Negative sentiment tended to be high for Ganjar Pranowo (51.42%) and Prabowo Subianto (25.99%), while Anies Baswedan and the presidential candidates had lower levels of negative sentiment (16.53% and 25.22%). Neutral sentiment was recorded for Prabowo Subianto (9.25%), Ganjar Pranowo (12.41%), the presidential candidates in general (40.87%), and Anies Baswedan (2.93%).
Judul Paper: Comparison of the Naive Bayes Classifier and Support Vector Machine Methods in Sentiment Analysis for the 2024 Presidential Election
Keyword: Naïve Bayes Classifier;Pemilihan Presiden;Support Vector Machine
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika: Jurnal Pengembangan IT

Abstrak: The necessity of usability testing on mobile applications built for landslide disaster management is discussed in this article. The design of user usability tests is critical to ensuring that the program is effective and efficient in catastrophic conditions, and the application's success greatly depends on its usability level. This research seeks to address user needs by designing a disaster mobile application. The goal is to address comfort issues when using disaster applications and provide the necessary solutions to improve their design and functionality by establishing user usability testing. In addition to identifying and solving usability problems that may occur when using disaster mobile applications, this research intends to establish a usability testing methodology related to landslide mitigation. The method of this study starts with research design, research procedures, data collecting, and analysis within several questions that relate to respondents who live in landslide-prone areas. The aspect of the usability test was assessed, such as connectivity, awareness, familiarity, easiness, usability, functionality, accessibility, error handling, and satisfaction. Using user usability test design in disaster mobile application development can boost the app's adoption and efficacy. Users who can easily access and use the application will have better access to emergency information and support. This study concludes that designing user usability tests is a viable method for improving the usability of disaster mobile applications. The findings revealed that user performance differed by group, with rescue workers being more efficient
Judul Paper: Usability Testing Design to Increase User Experience of a Mobile Landslide Application
Keyword: disaster mobile application,landslide susceptibility zones, usability tes
Jurnal: KREA-TIF : JURNAL TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: The sorting of melinjo fruit that has been done so far becomes a new problem after the melinjo fruit is successfully harvested. This is because determining the ripeness of melinjo fruit is only done by observing changes in the color of the melinjo fruit skin manually and using everyday community views. Meanwhile, people have different views in identifying the ripeness phase of melinjo fruit and the accuracy in producing fruit ripeness classification cannot be considered valid. This study can help the community in identifying the ripeness phase of melinjo fruit in the form of digital images using HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) color extraction with the KNN (k-Nearest Neighbor) algorithm. A total of 108 images were used as a dataset consisting of three classes: 36 raw images, 36 half-ripe images, and 36 ripe images. The results of this study using the KNN algorithm, obtained the best accuracy and classification report of 100% with k = 2 and an average accuracy of 97.56%.
Judul Paper: Maturity Classification of Melinjo (Gnetum Gnemon Linn.) Based on HSV Image with K-Nearest Neighbors
Keyword: Melinjo Fruit; HSV; Fruit Maturity; Classification; KNN
Jurnal: JISKa (Jurnal Informatika Sunan Kalijaga)

Abstrak: The Animal Rescue Center (PPS) is a government agency that serves as a wildlife conservation center. Animal data collection is inseparable from computerization, such as inventory data, animal receipts, animal releases, health monitoring, cage status, and reporting, which are still carried out by recording in an archive or using Microsoft Office software. This method only centralizes data in one place, making it difficult for interested parties to access it. This study designed and built an animal monitoring information system. The system development used the waterfall method, the system modeling tool used was UML with the programming languages ​​used were Java, XML, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. The animal data system process is integrated with the Animal Conservation Information System at the Web-Based Animal Rescue Center that can store animal inventory, mutation letters, health status, and reports into a centralized database, making it easier for interested parties to process and retrieve data. In addition, the correspondence process can be done by sending emails for faster and more cost-effective. This information system is the beginning of a system to achieve an integrated and reliable system at the PPS.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Animal Conservation Monitoring Information System at the Animal Rescue Center
Keyword: Conservation, Monitoring, PPS, Protected Animals
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The school administration payment system at MTs NU 17 Kyai Jogoreso, Kendal uses conventional methods by manually writing on books and student payment cards, causing problems with many processes that must be gone through which are not time efficient. A web-based and mobile information system is needed to cut processes, streamline time and make it easier for the administration to manage administration. The system was built using the PHP programming language, MySQL as a database, and the Bootstrap Framework as its interface design for the web-based system, and Java and Flutter for the mobile-based system. The research method uses Research and Development (R&D), while for the design, the Object Oriented Programming (OOP) method using the Unified Modeling Language (UML). Two types of testing were carried out: system validation tests and product trials. The validation test results obtained a score of 38 for the web-based system and a score of 32 for the mobile-based system, both of which are categorized as very valid. The product trial for both systems obtained a score of 31 with a very effective category. This system is also able to simplify each process and shorten service time from ten minutes to three minutes in the old system.
Judul Paper: Web and Mobile Based School Administration Payment Information System at MTS NU 17 Kyai Jogoreso
Keyword: Administration, Android, R&D, Web.
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Fuel is a fuel used by motor vehicles. Fuel consumption increases in line with economic growth in Indonesia. The increase in fuel prices in Indonesia has generated various opinions on Twitter through posts and threads. The focus of this research is to analyze sentiment towards the increase in fuel prices, with data obtained from 1,667 Twitter accounts. The purpose of this research is to compare the best-performing feature extraction methods, such as TF-IDF, Bag of Word, and FastText, tested with the SVM machine learning algorithm. The first stage of the research involves crawling Twitter data, data preprocessing, feature extraction, model creation with machine learning algorithms, and then testing and comparing confusion matrix models for each feature extraction. The results of this study indicate that the use of BoW feature extraction has better performance than other feature extraction models.
Judul Paper: Comparative Analysis of Text Feature Extraction on Sentiment Analysis of Fuel Price Increases
Keyword: Sentiment Analysis, SVM, TF-IDF, BoW, FastText
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: The implementation of information systems is one form of information technology utilization by an organization to support its business processes. Along with the use of information systems, the occurrence of risks that can negatively impact the business processes being carried out cannot be avoided. Risk assessment is necessary so that organizations can implement controls to minimize the negative impact of risks on information systems that can be detrimental to the organization based on impact areas such as reputation, finance, smooth productivity, safety and health, and fines and penalties. The risk assessment method used in this study is OCTAVE Allegro. Research data was collected using observation techniques and interviews with senior-level managers and heads of IT departments, then processed according to the rules contained in the OCTAVE Allegro framework. The final results obtained were the identification of five information assets, four containers, and 13 areas of concern where seven of them have a status that requires mitigation planning, while the other six can be deferred. To mitigate the damage that can be caused, a strategic control plan is provided based on the reference annex ISO/IEC 27001:2013. This control plan can be a reference for risk management and help related organizations in improving information security.
Judul Paper: Information System Risk Assessment Using the OCTAVE Allegro Method at Indonesia Publishing House
Keyword: Information Security, Risk Management, OCTAVE Allegro, Risk Assessment.
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Poverty in Indonesia occurs in various regions, from rural to urban areas, each having its own poverty issues. Poverty problems are also experienced by Bina Baru Village. Bina Baru Village has a population of 5,760 people with a total of 1,742 families, spread across 30 Neighborhood Associations (RT) and 8 Citizens' Associations (RW). Efforts to reduce poverty rates can be done in various ways, starting from equitable development, distribution of targeted assistance, providing appropriate policies, and so on. Poverty grouping is one effort to reduce poverty rates so that it can provide information to local governments in providing more appropriate policies. Clustering is a data mining technique that aims to group data objects into several Clusters. In this study, the grouping was carried out using data mining processing techniques with the K-Medoids algorithm from 2020 Bina Baru Village data totaling 1,005. The results of the calculation comparison for Cluster 1 (rich) with 527 residents, Cluster 2 (middle) with 248 residents, and Cluster 3 (poor) with 225 residents. The evaluation result of the k-Medoids algorithm is 0.991 which shows that the formed clusters provide good information grouping. The results of this grouping can be used as a reference for information on poor family groups that the government needs so that the assistance provided is right on target.
Judul Paper: Clustering of Poor Families in Bina Baru Village using the K-Medoids Method
Keyword: Clustering;  Data  Mining; K-Medoids;Kemiskinan; Knowledge  Discovery Database.
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Along with the increasingly high development of technology, the need for fast, precise, and accurate information in the business world is becoming very necessary, the need for fast, precise, and accurate information in the business world is becoming very necessary. direct sales to consumers and requires an online sales system to develop its business. The Japanese-style housing company SHOJI LAND has not been equipped with a system that can improve the company's effectiveness and efficiency. From the side of recording sales transaction data to purchasing transactions, company data processing is still done manually. Based on the analysis of SHOJI LAND's concerns, one solution is to develop an Android-based application to improve the performance of the SHOJI LAND company. Open Source IDE tools, namely Kodular, PHP as a programming language, and MySQL as a database management system are used to create applications. SHOJI LAND's flagship product is an Android-based land plot sales information system. This system can provide access to property sales information online. And the author uses the SDLC Waterfall method for developing this system, namely the process of creating and changing systems as well as models and methodologies used to develop software engineering systems.
Judul Paper: ANDROID BASED PLOT SALES INFORMATION SYSTEM IN SHOJI LAND USING THE WATERFALL METHOD
Keyword: Information System; PHP; MySQL; Kodular; Sales
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: The development of online news services has offered users numerous choices, resulting in information overload. This makes it challenging for users to locate desired news within a spesific timeframe. to adress this, recommender systems have developed to help users discover and select news article.
Judul Paper: NEWS RECOMMENDER SYSTEM USING HYBRID CONTENT-BASED FILTERING AND COLLABORATIVE FILTERING
Keyword: News; Recommender Systems; Hybrid Rec-ommender System; Content-Based Filtering; Collaborative Filtering;
Jurnal: JIPI (Jurnal Ilmiah Penelitian dan Pembelajaran Informatika)

Abstrak: The development of online news services has offered users numerous choices, resulting in information overload. This makes it challenging for users to locate desired news within a spesific timeframe. to adress this, recommender systems have developed to help users discover and select news article.
Judul Paper: NEWS RECOMMENDER SYSTEM USING HYBRID CONTENT-BASED FILTERING AND COLLABORATIVE FILTERING
Keyword: News; Recommender Systems; Hybrid Rec-ommender System; Content-Based Filtering; Collaborative Filtering;
Jurnal: JIPI (Jurnal Ilmiah Penelitian dan Pembelajaran Informatika)

Abstrak: Tenera Bakery is a bakery located in the Bekasi area, precisely in Cikarang, West Java, which produces and sells various kinds of bread and cakes, including whole wheat bread, plain milk bread, sweet bread, and various roll cakes with various flavors. Tenera Bakery only serves consumers who buy directly, namely by coming to the Tenera Bakery location. Therefore, consumers who do not visit this bakery do not get complete information about bread variants, prices, and available promotions. This sales technique is less effective where currently everything is online, therefore the purpose of this study is to create a website-based online bakery sales information system that can make it easier for consumers to buy and get information about Tenera bread. The research method used in this study is the waterfall model. The results of this study using the Laravel framework produce a structured project file and with the libraries available in the Laravel framework, researchers can be assisted in its development. In this website, there is a chat feature between the admin and consumers so that consumers can use it to ask about available bread stock. So with this website, it can help consumers as a means of purchasing bread online.
Judul Paper: WEB-BASED DESIGN OF A SALES INFORMATION SYSTEM FOR A BREAD SHOP IN CIKARANG CITY USING LARAVEL FRAMEWORK
Keyword: Framework Laravel; Roti; Website
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Mental health is a condition in which a person does not experience mental disorders and is able to carry out daily activities normally, especially in facing life's challenges. Good mental health is characterized by optimal physical, intellectual, and emotional development, as well as being able to interact well in social life. Usually those who experience poor mental health conditions are teenagers or now better known as Generation Z because at their age they are still unable to control themselves, and also lack knowledge about mental health. The purpose of this study is to build an expert system application for detecting mental health conditions to help Generation Z in understanding their mental health conditions. This expert system uses the Backward Chaining method which has rules for the relationship between symptoms and diseases that will later detect mental health. System testing using the black box testing method stated that the system successfully ran according to its function, and expert testing obtained an accuracy value of 91.67% and it can be concluded that the system is suitable for use.
Judul Paper: EXPERT SYSTEM FOR DETECTING MENTAL HEALTH CONDITIONS IN GENERATION Z USING BACKWARD CHAINING METHOD
Keyword: Backward Chaining, Generation Z, Mental Health, Expert Systems
Jurnal: JURNAL INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Learning about the hijaiyah letters is one of the mandatory materials in Islam taught at the elementary education level, especially kindergarten. Sultan Agung UII Kindergarten located in Sleman Regency is one of the elementary education institutions that still teaches learning about the hijaiyah letters using conventional dictation teaching to students and this is less efficient in making students enthusiastic in learning the hijaiyah letters. Based on this, this research was conducted to create a hijaiyah letter learning application targeting early childhood users aged 4-6 years who are students of Sultan Agung UII Kindergarten to get a good user experience in learning. The method used in this research is the design thinking approach through five stages, namely empathize, define, ideate, prototype, to testing. The results of this research are after testing using the Cognitive Walkthrough method to users, a success rate of 88% was obtained.
Judul Paper: USER EXPERIENCE DESIGN OF HIJAIYAH LETTERS LEARNING APPLICATIONS FOR EARLY AGE CHILDREN (CASE STUDY: TK SULTAN AGUNG UII)
Keyword: User Experience; Design Thinking; Early childhood; Learning Hijaiyah Letters
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: For the development of a Creative Garage company, an agent is needed as an intermediary to expand sales reach and increase promotional areas. In selecting an agent location, the company will assess it by looking at several criteria. This is because the previous placement was less than optimal from what was intended. To overcome this, a support system is needed to determine the location. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to design and build a decision support system to determine the location of the agent using the Fuzzy SAW method. Fuzzy SAW (Simple Additive Weighting) is a combination of 2 methods, namely the Fuzzy and SAW methods in building a Decision Support System (DSS), where this system will facilitate the comparison of the values ​​of the locations to be calculated for their weight values. In testing the program, it was done by comparing the results of the test inputting the weight values ​​of the prioritized criteria 5 times with different weight values. Based on the results of the tests that have been carried out on the system as many as 5 times the weight input test, it was concluded that the decision to determine the location of the agent was in accordance with the amount of the weight value inputted on each criterion. For example, if the weight value entered for the rental cost criterion is greater than the weight value for the other criteria, then the ranking of agent locations displayed in the system will be in order, with the highest agent location being the location with the lowest rental cost. Therefore, a decision support system using the Fuzzy Simple Additive Weighting (FSAW) method can be used by the Creative Garage company to determine agent locations precisely and accurately.
Judul Paper: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR CREATIVE GARAGE AGENT LOCATION SELECTION FUZZY SAW METHOD
Keyword: SPK application; Fuzzy SAW;Creative Garage
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Handicrafts are artistic activities that process certain materials into products that are not only useful, but also contain aesthetic value. Handicrafts usually prioritize hand skills as a medium in making craft objects so that they have high selling value. Handicrafts can be done by utilizing excess items that can possibly be processed into multi-functional and useful items. People who live in one of the tourist destinations of Kampung Aer located on Kemaro Island, South Sumatra, took the initiative to recycle paper waste into various functional products that can spoil everyone's eyes, and this can also be a solution to reduce paper waste in the city of Palembang. However, places that are difficult to reach for buyers, make newspaper craft sellers just wait for visitors to come to visit, The problem faced is the lack of business development strategies. WKA stores still rely on traditional sales. The product marketing system is still manual, still relying on communication media, direct interaction with consumers and still centered on certain locations such as coming directly to the store or when there is an exhibition. Another problem is that prospective buyers often have difficulty accessing information about products and information about product prices. Therefore, the author took the initiative to create a website for the Kampung Aer (WKA) tourist shop, which would make it easier for customers to purchase newspaper crafts without having to come to the shop. This information system was built using the PHP programming language with the MySQL programming language and the Laravel framework, using the SDLC (Systems Development Life Cycle) method, which is a method that refers to the models and processes used to develop software systems and describe the process.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Newspaper Craft Sales Information System (Case Study of Kampung Aer Tourism Shop)
Keyword: Laravel, PHP, Information sys-tems, SDLC (Systems development life cycle)
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This research is a development research conducted at the Al Irsyad Tengaran 7 Batu Islamic Boarding School which aims to: guarantee high internet access services to Clients, and the development of network system infrastructure. One important parameter for building a good internet infrastructure is the availability of large bandwidth. The availability of bandwidth capacity does not only rely on one backbone line. For this reason, a minimum of two lines are needed so that bandwidth capacity can be maximized which can lighten the traffic load and speed up response time. One solution is to use a Load Balancing system. This development research uses MikroTik, MikroTik itself can be found various load balancing methods that we can choose, including the NTH method and the PCC (Per Connection Classifier) ​​method. Both methods above have the same characteristics, where both support the distribution of data traffic on each connection and each data packet. Between the two load balancing methods certainly have their respective disadvantages and advantages. This study aims to determine which method has better performance. There are four test parameters carried out in testing each method including throughput, delay, jitter and packet loss. The objects in this load balancing are Download, Upload, and Browsing site, In testing the Download and Upload Delay parameters of the NTH and PCC methods. In testing the Download Throughput parameters of the NTH and PCC methods. at a data size of 18 MB the NTH method is 4.6% larger, at a data size of 12 MB the NTH method is 25.9% larger, at a data size of 6 MB the PCC method is 21.1% larger
Judul Paper: COMPARATION OF LOAD BALANCING PCC AND NTH METHODS ON MICROTIK IMPLENTATION IN AL IRSYAD TENGARAN 7 BATU
Keyword: Load Balancing; NTH; PCC; Bandwidth; Download; Upload; Browsing
Jurnal: JISKa (Jurnal Informatika Sunan Kalijaga)

Abstrak: Currently, stray animals such as cats and dogs have become a common sight in our environment. One of the causes of the large number of stray cats and dogs is the animal's health or disease, which causes the owner to abandon the animal. The most frequently found stray animals are cats, cats are one of the animals that can be tamed. Therefore, it is unfair for them to be released outside the house, because cats also need to be protected from danger. However, currently people who want to adopt cats (adopters) lack education on proper cat care, resulting in cats being abandoned and sometimes adopters do not know when the cat is due for vaccination. As a beginner who wants to adopt a cat from a trusted place, the problem faced is that usually the adoption fee results in adopters failing to adopt cats and have a means to discuss caring for cats. Based on these problems, the author proposes a solution: a website-based platform HelpMeong to bridge the gap between adopters and shelters. The method used in designing the HelpMeong interface is Goal-Directed Design, and will be evaluated using the usability tools Maze and SUS. The result of this research is a HelpMeong application design solution with a MAUS result of 88.2 and a SUS result of 76.7 which is included in the ACCEPTABLE value range with an adjective rating of GOOD. So it can be concluded that the HelpMeong website application for Adopters can be understood the flow of the application and in terms of design it has been accepted by users and has met user needs.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING THE USER INTERFACE IN THE HELPMEONG APPLICATION FOR ADOPTERS USING THE GOAL-DIRECTED DESIGN METHOD
Keyword: adopsi; adopter; desain antarmuka; goal-directed design; system usability scale
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Performance efficiency is important in mobile application development because mobile devices have limitations in terms of power and resources. Performance efficiency can be improved by applying architecture patterns. In this paper, we use the Model View ViewModel (MVVM) architecture. The application of the architecture is carried out to analyze how practical the application of the MVVM architecture pattern is in increasing performance efficiency in the mobile application. Performance efficiency is measured based on CPU usage, memory usage, and execution Time. The case study shows that the CPU usage and execution Time on MVVM are smaller than Base architecture pattern from the AR Ruler. This is due to the third-party library RxSwift in the MVVM architecture that increases the application's response so that CPU usage and execution time is better than Base architecture pattern. However, the existence of the third-party library RxSwift has a negative impact on memory usage, resulting in higher memory usage than the Base Architecture Pattern. The MVVM pattern is highly recommended for mobile application development to improve performance efficiency.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF THE IMPLEMENTATION OF MVVM ARCHITECTURE PATTERN ON PERFORMANCE OF IOS MOBILE-BASED APPLICATIONS
Keyword: Architecture Pattern; Mobile Application; MVVM; Performance efficiency; RxSwift
Jurnal: JIPI (Jurnal Ilmiah Penelitian dan Pembelajaran Informatika)

Abstrak: Rapid technological developments have had a significant impact on various sectors, including companies. Google Sheets, as a modern tool, is widely used in budget management due to its ease of organization, analysis, and financial monitoring. However, this technology has limitations in terms of data security and the potential for miscalculations. PT XYZ faces challenges in budget management, which currently uses Google Sheets. The main problems are data vulnerability and miscalculations that can affect financial decision-making. This study aims to develop a website-based budget realization planning system using the Agile Scrum method, known for its flexibility in dealing with change. The development process involves requirements analysis, feature planning, sprint planning, sprint execution, sprint review, and system testing. The results show that Agile Scrum significantly improves responsiveness, effectiveness, and collaboration in the budget system. This approach offers a better solution in terms of quality and security compared to Google Sheets.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF A WEB-BASED BUDGET REALIZATION PLANNING SYSTEM USING AGILE SCRUM METHOD
Keyword: Budget Management, Web Based Systems, Agile Scrum, Data Security
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Social assistance is a program implemented by providing (goods/services/money) to a specific group of people free of charge and temporarily with the aim of improving the welfare of a community group. One example of a social assistance program at the Nurul Jadid Islamic Boarding School is the Pre-Prosperous Students Assistance Program managed by the Social Assistance Foundation (YBS). In the aid distribution process, the Social Assistance Foundation (YBS) encountered obstacles in determining the target recipients of assistance. To overcome this problem, researchers utilized data from female students at the Junior High School (SLTP) and Senior High School (SLTA) levels of the 2022 intake at the Nurul Jadid Islamic Boarding School with a dataset of 843 records obtained from the pedatren admin (Islamic Boarding School Data Manager). The algorithm used in this study is the Fuzzy C-Means Clustering method implemented in the streamlit web. The Fuzzy C-Means method is a method that utilizes the degree of membership function to measure how close data points are to a predetermined cluster. The advantage of the Fuzzy C-Means method is that it is an efficient and effective method for performing large data clustering processes. The results of this study formed two clusters, where the first cluster consisted of 595 (Prosperous Families) and the second cluster consisted of 186 (Pre-Prosperous Families). Testing of the clustering results was carried out using the Silhouette Coefficient technique which produced a value of 0.5552751407539394 which indicates that the results of the clustering process that had been carried out were good.
Judul Paper: CLUSTERING RECIPIENTS OF PRE-PROSPEROUS STUDENT STUDENT AID USING THE FUZZY C-MEANS METHOD BASED ON STREAMLIT WEB AT NURUL JADID Islamic Boarding School
Keyword: Clustering, Bantuan Santri, Metode Fuzzy C-Means, Web Streamlit.
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: In the ever-advancing digital era, education is undergoing major changes by integrating information technology into the learning process. One form of this integration is the use of web-based E-portfolios, which allow students to store their work digitally. This study aims to design and build a website-based student E-portfolio application that can help vocational high school students in creating and presenting their portfolios digitally. This research method uses the Waterfall method, this is because it is one of the oldest and most structured system development methods. Meanwhile, the system testing uses the Black Box Testing method chosen to test the system thoroughly without the need to pay attention to the details of the internal code. From the test results, although there were several failures, especially in the PDF printing feature and verification of student work, this application demonstrated reliability with an average success percentage of 95.56%. This research contribution has a significant impact in increasing student learning motivation, facilitating evaluation by teachers, and becoming a basis for further development in the future.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF WEB-BASED STUDENT E-PORTFOLIO DESIGN AND TESTING USING WATERFALL AND BLACK BOX TESTING METHODS
Keyword: E-portofolio, Waterfall, Blackbox Testing
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The Digital Report Application is a web-based application system that is expected to change the teacher's work model from manual to digital. Teachers can make assessments for students and even print report cards and assess student learning outcomes. The objectives of this study are: 1) To find out whether there is a relationship between the use of digital report applications and teacher effectiveness at SMK 4 N Probolinggo, 2) to find out how big the relationship is between requests for Digital Activity certificates for SMK 4 N Probolinggo Teachers. This study is a quantitative and qualitative correlation method applied to assessments at SMK 4 N Probolinggo. The data collection techniques used are primary data, observation and documentation. In this study, we try to create a Digital Report Application that is based on the latest curriculum, namely the Independent Curriculum. The features available in this application include master data input starting from students, classes, teachers, semesters, settings and others. The access rights in this bosrapot application are as follows: (1). The Curriculum Level is the highest level in this application, where if you log in using this level you can access all the features in this application, starting from settings, inputting grades for all classes, printing quantitative report cards, printing qualitative report cards and other features, (2). The Homeroom Teacher Level is the second level after the Curriculum Level, where the homeroom teacher is given the right to see the grades that have been given by the teacher to his students starting from quantitative grades and also qualitative grades, at the homeroom teacher level you can print quantitative report cards and qualitative report cards. (3) In this application, the last level in this application is the teacher level, where at this level, teachers are required to fill in descriptions for each subject they teach, and also give grades to students, starting from quantitative grades and also qualitative grades up to mid-term and final exam grades.
Judul Paper: DIGITAL REPORT APPLICATION WITH CODEIGNITER 4 FRAMEWORK BASED ON THE INDEPENDENT CURRICULUM AT SMK N 4 PROBOLINGGO
Keyword: CodeIgniter4, Digital Report Cards, and Independent Curriculum.
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: In today's digital world, recommendation systems have a very important role to help users find hotels that match their preferences. This research focuses on developing a hotel recommendation system by combining matrix factorization method with Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) algorithm. The matrix factorization method is used to model the hotel ranking data as the product of the user matrix and the hotel matrix. While for the Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) algorithm plays a role in optimizing model parameters efficiently, where the method will be tested on hotel rating datasets or ratings. Evaluation of model performance in this study, using metrics such as Root Mean Squared (RMSE), Mean Squared Error (MSE), and Mean Absolute Error (MAE). This study shows fairly accurate results, with an RMSE value of 0.370312, an MSE value of 0.137131, and an MAE value of 0.089932. These results show that combining the matrix factorization method with Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) can be an effective solution for building a hotel recommendation system according to user preferences
Judul Paper: MATRIX FACTORIZATION USING STOCHASTIC GRADIENT DESCENT FOR OPTIMIZATION OF HOTEL RECOMMENDATION SYSTEM
Keyword: Matrix Factorization, Stochastic Gradient Descent, Recommendation System.
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: Educational institutions, including the Miftahul Iman Islamic Boarding School in Karawang, require the use of technology to support institutional progress. The rapid development of information technology is encouraging various agencies to shift to digitalization. One important aspect of managing Islamic boarding schools is the process of admitting new students. Currently, this process is still carried out manually, with registration information and student data recorded in books. This method requires a long time to access information when needed and is inefficient. This research aims to provide a solution by developing a digital-based information system that simplifies the process of registering new students and managing data effectively and efficiently. This system is designed using the PHP and JavaScript programming languages ​​with the Bootstrap and CodeIgniter frameworks, and MySQL as the database. The system development methodology uses a waterfall approach, which includes the stages of analysis, design, coding, testing, and maintenance. The research results are expected to facilitate prospective students' online registration and assist the administrators of the Miftahul Iman Sukatani Islamic Boarding School in managing student data more quickly and systematically.
Judul Paper: New Student Registration Information System at Miftahul Iman Islamic Boarding School with Bootstrap and CodeIgniter Framework
Keyword: Digitalization, Bootstrap and CodeIgniter Framework, Registration of New Students, Information Systems.
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Breast cancer remains one of the leading causes of cancer death in women worldwide. Early detection through routine screening using mammograms has been proven effective in reducing mortality. However, manual interpretation of mammograms is time-consuming, subjective, and often requires experienced radiologists. To address these challenges, this study proposes an Ensemble U-Net architecture to automatically segment breast cancer in mammogram images. The segmentation process involves several steps, including preprocessing (background removal, pectoral muscle removal, contrast enhancement, and resizing), followed by segmentation using an ensemble of models: Inception V3-U-Net, ResNet50-U-Net, VGG19-U-Net, and a custom U-Net. The final segmentation is achieved using soft voting and a 2D Gaussian filter for noise reduction, followed by thresholding for binary segmentation. The ensemble approach demonstrates improved segmentation accuracy by combining the strengths of multiple U-Net models. Model performance is evaluated using metrics such as accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, Dice coefficient, and Intersection over Union (IoU). Experimental results show that Ensemble U-Net has better performance compared to individual models, especially on complex mammogram images.
Judul Paper: U-NET ENSEMBLE ARCHITECTURE FOR AUTOMATIC BREAST CANCER SEGMENTATION ON MAMMOGRAM IMAGES
Keyword: Ensemble, Unet, Segmentation, Cancer, Breast.
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: The development of simulation games to facilitate the learning of chemical reactions has become an increasingly interesting topic in the world of education. This paper discusses the application of Virtual Reality (VR) technology in the development of a simulation game to introduce chemical concepts to high school students. The method used is the Scrum approach in software development, enabling iterative and efficient application development. This application aims to overcome obstacles in learning chemical reactions in schools, such as the unavailability of practical materials, budget constraints, and the risk of accidents, by providing an immersive and safe interactive experience for students. By using the Unity Game Engine and Oculus VR Quest 2, a realistic and engaging simulation environment for users was successfully created. The results of testing involving media experts and users showed a high level of satisfaction with this application. Most users stated that this application helped them understand chemical concepts better and increased their interest in learning chemical elements. The findings showed that 95.45% of all respondents felt that this simulation game application helped them in understanding the concept of chemical experiments better. Thus, it can be concluded that the development of this VR-based chemical simulation game application has succeeded in making a positive contribution to chemistry learning in schools and expanding the potential use of VR technology in education.
Judul Paper: SIMULATION EDUCATIONAL GAME INTRODUCING REACTIONS OF CHEMICAL ELEMENTS WITH A VIRTUAL REALITY BASED ENVIRONMENT
Keyword: Game; Scrum; Siswa; Unity Game Engine; Virtual Reality
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Learning schedule at MAN 1 Probolinggo has been carried out by utilizing a number processing application. However, the preparation is still done manually. This is due to the large number of teachers, study groups, subjects, and time allocation. Thus, there are still overlapping schedules. In this study, we propose graph coloring to arrange schedules at MAN 1 Probolinggo. Each vertex on the graph represents a subject in a class of X grade. Vertices which represent the subjects are connected by an edge if it taught by the same teacher or taken by the same class. Based on the data, there are 290 vertices in the graph. We used Welsh Powell Algorithm for coloring the graph and implemented by using Python. The results of this research showed that 30 different colors are needed to color the graph. This implies that the minimum period for scheduling all the subjects in each class in one week is 30 periods with one period equal to 2 lesson hours. From the graph coloring results, we obtained a class X schedule without overlap and easily rearranged according to the color groups.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF GRAPH COLORING IN LEARNING SCHEDULE ARRANGEMENT AT MAN 1 PROBOLINGGO
Keyword: learning schedule arrangement; graph coloring; Welsh Powell Algorithm; Python
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: The Quran is the holy book of Muslims, with approximately one-eighth of its verses addressing the fundamentals of science. Although Quranic verses have been classified according to their themes, it can be time-consuming to search for verses relevant to a specific scientific topic. To facilitate this search, a Question Answering System (QAS) can be used to obtain relevant answers to questions. The method used in QAS consists of three stages: question analysis, passage retrieval, and answer extraction. The question analysis stage is used to analyze questions. The passage retrieval stage is used to retrieve translated verse documents using TF-IDF and cosine similarity. Meanwhile, the answer extraction stage is used to extract answers using word-match and rule-based methods. The data used for the trial was 387 verses divided into 10 sub-themes. Based on the evaluation results, the system showed good performance. This can be seen from the results of the system evaluation using 20 questions, which obtained precision, recall and f-measures of 0.75, 0.72 and 0.74, respectively.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE RULE BASED METHOD IN THE SCIENCE THEMED QUESTION ANSWERING SYSTEM FOR TRANSLATING THE AL-QURAN
Keyword: al-Qur’an, information retrieval, question answering system, rule-based
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The increase in employment in the construction sector in Indonesia also means an increase in the potential for workplace accidents. The use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE), such as safety vests, is an important step in minimizing the risk of accidents. Safety vests not only increase worker visibility but can also have a positive impact on work productivity. This research aims to reduce the risk of workplace accidents, improve resource efficiency, and improve worker welfare through technological innovation. The use of a neurofuzzy technology-based safety vest supported by the Internet of Things (IoT) and Global Positioning System (GPS) is expected to help monitor health conditions and track workers' positions in real time. The research method used is a combination of descriptive and experimental methods by conducting experiments on a prototype scale. Testing was carried out on three volunteers with a usage time of four hours for each person. From the test results that have been carried out, sensor readings can be observed on the website in real time with a data transmission speed of 3 seconds / data or data will be updated every 3 seconds. The results obtained showed that the system can work well with a success accuracy of up to 95% and will be refined.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION WORKER HEALTH MONITORING AND TRACKING SYSTEM THROUGH IOT-BASED SAFETY VEST
Keyword: IoT, Construction, Neuro Fuzzy, Safety Vest.
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika: Jurnal Pengembangan IT

Abstrak: The rapid development of information technology has led to an increasing number of websites and blog platforms, particularly the rumahginjal.id website. The Rumah Ginjal website provides information in the form of books, scientific articles, and short articles about kidneys, which can be accessed online through the rumahginjal.id blog. Website optimization strategies are currently being intensively implemented by website managers to achieve the highest possible ranking in search engines, one of which is Search Engine Optimization (SEO). The rumahginjal.id website was chosen as a case study for this research because the level of website traffic has been declining since 2020-2021, necessitating website optimization methods, namely SEO. On-Page SEO is able to optimize website content well using the theory of SEO-Friendly Content. In optimizing content, Google Trends and Google Keyword Planner tools are used for keyword research, then to measure traffic using Google Analytics and Google Search Console. The results of implementing On Page SEO on the rumahginjal.id blog website are considered capable of increasing organic site traffic by 635% page views, 379% unique page views, 600% clicks, 315% impressions, and 102% organic search measured over 4 months.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF THE APPLICATION OF ON-PAGE SEARCH ENGINE OPTIMIZATION (SEO) METHODS IN OPTIMIZING BLOG WEBSITE CONTENT (CASE STUDY: RUMAHGINJAL.ID)
Keyword: Digitalization, Bootstrap and CodeIgniter Framework, Registration of New Students, Information Systems
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: Many changes have occurred due to the digitalization of education in Indonesia today, especially in terms of teaching and learning. Many colleges and universities have incorporated digital technology into the educational process, one of which is learning videos. Learning videos can be in the form of class recordings that are uploaded to the internet or tutorial videos made specifically for certain subjects. Learning videos can help students understand material more easily and can be accessed by students anytime and anywhere, thus facilitating the teaching and learning process. User Experience (UX) deals with the emotions, feelings, and thoughts that users experience when using a product or service. UX can be applied to learning videos by focusing on several factors, such as delivering material that is clear and easy to understand. So in this study, a UX assessment was carried out on learning videos. Learning videos using cash and bank material in introductory accounting courses at the diploma level with the concept of motion graphics Motion graphics were chosen because of their flexibility in conveying this information and attracting students' interest. This study consisted of seven processes, including: 1) determining goals and objectives; 2) making scenarios and scripts; 3) equipment preparation; 4) recording; 5) editing; 6) publication; and 7) assessment. In the assessment process, the respondent fills out a questionnaire. The questionnaire consists of 10 questions with aspects of use (usefulness, satisfaction, and ease of use). The value of each question in the questionnaire ranges from 1 to 4, with the following conditions: 1) bad; 2) enough; 3) good; and 4) very good. Every day for seven days, ten different people responded. As a result of filling out the questionnaire, a fluctuating curve was obtained.
Judul Paper: DETECTION OF KAGGLE BOT ACCOUNT USING DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS
Keyword: user experience; learning video; diploma education
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: Over the past few years, people have been able to get and share information through social media easily. Some of that information can be a false issue created by a buzzer account that intends to influence people into a specific opinion. Politicians often use social media to maintain a good image in society by utilizing buzzer accounts. The main characteristic of a buzzer account is that they upload the same content repeatedly within a certain period. Before analyzing data taken from social media such as Twitter, we need a buzzer detection system to filter data from buzzer users.  This research attempts to build a buzzer detection system using text processing and classification method. We use the similarity of tweets as a feature for the buzzer detection system by applying Cosine Similarity to the Term Frequency - Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) feature of the tweets. In addition, we will use other features such as the number of followers, number of followings, the intensity of tweets, the ratio of retweets, and the ratio of tweets that contain links as additional features in this study. This research uses these features as inputs to the Support Vector Machine model to determine whether an account is a buzzer or not. This system has promising results by having 89% accuracy, 86.67% precision, 70.91 % recall, and 78% F1-score.
Judul Paper: TWITTER BUZZER DETECTION SYSTEM USING TWEET SIMILARITY FEATURE AND SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE
Keyword: social media; buzzer detection; text processing; support vector machine
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: The problem of poverty is a social problem that has a sizeable impact in various countries, not only in a large scope, but even on a small scale, poverty is a problem that needs special attention, one example is within the scope of Islamic boarding schools. In this study, the dataset was obtained from Pedatren, namely data from SLTP and SLTA Nurul Jadid Islamic Boarding School students in 2021. The algorithm used in this research is the K-Means Clustering method. The K-Means Clustering method is an Unsupervised technique, as well as a method of grouping data into several groups, according to each other's characteristics. The advantages of the K-Means algorithm are relatively simple and easy to implement, scalable for large datasets, easily adaptable to new examples, commonly implemented to clusters of different shapes and sizes. The amount of data used is 749 junior and senior high school students data, divided into 4 clusters namely (C1) Pre-Prosperous Families (C2) Prosperous Families 1 Prosperous Families 2 (C3) and Prosperous Plus Families (C4). As for the phase that done in this research such as identifying a problem, a literature review, data collection, prepocessing, the implementation of k-means algorithm clustering and the last evalusi the results of. From the results of the grouping of clusters of data or C1 = 163, C2 = 215, C3 = 246 and C4 = 125.The end of use evalusi matrix davies bouldin mem-peroleh akurai 0,90 value index.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE K-MEANS ALGORITHM FOR CLUSTERING PRE-PROSPEROUS STUDENTS AT THE AZ-ZAINIYYAH PONDOK Pesantren NURUL JADID SOCIAL AID FOUNDATION (YBS)
Keyword: Davies Bouldin Index, K-Means Clustering, Pre-Prosperous, Santri
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: The advancement of the Industrial Revolution 4.0 era presents a significant challenge for freshwater fish farmers in Indonesia. With the rapid development of information technology, future fish farmers must be better prepared to face current competition. Freshwater fish farming is the business of raising and breeding fish for their benefits and harvests, located in rivers, rice fields, ponds, lakes, and swamps. One type of freshwater fish is catfish, which is a very potential commodity and is the most widely cultivated compared to other fish species. In Probolinggo Regency, currently, marketing of catfish is only through relatives, colleagues, friends, or collectors. The purpose of this research is to provide convenience for fish farmers, buyers, and the fisheries office by creating a fish marketplace application in Probolinggo Regency that can inform buyers of harvest results, buyers can find out, and the Probolinggo Regency fisheries office can monitor easily. The method used is the agile method because this model system is very suitable for working with a team. The development of this fish marketplace application is website-based using React JS as the frontend and backend. The results of the trial of this website were 94%, which means that this website has met the requirements to make it easier for farmers, buyers, and the Probolinggo Regency Fisheries Service.
Judul Paper: FISH MARKETPLACE APPLICATION DEVELOPMENT IN PROBOLINGGO DISTRICT BASED ON FRONTEND BACKEND USING REACT JS
Keyword: Ikan,Marketplace,Reach Js, Website
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Indonesia is an archipelagic country with a vast water area, particularly a sea area, that is larger than its land area. One of Indonesia's potential marine resources is the fisheries sector. Information on fish distribution data is very useful for fishermen in locating fish distribution locations. The Marine Research and Observation Center (BROL) of the Ministry of Maritime Affairs and Fisheries creates fish distribution maps that provide information in the form of maps and coordinates. Similarly, the dangers in Indonesian waters are uncertain. The Meteorology, Climatology, and Geophysics Agency (BMKG) provides information on dangerous conditions in Indonesia, including weather and wave heights. However, fishermen are rarely able to utilize this information. In this study, a fish distribution area navigation device was created for traditional fishermen in Java, Bali, and Nusa Tenggara, along with information media in the form of fish distribution area maps and dangerous conditions that can be accessed through http://188.166.242.227:8888/. The data on the fish distribution area map becomes input to the navigation device in the form of latitude and longitude data sent through a gateway to the navigation device using LoRa communication. Once the data is received, it is processed by a microcontroller and the sensor used is a GPS sensor. The research results show that the device can calculate the distance from the destination location to the starting location with a success rate of 99.8317% and measure the target angle of the destination location with a success rate of 99.9798%. The communication distance between the fish distribution area navigation device and the gateway using LoRa is approximately 1.9 km.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF AUTOPILOT VESSELS FOR TRADITIONAL FISHERMEN BASED ON LORA NETWORKS AND FISH DISTRIBUTION MAP
Keyword: GPS, LoRa, Map of Fish Distribution Areas, Navigation Devices
Jurnal: JOIN (Jurnal Online Informatika)

Abstrak: Data collection in research is challenging, especially on Kaggle, a popular platform for data scientists. However, in recent years, there have been many reports of fake accounts on Kaggle that are difficult to detect, threatening data integrity and research credibility. One of the key traits to identify fake accounts is by looking at incomplete or inconsistent profiles. This research aims to help datascience users to detect Kaggle bot accounts by building a model using Deep Neural Networks. DNN is a machine learning algorithm that mimics the nervous system in the human brain. DNN consists of input layers, hidden layers, and output layers. DNN has the advantage of learning patterns from complex data and providing more accurate results than traditional Machine Learning algorithms. This research uses a dataset consisting of 1,048,574 rows of row data and 17 variables obtained from kaggle.com. The data is then pre-processed to prepare the dataset and build a DNN model with 5 hidden layers. This DNN model will be trained using training data and tested using testing data. The results show high accuracy, with 99.90% accuracy on training data, 98.42% validation accuracy, and 99.86% accuracy on testing data. These results prove that DNN can work effectively to detect fake Kaggle accounts. With this fake account detection, the quality of research can be further improve
Judul Paper: DETECTION OF KAGGLE BOT ACCOUNT USING DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS
Keyword: Detection, Kaggle, Bot Account, Machine Learning, Deep Neural Networks
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: Sumenep is one of the salt-producing regencies in Madura with 27 sub-districts where 11 sub-districts are salt producers which have a total area of 2,077.12 ha of ponds. Generally, people only cultivate salt in certain months because this salt production can only be done and depends on several factors, such as weather and land area. From the existing problems, this research was conducted using a Deep Learning approach, namely Artificial Neural Network (ANN) and Simple Recurrent Neural Network (SimpleRNN) to predict the amount of salt production. Weather data as input and salt production data as output taken from the last 6 years (2017-2022). The accuracy value in model training was used as a comparison to make predictions. the process of dividing training and testing data was also carried out with a ratio of 80%:20%. Furthermore, both methods was given 6 trainings each, so that the training of the two methods produces a different accuracy value. The ANN model produces an accuracy value of 53% and 71% for Simple RNN. Based on the resulting accuracy value, this base cased study is suitable for using the SimpleRNN algorithm model compared to ANN, provided that the amount of data used is large-scale
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF ARTIFICIAL NEURAL NETWORK AND RECURRENT NEURAL NETWORK METHODS TO PREDICT THE AMOUNT OF SALT PRODUCTION
Keyword: Artificial Neural Network, Simple Recurrent Neural Network, Prediction, Salt Productio
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Keyword: user experience; learning video; diploma education

Abstrak: Rice is a type of plant that is very essential for humans. Rice is used as a staple food by a large portion of people, especially in Asia. Therefore, proper care and management of rice plants are crucial to maximize crop yields and meet the food needs in Indonesia, particularly for the staple diet. One of the common factors that hinder rice production is diseases that affect rice plants. If left untreated, it can have a detrimental impact on the much-needed rice production in Indonesia. Some common rice diseases include Bacterial Leaf Blight, Brown Spot, and Leaf Smut. Hence, early detection is required as a preventive measure against these diseases. One way to address this issue is by applying artificial intelligence, where AI can play a significant role in disease identification in rice plants. This allows farmers to take clear actions in disease management. Identification is performed using leaf images and an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) algorithm with an accuracy of 83%.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Artificial Neural Networks for Classification of Rice Plant Diseases Using Leaf Images
Keyword: Hyperparameter Analysis in Meat Type Classification Using the Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Advances in information technology are increasing over time, the use of the internet has become a daily thing that is often done. All kinds of activities that take place every day some use an internet connection for the process. PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia currently needs protection for the company's website to improve performance and avoid hacker attacks. Website security protection using Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF) at PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia is used to improve website performance which is not currently implemented. Currently, the performance of the company's website still gets insufficient marks in the criteria for a good website in testing using Pingdom Tools and GTMetrix and is not yet protected for security. The stages carried out start from making observations, preparing tools and materials, determining testing tools, installing and configuring the Cloud Web Application Firewall WAF and carrying out testing and data analysis. The results of the analysis that has been carried out show that the use of Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF) for the performance of the neptus.co.id website is very beneficial because implementing cloud WAF can change the performance load and prevent attacks from hackers
Judul Paper: Analysis of Web Performance Load Test on the PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia Jakarta Website After Using Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF)
Keyword: Analisis Performa Load, Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF), situs web, Pingdom Tools, GTMetrix
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: In the context of food and economy, meat plays a vital role in fulfilling the nutritional needs of society and serves as a strategic economic commodity. However, the difficulty in distinguishing between beef and pork often leads to fraud by meat traders. Particularly in Indonesia, where the consumption of beef and pork is high, this confusion raises significant concerns, especially since pork is prohibited in the Islamic religion. This research aims to address this issue by applying Artificial Intelligence technology, specifically the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) deep learning method in classifying images of beef, pork, and mixed meat. The study utilizes a dataset of 410 samples, with 70% used for training and 30% for testing. Testing is conducted using a basic CNN model with hyperparameter analysis such as image size, number of epochs, and batch size. Additionally, the dataset is tested using a comparative architecture, namely the ResNet-50 architecture. The best accuracy rate of the CNN model is 82.20%, achieved with an image size of 75 x 75 pixels, 100 epochs, and a batch size of 64. Testing with the ResNet-50 architecture yields the highest accuracy of 76.14%. Evaluation is performed using a confusion matrix with four categories: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1 Score.
Judul Paper: Hyperparameter Analysis in Meat Type Classification Using the Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm
Keyword: Image Classification, Convolutional Naural Network, Hyperparameters, Meat Type Classification
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Electronic Procurement Services (LPSE) is a work unit formed specifically to serve the Goods/Services Procurement Work Unit (UKPBJ), responsible for carrying out the procurement process electronically. currently, the method of selecting providers has become e-regular tendering which is all done online, the evolution of electronic tendering systems has grown rapidly along with advances in information technology. This research uses the data of tender winners that have been done Data Mining before from LPSE Semarang Regency, from 2011 to 2022 with the population of completed tenders, which aims to group the data of tender winners to find out what procurements have been completed and the role of local entrepreneurs / companies. total of 2127, using only 238 random data samples referring to the method of Isaac and Michael. using the method of Machine Learning, namely the Unsupervised Learning method processed with the K-Means Clustering Algorithm, the results obtained are the Construction of Public Facilities in the form of types of Construction Work, such as roads, tourist attractions, facilities for villages and others both made new, upgrades and others. then comes from the Semarang Regency area by showing 8 out of 13 or two-thirds with a percentage of 62%. This information is useful as an overview, education, information, knowledge for all of us in the Semarang Regency area and all the people of Indonesia as well as helping the economic development of the region and all other regional areas to the National.
Judul Paper: Grouping of Tender Winners using the K-Means Clustering Method (Case of Electronic Procurement Services, Semarang Regency Goods/Services Procurement Section)
Keyword: Analysis Clustering, Datang Mining, Electronics, Information Technology, Unsupervised Machine Learning.
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: This research discusses Digital Era 5.0 learning solutions, namely the benefits that can be provided by the presence of artificial intelligence in the development of science and technology. Artificial intelligence (AI) is a computer program designed and built to mimic human intelligence, including decision-making ability, logic, and other characteristics of intelligence. Artificial intelligence as a learning solution for the digital era 5.0 is here to improve teaching and learning and innovation in learning implementation. The results of this research show that AI support is needed in the world of education and learning, including for personalized learning, this system can analyze the strengths and weaknesses of students to provide material that suits their level of understanding. AI can also be utilized as real time feedback in learning, also utilized for interactive teaching, data management and administration in education and teaching, as a virtual tutor. AI can also be used for fraud detection and 21st century skills development. AI as an access to education is implemented in the form of distance learning can be in the form of e-learning, learning curriculum development and can simplify and ease the burden that teachers can do in the learning process.
Judul Paper: Artificial Intelligence: Learning Solutions for the Digital Era 5.0
Keyword: Artificial Intelligence,Learning,Digital Era 5.0
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The application of interactive media and the use of technology in supporting learning activities in schools is very important, but based on the initial interview with the Head of High School, YPK Tabernakel Nabire Central Papua, through the telephone in WA, the application of interactive learning media has not been thoroughly done. There are some obstacles, such as insufficient facilities, and not all teachers implement interactive learning media, resulting in a lack of interest among students in following the learning process. Based on this, the study aims to look at the use of Marvel as an interactive learning media to increase the interest of students in high school at YPK Tabernakel Nabire Central Papua, especially in class X MIA I. The research uses qualitative methods and purposive sampling techniques. The collected data will then be analyzed using one of the data analysis techniques of the Creswell Model. Based on the results of the observations and interviews, it is concluded that the interactive media of Marvel can increase the student's interest in learning, as seen from the indicators of the observation results and the source's answers during the interview.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Marvel Interactive Learning Media to Increase Interest in Learning at YPK Tabernacle High School Students in Nabire, Central Papua
Keyword: Marvel media, using interactivel learning media, increased interest in learning
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: PT XYZ is one of the government-owned enterprises of the Republic of Indonesia that engaged in agribusiness. PT XYZ already has an information security management system (ISMS), but there are still several obstacles that are found, such as low personnel attention to information security, the need to remain compliant with government regulations, to technical constraints that arise, so PT XYZ wants to improve its information security-related capabilities. This study aims to determine the current condition of the existing ISMS  at PT XYZ and provide recommendations for improving the ISMS. This research uses information security controls based on the ISO/IEC 27001: 2022 standard to get the information security condition gap, then divides the information technology (IT) assets owned by the IT division of PT XYZ into several categories using the ISO/IEC 27005: 2018 standard, and conducts a risk assessment using the gap result data, namely the selected information security controls. Then recommendations were made based on the ISO/IEC 27002:2022 standard. The findings of this study were the discovery of 17 ISO/IEC 27001:2022 control activities whose value results were not maximised. These 17 controls are then divided into 3 categories of recommendations based on the urgency, from the results of the risk assessment.
Judul Paper: Information Security Evaluation Using ISO/IEC 27001: Case Study of PT XYZ
Keyword: information security, information security management system,evaluation, compliance audit, ISO
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Technology has become an integral element in modern business transformation, and plays a key role in improving operational efficiency. Toko Aneka Buah Ciaul is a business in the field of service that provides various types of fruits located on Jalan R.A. Kosasih Ciaul Subang Jaya, Kec.Cikole Kota Sukabumi, West Java. This store is one of the business entities that has not implemented SI/IT thoroughly. In its business activities, it still uses conventional methods, namely in the process of buying fruit consumers directly come to the store and in recording finances, procurement, inventory, and sales the owner only relies on notebooks and calculators. Of course, in this problem, information systems can be used as a solution. So in this study the author designed a Website-based Toko Buah Information System Enterprise Architecture using the TOGAF ADM framework with a focus on Premliminary Phase, Architecture Vision, Business Architecture, Information System Architecture, and Technology Architecture customized based on needs. The results of this research are in the form of a blueprint that includes the process of designing the system and the resulting technology. This research is expected to be used as a reference for store owners in making systems, with the aim of increasing efficiency and simplifying business processes in the future.
Judul Paper: Enterprise Architecture Design for a Website-Based Fruit Shop Information System using the TOGAF ADM Framework
Keyword: Enterprise Architecture, Information System, TOGAF-ADM
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The increasing development of information technology causes technology to play an important role in the progress of a company's business processes. This development also has an impact on salon business people. Salon is a place for hair and skin care to beautify your appearance. Meanwhile, currently many salons still use manual methods, namely queuing according to arrival when they want to be served, resulting in queues building up and data management also relying on the notebook method. Therefore, salons need a good booking system to improve customer service. The methodology used to build this system is the Waterfall model with stages of systems engineering, analysis, design, implementation and testing. The Web-Based Salon Services E-Booking Information System uses the PHP, XAMPP and MySQL programming languages as the DBMS to run the database. The Web-Based Salon E-booking Information System uses a database with 7 tables, namely admin, user, user role, category, service, booking, complaint. Based on testing and observations on the Web-based Salon E-booking Information System that has been created, it is concluded that the web-based salon E-booking information system is in accordance with what has been determined, namely in accordance with user needs. Meanwhile, the recommendation for a web-based e-booking information system for salon services is that this system can add a login feature for customers if the salon already has many customers and add a data back-up feature to avoid data loss if damage occurs to the storage system.
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based E-Booking Information System for Salon Services
Keyword: E-booking, salon,customer
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: c\The sale of motorcycles at PT.XYZ requires a reliable and high-quality Point of Sale (POS) system to enhance efficiency and customer satisfaction. This research aims to conduct testing and quality assurance of POS software using the Black Box method. This method focuses on testing external functionality without considering the internal system implementation. In this research, testing steps involve identifying the core functionalities of the POS, creating test cases, conducting tests, and analyzing results. Quality assurance will be implemented to ensure that the software meets the specified functional and non-functional requirements
Judul Paper: Testing and Quality Assurance of PT Motorcycle Sales Point Of Sale Software. XZY Using the Black Box Method
Keyword: Point of Sale (POS),Sotware Testing,Quality Assurance, Black Box,Motorcyle Sales
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Almost all Asian countries experience the Korean Wave phenomenon. Asian countries such as Japan, China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Thailand, Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia and others. With such a phenomenon, it can be observed that if someone likes something from abroad, most people are interested in learning the language. However, it is still difficult for them to find Korean language learning solutions. And one solution is to use appropriate learning media to support learning. The simple additive weight (SAW) method, also known as the weight sum method, will be applied in this study. The SAW method can select the best alternative from several available alternatives because it is ranked after determining the weight of each feature. The results showed that alternative or mobile learning at A2 is the best learning media for Korean and the simple additive weight (SAW) method can determine the best choice of Korean language learning environment.
Judul Paper: Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) Method in Selecting Korean Language Learning Media
Keyword: Simple Additive Weighting, Learning media, Korean
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The internet, like the workplace, is at the heart of every aspect of communal life in the modern digital era. Many platforms already provide job vacancies, especially for independent contractors. To identify relevant job openings, consumers typically need to access multiple websites to gather this information. One way to overcome this problem is to use web scraping. BeautifulSoup and Selenium libraries will be used to collect data in accordance with previous research findings. The vector space model approach is used to determine the degree of data similarity between queries and documents to perform data searches. After examining the data, a mean accuracy value of 56% was obtained and a mean perfect recall value of 100%. This is because, even if the context does not match, data searches use three parameters, increasing the likelihood of returning irrelevant material if the document contains words from the user's query. Users can manage the processes of web scraping, data processing, and data searching with the help of the Streamlit framework in Python, which displays the results of data processing. To obtain data from the Sribulancer, Project and freelancing freelancer websites, this research will use web scraping techniques. Users can search for data from multiple websites using a vector space model approach rather than accessing each loose website one by one. Web scraping results can also be processed to be displayed in a more user-friendly format and save time by using data visualization in the form of a web application built using the Streamlit framework.
Judul Paper: Web Application for Web Scraping Visualization Using the VSM Method
Keyword: Web Scraping, freelance job, Python, vsm method
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: In today's digital age, electronic certificates, also known as e-certificates, are frequently used. The authenticity of these certificates, however, can be a challenge to resolve because they are easily falsified. Rarely do certificates for events like contests, seminars, courses, and awards have serial numbers, barcodes, or QR scanners as authenticity markers. Contrary to certificates for land titles, vehicles, law, education, or academia, which are challenging to counterfeit because they have an indicator and typically have a physical form rather than a digital one. Recruiting committees, institutional memberships, and HR departments could all suffer as a result. Therefore, a solution is required to maintain the validity of these certificates using the Cryptographic Hash Function technique and the SHA-512 algorithm, which is the most recent member of the SHA-2 generation. The findings from this research indicate that the website application developed performs effectively on the user's device and facilitates the verification process of e-certificates that lack authenticity indicators. Therefore, the authors can conclude that this website application provides assistance to both individual and organizational users in verifying digital certificates.
Judul Paper: Design and Build an e-Certificate Authenticity Verification Application using the SHA-512 Algorithm
Keyword: e-Certicate, Hash,SHA-512,Cryptography
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The emergence of computer-based and mobile-based social networks seems to have received high attention from the public. Evidenced by the increasing number of social networks that appear. Friendster, Facebook, Twitter, Linkd In and many others. Twitter is one of the social media used to find information, Twitter users generally report every activity. They are even more helped by the existence of increasingly sophisticated cellphones. The system created in this study to optimize the analysis of informative and uninformative sentiment using a rapid miner application with the Naïve Bayes, Naïve Bayes + Adaboost, SVM, and SVM PSO methods using data taken from twitter @infoBMKG. The research method used is the collection of tweet data from twitter taken by the Crawling method. The data taken is tweets in Indonesian with a total of 1,000 tweets from the @infoBMKG twitter account. The results of the nave Bayes algorithm test carried out in this study were to measure the performance of accuracy, precision, recall, AUC from the results of the training and submission of datasets that had gone through the data preprocessing process. From the results of the research that has been done, it is proven that the optimization of informative and uninformative sentiment analysis from tweets on BMKG's twitter gets good results using the Support Machine Vector method with higher Accuracy, Recall, and AUC values than other methods.
Judul Paper: Optimizing Sentiment Analysis of Informative and Uninformative from Tweets at BMKG Using the Naive Bayes Algorithm and Synthetic Minority Sampling Technique Method
Keyword: Data Mining, Sentiment Analist, Naive Bayes, Support Machine Vector, BMKG
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: KRL Commuter Line is a common transportation that is in great demand by the public. Affordable rates are the reason why commuter lines are in high demand.
