The total match rate of the overall ranking was 21.3% with a difference of 1 to 5 ranks or 1.7%. For rankings with large data, the Fuzzy-SAW method is more recommended because the process is simpler and easier to implement.
Judul Paper: PENENTUAN PENERIMA BEASISWA BIDIKMISI MENGGUNAKAN METODE FUZZY SIMPLE ADDITIVE WEIGHTING DAN ELIMINATION AND CHOICE TRANSLATION REALITY
Keyword: Pengujian, Fuzzy Simple Additive Weighting, Elimination and Choice Translation Reality, Beasiswa
Jurnal: JURNAL INSTEK (INFORMATIKA SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI)

Abstrak: Customer satisfaction with clean water services is an important aspect that needs to be analyzed by the Batiwakkal Berau Regional Drinking Water Company to ensure the best service. This study aims to implement the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm to analyze customer satisfaction data of Batiwakkal Berau Drinking Water Company. This study evaluates the accuracy of the KNN model in classifying customer satisfaction levels, determining the best value of the K parameter, and providing an overview of customer perceptions of the Batiwakkal Berau Regional Drinking Water Company services. The research method involves collecting data from Batiwakkal Berau Drinking Water customers. The data is separated into training and testing sets, followed by a normalization process. The KNN model is trained with various K values ​​to find the best parameter. The results show that the KNN algorithm can classify customer satisfaction levels with adequate accuracy. The best K value found is 14, providing the best performance in predicting customer satisfaction with an accuracy value of 85.96%.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF CUSTOMER SATISFACTION USING THE K-NEAREST NEIGHBORS ALGORITHM IN BATIWAKKAL BERAU REGIONAL PUBLIC WATER COMPANIES
Keyword: Customer satisfaction, Batiwakkal Berau Drinking Water, K-Nearest Neighbors
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: This research focuses on the development of an integrated information system for the Informatics Engineering Department at the Faculty of Science and Technology, UIN Alauddin Makassar. The objective of this research is to create an information system that enables efficient and integrated data management, including curriculum vitae data of lecturers and staff, research, community service, as well as information about students and alumni. The research methodology involves the use of hardware (PCs and laptops with certain specifications) and software (Windows-10, Tools Environment, development applications), as well as analysis of existing data files. The result of this research is the creation of an information system that allows the display of various data in graphical or statistical form. This system facilitates access and monitoring of the development of the number of research, community service, the number of students, and alumni. This system is expected to assist the Informatics Engineering Department in optimizing operations, management, and decision-making based on organized and easily accessible data.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF DATA MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEMS FOR LECTURERS, EMPLOYEES AND STUDENTS DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATICS ENGINEERING UIN ALAUDDIN MAKASSAR
Keyword: information systems, data, informatics engineering
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Improving the quality of services in the health and environmental sectors can be enhanced by the potential advantages of devices and sensors based on Internet of Things (IoT) applications. In the context of medical applications, optimization techniques are used to improve IoT-based network connectivity by utilizing sensor networks (WSNs) and intelligently connected sensors. This study evaluates the impact of adding WLAN to a WSN using IEEE802.15.4 Zigbee sensors and how coexistence occurs because Wifi and ZigBee operate on the same channel. This study was conducted using Opnet 14.5 software in several scenarios. The results obtained show that Wi-Fi coexistence degrades the performance of the ZigBee network in terms of throughput, delay, and packet loss, such as file transfer, web browsing, and database access. Increasing the number of PCs in the Wifi-ZigBee network with the right choice of routing topology can improve the performance of the proposed network.
Judul Paper: JARINGAN SENSOR NIRKABEL BERBASIS IOT PADA APLIKASI MEDIS
Keyword: IoT, OPNET, WSN, WiFi ZigBee
Jurnal: JURNAL INSTEK (INFORMATIKA SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI)

Abstrak: The high risk of danger to public bus passengers is caused by the lack of safety induction services. A website-based application containing information and videos about safety induction for public bus passengers at PO. New Shantika was built using the ADDIE (Analyze, Design, Development, Implementation, Evaluation) development method. The IPA (Importance Performance Analysis) method was used to analyze needs, storyboard and UML were used for design, Capcut and WordPress were used for development, and the SUS (System Usability Scale) method was used for evaluation. The needs analysis with IPA resulted in 8 indicators in quadrant 1 and 1 indicator in quadrant 2 presented in a Cartesian diagram. The application built contains 9 explanations and safety induction videos. Application testing using SUS obtained an average value of 74.7 (B) which means that passengers as users accept the use of the application built. The application built can be used as an effort to improve the safety of public bus passengers.
Judul Paper: PUBLIC TRANSPORT BUS PASSENGER SAFETY INDUCTION USING A WEB-BASED APPLICATION
Keyword: Safety Induction, Passenger, Bus, Application
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF CUSTOMER SATISFACTION USING THE K-NEAREST NEIGHBORS ALGORITHM IN BATIWAKKAL BERAU REGIONAL PUBLIC WATER COMPANIES
Keyword: customer satisfaction, K-Nearest Neighbors, Batiwakkal Berau Drinking Water
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: Expert system for troubleshooting can help mechanics and drivers in knowing the damage that occurs in electric buses. The purpose of this research is to find out information about electric bus damage and how to maintain it and to design an expert system for troubleshooting electric buses and save time in solving complex problems using the certainty factor method. In the calculation process, the certainty factor method is used by accommodating the reasoning of experts who are not precise using phrases such as possible, most likely, almost certainly by drawing several conclusions from the symptoms of damage. The output of the expert system by applying the certainty factor method is in the form of a calculation process for the possibility of vehicle damage to the symptoms selected by the user, then the user will receive results in the form of a percentage value of damage, damage details, and repair solutions so that the user can know what is damaged in his vehicle. The results of this research, users can use this expert system application directly on a laptop. In operating this expert system, two accesses can be made, namely users and admins.
Judul Paper: EXPERT SYSTEM FOR TROUBLESHOOTING ON ELECTRIC BUSES USING WEB-BASED CERTAINTY FACTOR METHOD
Keyword: Bus Listrik, Certainty Factor, Sistem Pakar, Troubleshooting
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: At the Informatics Engineering Laboratory of Pontianak State Polytechnic, there is a fire detection system using smoke and heat sensors in certain rooms, while CCTV cameras are available throughout the room. Therefore, a fire detection system using CCTV cameras is proposed as an alternative fire detection tool to support sensor-based fire detection. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are a class of deep learning algorithms specifically designed for processing structured grid data, such as images. They are particularly effective in tasks related to image recognition and classification due to their ability to automatically learn spatial hierarchies of features from input images. This system works by processing video from CCTV cameras and classified using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model that has been previously trained to recognize visual signs related to fire on video from CCTV cameras. Detected fire will be sent a notification via the user's Telegram application. These results show that the system works as expected with an average confidence level of 91.9% accuracy and 20.8% loss. The system was successfully developed into a fire detection application using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model integrated with CCTV cameras and notification features via the Telegram application.
Judul Paper: FIRE EARLY WARNING SYSTEM VIA CCTV CAMERA USING CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK
Keyword: Internet of Things (IoT),, deep learning, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), fire detection system, CCTV, Informatics Engineering Laboratory
Jurnal: JURNAL INSTEK (INFORMATIKA SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI)

Abstrak: The tutorial learning process (problem-based learning) has critical incidents that make the implementation of tutorial learning less than optimal. The purpose of this study is to implement a web-based tutorial system for the implementation of tutorial learning. This study uses the waterfall method to create the system. The stages of the waterfall method are gathering requirements, system design, system implementation, system testing, and system maintenance. The result of this study is a web-based tutorial system at the Faculty of Medicine, Gunadarma University. System testing using the blackbox method shows that all menu features provided by the system run well and students and tutors are successful in using the system. This web-based tutorial system helps the implementation of tutorial learning to be more optimal.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF A WEB-BASED MEDICAL TUTORIAL SYSTEM AT THE FACULTY OF MEDICINE, GUNADARMA UNIVERSITY
Keyword: Systems, Medical Tutorials, Medical Scenarios, Medical Faculty
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Utilizing machines as intermediaries in the buying and selling process is how automation technology is applied. Machines function as sellers and possess brain-like capabilities, such as speed and accuracy in reading and identifying currency denominations. By using this automated technology, buying and selling transactions become more convenient. The Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method, one component of Deep Transfer Learning technology, is used in this study to recognize rupiah banknotes. Furthermore, this study selects an appropriate MobileNetV2 model architecture and modifies the learning rate, both of which impact the performance of the classification model. To ensure that the model has sufficient opportunity to learn from the training data, the ideal number of epochs is also taken into account. Furthermore, this can impact achieving high performance with efficient computation time, the utilization of optimal batch size is also investigated. Evaluation of model performance during training yielded the following results: f1-score 98%, recall 98%, precision 98%, and accuracy on the test set 97.86%.
Judul Paper: CLASSIFICATION OF RUPIAH Banknote Fractions USING TRANSFER LEARNING WITH THE MOBILENETV2 MODEL
Keyword: Klasifikasi, MobileNetV2, Convolutional Neural Network
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: To determine the type of business to be operated by the Village-Owned Enterprise (BUMDes), it is necessary to review the needs of the Soppeng Regency community in general and the Watu Village community in particular. Internet proficiency is a must for business actors within the BUMDes. One promotional tool that can be used is through the BUMDes website. The purpose of this research is to create a web-based marketing information system. This website significantly supports business product promotion activities, allowing the public to learn about it and make purchases through it. The Watu Village community has a BUMDes (village-owned enterprise). However, it has not developed as expected because its products have not been widely promoted online. The method used to design this system is the RAD (Rapid Application Development) method, which consists of Requirements Planning, System Design, and Implementation. Based on the results, the implementation of the marketing information system greatly facilitates the online marketing process of BUMDes products and expands their reach.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF MARKETING INFORMATION SYSTEMS FOR DEVELOPMENT AND INCREASING PRODUCTIVITY OF BUMDES WATU VILLAGE
Keyword: Marketing Information Systems, Bumdes, Web
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak:
This research developed a verse search application, altaqur.com, integrated into the Urban and Regional Planning Engineering (T.PWK) study program to facilitate students in finding relevant verses. The research methodology included application development, display design, implementation, and user perception analysis. The study results demonstrate the relationship of verses to various aspects of T.PWK, such as regional planning, spatial planning, the environment, and others.
The application also provides digital Quran recitations and murottal (recitations). Testing with T.PWK students showed a positive response, with the application being considered helpful in finding verses and completing academic assignments. The application was tested on several T.PWK students. Data collected through a Google form regarding student perceptions of the application's use were collected from 100 respondents, and almost all of them responded that it was very helpful and facilitated users in finding needed verses and in completing assignments, both religious course assignments and major thesis writing assignments.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF AN INTEGRATED VERSE SEARCH APPLICATION IN THE STUDY OF WEBSITE-BASED REGIONAL AND CITY PLANNING TECHNIQUES
Keyword: Applications, Al-Qur'an Verses, PWK Engineering Studies
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: This research focuses on improving data management at the Muara Enim Regency Fisheries Service, specifically in advancing catfish production, in line with the increasing demand for fish consumption in South Sumatra Province. Facing the challenge of frequent catfish supply shortages, this study developed a predictive model for catfish production yields using three machine learning algorithms: Artificial Neural Network (ANN), Random Forest, and Decision Tree. The data used included historical production data, environmental data, and maintenance data. The main objective was to understand the relationship between environmental factors, maintenance practices, and catfish production output. The performance of each algorithm was evaluated using appropriate metrics to determine the best approach. The research results are expected to provide insights for the Fisheries Service in planning production, managing resources, and making more informed and efficient decisions, thereby supporting sustainable catfish availability and better meeting market demand.
Judul Paper: PREDICTION OF CATFISH PRODUCTION RESULTS USING MACHINE LEARNING (Case Study of Muara Enim District Fisheries Service)
Keyword: Artificial Neural Network (ANN), Decision Tree, Dinas Perikanan, Prediksi hasil produksi, Ikan lele, Random Forest
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: The process of data collection and archiving of research and community service data within the scope of UIN Alauddin Makassar has not been optimal. Where the problem faced is searching for archives one by one. The purpose of this study is to develop an integrated research and community service data collection information system, and to be able to conduct research and community service data collection at UIN Alauddin Makassar by utilizing the research and community service data collection information system. This type of research is Research and Development (R & D) using the SDLC (System Development Life Cycle) method. The processing technique goes through the stages of planning, analysis, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance. The results of the study show that the research and community service information system named SITASYA is running well, where users can search and monitor research data based on faculty or department. In addition, users in this case the admin in each study program or faculty can add research and community service data.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF AN INTEGRATED RESEARCH AND COMMUNITY SERVICE DATABASE INFORMATION SYSTEM AT UIN ALAUDDIN MAKASSAR
Keyword: Information Systems, Research, Community Service
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The existence of the introduction of the Information Systems Department is published visually by looking at the many facilities and infrastructure, human resources and work programs that support the ongoing process of activities in the information systems department. The type of research used is applied research with qualitative data collection methods, namely observation, interviews and questionnaires. The tools used to design the system in this study are unified modeling language while for the programming language used are bosstrep as the frontend and Laravel as the backend, MySQL as the database and testing this application using the Black Box method and the user acceptance test method. From the results of the test using the UAT method which is carried out by giving questionnaires to all users involved and to find out user opinions on the application that has been built. So that the results obtained percentage of the level of usability of the reporting administration system based on alternative user perceptions are classified as very strong.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI VIRTUAL TOUR SEBAGAI OBJEK PENGENALAN MENGGUNAKAN METODE MDLC ( MULTIMEDIA DEVELOPMENT LIFE CYCLE)
Keyword: Virtual Tour, MDLC, User Acceptance Test (UAT)
Jurnal: JURNAL INSTEK (INFORMATIKA SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI)

Abstrak: Batik is a type of cloth with distinctive motifs made with special techniques, one of which is batik in the Pekalongan area. In this article, researchers want to classify the types of Pekalongan batik using HSI images with the KNN method which aims to provide results in the form of how accurate the method is when used to classify objects with various color levels. The data used amounted to 57 image data, consisting of 7 jlamprang batik data, 6 liong batik data, 7 semen batik data, 8 terang bulan batik data, 7 tuju rupa batik data and 22 batik data from outside the city of Pekalongan.
Judul Paper: CLASSIFICATION OF PEKALONGAN BATIK TYPES USING HSI IMAGES WITH THE K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR METHOD
Keyword: KNN, HSI, Batik, Batik Pekalongan
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: English e-Learning Media Development Based on Web Blog at SDN 5 Salamae Palopo aims to develop English e-Learning media based on web blog as a learning media in the form of a website using Google Sites. This research uses Research and Development (R&D) research type and uses observation, interview and library study data collection methods. The development of this e-Learning media uses Google Sites and CorelDRAW X7 software. The system testing on this web blog uses Black Box testing. This research produces English e-learning media based on web blog as an alternative media in learning activities that can be accessed on various devices that have been connected to the internet network.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF ENGLISH E-LEARNING MEDIA BASED ON WEB BLOG AT SDN 5 SALAMAE PALOPO
Keyword: Google sites, Media e-learning, web blog, CorelDraw X7
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The performance assessment of non-civil servant teachers is conducted at the end of each semester and is made by the assessor to determine the award for each non-civil servant teacher who achieves good performance. Because the data processing process does not use an application program and decision making takes quite a long time, the employee performance assessment process is slow and inaccurate. To support a good and transparent assessment process, a computer-based system is needed that uses an algorithm for the assessment weight calculation process. The purpose of this research is to develop a performance assessment system for non-civil servant teachers with an application-based decision support concept. The system is built using the SDLC (Systems Development Life Cycle) development method and the calculation process uses the Graphic Rating Scale method. The application implementation uses Borland Delphi 2010 is used to manage the data processing interface. The results of the assessment process using the application display the calculated value of each criterion. The application implementation makes it easier for SMAN 2 SIDRAP to evaluate the performance of non-civil servant teachers.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE GRAPHIC RATING SCALE ALGORITHM IN THE PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT SYSTEM OF NON CIVIL SERVANT TEACHERS AT SMAN 2 SIDRAP
Keyword: Guru non PNS, Graphic Rating Scale, Sistem Penilaian
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The borrowing of practical equipment must be recorded. Difficulties in the manual process include time-consuming data searches, difficulty checking equipment availability, the risk of lost archives, and human error. Proper equipment management is required by creating an application for borrowing and handling equipment using Automated Guided Vehicles (AGV). This research resulted in an application for borrowing and designing an AGV. The tool borrowing application uses an HTML program with MySQL database access with a local server using XAMPP. The AGV built can withstand a maximum load of 20 kg. The control system uses an Arduino Mega as the main controller and a NodeMCU8266 to communicate via WiFi to the station. The results of the study show that the tool borrowing application is effective in both the borrowing process and the equipment return process. The AGV can deliver equipment at a speed of 0.6 – 1.8 m/s and stops when there is an obstacle in front of it.
Judul Paper: PRACTICAL EQUIPMENT LENDING SYSTEM APPLICATION WITH AUTOMATED GUIDED VEHICLE AS AN INTRODUCTION TO EQUIPMENT
Keyword: AGV, Tool lending application, html, mySQL, Wifi
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: The existence of a website is currently a powerful marketing activity in developing a business with the implementation of the right strategy. This study aims to create a website as a digital marketing medium with content displaying the 4P marketing mix consisting of price, product, place, promotion and SEO strategy to maximize the marketing function on the website. This study also wants to know the opinion of company leaders regarding the website that has been created. The steps in website design include analysis, data collection, design, implementation and testing. This study uses quantitative and qualitative data analysis techniques. Interviews, questionnaires and observations are the data collection techniques adopted in this study. The results of the study state that (1) The designed website has fulfilled the form of digital marketing application based on SEO strategy and includes 4P marketing mix content. (2) The company's perception shows that the website is very easy to use.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE DESIGN BASED ON DIGITAL MARKETING AT PT SATOIMO SULAWESI SUCCESSFULLY
Keyword: Digital Marketing, Website Designing, Marketing Mix
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: The development of social media and websites as a medium for disseminating information is very rapid and easily accessible. However, this is not entirely accurate and cannot be responded to by various parties such as investors and potential investors, so it can trigger investor sentiment that impacts the company's stock price. Sentiment is the process of identifying opinions in text form that can be categorized as positive or negative sentiment. This study aims to test the use of the Information Gain method in the process of classifying public opinion on stocks into positive or negative sentiment classes using the Naive Bayes Classifier classification method. The results of the study showed that the classification accuracy produced by using the Information Gain feature selection method increased from 42.86% to 50%.
Judul Paper: INFORMATION GAIN (IG) FEATURE SELECTION IN STOCK OPINION DATA CLASSIFICATION USING THE NAÏVE BAYES METHOD
Keyword: Classification, Information Gain, Naive Bayes, Stock Opinion
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: This study aims to design an application for the PDIDIKTI Feeder Integration System with Academic Data (SIFEEKA) where this application is Web-based. This application aims to facilitate the process of reporting academic data to the PDDIKTI Forlap. The research method used is the experimental method and literature study. This service uses a website application. This testing is carried out by testing the functional system, such as sending academic data reported to Neo Feeder. This study produces a PHP Web application with an admin user where this system is able to assist the UIN Alauddin Makassar Database Center in reporting to the PDDIKTI Neo Feeder.
Judul Paper: INTEGRASI DATA AKADEMIK PERGURURUAN TINGGI DENGAN PANGKALAN DATA DIKTI MENGGUNAKAN SISTEM INTEGRASI FEEDER TERBARU (SIFEEKA)
Keyword: Data Integration, Forlap PDDIKTI, SIAKA, Website.
Jurnal: JURNAL INSTEK (INFORMATIKA SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI)

Abstrak: The existence of a website is currently a powerful marketing activity in developing a business with the implementation of the right strategy. This study aims to create a website as a digital marketing medium with content displaying the 4P marketing mix consisting of price, product, place, promotion and SEO strategy to maximize the marketing function on the website. This study also wants to know the opinion of company leaders regarding the website that has been created. The steps in website design include analysis, data collection, design, implementation and testing. This study uses quantitative and qualitative data analysis techniques. Interviews, questionnaires and observations are the data collection techniques adopted in this study. The results of the study state that (1) The designed website has fulfilled the form of digital marketing application based on SEO strategy and includes 4P marketing mix content. (2) The company's perception shows that the website is very easy to use.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE DESIGN BASED ON DIGITAL MARKETING AT PT SATOIMO SULAWESI SUCCESSFULLY
Keyword: Digital Marketing, Website Designing, Marketing Mix
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: In the digital era and advances in information technology, the food and beverage (F&B) industry faces challenges in remaining relevant and attractive to increasingly tech-savvy consumers. Many cafes and restaurants, such as Eatery Cafe, are struggling to maximize their product promotion and sales potential through digital channels. The lack of engaging interactions and suboptimal user experiences in mobile applications can hinder promotional effectiveness and reduce sales conversions. Therefore, it is important to design mobile applications with a user-centered approach (User-Centered Design/UCD) to ensure that the UI/UX design is not only visually appealing but also provides comfort and convenience for users. This study aims to design the user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) of Eatery Cafe's mobile application using a User-Centered Design (UCD) approach. The main focus of this study is to design a UI/UX that is well-received by users and evaluate its impact on F&B product sales and customer satisfaction. The methodology includes collecting user data through interviews, surveys, and observations, designing an application prototype with UI/UX design based on the results of user data analysis, testing the prototype with user groups and revising the test results to make design improvements and evaluate the impact on product promotion and sales. The results of the study show that user-oriented UI/UX design not only increases user comfort and satisfaction, but also significantly increases awareness, interest, and purchases of F&B products at Eatery Cafe. Thus, it is expected that this application can be an effective tool in strengthening the relationship between Eatery Cafe and customers and increasing product sales.
Judul Paper: Interactive Mobile App UI/UX Design to Increase Promotion and Sales of F&B Products at Eatery Cafes
Keyword: Eatery Café; Promosi; Prototipe; UI/UX; User-Centered Design
Jurnal: KREA-TIF : JURNAL TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: This research aims to improve internet access in rural areas by utilizing OpenWRT technology as a portable Wi-Fi. The case study was conducted in Bulupitu Village, Gondanglegi District, Malang Regency. The HG680P STB device was converted into a router with OpenWRT (Helmiwrt) firmware, using non-regular internet packages such as ilmupedia. The results show that this system successfully provides stable and affordable internet access, with good signal strength and adequate internet speed. Positive impacts are seen in increasing accessibility, productivity, and social connectivity of the community. Challenges such as limited signal coverage in closed areas are overcome by the use of additional repeaters and device maintenance training for network managers. This research provides a replicable model for other rural areas and offers practical solutions that can be widely applied.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Openwrt as Portable WiFi in Community Network Development: Affordable and Stable Internet Access
Keyword: Internet Access; Community; OpenWRT; Rural; Portable Wi-Fi
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Most science subjects, especially those related to the solar system, are still taught conventionally, using teaching aids such as books, whiteboards, and props. These props do not attract students' attention, so students become less interested in the subject. So, alternative media are needed in introducing solar system material. The purpose of this study is to create an Augmented Reality-based solar system introduction application. This application will make planetary objects more realistic and improve students' understanding of the literature about the solar system. This study will use a literature study research method. Identifying problems, conducting literature research, collecting data, developing systems, testing applications, and writing reports are the research steps. This study produces an augmented reality application that uses a markerless method so that 3D objects can be moved freely by users. This application can be an alternative media for introducing the solar system, helping students gain a better understanding and encouraging them to participate in active learning.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Augmented Reality as a medium for introducing the Android-based solar system
Keyword: augmented reality;introduction media;solar system
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: In an effort to improve the sustainability of the product manufacturing business, the right strategy is needed to avoid losses due to wrong policies. This study uses the application of Tsukamoto fuzzy logic as a solution to determine bread production based on inventory and demand data. Bread, as a product with a short shelf life, requires intelligent production management to avoid waste and losses. Many bakeries still adopt traditional methods without considering fluctuations in market demand, which can result in overproduction or stock shortages. This study takes the case of the Sarinda bread factory, which faces challenges in dealing with fluctuations in market demand. Through the use of the Tsukamoto fuzzy method, the results show an accuracy rate of 93.06%, with a Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE) of 6.94%, which is categorized as very good. This method proves its effectiveness in helping entrepreneurs determine the amount of bread production that is appropriate to changing market conditions, without the need to add many existing production facilities. The use of Tsukamoto fuzzy logic in this context can be a smart solution to increase bread production efficiency and optimize business profits.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Fuzzy Logic to Determine the Amount of Bread Production Using the Tsukamoto Method
Keyword: market fluctuations; Fuzzy Tsukamoto;MAPE;production;bakery
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Rice is a type of plant that is very essential for humans. Rice is used as a staple food by a large portion of people, especially in Asia. Therefore, proper care and management of rice plants are crucial to maximize crop yields and meet the food needs in Indonesia, particularly for the staple diet. One of the common factors that hinder rice production is diseases that affect rice plants. If left untreated, it can have a detrimental impact on the much-needed rice production in Indonesia. Some common rice diseases include Bacterial Leaf Blight, Brown Spot, and Leaf Smut. Hence, early detection is required as a preventive measure against these diseases. One way to address this issue is by applying artificial intelligence, where AI can play a significant role in disease identification in rice plants. This allows farmers to take clear actions in disease management. Identification is performed using leaf images and an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) algorithm with an accuracy of 83%.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Artificial Neural Networks for Classification of Rice Plant Diseases Using Leaf Images
Keyword: Rice, identification, crops,artificial intelligence,diseases
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Advances in information technology are increasing over time, the use of the internet has become a daily thing that is often done. All kinds of activities that take place every day some use an internet connection for the process. PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia currently needs protection for the company's website to improve performance and avoid hacker attacks. Website security protection using Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF) at PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia is used to improve website performance which is not currently implemented. Currently, the performance of the company's website still gets insufficient marks in the criteria for a good website in testing using Pingdom Tools and GTMetrix and is not yet protected for security. The stages carried out start from making observations, preparing tools and materials, determining testing tools, installing and configuring the Cloud Web Application Firewall WAF and carrying out testing and data analysis. The results of the analysis that has been carried out show that the use of Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF) for the performance of the neptus.co.id website is very beneficial because implementing cloud WAF can change the performance load and prevent attacks from hackers
Judul Paper: Analysis of Web Performance Load Test on the PT Neptus Teknologi Indonesia Jakarta Website After Using Cloud Web Application Firewall (WAF)
Keyword: Analysis performance Load, cloud web application firewall (WAF), website, pingdom, Toll, GTMetrix
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: In the context of food and economy, meat plays a vital role in fulfilling the nutritional needs of society and serves as a strategic economic commodity. However, the difficulty in distinguishing between beef and pork often leads to fraud by meat traders. Particularly in Indonesia, where the consumption of beef and pork is high, this confusion raises significant concerns, especially since pork is prohibited in the Islamic religion. This research aims to address this issue by applying Artificial Intelligence technology, specifically the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) deep learning method in classifying images of beef, pork, and mixed meat. The study utilizes a dataset of 410 samples, with 70% used for training and 30% for testing. Testing is conducted using a basic CNN model with hyperparameter analysis such as image size, number of epochs, and batch size. Additionally, the dataset is tested using a comparative architecture, namely the ResNet-50 architecture. The best accuracy rate of the CNN model is 82.20%, achieved with an image size of 75 x 75 pixels, 100 epochs, and a batch size of 64. Testing with the ResNet-50 architecture yields the highest accuracy of 76.14%. Evaluation is performed using a confusion matrix with four categories: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, and F1 Score.
Judul Paper: Hyperparameter Analysis in Meat Type Classification Using the Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm
Keyword: Image classificatio, Convolutional Neural Network, Hyperparameter, Meat Type Classificatio
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: This research discusses Digital Era 5.0 learning solutions, namely the benefits that can be provided by the presence of artificial intelligence in the development of science and technology. Artificial intelligence (AI) is a computer program designed and built to mimic human intelligence, including decision-making ability, logic, and other characteristics of intelligence. Artificial intelligence as a learning solution for the digital era 5.0 is here to improve teaching and learning and innovation in learning implementation. The results of this research show that AI support is needed in the world of education and learning, including for personalized learning, this system can analyze the strengths and weaknesses of students to provide material that suits their level of understanding. AI can also be utilized as real time feedback in learning, also utilized for interactive teaching, data management and administration in education and teaching, as a virtual tutor. AI can also be used for fraud detection and 21st century skills development. AI as an access to education is implemented in the form of distance learning can be in the form of e-learning, learning curriculum development and can simplify and ease the burden that teachers can do in the learning process.
Judul Paper: Artificial Intelligence: Learning Solutions for the Digital Era 5.0
Keyword: Artificial Intelligence, Learning, Digital Era 5.0
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Electronic Procurement Services (LPSE) is a work unit formed specifically to serve the Goods/Services Procurement Work Unit (UKPBJ), responsible for carrying out the procurement process electronically. currently, the method of selecting providers has become e-regular tendering which is all done online, the evolution of electronic tendering systems has grown rapidly along with advances in information technology. This research uses the data of tender winners that have been done Data Mining before from LPSE Semarang Regency, from 2011 to 2022 with the population of completed tenders, which aims to group the data of tender winners to find out what procurements have been completed and the role of local entrepreneurs / companies. total of 2127, using only 238 random data samples referring to the method of Isaac and Michael. using the method of Machine Learning, namely the Unsupervised Learning method processed with the K-Means Clustering Algorithm, the results obtained are the Construction of Public Facilities in the form of types of Construction Work, such as roads, tourist attractions, facilities for villages and others both made new, upgrades and others. then comes from the Semarang Regency area by showing 8 out of 13 or two-thirds with a percentage of 62%. This information is useful as an overview, education, information, knowledge for all of us in the Semarang Regency area and all the people of Indonesia as well as helping the economic development of the region and all other regional areas to the National.
Judul Paper: Grouping of Tender Winners using the K-Means Clustering Method (Case of Electronic Procurement Services, Semarang Regency Goods/Services Procurement Section)
Keyword: Analysis Clustering, Datang Mining, Electronics, Information Technology, Unsupervised Machine Learning.
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The application of interactive media and the use of technology in supporting learning activities in schools is very important, but based on the initial interview with the Head of High School, YPK Tabernakel Nabire Central Papua, through the telephone in WA, the application of interactive learning media has not been thoroughly done. There are some obstacles, such as insufficient facilities, and not all teachers implement interactive learning media, resulting in a lack of interest among students in following the learning process. Based on this, the study aims to look at the use of Marvel as an interactive learning media to increase the interest of students in high school at YPK Tabernakel Nabire Central Papua, especially in class X MIA I. The research uses qualitative methods and purposive sampling techniques. The collected data will then be analyzed using one of the data analysis techniques of the Creswell Model. Based on the results of the observations and interviews, it is concluded that the interactive media of Marvel can increase the student's interest in learning, as seen from the indicators of the observation results and the source's answers during the interview.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Marvel Interactive Learning Media to Increase Interest in Learning at YPK Tabernacle High School Students in Nabire, Central Papua
Keyword: Marvel media, using interactivel learning media, increased interest in learning
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Nowadays, society uses a lot of digital and practical services, including church canteens or other spiritual songs such as Kidung Pasamuan Jawi, Pelengkap Kidung Jemaat and others. Because it requires innovation or a change to support a variety of private activities, for example in church services and sunday school songs. The innovation can use smaartphone technology, because it is then made an Android-based application system with the purpose and purpose can produce a smartphone application that can be used and used to help in worship activities. In this study is planned the design of Android application with the help of Android studio and with the aid of firebase as the method of making this application, it is hoped this research can help the devotion in the church who still use the Nyanyian Rohani, such as the Kidung Jemaat, as well as help the youth as a learning and aiding tool in playing music and others
Judul Paper: Designing an Android-Based Application for Congregational Song Lyrics and Chords for Sunday School Songs
Keyword: android, firebase, congregational hymn, android studio
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak:
Spices are one of the products of natural wealth owned by Indonesia which has been recognized by the
world. Spices are part of plants that have benefits not only as a complement to spices in cooking, but
are also used to boost the immune system of living things. Due to the many types of spices that exist in
Indonesia, a system is needed to help the community, especially millennial children, to know the
various types of spices correctly and clearly. The spice detection process is carried out using an
accuracy calculation on the system using a dataset in the form of 1800 images and 12 types of spices.
The classification process for spices is generated using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
method with the tensorflow module used for the training and testing process of data. The results of the
accuracy experiment on spices resulted in an accuracy value of recognizing the type of spice of 60%.
Judul Paper:
Detect Types of Spices Using
Real Convolutional Neural Network Method
Time
Keyword: Spices, Detection system, Convolutional Neural Network, tensorflow, deep learning
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak:
KRL Commuter Line is a common transportation that is in great demand by the public. Affordable
rates are the reason why commuter lines are in high demand. With so many users of this
transportation service, the KRL Commuter Line must continue to improve services. In the process,
there are often obstacles that cause users to make complaints. Users of Commuter Line often make
complaints or give their opinions via social media twitter. In this study, sentiment analysis was carried
out to Commuter Line users. Sentiment analysis is performed for the classification of tweets or tweets
regarding commuter line service into positive and negative sentiments. The focus of this study is to

compare the Support Vector Machine (SVM), SVM-Particle Swarm Optimization, Naive Bayes and NB-
Adaboost algorithms. The data used was 1001 tweet data on Twiiter @CommuterLine. The

comparison results obtained average values for SVM: 78.15%, SVM-PSO: 79.47%, NB: 76.67% and NB-
Adaboost: 78.80%. So that it can be seen that the classification of algorithms using optimization

methods can increase the average value. In this study, the SVM algorithm with the PSO optimization
method is a better classification used compared to the SVM algorithm, Naive Baiyes and Naive Bayes
with AdaBoost optimization.
Judul Paper:
Comparison of Algorithms for Sentiment Analysis
On Commuterline Public Transportation Twitter
Keyword: SVM, PSO, Naive Bayes, Adaboost, Commuter Line
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak:
The emergence of computer-based and mobile-based social networks seems to have received high
attention from the public. Evidenced by the increasing number of social networks that appear.
Friendster, Facebook, Twitter, Linkd In and many others. Twitter is one of the social media used to find
information, Twitter users generally report every activity. They are even more helped by the existence
of increasingly sophisticated cellphones. The system created in this study to optimize the analysis of
informative and uninformative sentiment using a rapid miner application with the Naïve Bayes, Naïve
Bayes + Adaboost, SVM, and SVM PSO methods using data taken from twitter @infoBMKG. The
research method used is the collection of tweet data from twitter taken by the Crawling method. The
data taken is tweets in Indonesian with a total of 1,000 tweets from the @infoBMKG twitter account.
The results of the nave Bayes algorithm test carried out in this study were to measure the performance
of accuracy, precision, recall, AUC from the results of the training and submission of datasets that had
gone through the data preprocessing process. From the results of the research that has been done, it is
proven that the optimization of informative and uninformative sentiment analysis from tweets on
BMKG's twitter gets good results using the Support Machine Vector method with higher Accuracy,
Recall, and AUC values than other methods.
Judul Paper:
Informative Analysis Sentiment Optimization and Not
Informative from Tweets on BMKG Using
Naive Bayes Algorithms and Engineering Methods
Synthetic Minority Sampling
Keyword: Data Mining, Sentiment Analyst, Naïve Bayes, Support Machine Vector, BMKG
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: The internet, like the workplace, is at the heart of every aspect of communal life in the modern digital era. Many platforms already provide job vacancies, especially for independent contractors. To identify relevant job openings, consumers typically need to access multiple websites to gather this information. One way to overcome this problem is to use web scraping. BeautifulSoup and Selenium libraries will be used to collect data in accordance with previous research findings. The vector space model approach is used to determine the degree of data similarity between queries and documents to perform data searches. After examining the data, a mean accuracy value of 56% was obtained and a mean perfect recall value of 100%. This is because, even if the context does not match, data searches use three parameters, increasing the likelihood of returning irrelevant material if the document contains words from the user's query. Users can manage the processes of web scraping, data processing, and data searching with the help of the Streamlit framework in Python, which displays the results of data processing. To obtain data from the Sribulancer, Project and freelancing freelancer websites, this research will use web scraping techniques. Users can search for data from multiple websites using a vector space model approach rather than accessing each loose website one by one. Web scraping results can also be processed to be displayed in a more user-friendly format and save time by using data visualization in the form of a web application built using the Streamlit framework.
Judul Paper: Web Application for Web Scraping Visualization Using the VSM Method
Keyword: Web Scraping, freelance job, Python, vsm method
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: In today's digital age, electronic certificates, also known as e-certificates, are frequently used. The authenticity of these certificates, however, can be a challenge to resolve because they are easily falsified. Rarely do certificates for events like contests, seminars, courses, and awards have serial numbers, barcodes, or QR scanners as authenticity markers. Contrary to certificates for land titles, vehicles, law, education, or academia, which are challenging to counterfeit because they have an indicator and typically have a physical form rather than a digital one. Recruiting committees, institutional memberships, and HR departments could all suffer as a result. Therefore, a solution is required to maintain the validity of these certificates using the Cryptographic Hash Function technique and the SHA-512 algorithm, which is the most recent member of the SHA-2 generation. The findings from this research indicate that the website application developed performs effectively on the user's device and facilitates the verification process of e-certificates that lack authenticity indicators. Therefore, the authors can conclude that this website application provides assistance to both individual and organizational users in verifying digital certificates.
Judul Paper: Design and Build an e-Certificate Authenticity Verification Application using the SHA-512 Algorithm
Keyword: e-Certicate, Hash,SHA-512,Cryptography
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Land conversion, pollution, logging, and the use of pesticides are the main causes of butterfly extinction. This used 50 types of butterflies using different RGB colors obtained from the Kaggle website. The goal is to separate the butterfly object from the background and produce the best accuracy from the segmentation proses. The method used is Multilevel Thresholding. The results of preprocessing on the image using Multilevel Thresholding segmentation are able to identify colors and butterfly objects. The first step is RGB image input, then the image is Segmented using Multilevel Thresholding. After that, the output is displaying the image, and using a threshold value of 0-255 with the results of image segmentation, the threshold value separates the object and the background. Multilevel Thresholding segmentation with color and shape identification obtains threshold values of 100 from the dataset train, 100, and 110 from the test dataset and 140, and 150 from the validation dataset. It was concluded that the results of threshold value of the Multilevel Thresholding segmentation obtained good results
Judul Paper: Butterfly Image Segmentation Using Multilevel Thresholding Method
Keyword: Segmentation, Butterfy,multilevel Thresholding
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: This study aims to find out the best sub-districts in Pati Regency which are located outside Pati District as a place for Supermarket construction based on the specified criteria and a comparison of the four methods to be used. The tool used to support this research process is Microsoft Excel. This study uses the SAW, MAUT, ORESTE, and TOPSIS methods in the research model to compare the final results. The final results obtained are that the SAW and TOPSIS methods have the first three orders, namely A10, A15, and A3, the MAUT method has the same first three orders, namely A10, A3, and A15, while the ORESTE method has the first three orders, namely A21, A10, and A3. By looking at the opportunities for emergence, the final results show A10, namely Kayen District as the best sub-district in supporting supermarket development decisions in Pati Regency.
Judul Paper: Comparison of SAW, MAUT, ORESTE, TOPSIS Methods in Supporting Supermarket Development Decisions in Pati Regency
Keyword: SAW,MAUT,ORESTE,TOPIS,supermarket construction
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: People often find it difficult to cope with the accumulation of household waste that includes furniture, clothes and other items. This accumulation of household waste does not only affect one house but also affects neighboring houses. Piles of unused items continue to accumulate in homes and other places, resulting in problems caused by inconvenience due to the large number of new items. With these problems, an application for buying and selling used goods was developed for people who want to sell or buy used goods. This research uses the Waterfall method as a software development method. This application is made by integrating the responsibilities of sellers and buyers simultaneously, resulting in one account that can buy and sell at the same time. With this application, it is hoped that the community can be helped in finding used products or goods that are still suitable for use.
Judul Paper: Development of an Android-based E-Commerce Application as a Means of Buying and Selling Used Goods using the Waterfall Method
Keyword: Android Application, E-Commerce, MVVM, Waterfall Method
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Since the pandemic, the use of devices such as computers and laptops has increased due to the increasing number of activities that can be done virtually. This naturally also increases the possibility of damage to devices such as computers and laptops. The Oz Computer store in Salatiga, which provides laptop and computer repair services, has also experienced an increase in customer service requests since the pandemic. With this increase in service demand, the Oz Computer store in Salatiga sometimes experiences challenges in data collection, recording, and providing service information to customers due to the increasing number of existing customers. To address these issues, this research will design a web-based service information system at the Oz Computer store in Salatiga, using the prototype method as the software development method. This service information system is expected to help the Oz Computer store in Salatiga optimize data collection, recording, and providing service information to customers.
Judul Paper:
Designing a Service Information System at the Oz Store
Computer Salatiga Using the Prototype Method

Web Based
Keyword: Web Based Information System, Prototype, Prototype Method
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Selection of optimal coconut varieties for coconut milk production is a crucial step in the food industry, considering that the quality and quantity of coconut milk are greatly influenced by the type of coconut used. This study aims to determine the best coconut varieties for coconut milk production by integrating two multicriteria decision-making methods, namely the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) and Simple Additive Weighting (SAW). The AHP method is used to determine the weight of each influential criterion, such as oil content, taste, price, and availability. Meanwhile, the SAW method is applied to rank various coconut varieties based on the weight of the criteria that have been obtained. The data used in this study were collected from various sources, including scientific literature, as well as field observation data. The results of the analysis indicate that certain coconut varieties have significant advantages in terms of quality and efficiency of coconut milk production. The coconut varieties selected through the combined AHP and SAW methods are expected to provide practical guidance for coconut milk producers in selecting optimal coconut varieties, so that they can improve the quality of the coconut milk produced. Thus, this study provides an important contribution in the field of agribusiness, especially in the selection of coconut varieties for coconut milk production, as well as implementing the use of AHP and SAW methods in complex and multi-criteria decision making.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Selecting Optimal Coconut Varieties for Coconut Milk Production: Integration of Analytic Hierarchy Process and Simple Additive Weighting Methods
Keyword: Decision Support System; AHP; SAW
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: Textbook-based learning media makes the learning atmosphere less attractive for students, especially for elementary school students. This causes the transfer of knowledge to be hampered. Advances in information technology have penetrated the world of education which applies information technology as a tool in teaching and learning activities such as visual animations including augmented reality technology. The augmented reality of technology in English learning applications is a solution to attract the interest of elementary school children. This application has two main features, namely learning and quizzes. First, students are given an introduction to objects around the house in English, then asked to work on questions in an augmented reality and virtual reality technology environment. This application carries out several processes which include reading marker symbols using a camera, then carrying out a pre-processing stage, namely the segmentation process for comparing marker symbols. If the marker symbol is an image that is similar to the reference data, the recognition image will be used to display the 3 dimensions of the object. The trial results show that the features of this application work well, and students perceive it as helpful to have this application for learning English.
Judul Paper: Design of a Virtual Based English Learning Application System Reality and Augmented Reality
Keyword: Augmented Reality; English; Media; Learning; Virtual Reality
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: The continuous development of technology makes everything sophisticated and easy, such as attendance that can be accessed online. In this study, an online office employee attendance system was designed on an HTML and CSS-based website, where on this website there is a time and map that can show the whereabouts of employees and what time they are absent so that it is expected to prevent fraudulent attendance such as entrusting attendance. The purpose of this study is to help the office with attendance problems so that the office can easily control all employees in terms of attendance and all incoming data will be neatly arranged so that the data will be easy to summarize. This study uses a method of collecting data from observation as well as designing and building. So that with the observation method used, it can be used to find out and obtain data that will be used in the design and building stage of this website. This website itself is designed using the HTML programming language as the initial stage of the website page framework and uses the CSS programming language to make the layout of the website more attractive.
Judul Paper: Design of Online Office Employee Attendance System on Website Based on HTML and CSS
Keyword: Online Attendance; Website; Employee; Office
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: The problem of manual trash cans causes a lack of hygiene for users and scattered garbage due to the volume of garbage bins that have accumulated. Paper and tissue waste is the dominant waste in the campus area and is highly flammable. Due to the lack of manual trash cans, innovation ideas were obtained to make automatic room trash cans and can monitor waste capacity and detect smoke using smartphone applications as the application of the Internet of Things (IoT). The IoT-based smart trash can uses the NodeMCU 8266 as its main control and ultrasonic sensors to detect the distance of the garbage capacity and the distance of the object. Servo motor as a drive for the garbage lid automatically. MQ-2 smoke sensor as a smoke marker, a warning sound through the Buzzer and also the Wifi ESP 8266 module so that it can send notifications via the internet network. Trash cans can be monitored using the Blynk application. The results obtained in this study are that the trash can cover will automatically open when the object is 10cm to 1cm from the trash can. The results of the sensor detection of the full capacity level of the waste are when the garbage is 5cm to 1cm from the sensor. Furthermore, the results of the detection of the MQ-2 sensor, when the smoke capacity exceeds 325ppm, the buzzer will turn on and the system sends a notification message using a Blynk to the cleaning staff's smartphone.
Judul Paper: IoT-Based Smart Waste System Using Blynk Application
Keyword: NodeMCU 8266; Smart Trash Can; Internet of Things.
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: In the business world, generally users and owners of companies need something innovative to help support performance and facilitate the use or search for product data. The presence of this website-based internet will make it easier for all groups to access all forms of information, including utilizing the media to be able to connect the relationship between customers and the company's products, namely one of which is ordering bus tickets. Based on the various conveniences and uses of the internet, a "Utilization of Information Systems in Ordering and Digitizing Bus Tickets Based on Websites" was developed. This system is made with PHP, MySQL and Bootstrap software. This Information System is designed to provide convenience in terms of ticket ordering services and obtaining other information needed by customers
Judul Paper: Design and Construction of a Website-Based Bus Ticket Booking Information System
Keyword: Bus Ticket; Booking; Website; Information System; Codeigniter
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: Algorithm complexity analysis is very important for computer science people, because with the analysis we will be able to know the performance and efficiency of the algorithm we are analyzing. The insertion sort and selection sort algorithms will be our discussion by implementing them into the Java programming language by measuring the best (Best Case), worst (Worst Case), average (Average Case) conditions. Based on the results of the analysis, it was found that the insertion sort and selection sort algorithms have almost the same efficiency, only for the insertion sort algorithm has an advantage if there are numbers that are almost sorted.
Judul Paper: Complexity Analysis Between Insertion Sort and Selection Sort Algorithms and Implemented with the Java Programming Language
Keyword: Insertion Sort; Selection Sort; Pemrograman Java
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Messages are a means of communication between individuals. Messages come in a variety of forms, from general messages to confidential messages. Confidentiality within a message is crucial to ensure its security, preventing unauthorized parties from accessing it. Therefore, a technique for encrypting messages using the Vigenère Cipher cryptography algorithm emerged. This algorithm makes it difficult to guess the plaintext, even to cryptanalyze the ciphertext. Furthermore, messages (plaintext) encrypted with the Vigenère Cipher are embedded within a digital image using the LSB steganography method, ensuring the security of the secret message (plaintext).
Judul Paper: Study of Embedding Encrypted Text Messages in Digital Images Using the Vigenere Cipher Algorithm and Least Significant Bit Steganography
Keyword: Message; Vigenere Cipher; L
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Sending or exchanging data is a common occurrence in the world of information technology. Moreover, data transmission is carried out through cyber communication services, where the threat of crime is very common. To maintain data security, cryptography techniques can be used. Many cryptographic algorithms are used to secure messages, but the strength of the security of these messages is still weak. Improving message and key security is done with a hybrid algorithm. The hybrid method is done by combining the AES symmetric algorithm with OTP with the ECC (Elliptic Curve Cryptography) algorithm, namely ECDH (Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman). The AES and OTP algorithms are used for message encryption and decryption, while ECDH is used to determine and exchange keys, thus further increasing message security.
Judul Paper: Combination of Symmetry and ECC Algorithms to Improve Message Security
Keyword: ECC algorithm; AES algorithm; Message Security
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Passwords are used to protect confidential information. Some people create passwords by combining multiple characters to make them difficult to guess. However, if a system is combined with an SMS verification code sent by the system when a user attempts to log in, the system becomes more secure and can be accessed anywhere.
Judul Paper: Implementation of SMS Gateway for Verification Code
Keyword: Computer Security (Software); Data; SMS Gateway
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak:
Diabetes Mellitus (DM) is a dangerous disease and the fourth leading cause of death worldwide. The number of people with DM continues to increase by approximately 7 million each year. This increase is caused by changes in daily habits such as lack of activity, a habit of consuming foods high in fat and carbohydrates, and hereditary factors. These habits cause blood sugar levels to rise, leading to complications such as heart disease, kidney disease, and liver disease, as well as digestive disorders such as dyspepsia.

Dyspepsia has similar symptoms to DM, so in this study it was used as a diagnostic comparison. The application of the VFI5 algorithm to patient data was able to produce good prediction results with an average accuracy of 90% based on 3-fold cross-validation. The results of the training interval of the VFI5 algorithm indicated that DM and dyspepsia have similar symptoms, making it difficult for laypeople to differentiate the two conditions without laboratory testing.
Judul Paper: Prediction of Diabetes Mellitus Using Voting Feature Intervals 5 Classification Algorithm
Keyword: Diabetes Mellitus; Dyspepsia; Voting Feature Intervals 5; 3-fold Cross Validation; Klasifikasi.
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: The purpose of creating an information system is to help humans in many ways, including data processing and information delivery, this will be better if using an online-based information system. The final assignment information system was chosen by the author because there is still no online final assignment information system at AMIK Tunas Bangsa Pematangsiantar. This causes several problems such as slow delivery of information, students must submit a title submission form to the campus and so on. This system provides a solution for students in the process of designing their final assignments. This system includes title submissions, announcements, title acceptance or rejection, supervisor information and others. The author tried to build this system using the PHP programming language and MySQL Database so that it can be realized online. With this system, it will help students in carrying out final assignment procedures easily because it can be accessed anywhere and anytime.
Judul Paper: Information System for Online-Based Final Project Title Submission to Amik Tunas Bangsa Pematang Siantar
Keyword: Information Systems; Thesis
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The development of Information Technology has become increasingly rapid. Many agencies or companies that have used information systems for operational processes that manually become an automated and integrated system. One of which is a parking system. In Indonesia there are still many vehicle day care stations that use a parking system manually. This makes the parking attendant unfamiliar with the price set and the lengths of time parked the vehicle and make it difficult in the process of calculating the report of parked vehicles. For this reason, an integrated parking system is needed so that it can be applied to manual vehicle storage. So in making the parking system uses the concept of programming. The concept of the program to be used is the concept of Object Oriented Programming with the Java programming language and the editor uses Netbeans 8.2 to run the program. The method in conducting this research is to use 2 methods, namely the method for collecting data with the description method and the method for developing a waterfall system. With the parking system will provide convenience for parking users and also make efficient parking attendant performance. So expect speed, and accuracy in collecting vehicle parking at a vehicle storage in Indonesia.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Oriented Programming Concepts Objects in The Parking System Application Using Java Programming Language
Keyword: Java; object oriented programming; parking
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: Cryptography is the science or art to maintain the security of messages that include the security aspects such as confidentiality, data integrity and authentication. One method that is able to encrypt messages Affine Ciphers modified. Plaintext encrypted with Affine Cipher using the equation E (P) = (ax + b) mod m, where m is the size of the alphabet, a is an integer relatively prime to m, b is the number of shifts, x is the plaintext is converted to an integer of 0 to m-1 in accordance with the order of the alphabet, E (P) is ciphertext that is converted to an integer of 0 to m-1 in accordance with the order of the alphabet. Affine Ciphers ciphertext is decrypted by using the equation D(E(P))=a-1(E(P)-b) mod m in order to obtain the plaintext.
Judul Paper: Classical Cryptography Using Modified Affine Ciphers Method
Keyword: Affne Cipher, encryption , decrypton
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: Advances in information technology have increasingly facilitated the process of exchanging information, and this progress is inseparable from the existence of computers and the internet. However, alongside these technological advances, new problems have emerged, namely threats to data security. When information exchange takes place, the information sent is plaintext data and this is very risky if someone succeeds in intercepting the information, then that party will easily change the information before it reaches the actual recipient. The application of Digital Signature in the data transmission process is a solution to this problem. Because digital signatures are a mathematical way to show the authenticity of data. From several studies that have been conducted, digital signatures have been widely used and are able to build a secure system by combining digital signatures with various algorithms such as LSB Embedding, SHA-256, CRC32, Elliptic Curve, etc., will greatly support the generation of systems that are able to secure special data in the data authentication process.
Judul Paper: Analysis of the Application of Digital Signature as Authentication and Data Security
Keyword: Digital Signatures; Data Authentication; LSB Embedding; SHA; CRC3;
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: In the business world, generally users and owners of companies need something innovative to help support performance and facilitate the use or search for product data. The presence of this website-based internet will make it easier for all groups to access all forms of information, including utilizing the media to be able to connect the relationship between customers and the company's products, namely one of which is ordering bus tickets. Based on the various conveniences and uses of the internet, a "Utilization of Information Systems in Ordering and Digitizing Bus Tickets Based on Websites" was developed. This system is made with PHP, MySQL and Bootstrap software. This Information System is designed to provide convenience in terms of ticket ordering services and obtaining other information needed by customer
Judul Paper: Design and Construction of a Website-Based Bus Ticket Booking Information System
Keyword: Bus Ticket; Booking; Website; Information System; Codeigniter
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan
