Abstrak: Telegram is a free, non-profit, cloud-based, multi-platform instant messaging service that competes with WhatsApp (WA). Telegram enhances various features that WA has not yet developed, including the ability to send large files via Telegram. This feature facilitates the exchange of information and data. Telegram also provides security gaps involving both smartphones and computers. Crimes involving digital devices need to be minimized to assist the judicial process in addressing the potential impacts. Digital forensic investigations play a role in combating abuse of Telegram's instant messaging features, including investigative steps in handling cases of wiretapping of Telegram conversations through a series of standard steps according to digital forensic processes and procedures. Exploration of digital evidence in Telegram conversations will serve as a reference for the crime of wiretapping, which will then be followed by a forensic investigation report involving evidence from the victim's smartphone and computer. Mobile Forensic Analysis and Investigation on Android smartphones and dual web browser-based applications. The QR Code database requires authentication on the smartphone only once upon first login, requiring user vigilance, such as using a pattern lock on the smartphone and a user password login on the user's computer. The process of direct acquisition of the victim's smartphone and analysis of the web browser on the computer.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS PENYADAPAN PADA TELEGRAM DENGAN NETWORK FORENSIC
Keyword: Forensics, Investigation, Smartphone, Telegram,
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Market segmentation is a strategy for grouping potential consumers based on shared perceptions of needs and desires. In marketing strategies, market segmentation is essential because determining market segmentation is the foundation of marketing. However, market segmentation often encounters obstacles, such as lack of segmentation updates, neglecting potential consumers, and insufficient data. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to determine market segmentation through clustering, which involves grouping data according to consumer characteristics and comparing the results of the best clustering model. The data used are automotive sales market segmentation data taken from kaggle.com. The clustering methods used in this study are K-Means, DBSCAN, and Hierarchical, with KNIME software used in the modeling process. The results of this study indicate that the K-Means method is a good method for clustering. This is evident from the average Silhouette Coefficient K-Means value approaching 1, which is 0.716, while DBSCAN is 0.296 and Hierarchical is 0.301.
Judul Paper: COMPARISON OF RESULTS OF K-MEANS, DB SCANNER & HIERARCHICAL CLUSTERING METHODS FOR MARKET SEGMENTATION ANALYSIS
Keyword: Data Mining, K-Means, DBSCAN, Hierarchical, Silhouette Coefficient.
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Firefighters (Damkar), Branwir, or PMK are officers or agencies trained and tasked with combating fires. Unfortunately, the public still faces obstacles in reporting fires to officers because they are only available by telephone. Firefighter units are often late in arriving at the rescue location. This can be caused by four things. First, officers are not prepared. Second, heavy traffic on the way to the incident location. Third, residents who experience disasters are late in providing information to officers. Fourth, location information obtained from the public is unclear. There are several main features that can make it easier for the public to report, including GPS Photo Tagging, and Google Maps. Judul Paper: Design and Build an Android-Based Firefighter Reporting Application
Keyword: Reporting; Firefighter; GPS Photo Tagging; Google Maps

Design can use the electronic journal information system to solve problems in compiling a journal integration system based on software requirements analysis. In addition, the system development method used is a waterfall. The design uses UML, ERD, Wireframe, and database implementation using DBMS. The research results are realized in the form of a conceptual design of the system so that it can accommodate the needs to make the system. The development also can choose journals that are following their fields so that they can estimate open access journals based on the estimated submission time.
Judul Paper: PEMODELAN HASIL REKAYASA KEBUTUHAN PERANGKAT LUNAK SISTEM JURNAL ELEKTRONIK TERINTEGRASI "IDEOGRAM"
Keyword: Integration Systems, Software Engineering, Information Technology, Ideograms
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Choosing a study program is crucial for those wishing to continue their education at university. Mistakes in choosing a study program can significantly impact students during the learning process. There are many ways to determine the right study program for prospective students, one of which is through a fuzzy logic approach. This study applies fuzzy logic to the selection of study programs at the Faculty of Science and Technology. The data used is the 2021/2022 New Student Admissions (PMB) data.

Fuzzy logic encompasses the Fuzzy Inference System (FIS), and the method used is the Tsukamoto method. The Tsukamoto method has three essential stages: 1. Fuzzification to determine variables, sets, and domain values; 2. Inference to form rules and the Min implication function; and 3. Defuzzification using a weighted average method. This study yielded test results with an error value of 12.28% and an accuracy value of 87.72% from 57 prospective students sampled based on the variables of Mathematics, Indonesian, and English. It is hoped that further research can add related variables to increase accuracy in determining study programs for prospective new students.
Judul Paper: FUZZY INFERENCE SYSTEM METODE TSUKAMOTO UNTUK PENENTUAN PROGRAM STUDI FAKULTAS SAINS DAN TEKNOLOGI DI UNIVERSITAS MUHAMMADIYAH KALIMANTAN TIMUR
Keyword: Fuzzy Inference System; Fuzzy Tsukamoto Method; Determination of Study Program
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: This research is about a decision support system using the Simple Additive Weighting method to help determine the recipients of social assistance wich provided by the government with the aim to improve their standard of living. Wedomartani Village has a fairly large area with a large population. The problem is that the number of potential beneficiaries is not proportional to the available social assistance quota, so it is necessary to select recipients based on certain criteria to fit the target. The Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method has been used to determine the nomination of candidates for social assistance. From the results of data processing for prospective recipients of Bantuan Langsung Tunai Dana Desa (BLT-DD) in 2020, If the largest 25 are taken from it, it shows that the distribution of the poverty level of the population in the area is not evenly distributed, so a policy made by the sub-district government is needed for more specific poverty reduction.
Judul Paper: Clustering of Social Assistance Recipients Using the Simple Additive Weighting Method
Keyword: beneficiaries; decision support system; SAW; Social assistance
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: In developing a platform, optimal planning and database optimization are required so that the stored data can have good quality and can function effectively and efficiently. To optimize and overcome the risk of problems or errors that arise in database creation, it is necessary to test the database system, there are several ways or methods that can be used to measure database quality including aspects of relevance, truth, minimalism, and consistency. This study aims to determine and measure the quality of the database or database used in tour and travel information systems. The results of this study found recommendations for a more optimal database scheme and reduced redundancy so as to improve the integrity of the quality of a database in a tour and travel information system.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF QUALITY ASPECTS OF DATABASE SCHEMES IN TOUR AND TRAVEL INFORMATION SYSTEMS
Keyword: Data quality, database schema, tourist information
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Semarang, located in Central Java, boasts numerous tourist destinations, but most visitors are only familiar with a few, including Tugu Muda, Simpang Lima, Lawang Sewu, and others. Consequently, many other tourist attractions in Semarang remain under-visited and under-explored. The next issue concerns the local government's ongoing efforts to introduce tourist destinations, which still rely on outdated methods of manually introducing tourist attractions through brochures. The purpose of this research is to create a system that recommends tourist attractions in Semarang based on ratings using collaborative filtering. The desired outcome of this research is the creation of a system using collaborative filtering that can recommend tourist attractions based on comparison scores from other tourists. This system allows anyone to rate the site, thereby providing recommendations for the city of Semarang. This recommendation system can introduce new tourist attractions in Semarang, thereby generating new tourism potential in the city. Further development of this application can be done by making the system online so that it can be used by the public and can be developed with other recommendation methods such as content-based filtering.
Judul Paper: SISTEM REKOMENDASI TEMPAT WISATA DI KOTA SEMARANG MENGGUNAKAN METODE COLLABORATIVE FILTERING
Keyword: Collaborative Filtering; Recommendation System; Tourist attraction
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: This research is a progress report of the project entitled "Optimization of Production Capacitation to Obtain Maximum Profit with Linear Programming Simplex Method (Study on Alltho Beverage UMKM)". This project aims to help the owner of Alltho Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in optimizing the production and profit of their products. In this study, the linear programming method with the simplex method technique was used to find the optimal solution that maximizes the profits of Alltho UMKM. Data on the maximum capacity of raw materials and product selling prices are determining factors in the calculation. The three main products analyzed were Red Velvet Choco Royal, Choco Royal Oreo, and Greentea Choco Royal. The results showed that using the linear programming simplex method, the optimal production quantities of each product were 10.29 Red Velvet Choco Royal drinks and 11.76 Greentea Choco Royal drinks, while the production of Choco Royal Oreo should be temporarily stopped. These results indicate that Alltho MSMEs can achieve maximum profits of around IDR 227,942 by producing these products according to the recommended quantities. This research provides an important contribution to decision-making in MSME production management, helps improve efficiency in resource utilization, and provides an overview of the importance of applying mathematical techniques in optimizing MSME businesses in a competitive era.
Judul Paper: Optimizing Production Capacity to Obtain Maximum Profits with Simplex Linear Programming Method
Keyword: Optimization, production capacity, linear programming, resource utilization
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The background of this study is based on the challenges currently being faced by the Indonesian financial sector in terms of transparency and trust. Various cases that often occur such as data manipulation, fraud, and lack of accountability in the financial transaction process have drastically reduced public trust in financial institutions. Blockchain technology here is present as one of the potential solutions to overcome this problem, by offering a decentralized, transparent, and immutable financial recording system. This study aims to analyze the implementation of blockchain technology in increasing transparency and trust in the Indonesian financial sector. The research method used is qualitative with the Systematic Literature Review (SLR) approach. This research was conducted by collecting and analyzing relevant literature related to the implementation of blockchain in the financial sector, especially in Indonesia. The analysis process was carried out using the content analysis method in order to identify the benefits, challenges, and impacts of blockchain implementation on transparency and public trust. The results of the study show that blockchain has great potential in increasing transparency in the financial sector, by reducing the risk of data manipulation and increasing operational efficiency. However, several challenges are still faced, such as inadequate regulations, uneven technological infrastructure, and low digital literacy in the community. This study emphasizes the need for collaboration between the government, financial institutions, and the community to create an ecosystem that supports the widespread adoption of blockchain technology. With a collaborative approach, blockchain is expected to contribute significantly to strengthening a more transparent, accountable, and highly competitive financial ecosystem in the future. In addition, this study provides an understanding of the readiness of the Indonesian financial sector in facing technological changes and innovation opportunities in the future.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Information Technology, Risk, and Handling Complaints on the Interest of BSI Palangka Raya Customers in Using Internet Banking
Keyword: Blockchain, Decentralization, Trust, Financial Sector, Transparency
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: This research responds to the development of Internet Banking technology in the banking sector. Internet banking has become an integral part of financial institutions; however, risks and handling complaints about services can influence customer interest. The research aims to analyze the influence of information technology, risk, and complaint handling on the interest of BSI customers in Palangka Raya City in using Internet Banking, both partially and simultaneously. The research method is quantitative with a survey type, involving 96 respondents determined by the lemeshow formula. Data were collected through a questionnaire, and the analysis was conducted with prerequisite tests (normality, multicollinearity, and heteroskedasticity) and using multiple linear regression analysis, T-test, F-test, and coefficient of determination in SPSS 26. The research results show that information technology and risk partially have a positive and significant effect on customer interest in using internet banking, while handling complaints do not have a significant partial effect. The F-test indicates that simultaneously information technology, risk, and complaint handling are significant for customer interest. The coefficient of determination of 0.514 shows how well these three variables explain the variation in customer interest in using internet banking.
Judul Paper: Performance Analysis of Edge Detection Algorithms on Multispectral Images
Keyword: Handling Complaint, Interest, Information Technology, Risk
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: This research responds to the development of Internet Banking technology in the banking sector. Internet banking has become an integral part of financial institutions; however, risks and handling complaints about services can influence customer interest. The research aims to analyze the influence of information technology, risk, and complaint handling on the interest of BSI customers in Palangka Raya City in using Internet Banking, both partially and simultaneously. The research method is quantitative with a survey type, involving 96 respondents determined by the lemeshow formula. Data were collected through a questionnaire, and the analysis was conducted with prerequisite tests (normality, multicollinearity, and heteroskedasticity) and using multiple linear regression analysis, T-test, F-test, and coefficient of determination in SPSS 26. The research results show that information technology and risk partially have a positive and significant effect on customer interest in using internet banking, while handling complaints do not have a significant partial effect. The F-test indicates that simultaneously information technology, risk, and complaint handling are significant for customer interest. The coefficient of determination of 0.514 shows how well these three variables explain the variation in customer interest in using internet banking.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Information Technology, Risk, and Handling Complaints on the Interest of BSI Palangka Raya Customers in Using Internet Banking
Keyword: Handling Complaint, Interest, Information Technology, Risk
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: A weighing bridge is a series of equipment used to weigh goods vehicles or trucks. This equipment can be installed permanently or portable. On the weighing bridge there are several bridges that are used for weighing so as not to exceed the load, but in this research the weighing bridge in question is for weighing goods in the form of cardboard, materials, etc., this weighing bridge still does not use an application or is still recording manually, therefore This research aims to design a weighing bridge application using digital scales and an IP Cam. This research has a tool to connect the load cell to the application, namely RS232. The development of this application uses the waterfall method, and this research has its own research methodology and stages which are similar to the waterfall method. The application design uses the VB.NET programming language and SQLServer database. This application has several features, namely that it can record data from weighings, automatically the weighing value appears and can take pictures from CCTV on the weighing bridge for data proof that the data that has been entered is correct. From the methods that have been used in this research, they have been successful in designing applications, success can be seen from testing and applying the methodology chosen from this research. The test used in this research is BlackBox testing.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of a Digital Weighing Information System Using the Desktop-Based Waterfall Method
Keyword: Weighing Bridge, RS232, IP Cam, Digital Scales, VB.NET, SQLServer, Waterfall Method
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: All agency employees have the right to take leave, which is one of their rights and obligations. Many companies still carry out employee leave manually. TELKOM MEDAN VOCATIONAL SCHOOL still uses letters to process employee data. To overcome this problem, an information system was created to manage employee leave. With the Website-Based Employee Leave Application Information System at TELKOM MEDAN Vocational School, designing this website consists of several stages, including interviews, data collection, and data analysis observation. Then, using UML, each component is designed and analyzed.
Judul Paper: Designing a Website-Based Leave Application Information System
Keyword: Leave Application System, Employees, Website
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: In the current digital era, the use of information technology is very important to increase efficiency and convenience in various fields. This research aims to develop and implement a web-based student attendance information system at Teladan Pematangsiantar Vocational School. This system is designed to increase the efficiency and accuracy of the student attendance process. The system development methodology uses a literature review approach, needs analysis, system design, implementation and evaluation. This system utilizes web-based technology to provide access to real-time attendance databases, allowing for more efficient monitoring by school staff. Evaluation is carried out by involving the participation of students and school staff in using the system. This research makes a positive contribution to managing student attendance at Pematangsiantar Teladan Vocational School, by providing an efficient and integrated solution.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Student Attendance Information System at Pematangsiantar Teladan Vocational School
Keyword: Attendance Information System, Student Attendance, Website dan Framework Laravel.
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Technological developments are occurring rapidly in various areas of human life where manual data processing is slowly being abandoned and society is starting to realize the importance of the role of computers. In the world of education there is also a need for a system that can help with data processing, almost everything now uses technology, both in processing student data and for other purposes. However, the Gresik Muhammadiyah Elementary School school still uses manual attendance, namely using student attendance attendance books so that sometimes errors occur which make reports inaccurate and less effective. This also often happens when searching for data storage documents, sometimes the book is lost or sometimes the archive book is damaged. Apart from that, parents can only see their child's attendance report when the report cards are distributed so that in the attendance process currently implemented it is difficult for parents to monitor whether their child is actually going to school or playing somewhere else without the school knowing. Therefore, an information system is needed that is able to reduce or even eliminate deficiencies that arise in the process of processing attendance data that occur at SD Muhammadiyah Gresik. The aim is to make it easier to manage student attendance, help teachers to fill in student attendance, and be able to produce student attendance reports more quickly and accurately so that errors can be minimized. This online web-based school attendance system was built using waterfall model software, PHP programming language and MySQL database. This system allows us to provide solutions to make participation easier to use, as well as effective and efficient
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based School Attendance System at SD Muhammadiyah Gresik
Keyword: Technology, Website, School Attendance System, Waterfall
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The web-based Educational Development Contribution (SPP) Payment Administration Information System is a technology solution designed to make it easier to manage the administration of tuition fees within educational institutions. This system adopts a web-based approach to provide easy and transparent access for all stakeholders, including parents or guardians of students, administrative staff, and other related parties. The advantage of this system lies in its ability to carry out online payment transactions via a web platform, making it easier for people parents or guardians of students to pay tuition fees from anywhere and at any time. This system also provides automatic notifications to remind parents or guardians of students regarding payment due dates, reducing the risk of late payments. Data security is the main focus in designing this system. By using effective web security protocols, it is hoped that the implementation of this Web-Based Tuition Fee Administration Information System can bring significant benefits in increasing operational efficiency, transparency and ease of access in managing the administration of tuition fee payments in educational institutions.
Judul Paper: Website Based Tuition Payment Administration Information System
Keyword: information system, tuition payments, administration
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The East Java Province Department of Cooperatives and SMEs is taking advantage of advances in technological developments by providing online services. One of the services is, submitting a Cooperative Identification Number Certificate. The problems and difficulties that arise can affect the cooperative's acceptance of the use of the application for a Cooperative Identification Number certificate. For this reason, research was carried out entitled Measuring the Acceptance of Applications for Submitting NIK Certificates Using UTAUT and Social Influence Theory. The choice of UTAUT and Social Influence Theory as conceptual models was based on previous research conducted by Lim et al. (2023). The testing in this research used the SEM-PLS technique and was tested on SmartPLS 4 software. The research results showed that the performance expectancy and subjective norms variables had a significant positive effect on behavioral intention and the electric word of mouth variable had a positive effect on subjective norms and perceived risk. Through this research, insight into user acceptance of the NIK Certificate Submission Application can be understood as an evaluation for improving and improving services in the future.
Judul Paper: Measuring Acceptance of NIK Certificate Applications Using UTAUT and Social Influence Theory
Keyword: Application for NIK Certificate Submission, Social Influence Theory, SEM-PLS
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The Sungai Rotan District Office is located at Jalan Harapan No. 02 Desa Sukarami Kec. Sungai Rattan Kab. Muara Enim. After conducting research at the Sungai Rotan District Office, it was found that problems regarding the processing of social assistance (bansos) data were still manual. Where employees of the Sungai Rotan District Office still store social assistance (bansos) data, still in the form of files or notes in agenda books and do not have a database where when searching for information, they have to open files or agenda books that are old and take quite a long time. In making this final assignment, the authors designed a social assistance program where research was carried out by observation or interviews. The programming used is Sublime text 3 using the mysql database. The tools in designing this system are Unified Modeling Language (UML), Use Cases, Class Diagrams, Activity Diagrams. So that it can replace a system that is less effective and efficient. It is also hoped that this will facilitate reporting to the sub-district office and report social assistance data.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of a Web-Based Social Assistance Administration Report Application at the Sungai Rotan District Office
Keyword: Database, Administration, PHP MYSQL, UML
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The use of technology in various fields in the current era is very helpful to be more efficient. One of them is in utilizing information systems to process data. This research aims to analyze transaction data that is useful for small and medium business managers. The data collection methods used in this research are interviews and observations. Website development using Visual Studio with Python programming language and MySQL database. The information system designed consists of several pages including dashboard, master data, data exploration and fp-growth analysis page. The results of this study are in the form of an Information System for analyzing the fp-growth algorithm using the flask library to facilitate users in obtaining information on the results of the analysis. The pages contained in the system are the login page, dashboard page, master data page, data exploration page and fp-growth page which contains analysis results.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Data Mining in Information Systems Using Fp-Growth
Keyword: Data, Data Mining, Fp-Growth, Information System
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Based on the resulSSR of interviews with 14 active users of SIAMIK from XYZ, issues related to the user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) of SIAMIK were identified. The purpose of this research is to design the UI/UX of the SIAMIK website using the Lean UX method, aiming to achieve improved usability. This study will discuss the redesign of the SIAMIK UI/UX using the Lean UX method, which is user-centered and incorporates Lean and Agile principles to minimize resource waste and create a user-oriented product. The design evaluation phase will be conducted using three usability aspecSSR. The test resulSSR yielded an Effectiveness score of 97.0%, an Efficiency score of 97.0%, and a SUS (System Usability Scale) score of 83.50.
Judul Paper: UI/UX Redesign of the Academic Information System Website at XYZ University Using the Lean UX Method
Keyword: Academic Information System, Lean UX, Interface Design, Usability Testing
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: In today's era, the florist industry has evolved, offering a variety of products such as flower bouquets, floral arrangements, flower boards, and single flowers, both real and artificial. However, the process of ordering or renting florist services is currently inefficient. Therefore, the objective of this research is to design a mobile-based florist rental application using the Design Thinking method, with a focus on achieving excellent usability. Testing was conducted, resulting in a final effectiveness score of 94.54% and an efficiency score of 95.84%, both falling into the category of good or excellent. Additionally, in the satisfaction aspect, a final score of 81.8 was achieved, categorizing it as good and acceptable.
Judul Paper: Florist Rental Application Interface Design Using the Design Thinking Method
Keyword: Design Thinking, Usability Testing, Florist, UI/UX
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: In research or scientific articles, previous or relevant research is very important because it helps strengthen theories and phenomena of the relationship or influence between variables. In the literature research on accounting information systems, this article analyzes user involvement, personal technical skills, and top management support. These factors affect the accounting information system. Building a hypothesis of influence between variables is the aim of this paper. The results of this literature research are as follows: 1) User Involvement influences the Accounting Information System; 2) Personal Technical Ability influences the Accounting Information System; and 3) Top Management Support.
Judul Paper: The Influence of User Involvement, Personal Technical Ability and Top Management Support on Accounting Information System Performance
Keyword: Accounting Information System, User Involvement, Personal Technical Ability and Top Management Support
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: ShopeeFood and GoFood are food delivery services that are popular in the community. Both have similar products and services, which is why the competition is getting tougher. To remain competitive, companies must develop optimal strategies to achieve customer satisfaction. The purpose of this research is to determine the right competitive strategy by prioritizing the services offered by companies to customers in choosing food delivery services. The method used in this research is game theory with a descriptive research type. Data analysis techniques used descriptive analysis and SPSS to calculate the validity and reliability of the data. Data is collected through questionnaires distributed to users of the application. From the results of game theory calculations, Shopeefood and GoFood get an optimal game value of 6. The game is solved with a pure ShopeeFood strategy, namely a promotional strategy with a probability of 6. Meanwhile, GoFood also uses a promotional strategy with a probability of 6. In this case, the best strategy is optimal for both services is to improve the promotion strategy.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Competition Strategy Between Shopeefood and Gofood Using Game Theory
Keyword: ShopeeFood, GoFood, Game Theory
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: In the era of technological advances and financial deregulation policies, competition between banks is getting tougher. M-Banking is a provider of various facilities to make it easier for customers to carry out online transactions. Nonetheless, some concerns still exist regarding the security and feasibility of the features provided by each bank. In this study, Signaling Theory is used to explore the level of customer satisfaction in utilizing m-banking services. The purpose of this study is to compare the feasibility of features, ease of access, and security of Mobile Banking transactions at three leading banks in Indonesia, namely BNI, BCA and BRI, from the point of view of customer preference. This research will use quantitative methods by collecting data through a survey using a questionnaire. It is hoped that the results of this study can provide a picture of preferences for customers in each bank, so that it can be taken into consideration in improving work systems and services to customers compared to other banks. The variables to be examined are the characteristics of each bank such as service, feasibility of features, interface design, and convenience for customers to access M-Banking.
Judul Paper: Mobile Banking Services in Indonesia: Review of User Perceptions and Expectations at BCA, BNI and BRI Using Signal Theory
Keyword: M-Banking, Bank, Customer Satisfaction, Signaling Theory, Feasibility of Features, Ease of Access, Transaction Security, User Experience.
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak:
Given the development of emerging digital banks in Indonesia, Allo Bank emerged as a digital bank that implemented something different to compete with other digital banks. The purpose of this study was to determine the reasons for Allo Bank's choice of the Allo Bank Festival event marketing strategy, to identify the target audience for the Allo Bank Festival, to identify the communication objectives for the Allo Bank Festival, to identify the Allo Bank Festival communication design, to identify the Allo Bank Festival communication channels, to determine the Allo Bank Festival communication budget, to identify the Allo Bank Festival communication mix, and to identify the results of the Allo Bank Festival communication. This study employed a case study method with a qualitative approach, in which the author conducted interviews and documentation studies to collect data. Interviews were conducted with six informants: employees of Allo Bank and CXO Media, as well as visitors to the Allo Bank Festival.

The results indicate that Allo Bank chose the Allo Bank Festival event marketing strategy based on a situational analysis that examined trends at the time. In implementing this strategy, Allo Bank significantly benefited from CT Corp, its parent company, which is one of the largest business ecosystems in Indonesia, enabling smooth planning and implementation. However, Allo Bank also plans each stage of its strategy with careful consideration and planning so that all persuasive messages are well received and create a high increase in awareness and new users.
Judul Paper: ALLO BANK EVENT MARKETING STRATEGY IN INCREASING ALLO BANK USERS (CASE STUDY AT ALLO BANK FESTIVAL EVENT)
Keyword: Event Marketing, Increasing Users, Allo Bank
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: In Medan City, vaccination services are still not fully publicized, and information on vaccination locations is still limited. This has resulted in many people not receiving vaccinations due to a lack of information on vaccination locations and the distance between them. Researchers have developed an Android-based vaccine location search application that displays information on vaccination location distances, vaccination schedules, and vaccination quota stock information. This application uses a geolocation map, which functions to directly search for locations based on the nearest location using the Euclidean distance method. It is hoped that users can find their desired vaccination location by utilizing the closest distance to reach the desired location. In the case of determining the closest distance between the location of the Medan City Health Office with Latitude 3.5893899 and Longitude 98.6636413 to the vaccination location at the Darussalam Community Health Center with Latitude 3.5858931 and Longitude 98.6506429, the location of the Medan City Health Office with Latitude 3.5893899 and Longitude 98.6636413 to the vaccination location at the Glugur Darat Community Health Center with Latitude 3.6151332 and Longitude 98.6769036 using the Euclidean Distance method with the specified route. The results of the distance calculation are still in decimal degrees (according to the longlat format used) so that to adjust it, it needs to be multiplied by 111,319 km (1 degree of the earth = 111,319 km).
Judul Paper: Design and Development of a Vaccine Location Search Application at Community Health Centers in Medan City Using the Android-Based Euclidean Distance Method
Keyword: Location, Vaccine, Android, Euclidean Distance
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The purpose of making a Desktop-based application in Bukit Lama Palembang village that has been made is to help the admin and service staff of the village and Lurah to be able to find out who the residents who submit letters every month and manage the data of residents who submit letters can be archived well, and can find out the process of making Letters has been there until where . This desktop application is one of the calculation media in calculating the progress of services to citizens .Making this desktop application is made with supporting applications, namely Netbeans and for database design using the My SQL application. The writing methodology used is an iterative method by observing the running system, conducting interviews and collecting data to produce the information needed. The results of making this desktop application can help the admin to make a report on anyone filing a letter and what letters are made.
Judul Paper: GENERAL LETTER MANAGEMENT AND ARCHIVING APPLICATION IN THE BUKIT AMA PALEMBANG DISTRICT
Keyword: Desktop,Netbeans, My SQL, iterative, management, archiving
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak:
This research aims to improve the accuracy of heavy equipment failure prediction at Grand Indo Perkasa, a coal mining company in South Sumatra. Heavy equipment failures are a frequent critical issue that can hamper operations, increase costs, and reduce productivity. To address this issue, this research developed a web-based application using the C4.5 Decision Tree algorithm, designed to analyze historical failure data and predict potential problems more accurately.

The research process included data collection through observation, interviews, and literature review, as well as system modeling using UML tools. The data used consisted of information related to five types of heavy equipment, totaling 58 series, 9 brands, and 16 models. The C4.5 algorithm was applied to determine patterns from failure attributes, generating a decision tree that underpins the prediction system. The gain calculation identified the ninth attribute as the root node, serving as the basis for subsequent decisions.

The results showed that this application improved heavy equipment management efficiency by reducing downtime and accelerating diagnostics. The web-based implementation provided the advantage of high accessibility, enabling technicians and managers to monitor equipment conditions in real time and take timely preventive actions. This research proves that the integration of the Decision Tree algorithm with web-based applications is an effective solution to support operations in the coal mining sector.
Judul Paper: Automating Static Content and Dynamic Behavior of E-Commerce Web Using PT Multi Sinar Teknik's Content Based Filtering Method
Keyword: Decision Trees; Damage Prediction; C4.5; Coal Mining
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: In the era of globalization, advances in information and communication technology have brought significant changes to various aspects of human life, including the way we interact with digital devices. One prominent innovation is Speech Recognition technology, which is part of the Web Speech API in the JavaScript programming language. This technology is able to understand and process spoken language, recognize human voices, and convert them into text on a computer. Speech Recognition technology plays a crucial role in online Speech to Text applications. This technology is implemented directly in the browser and can be accessed through the Web Speech API in JavaScript. Because humans can generally speak faster than they type, online Speech to Text applications are designed to facilitate activities related to typing or note-taking. This application uses a Deep Learning algorithm equipped with the Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) method. The RNN method, as part of the Deep Learning algorithm, has the ability to learn patterns from complex and abstract data. This makes it very effective in image recognition, natural language processing, speech recognition, and many other fields. Therefore, RNN is the right method to be applied in the Deep Learning algorithm in online Speech to Text applications.
Judul Paper: Implementasi Algoritma Deep Learning pada Aplikasi Speech to Text Online dengan Metode Recurrent Neural Network (RNN)
Keyword: Speech to Text; Speech Recognition; Algoritma Deep Learning; Metode Recurrent Neural Network (RNN); Web Speech API
Jurnal: SUDO JURNAL TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: This study aims to compare the performance of two prediction methods, namely Monte Carlo and K-Nearest Neighbors (K-NN), in predicting student scores on the Vocational Competency Test (UKK). Monte Carlo is known as a statistical method that uses random simulation to produce predictive results, while K-NN is a machine learning method that uses nearest neighbors for classification and regression. In this study, student score data was collected and divided into training data and test data. The prediction accuracy of both methods was calculated and compared. The results showed that the Monte Carlo method provided a prediction accuracy of 85.26%, while the K-NN method provided a prediction accuracy of 85.37%. Thus, K-NN slightly outperformed Monte Carlo in terms of prediction accuracy. This study provides valuable insights in choosing a more effective prediction method for evaluating student scores on the UKK.
Judul Paper: Comparison of Prediction Systems Using the Monte Carlo Method with the K-NN Method on Students' Vocational Competency Test Scores
Keyword: Accuracy; K-Nearest Neighbors; Monte Carlo; Prediction; Vocational Competency Test
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Scabies in cats is a common health problem and requires proper treatment to prevent the spread and complications. Scabies is a skin disease caused by mites that nest and lay eggs on the skin, especially in the ears. This disease is also a disease that can be transmitted from cat to cat and from cat to human. Due to the lack of knowledge among cat owners about scabies in cats, an expert system application was built to diagnose scabies in cats to make it easier for cat owners to identify scabies in cats. An expert system is a system built by utilizing artificial intelligence that can think like an expert. This expert system contains knowledge about scabies based on the symptoms experienced by cats. Based on the data obtained, the author used the K-Nearest Neighbor algorithm. The K-Nearest Neighbor algorithm is an algorithm with a working system that finds the closest distance or neighbor between training data and test data based on predetermined weight values. The K-Nearest Neighbor algorithm is used as a calculation in expert system applications in diagnosing scabies.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the K-Nearest Neighbor Algorithm in an Expert System Application in Diagnosing Scabies in Cats
Keyword: Scabies pada Kucing; Sistem Pakar; Algoritma K-Nearest Neighbor
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: Security is the most important thing in life. Everyone needs more security in their residence. It is hoped that a well-designed security system will provide a sense of security and comfort. In addition, of course, the security system that will be created will help reduce the crime rate in society, especially theft. Current door security such as using conventional keys. So, it is less efficient to use on doors because too many keys must be carried, besides conventional keys are easily opened by thieves. In this study, the author created a door security tool to help the community. This tool was created by the author to enable the community to experience developments such as doors that can be controlled via smartphone and monitored automatically using ESP32 CAM and security to open a room based on Internet of Things (IOT) technology through internet network media. Based on the tests carried out, this system is able to respond well to the security of a room.
Judul Paper: Design and Build Door Security Using ESP 32 CAM and Blynk Based on the Internet of Things
Keyword: Internet of Things; Keamanan; Kunc
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: In today's digital era, server stability and security are crucial for the continuity of business and organizational operations. This research develops a system that integrates server temperature monitoring and control with an automatic database backup mechanism, using a case study at PT Hasan Network Group. This system is designed to address two key issues in server management: the risk of overheating, which can lead to hardware damage, and data loss due to system failure. Temperature monitoring is performed in real time using a DHT22 temperature and humidity sensor module installed on the server. The obtained temperature data is sent to a control center via an Orange Pi Zero mini PC, which serves as a processing and control center. The received data is analyzed to detect abnormal conditions. If the temperature exceeds a predetermined limit, the control system will activate additional cooling mechanisms to prevent overheating and automatic database backup to prevent data loss when the server is forced to shut down in the event of overheating. It will then provide automatic notifications via Telegram Bot. Test results at PT Hasan Network Group show that the developed system is able to maintain server temperatures within safe limits and perform data backup effectively. Implementation of this system is expected to improve server reliability and security, as well as minimize the risk of data loss and hardware damage.
Judul Paper: Temperature Monitoring & Control System with Database Server Backup Mechanism at PT Hasan Network Group
Keyword: Control System; Monitoring; Automatic; Temperature
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: The role of technological advancement is increasingly rapid in today's digital era. The Internet of Things is a tool that makes everything in all activities easier and connects people from far to near. to learn about designing a smart home system that focuses on controlling the opening and closing of doors using the Internet of Things (IoT) in prototype form. This construction uses an Arduino Uno as a control center to control the process of opening and closing the gate, as well as to connect the Arduino Uno to the internet via the NodeMCU ESP8266. Thingspeak functions as a server and intermediary between the smartphone and the gate. Functioning as an intermediary, the smartphone functions as a controller and sends commands to the Arduino Uno. These commands are then processed by the Arduino Uno via the ESP8266, which is connected to the internet. Thus, the initial command given by the Android smartphone can be executed by other electronic parts, such as limit switches, current flow motors, and buzzers. Thus, the Internet of Things allows Android smartphones to control the gate remotely. The goal is to make the process of opening and closing the gate easier and save time. Thus, what was initially operated manually can now be operated automatically and more efficiently anywhere and anytime. The research results obtained work well from an Android smartphone used to control the Arduino, so that the prototype can run, the Thingspeak server sends commands to the Arduino Uno via the smartphone. This research used a 7 volt voltage. The gate takes approximately 5 seconds to close and open.
Judul Paper: Turnstile Remote Control System Design Via the Internet of Things
Keyword: Turnstile Remote Control System Design Via the Internet of Things
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: In the Islamic University of North Sumatra (UISU) environment, the Wide Area Network (WAN) plays a very important role in supporting operations and collaboration between faculties and administrative units. It still relies on static routing as the primary method for managing communication routes in its network. However, to improve network efficiency and reliability, this study aims to switch to the OSPF (Open Shortest Path First) Routing Protocol as a more adaptive dynamic routing method. One of the main problems is limited flexibility and responsiveness when changes in network topology or the addition of devices. OSPF allows automatic recognition of these changes, reducing the need for complex manual updates on each router. OSPF's ability to automatically resolve network failures is also a significant advantage. In situations where network reliability is a must, OSPF can detect and respond to failures quickly, minimizing downtime and maintaining smooth network services.
Judul Paper: Performance Analysis of the Open Shortest Path First (OSPF) Routing Protocol on the Islamic University of North Sumatra Network
Keyword: UISU; Network Topology; OSPF; Routing Protocol; WAN
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Tuberculosis (TB) is an infectious disease caused by the bacterium Mycobacterium tuberculosis, a pathogen that most successfully infects the lungs. The most frequently used TB diagnosis technique is through a chest (lung) X-ray examination. X-ray results can be viewed visually by doctors to see if there are characteristics and patterns of TB disease in patients. This study focuses on Artificial Intelligence (AI) to assist doctors and provide an alternative, efficient solution in diagnosing patients, whether the patient has TB or not more quickly. This study was designed using a Multi-Scale Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify tuberculosis based on chest X-ray images. The data used in the form of chest X-ray images are used as input for the image processing process. The collected dataset amounted to 1400 data consisting of two classes: normal lungs and lungs of tuberculosis patients. The CNN model consists of 3 convolution layers measuring 3x3, 3 pooling layers (Maxpool) measuring 2x2 and 1 fully connected layer that uses softmax activation. The filter used in each convolution layer is 128. This study uses the Adam Optimizer algorithm. The dataset is divided into 1120 data in scenario 1 and 978 data in scenario 2 for training and 280 data in scenario 1 and 422 data in scenario 2 for testing. In the training process, an epoch value of 20 was used to obtain an accuracy value of 100% in all scenarios. In the testing phase, an accuracy value of 99.29% was produced in scenario 1 and 97.67% in scenario 2.
Judul Paper: Classification of Tuberculosis Based on Thorax X-ray Images Using Multi-Scale Convolutional Neural Network
Keyword: Tuberculosis; Convolutional Neural Network; Multi-Scale; Thorax; X-Ray
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: In the 21st century learning process, technology plays an important role as a tool in achieving the learning process. Therefore, this study aims to produce a prototype of an educational game that can be a tool for students as a supplement in understanding the material both at school and elsewhere. The research method used in this study uses Design Thinking which consists of 5 stages: Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, and test. In this study, several samples were used, namely a random group of students with elementary school level criteria who studied mathematical operations of addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division, as well as from the teacher who validated the material during the learning process. The results of the study showed an average value of 82.25% with a grade score of A and showed Acceptable in the test. It is hoped that this game learning media can be used with good quality that meets validity, practicality, and effectiveness and can be more interesting for students' understanding.
Judul Paper: Android Educational Game User Interface Design on Mathematical Calculation Operation Subjects using the Design Thinking Method
Keyword: Gamification; Design Thinking; Android; Learning Materials; Mathematics
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: Many PC users maintain optimal processor, memory, and graphics card components. Therefore, overclocking is necessary for users who want to increase speed but don't have a significant budget. Overclocking is commonly used for gaming, heavy-duty tasks, video editing, and 3D rendering. The processor used in this study was an AMD Ryzen 5 5600X with a default clock speed of 3.7GHz and a maximum boost clock of 4.6GHz. In this study, two tests were conducted: using Cinebench R23 software and the Call of Duty: Warzone game application. Testing was carried out to obtain comparative results between the CPU that had not been overclocked and one that had been overclocked. This research used a qualitative method. Qualitative methods are oriented towards phenomena or indications that occur in the surrounding area. In contrast, the approach used in this qualitative research is an experimental approach that aims to find certain conditions after being influenced under controlled conditions. So it can be seen that using the AMD Ryzen 5600x CPU in the rendering process using the cinebench R23 software after overclocking gets results above the average of the AMD Ryzen 5600x CPU base clock but for the temperature produced in the rendering process in overclocked conditions is very high therefore a cooling fan or additional fan from the aftermarket is needed. Then to play the Call of Duty: Warzone game with the AMD Ryzen 5600x processor can still be relied upon and is capable of being seen in the Call of Duty: Warzone game test, the fps results before overclocking reached 344fps and after overclocking reached 357fps where in both of these comparisons in playing the Call of Duty: Warzone game did not feel laggy (stuttering).
Judul Paper: Optimizing Computer Performance through Overlocking Techniques on the AMD Ryzen 5 5600x Processor
Keyword: Overclock; Prosessor; CPU; AMD; Benchmark
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Cataracts are clouding of the lens of the eye caused by fibrous calcification of the lens capsule or lens material. The WHO estimates that approximately 18 million people are blind in both eyes due to cataracts, which accounts for a total of 47.8% of all causes of blindness. Cataracts can be treated by detecting the disease early to reduce the damage caused by the disease with the help of an ophthalmologist. In Indonesia itself, access to an ophthalmologist is sometimes quite difficult to find, especially in rural areas of Indonesia. Therefore, this study will build a classification model used to detect cataracts early using machine learning using the Convolutional Neural Network method. Based on the results of the study, it was found that the model built with the CNN method can detect cataracts well, as evidenced by an accuracy rate of 92.5%. Thus, this model can be used to detect cataracts early. Then the model can be integrated into various platforms such as mobile-based applications for ease of use.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm in Early Identifying Cataract Eye Disease
Keyword: Mata; Katarak; Deep Learning; Convolutional Neural Network; Classification
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Data transfer is the process of sending information data from one place to another using a transmission medium. The transmitted information can be audio, video, facts or software. USB (Universal Serial Bus) is usually used to connect electronic devices. USB has several types including type A, type B, type C, micro USB, mini USB, lightning and USB micro B superspeed. Each type has a different shape and size and some of them support data transfer at higher speeds. In this study, a comparison of experiments was conducted using USB type A to C and USB type C to C by comparing the two types. The results showed that USB type C is superior to USB type A. With USB type A to C with an 8 GB file at a speed of 239 MB / s while USB type A to C with an 8 GB file at a speed of 239 MB / s.
Judul Paper: Analisis Kinerja Transfer Data pada Universal Serial Bus (USB) Type A to C dan Type C to C
Keyword: Transfer Data; USB A; USB C
Jurnal: SUDO JURNAL TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Data security is very important in maintaining the confidentiality of information, especially those containing sensitive information whose contents should only be known by authorized parties, especially if the transmission is carried out via a public network, if the data is not secured first, it will be very easy to be intercepted and the contents of the information known by irresponsible parties. Therefore, researchers will apply the ElGamal and XOR algorithms to be able to provide data security in text. The XOR algorithm is a simple algorithm that uses logical principles. While the ElGamal algorithm emphasizes the strength of its key on solving discrete logarithm problems. By utilizing large prime numbers and quite difficult discrete logarithm problems. text messages have layered security because they have many keys by combining the ElGamal and XOR algorithms.
Judul Paper: Securing Text Data Using the Elgamal Cryptography Algorithm and XOR from Hacker Attacks
Keyword: Cryptography; Elgamal; XOR; Text
Jurnal: Data Science: Journal of Computing and Applied Informatics

Abstrak: The North Sumatra Communication and Informatics Office has been manually managing public information analysis using Microsoft Excel. This is certainly inefficient considering the large number of articles received and the limited data that may be out of sync. Therefore, an information system was created that can monitor public opinion in online media. This system is expected to simplify the work of staff in monitoring public opinion, making it more efficient and effective, thereby improving the quality of service. This system was designed using Visual Studio Code as a text editor, PHP as a web builder, Bootstrap as an interface design, and MySQL as a database. This research resulted in a Web-Based Public Opinion Monitoring Information System in Online Media.
Judul Paper: Design of a Diskominfo Public Opinion Monitoring Information System on Online Media using the Rapid Application Development Method
Keyword: Sistem Informasi; Monitoring; Opini Publik; Rapid Application Development
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Users of the Mandatory Tuberculosis Notification (Wifi TB) application were implemented in the Purwakarta District Clinic environment. In this study, a pre-research questionnaire was distributed as supporting data for the research distributed to officers in the District Clinic environment. Several problems were found that were felt by users of the Mandatory Tuberculosis Notification (Wifi TB). Problems felt by users when accessing the Mandatory Tuberculosis Notification (Wifi TB) include, there are features in the system that do not function properly, frequent server downtime, the system is less responsive, the display is less attractive and difficult to understand, not user friendly, users feel the system is difficult to operate. This ultimately leads to different levels of satisfaction for each user. The purpose of this study is to examine what factors can influence user satisfaction of the Mandatory Tuberculosis Notification (Wifi TB) Application. The research model used is DeLone & McLean. This research data processing uses SPSS version 26.0 and IBM SPSS and SmartPLS 4 applications. The results of this study are the 1st hypothesis Service Quality (SQR) has a positive and significant effect on User Satisfaction (US), the 2nd hypothesis System Quality (SQ) has a positive and significant effect on User Satisfaction (US), the 3rd hypothesis Information Quality (SQL) has a positive and significant effect on User Satisfaction (US) the 4th hypothesis User Satisfaction (US) has a positive and significant effect on Net Benefit (NB).
Judul Paper: Analysis of User Satisfaction Levels of the TB Wifi Application using the Delon and Mclean Method
Keyword: End User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS); DeLone & WIFI TB
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: The rapid development of technology has affected all aspects of life. Students are more interested in interesting interactive educational learning methods than conventional learning from textbooks. Students of Andaawai Catholic Elementary School lack a good understanding of using Indonesian, resulting in minimal recognition of animal names. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to build a learning application for recognizing animal names in Indonesian and the East Sumba (Karera) regional language. The research method used is RAD (Rapid Application Development) which includes requirements planning, system design, development and implementation. Based on the results of black box testing, all features and functions in the learning application for recognizing animal names on the Andaawai SDK based can run well. The results of the application effectiveness test on students in grades 3-6 of the Andaawai SDK. Shows that the application can improve students' abilities related to animal names in Indonesian. The test results obtained a pre-test score of 61 and a post-test score of 85. So that the increase in student scores reached 39%. The results of the application effectiveness test on the same students also improved their abilities related to animal names in the East Sumba (Karera) language. The results obtained were a pre-test score of 58 and a post-test score of 69. So there was an increase in ability of 19%.
Judul Paper: Android-Based Application for Learning Animal Name Recognition Using the RAD (Rapid Application Development) Method
Keyword: Application; Learning; Animal Names; RAD (Rapid Application Development)
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The Department of Energy and Mineral Resources (ESDM), especially in the field of geology, is inseparable from the Technical Recommendations for drilling permits and groundwater exploitation permits. The large amount of incoming data makes it difficult to search for stored data because it has to open old data and search one by one, it will take a long time, and cause employees to have difficulty in making the final summary in the required period, this is because data processing is done manually in the ledger, then it will be summarized using Microsoft Excel. Therefore, it is necessary to design an information system which is one of the effective steps in data processing. In designing the information system that will be created later, it will be website-based with the Rapid Application Development (RAD) method because it only takes a short time at the stage of creating an information system, in building the system, system development tools are used, namely Use Case Diagrams, Flowmaps, and Sequence Diagrams and by using the PHP and HTML programming languages ​​and MYSQL as the database. The result of this study is the creation of a Web-based information system for processing technical recommendations for drilling permits and groundwater exploitation permits in the field of geology.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Technical Recommendation Data Processing Information System
Keyword: Information Systems; Data processing; Website; Technical Recommendations; RAD (Rapid Application Development)
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The security of belongings for each library visitor is a matter that requires careful attention. Therefore, every library always provides temporary storage, such as a library locker. Lockers are generally used to store valuable items such as novels, writing utensils, food containers, and the like. The presence of lockers can simplify a person's carrying, so their bags are not too heavy. Lockers are usually equipped with a simple security system, secured only by a key held by the owner or user. Incidents of keys being lost or items inside the locker often occur due to the negligence of the locker owner. This also occurred at the ITS NU Pekalongan library. Therefore, a systematic locking system is needed to prevent keys from being duplicated and to minimize the risk of losing keys or items. The method in this research can then be developed qualitatively based on the research, where the author created a system using a database to organize the recording of library locker usage so that all users can access the library locker from time to time. It is hoped that this system, which is designed based on RFID, will grow into a professional prototype in the future.
Judul Paper: MySQL Based Library Locker Security Tag RFID Design Concept
Keyword: RFID; Security; Lockers; Library; ITS NU Pekalongan
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Ad-Durah IT Middle School was established in 2020, located at Jalan Marelan Raya No. 5 Medan. This integrated Islamic educational institution has students with high potential in achieving their future goals and getting extensive education in all aspects of life. One of the efforts made is by improving the Library service system. The library service system at Ad-Durah IT Middle School in processing administrative data is still manual, so it still finds many problems and hinders the service process for students. Because there are still many problems found in processing book data and the lack of information related to books that have been borrowed from students, software is needed to make it easier for librarians to process library data and services provided to students at Ad-Durah IT Middle School. To create a library service with the PHP Laravel framework using the bubble sort algorithm, there are several stages that must be carried out such as planning, modeling, construction, deployment. At the planning stage, a plan is made to build the service system that will be created, at the modeling stage, a system architecture is designed and modeled that focuses on data structure design, then the construction stage starts the implementation in the form of translating the design and modeling of the system that will be created and the final stage of deployment is implementing customer software, as well as periodic software maintenance. The results of this study are expected to make it easier for librarians to improve the service system and book data management and maximize book lending transactions, book returns, and can make it easier for students to find library books. The service system built uses the Laravel framework and uses the Bubble Sort algorithm.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Bubble Sort Algorithm in a Library Service System Using Laravel
Keyword: Laravel; Library Service System; PHP; Junior high school
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: With the rapid advancement of information technology, the need for effective educational platforms has become pressing. ITB AAS Indonesia has taken steps to meet this need by developing an e-learning system using the CodeIgniter framework. This paper discusses the development process of the e-learning platform designed to provide an enhanced learning experience for students and faculty. By adopting a user-centered approach and applying structured development methods, this system offers advanced features that support remote learning, user interaction, and educational content management. Evaluation results indicate that this platform enhances accessibility and efficiency in the teaching and learning process, significantly contributing to modern education in Indonesia
Judul Paper: Development of E-Learning Web for ITB AAS Indonesia Using CodeIgniter Framework
Keyword: Development, E-learnign, Codeigniter, Framework
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: This study aims to implement an inventory checking system combined with Finite State Machine (FSM) in the Role Playing Game (RPG) game genre using Arnold Hendrick's Game Development Life Cycle (GDLC) development method. In RPG games, inventory management is a crucial aspect that affects the gameplay, especially in the management of quests and item crafting features. The FSM approach is used to manage state and state transitions in randomly completed quests, providing more flexible dynamics in the completion of in-game tasks. The GDLC method was chosen to ensure that system development is carried out in a structured manner, starting from planning, design, implementation, to testing. This research integrates FSM in  the RPG Maker MV game engine, which allows developers to dynamically set various quest variables and optimize the item crafting process. By implementing FSM, items can be combined based on predefined state conditions, creating a more complex and interactive gameplay experience. The results of this study show that the application of FSM in the inventory checking system has a significant impact on flexibility in quest management and crafting. Quest variables that can be completed freely according to the player's choice, Overall, Finite State Machine can provide interactivity and depth of gameplay in RPGs with various quests that are tiered with each level, especially in the use of RPG Maker MV as an engine to apply various supporting variables to create flexibility in completing missions.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Inventory Checking System Using Finite State Machine in Role Playing Game
Keyword: Finite State Machine,Rpg Game Engine, Inventory
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: In this era of computerization, the human need for information drives the rapid development of technology in the fields of information and telecommunication technology. With the current developments in information technology, data processing can be done easily. Manual data entry has several drawbacks, including the potential for errors in writing and reading, and it is also prone to loss or damage. From the aforementioned issues, the author has developed a web-based inventory management information system to facilitate the management of stock data. The purpose of creating this inventory management system application is to help integrate data properly and enable easy and accurate data processing. The development of this system uses the waterfall system design method, which can help in the creation of the system by following a sequential process. This method is carried out starting from the stages of requirement analysis, system and software design, implementation, system testing, and maintenance. The design tool uses UML (Unified Modeling Language) to create use case diagrams, activity diagrams, and class diagrams. The data collection system uses observation, interviews, documentation, and literature study methods, and employs the PHP programming language and MySQL as the database. Based on the testing results, this information system can process incoming and outgoing item data, store data, and generate reports.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Inventory Management Application Using PHP and MySQL
Keyword: Technology, Website, School Attendance System, Waterfall
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: This paper addresses the critical need for a revised systems engineering framework to ensure the safety and security of LiDAR perception software in autonomous vehicles. Traditional approaches, often rooted in waterfall methodologies, prove inadequate in addressing the complexity, stringent safety requirements (ISO 26262), and evolving cybersecurity threats inherent in this rapidly advancing field.  We propose a novel framework that integrates best practices from Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), agile development, formal methods, and security-by-design principles, creating a holistic approach to development and validation.  This framework directly tackles the limitations of traditional methods by incorporating iterative development cycles, rigorous verification and validation processes, and proactive security measures throughout the entire lifecycle.  The framework’s practical application is demonstrated through a comparative case study analyzing DBSCAN and Euclidean clustering algorithms for object detection within a safety-critical Autonomous Emergency Braking (AEB) system. This case study highlights the importance of algorithm selection, parameter optimization, and the crucial role of testing methodologies in achieving both high performance and compliance with ISO 26262 safety standards.  Our analysis reveals significant performance differences between the algorithms, underscoring the necessity of a rigorous and data-driven approach to algorithm selection and validation within a comprehensive systems engineering framework.  The research concludes by outlining key areas for future investigation, including advancements in algorithmic efficiency, robust sensor fusion strategies, enhanced cybersecurity measures (addressing both known and emerging threats), and the development of standardized testing and validation procedures to ensure the continued improvement and widespread adoption of safe and reliable autonomous driving systems.  This holistic framework offers a significant contribution to the ongoing effort of building more robust and trustworthy autonomous vehicles, directly addressing the challenges of safety, security, and reliability in this rapidly evolving technology.
Judul Paper: Development of an Augmented Reality (AR)-Based Indoor Navigation Application for Evacuation and Emergency Handling in UIN Sunan Ampel Surabaya Building
Keyword: Augmented Reality,Indoor navigation, A, Algoritma, Unity, Navmesh
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The management of emergency situations in buildings is a crucial aspect of occupational health and safety (OHS). Fast and efficient evacuation is essential to ensure the safety and well-being of all individuals within the building. To address this need, this research developed a marker-based augmented reality (AR) application to support evacuation and emergency handling. The application was built using the Unity game engine, the A* algorithm for navigation, and Unity Navmesh for environment modeling. The development process followed systematic research methods, including needs analysis, design, development, testing, and system evaluation. Implemented in C# programming language, the application integrates ARCore for AR features and ZXing for QR code decoding. Testing results demonstrated that the application provides accurate and efficient evacuation guidance, with a navigation accuracy averaging a margin of error of 1.12 meters. Additionally, the Image Tracking feature enables recognition of emergency equipment, further supporting emergency response. The application functions reliably under various lighting conditions, ranging from 878 lux to 1 lux. By integrating these capabilities, this system is anticipated to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of evacuation and emergency handling processes in multi-story buildings.
Judul Paper: Breast Cancer Detection Using Machine Learning
Keyword: Breast cancer, Machine Learning, Accuracy, Efficiency, Support Vector Machines (SVM), Random Forest, Neural Networks, Feature Extraction, Wavelet Transform, Gabor Filter, Interpretability, Early Diagnosis, Treatment Planning
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The internet provides convenience in various aspects of human life. Internet penetration in Indonesia has grown by 66.5% of the total population of 278.7 million people. This shows that 185.3 million people are active internet users. Based on the report of the Ministry of Communication and Information (Kemenkominfo), it has handled negative content since 2016 to 2023 with a total of 1.9 million contents. With the most access through website media. MikroTikRouter Os as a tool used to support computer network communication, is expected to minimize access to this negative content. Configuration in MikroTik devices with Layer7 Protocol and Firewall Rules is used to prevent access to negative content from the client side. A firewall is a network security tool that monitors incoming and outgoing network traffic. The application layer that acts as a liaison between applications and network functions, manages how applications access the network, and regulates the creation of error messages is called Layer 7 Protocol. The Layer 7 Protocol configuration and firewall rules are effectively applied to Mikro Tik RB941-2ND to ward off negative pornographic content on local networks with a percentage of 87% of the 91 websites that have been tested. In particular, the test results show that this method is an effective scheme using unwanted travel with global internet usage and without using a Virtual Private Network (VPN). By using this filtering and switching technique, negative site access restrictions can be minimized. At least it can be a pioneer of a healthy internet.
Judul Paper: Combination of Filtering and Switching Methods for Network Security from Pornographic Content
Keyword: Networking, Mikrotik, Layer7Protocol,Firawell, Porn Site
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: This article develops an E-Learning application called BrandBiz using MERN technology (MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js) to help MSMEs understand product branding. This application also uses Progressive Web App (PWA) technology for flexibility of use on various devices. The research methodology involves literature studies and user testimonials to collect data and measure the effectiveness of the application. As a result, BrandBiz provides login, registration, selection and learning of educational paths, quizzes, and feedback features, which are accessed via https://www.brandbiz.site/.
