The purpose of this research is to build a system in the form of a website-based PKL assessment information system using the moora method. This research is a type of applied research, namely a type of research used to find solutions to problems that occur, especially PKL assessment. This website-based PKL assessment information system will be used by PKL supervisors to provide assessments, and get the results quickly and to support the creation of certificates/Certificates of PKL quickly.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Vocational School Students' PKL Assessment Using the Moora Method
Keyword: PKL, SPK, moora method, website
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The government's decision to restrict movement in several cities to prevent the spread of Covid-19 has forced people to stay at home rather than travel. The case study for this research is a tourist attraction in Gunung Kidul, Yogyakarta Special Region. Therefore, Augmented Reality was created to introduce several tourist attractions in Gunung Kidul, and was approved by the Gunung Kidul Tourism Office. This method adds one or more virtual objects in 2D or 3D to the real environment, where 3D objects are displayed in real time. The use of technology aims to help visitors who want to travel get an overview or visualization of each tourist attraction so that they will remain interested in traveling when conditions improve. One method that can be utilized during the Covid-19 pandemic is virtual tourism. A marker in the form of the Gunung Kidul logo is entered into the Vuforia database with the aim of being read by the application when the user performs the scanning process. Based on a feasibility test of the augmented reality system for introducing Gunung Kidul tourist villages, the Gunung Kidul Tourism Office successfully obtained an average response of 82.4%, stating that the application was highly suitable for use. This was determined by a feasibility percentage calculation formula tested by five members of the Gunung Kidul Tourism Office.
Judul Paper: Design of Augmented Reality Based Application for Introduction to Gunung Kidul Tourism Village
Keyword: 3D, Augmented Reality,Wisata
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: Tree structures are an important representation in the field of data structures, used to organize data hierarchically. Tree analysis can be performed using various approaches, including Venn diagrams, bracket notation, level notation, and row notation. Each analysis method has unique characteristics and uses in depicting the relationships between nodes in a tree. This article aims to explain the process of transforming a tree structure into these four forms, with an emphasis on conceptual understanding and practical applications. Venn diagrams help visualize the set relationships between elements in a tree. Bracket notation provides a linear representation of a tree structure, which is useful for data storage and processing. Level notation represents the depth of each node in the tree, providing insight into the hierarchy and depth of the structure. Meanwhile, row notation allows for a more structured and systematic representation in tabular form, which facilitates advanced analysis. The case study in this article illustrates how a simple binary tree is transformed into these four forms, using clear and efficient algorithms. By understanding these methods, readers are expected to be able to choose an analysis approach that suits their application needs. The results of this study indicate that a combination of different analysis methods can improve the efficiency and effectiveness of visualizing and manipulating tree structures. This article makes a significant contribution to the field of software education and development by providing a practical guide to tree analysis in various computing scenarios.
Judul Paper: How to Analyze a Tree (Tree Structure) in the Form of a Venn Diagram, Bracket Notation, Level Notation and Line Notation in Data Structure Cases
Keyword: Venn Diagram, Bracket Notation, Level Notation, Row Notation, Data Structure, Tree Structure
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) is a popular classification algorithm frequently used in machine learning. KNN classifies objects based on the learning data closest to a given object. The Nearest Neighbor algorithm only considers the closest learning data as the basis for classification. Although KNN is simple, its strength lies in its ability to produce fairly accurate predictions in various application cases. However, the main weakness of this algorithm is its sensitivity to parameters such as the number of neighbors (k) and the distance metric used. Over time, many researchers have made various developments and improvements to KNN to improve the accuracy of its classification results. Various approaches have been applied, such as optimizing parameter selection, developing distance measurement methods, and implementing hybrid algorithms with other machine learning techniques. The improvements developed include adaptive adjustments to the value of k, the use of more complex distance metrics, and the integration of optimization methods such as distance weighting and ensemble techniques. These studies have shown significant results in improving KNN performance, both in terms of efficiency and accuracy. This paper aims to review the various types of developments that have been made to the KNN algorithm, analyze its advantages and disadvantages, and identify factors that influence its performance. By understanding the various innovations that have been implemented, it is hoped that this will provide in-depth insights into the potential for further improvements to the KNN algorithm. Furthermore, this research also discusses the application of KNN in various domains, such as pattern recognition, prediction, and large-scale data processing. The results of this study are expected to serve as a reference for algorithm developers to more optimally utilize the advantages of KNN and open up new research opportunities in the field of distance-based classification.
Judul Paper: Critical Analysis and Development of the K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) Algorithm: A Literature Review
Keyword: K-Nearest Neighbor, machine learning, algorithm improvement, classification methods, data mining
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: This study aims to analyze the application of project-based learning model in Social Studies subject of Grade 5 of Al-Manar Elementary School, Medan in improving student creativity. Creativity is one of the important skills that students must have to face future challenges. However, most traditional learning methods tend to focus more on cognitive aspects without paying attention to the development of student creativity. Therefore, this study examines one of the various innovative learning models, namely project-based learning and its impact on student creativity. The research method used is quantitative with an experimental approach involving two groups of Grade 5 students of Al-Manar Elementary School, Medan. The results of the study indicate that the application of project-based learning model can improve student creativity in the aspects of problem solving, critical thinking, and communication and collaboration skills. This study contributes to the development of learning methods that are more oriented towards the development of creativity in elementary schools.
Judul Paper: The Influence of the Project-Based Learning Model on Class 5 Social Sciences Subjects at SD Al-Manar-Medan in Increasing Student Creativity
Keyword: Projects, Learning, Creativity, Traditional, Innovative
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: This study aims to determine the effect of learning strategies and thinking styles on the learning outcomes of Digital Electronics and Computers of class XI students of Audio Video Engineering Expertise at SMK Teknologi dan Industri Muhammadiyah-10 Kisaran. The subjects of this study were all class XI students of Audio Video Engineering Expertise at SMK Teknologi dan Industri Muhammadiyah-10 Kisaran, totaling 63 people. The subjects of this study were taken using the total sampling technique and for the treatment group were selected by drawing randomly, namely the treatment group with computer-based learning strategies totaling 31 people and the treatment group with. The results of the analysis requirements test show that the distribution of learning outcomes data of Digital Electronics and Computers taught with computer-based learning strategies and having an abstract sequential thinking style is normally distributed where LTable 0.213 > LCount 0.218 and the learning outcomes data of Digital Electronics and Computers of students taught with computer-based learning strategies and having a concrete sequential thinking style is normally distributed where LTable 0.220 > LCount 0.131 and the learning outcomes data of Digital Electronics and Computers taught with laboratory-based learning strategies and having an abstract sequential thinking style is normally distributed where LTable 0.220 > LCount 0.119 and the learning outcomes data of Digital Electronics and Computers taught with laboratory-based learning strategies and having a concrete sequential thinking style is normally distributed where LTable 0.206 > LCount 0.118 and both data variances are homogeneous because. The results of this study indicate that (1) computer-based learning strategies and laboratory-based learning strategies have significantly different effects on the learning outcomes of Digital Electronics and Computers of class XI students of SMK Teknologi dan Industri Muhammadiyah-10 Kisaran where Fcount 6.50 > Ftable 4.00; (2) abstract sequential thinking styles and concrete sequential thinking styles have significantly different effects on the learning outcomes of Digital Electronics and Computers of class XI students of SMK Teknologi dan Industri Muhammadiyah-10 Kisaran where Fcount 9.21 > Ftable 4.00; (3) there is an interaction between learning strategies and the thinking styles of class XI students of SMK Teknologi dan Industri Muhammadiyah-10 Kisaran where Fcount 8.43 > Ftable 4.00.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Learning Strategies and Thinking Styles on Digital Electronics and Computer Learning Outcomes for Class XI Students of Muhammadiyah Technology and Industry Vocational School-10 Kisaran
Keyword: Learning Strategy, Learning Outcomes, Digital Electronics, Technology, Industry
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The Sparkle Official Store is a company that sells various t-shirts and jackets with modern designs and has its own characteristics of its products, thus data processing in this store still uses human capabilities, in recording apparel inventory. Apparel inventory data still uses Microsoft Excel, as a result, the large amount of apparel inventory is mixed with apparel inventory that is almost out of stock. So there is no definite stocking for production back to the production section. Analyze and create modeling using the Unified Modeling Language (UML) on the information system running on The Sparkle Official Store. Design a Web-Based Apparel Inventory Information System using the JavaScript (JS) application system, the Unified Modeling Language (UML). Create a prototype of the Web-Based Apparel Inventory Information System software. Make tests with the black box method 1. Observation 2. Interview 3. Literature study 4. Design 5. Implementation 6. Testing. In designing the proposed system, use tools that help to explain, such as using object-oriented modeling with the Unified Modeling Language (UML), File specifications and coding. After analyzing the current system through the observation method, the existing system is still less effective because there is no separate packing process for goods. The difference in the current system use case is that there are 6 actors, namely sales, product support, vendors, finance, administration, and engineering. While the proposed business use case diagram has 5 actors, namely sales, vendors, finance, administration, and finishing. The prototype "Design and Creation of a Web-Based Apparel Inventory Information System at The Sparkle Official Store" has been successfully tested through the Blackbox Testing table.
Judul Paper: Design and Creation of a Web-Based Apparel Inventory Information System at The Sparkle Official Store
Keyword: Information Systems, Design and Manufacturing, Apparel Supplies, JS, UML, MySQL, Web Based.
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Interactive games can be an effective educational medium for young children. The Early Childhood Character Game (GKAUD) was developed to support the learning of nine positive character pillars that are essential in the formation of moral and social values. This game is designed based on the Android platform and targets children aged 4-6 years attending kindergarten. This study aims to evaluate the design and implementation of GKAUD and its impact on improving children's understanding of character. The game consists of six levels, each reflecting character values ​​such as responsibility, love of God, honesty, and cooperation. Through point- and star-based evaluations, the results indicate that this game provides a fun and effective approach to character learning. This study recommends the integration of GKAUD into the early childhood education curriculum.
Judul Paper: Early Childhood Character Games for the Formation of Positive Character Pillars
Keyword: Early Childhood Education, Educational Games, Moral Character, Android, Interactive Learning
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak:
This study aims to determine the effect of learning methods on student learning outcomes in Civics in fourth-grade students at HKBP Tomuan Private Elementary School, Pematang Siantar. The sample used by the researcher was all 28 fourth-grade students. Data collection was conducted using a questionnaire, with data analysis using SPSS 21.

The t-test results, using coefficients, showed that learning methods (variable X) had a value of 2.129 > 1.721 and a significance value of 0.00 < 0.05. This indicates that learning methods influence the learning outcomes of fourth-grade students at HKBP Tomuan Private Elementary School, Pematang Siantar. Therefore, the t-test indicates the effect of teacher reinforcement on learning outcomes. Ha is accepted and Ho is rejected.

The conclusions in this study are as follows: (1) there is a significant influence between learning methods and the learning outcomes of fourth grade students at HKBP Tomuan Pematang Siantar Private Elementary School, (2) the learning methods of fourth grade students at HKBP Tomuan Pematang Siantar Private Elementary School are in the high category.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Learning Methods on Student Learning Outcomes in Civics Subjects in Class IV of the HKBP Tomuan Tomuan Pematang Siantar Private Elementary School
Keyword: The Influence of Learning Methods on Student Learning Outcomes in Civics Subjects in Class IV of the HKBP Tomuan Tomuan Pematang Siantar Private Elementary School
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to determine: (1) The influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on achievement motivation; (2) The influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on job satisfaction; (3) The influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on organizational commitment; (4) The influence of achievement motivation on organizational commitment; and (5) the influence of job satisfaction on organizational commitment of teachers in the study were junior high school teachers in Tanjung Morawa District with a sample of 131 people. Sampling was carried out by proportionate simple random sampling. The research method is path analysis which aims to test the theory and obtain information about the research. Based on the hypothesis testing, it can be concluded: (1) there is an influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on achievement motivation with t count ?31 > t table ?=5% (10.78 > 1.98); (2) The influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on job satisfaction with t count ?32 > t table ?=5% (11.01 > 1.98); (3) The influence of the principal's transformational leadership style on organizational commitment is stated with t count ?41 > t table ?=5% (4.65 > 1.98); (4) there is an influence of achievement motivation on organizational commitment with t count ?42 > t table ?=5% (2.97 > 1.98); and (5) there is an influence of job satisfaction on teacher organizational commitment with t count ?43 > t table ?=5% (2.65 > 1.98)
Judul Paper: The Influence of the Principal's Transformational Leadership Style, Achievement Motivation and Job Satisfaction on the Organizational Commitment of Public Middle School Teachers in Tanjung Morawa District
Keyword: Leadership, Transformational, Principal, Motivation, Job Satisfaction
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: The purpose of this research is to describe: (1) the ability of Civics teachers at SDN 050676 Kebun Balok in implementing learning (2) the inhibiting and supporting factors of Civics teachers at SDN 050676 Kebun Balok in implementing learning professionally. The research method uses qualitative research. The research subjects were 2 Civics teachers, 3 Principals, 9 other subject teachers, 6 students and 1 supervisor. Data collection techniques: participant observation, in-depth interviews, and documentation. Data analysis used a qualitative-interactive model. Research results: (1) the ability of Civics teachers in learning is lacking. The preparation of lesson plans is not yet serious. The implementation of learning is based on the teacher's teaching habits. Teachers have not yet played a role as educators, innovators, and role models. Assessments are in the form of daily tests, mid-semester exams and semester exams, and have not yet developed assessment instruments. (2) Internal obstacles are limited insight into Civics material, weak motivation to study teaching materials, commitment is not yet strong, limited experience in participating in scientific forums. External obstacles are limited learning media in schools. Learning media are not displayed in class in an attractive manner. Disability in schools is a source of teaching materials.
Judul Paper: Elementary School Teachers' Ability to Provide Variations in PKN Learning at SDN 050676 Kebun Balok
Keyword: Variation, Learning, Civics, Ability
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: In many cases, this information is insufficient to make a specific decision to solve a particular problem. Therefore, Decision Support Systems were created as a way to meet this need. The concept of computer-based decision support systems (CDS) is currently developing very rapidly. In the decision-making process, there are many criteria used, and there are also many methods that can be used to find solutions to these problems. When there are many methods that can be used, we will encounter a new problem: which method will provide more accurate results. Therefore, this study analyzes two frequently used methods: the weighted product (WP) method and the simple additive weighting (SAW) method, both methods being run individually or using a hybrid approach. In both DSS methods, there are two main parts to be discussed: the weighting process and the ranking process. Meanwhile, the test data that will be used is 200 data sets. The ranking results obtained from this method will later be compared with the initial data, where the initial data is arranged or ranked by multiplying the data importance value by the data itself.
Judul Paper: Analisis Komparatif Metode Weighted Product (WP) dan Metode Simple Additive Weighting (SAW)
Keyword: Decision Support Systems, WP Method, SAW Method, Hybrid System, Ranking
Jurnal: Jurnal Pendidikan Sains dan Komputer (JPSK)

Abstrak: The process of archiving incoming mail simply involves storing letters in a ledger, making it difficult to find them if they are lost or needed again. Incoming mail is still stored in a chronologically organized ledger. Therefore, a system is needed to handle correspondence data processing, from recording and archiving incoming mail, creating outgoing mail, and reporting incoming and outgoing mail on a web-based basis. These problems can be addressed by using an online correspondence management information system. This program is expected to help improve the performance of BDK correspondence management. Agencies can track the evolution of correspondence more easily and accurately with the help of this web-based solution. It is hoped that with the creation of this application, business actors will more easily collect correspondence data, including the sender's name, the time the letter was received, and its final destination.
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based Correspondence Information Management System at the BDK Medan Office
Keyword: Information, Management, Design, Systems, Correspondence, Web
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Computerized payment application as a tool in recording school quota payments based on VBA Macro Excel where the report/note file is only sent per individual from each student via student e-mail at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra using the waterfall software method. All processes based on the waterfall software method were successfully carried out, starting with system analysis, process design (BPMN, Flowchart, DFD, and ERD) to evaluation (trial and test) and have been implemented in student payments at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra.
Judul Paper: Student Quota Payment Application Based on VBA Macro Excel at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III, South Sumatra
Keyword: VBA Macro Excel, Waterfall, SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Computerized payment application as a tool in recording school quota payments based on VBA Macro Excel where the report/note file is only sent per individual from each student via student e-mail at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra using the waterfall software method. All processes based on the waterfall software method were successfully carried out, starting with system analysis, process design (BPMN, Flowchart, DFD, and ERD) to evaluation (trial and test) and have been implemented in student payments at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra.
Judul Paper: Student Quota Payment Application Based on VBA Macro Excel at SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III, South Sumatra
Keyword: VBA Macro Excel, Waterfall, SMA Negeri 3 Banyuasin III South Sumatra
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Minang Jaya, this company still uses writing in books which has a greater risk of document loss. In addition, in terms of the report creation process, there are also obstacles, namely the process of presenting reports that takes a long time so that the resulting report format is not good. Based on this, an information system is needed that can process data quickly and accurately so that it can improve company performance. 1. Field Method a. Observation, the purpose of observation is to directly find out how the project management process at CV. Minang Jaya. The results of the observation are used by the author to obtain accurate and relevant data in accordance with the research objectives. b. Interview data that is more detailed data whose purpose is to be considered in drawing research conclusions. 2. Literature Study Conducting a literature study by reading and studying books related to system analysis and design and books that support the topics that will be discussed in the preparation of this thesis. In addition, also visiting websites related to the topics in this thesis. Based on the research, application design results, and discussions that the author has conducted, the researcher can provide the following conclusions: 1. Facilitate the cashier payment transaction process for data input and storing data in a database media so that it can improve the quality of sales & input of incoming and outgoing goods data. 2. Facilitate the sale and purchase transactions of goods & input of incoming and outgoing goods, thereby minimizing errors in inputting & selling goods. 3. With this application, it will be easier to process reports and check data so that it produces faster and more accurate reports accordingly.
Judul Paper: Design of a Watch Sales Information System on CV. Minang Jaya
Keyword: CV, Hours, Sell_Hours, Minang, Minang_Jaya, Sales, Planning, System_Planning
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The application of technology has now entered many domains and aspects of life, including meteorology, climatology, and geophysics, which are overseen by the BMKG (Meteorology, Climatology, and Geophysics Agency). One frequently encountered issue concerns the evaluation of information system acceptance satisfaction. The One-Stop Integrated Service Information System (PTSP) has been implemented since 2020 and is now entering its third year. An evaluation of its implementation within the community is necessary. One method for measuring this is the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM). TAM is an alternative for measuring the level of user desire to use a technology or system. The purpose of this study was to obtain an overview of the technology implementation. The results showed that all variables had a significant influence, thus the implementation of the PTSP Information System can be considered successful.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Customer Satisfaction with Online PTSP Information System Application Services at Bmkg Center Using the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM)
Keyword: Satisfaction Analysis, Information System Applications, BMKG, PTSP, Technology Acceptance Model (TAM)
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Based on the results of observations and interviews with one of the biology teachers at SMA Negeri 1 Pematang Siantar, it was obtained information that in the learning process in class the teachers still do not use varied learning media in the learning process. This is proven through observations conducted in class X, which consists of 7 classes. From the observations, it was obtained information that only 26 out of 252 students or about 10% of the total obtained a passing score or above the Minimum Completion Criteria (KKM). This study was conducted to determine the feasibility test of the Pop-up Book learning media on the Biodiversity material to expert validators, namely lecturers and biology teachers. The other objectives of this study were to determine the effect of the use of this learning media on learning outcomes and to determine students' responses to the Pop-up Book learning media. The type of research used was research and development (Research and Development) with the ADDIE development model. The results of the Pop-up Book learning media feasibility test by expert validators obtained an average percentage of 92.5%. Student learning outcomes in classes that use Pop-up Book learning media have higher scores than classes that do not use Pop-up Book learning media. Meanwhile, student responses to Pop up Book learning media as a learning media were in the very good category with a percentage of 91.30%.
Judul Paper: Development of Pop-up Book Learning Media on Biodiversity Material
Keyword: Biodiversity, Media, Learning, Development, Pop-up Book
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: One of the learning media that can increase students' attention to learning is Adobe Flash CS6. The Adobe Flash CS6 learning media is still rarely used in schools around Peimatang Siantar, especially in SMA Neigeiri 1 Peimatang Siantar. This research method is R & D (Research and Development) using the ADDIEi model (Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation, and Evaluation). The results of the research and balancing of learning media using Adobe Flash CS6 on the Biodiversity material are concluded as follows: Based on the picture above, the significance value (2-tailed) is 0.000 where <0.05. So it can be concluded that Ho is rejected and Ha is accepted. So the result of this hypothesis that is accepted is Ha is accepted, namely There is an Influence of Using Adobe Flash CS6 Learning Media on the Learning Outcomes of Class X Students on Biodiversity Material at SMA Negeri 1 Pematang Siantar. The conclusion of this study for the overall results of the survey is 88%, proving that the learning media using Adobe Flash CS6 on Biodiversity material is Very Feasible/Valid to be tested for its use in the field. Student learning outcomes in classes that use Adobe Flash CS6 media are higher than classes that do not use Adobe Flash CS6 learning media. Student responses to the media are 81.49%, this proves that student responses to the media are very good. And for the teacher's review, it was 90% and it was concluded that it was very good.
Judul Paper: Development of Learning Media Using Adobe Flash CS6 to Improve Student Learning Outcomes
Keyword: Adobe Flash CS6, Learning Outcomes, Learning Media, Improving, Development
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The application of technology has now entered many domains and aspects of life, including meteorology, climatology, and geophysics, which are overseen by the BMKG (Meteorology, Climatology, and Geophysics Agency). One frequently encountered issue concerns the evaluation of information system acceptance satisfaction. The One-Stop Integrated Service Information System (PTSP) has been implemented since 2020 and is now entering its third year. An evaluation of its implementation within the community is necessary. One method for measuring this is the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM). TAM is an alternative for measuring the level of user desire to use a technology or system. The purpose of this study was to obtain an overview of the technology implementation. The results showed that all variables had a significant influence, thus the implementation of the PTSP Information System can be considered successful.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Customer Satisfaction with Online PTSP Information System Application Services at Bmkg Center Using the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM)
Keyword: Satisfaction Analysis, Information System Applications, BMKG, PTSP, Technology Acceptance Model (TAM)
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: The approval evaluation information system for employee transfers at the National Land Agency is already web-based, but it is less user friendly, because the process of making employee transfer decision letters in the existing system is still manual using a lot of paper, thus hampering the employee transfer approval process in defining needs and analyzing the development of the system above with the proposed system such as adding employee actors and action use cases for making decision letters so that employees can immediately see the decision letters that have been made, the system that will be designed is an Android-based system using the Delphi programming language and MySQL as its database, with the development of the approval evaluation information system, the process in terms of approval evaluation for employee transfers becomes more integrated for use
Judul Paper: Android-based Employee Transfer Approval Evaluation Information System Engineering at the National Land Agency
Keyword: Information systems, Design, Creation, Evaluation, approval, UML, Delphi, MySql server
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: The selection of a high school major is one of the crucial decisions that will determine the future of students. Decision Support Systems (DSS) can be used to assist students in making such decisions. DSS can provide information and advice to students based on relevant criteria. The decision tree method is one of the classification methods that can be applied to DSS. This method utilizes a tree representation consisting of several nodes. Nodes in the decision tree represent attributes that influence decision-making in specific cases. This research aims to develop a decision tree model using the C++ programming language to assist high school students in choosing their majors. The decision tree model is developed by considering relevant criteria, namely interests, talents, and grades obtained by students in various subjects. The research results indicate that the developed decision tree model can provide relevant information and advice to students in choosing their majors. This model can significantly contribute to the effectiveness of the decision-making process undertaken by high school students when selecting their majors.
Judul Paper: Development of a Decision Tree Model for Determining Majors in High School Using C++ Language
Keyword: decision support system, decision tree, high school major selection
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Due to the need to overcome problems in a company, it is necessary to implement technology that is a solution for the company. PT Puncak Prima Lestari is a retail company that has various branches in Bangka and Belitung Islands. The problem in this company is that purchasing goods is still done manually. The purpose of this study is to produce a design for a purchasing system and merchandise analysis. The data collection and data analysis method used is descriptive qualitative consisting of interview data analysis and literature study collection, while the solution development method is the prototyping method, where the application to be designed is desktop-based, so it uses UML diagrams for system design. Business situation analysis is carried out using value chain analysis and porter's five forces. The results of this study are recommendations related to the purchasing system and merchandise analysis to help the company in providing a more efficient purchasing system and can predict sales levels for company planning considerations in market research.
Judul Paper: Design of a Purchase System and Analysis of Merchandise in the Household Division of PT Puncak Prima Lestari
Keyword: Purchasing systems, analysis systems, merchandise, household equipment, PT Puncak Prima Lestari.
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This thesis discusses the challenges encountered by the Mutiara Farmer Group during the corn crop production process. The group faces field-related factors that affect corn production. To estimate crop yields, the group still relies on a manual prediction method, which often leads to estimation errors that can harm its members. Additionally, the lack of planning and preparation in managing corn crops poses a significant problem. This research presents a web-based program for estimating corn crop yields using the Tsukamoto Fuzzy method. The program utilizes factors in the field to assist farmer groups in planning corn planting with expected results. The results indicate that the system can predict crop yields with a high degree of accuracy, as demonstrated by a MAPE(Mean Absolute Percentage Error) value of 15.92%.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Corn Crop Estimation Assistance Program Case Study: Mutiara Farmers Group, Maunggal Karya Village
Keyword: Fuzzy Tsukamoto, MAPE, Forecast, Production
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: X is a digital platform that facilitates the sharing of thoughts and criticisms through written content. A multitude of individuals and organizations depend on the perspectives or sentiments of the general populace while making decisions. Consumers generally rely on the viewpoints of other consumers when it comes to evaluating a product or service that they come across on social media sites. Through the surveillance of social media activity, companies that sell products and services can gain insight into the emotion expressed by consumers towards their offerings. Nevertheless, due to the limitations of writing, which lacks the ability to transmit nonverbal cues like gestures, facial expressions, and intonation, it is often challenging to identify implicit signs such as sarcasm. Sarcasm in a tweet can lead to an erroneous evaluation of the message's sentiment. Hence, it is crucial to conduct sarcasm detection, as it can greatly enhance the outcomes of sentiment analysis. This study assesses the efficacy of four transformer models, namely IndoBERT, RoBERTa, BERT, and BERT Multilingual, in detecting sarcasm in Indonesian on X platform. The experimental results demonstrate that the IndoBERT model, which has been specifically tailored for the task, gets an impressive F1-score of 95%.
Judul Paper: Classification of Sarcastic Tweets on Platform X Using Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers
Keyword: sarkasme, deep learning, tweet.
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Technological trends are always dynamic and experiencing rapid development, especially the internet with many sites emerging, both formal and entertainment (intertain). This requires a web developer, especially in terms of appearance, to always innovate in order to provide a good user experience, intuitive design, and easy to use by all groups. Of course, in designing an attractive interface page, you have to know the needs of the user, in order to optimize existing features, for that UI/UX concepts and techniques need to be applied in designing the interface. In this research trial using the Figma tool as the main tool starting from designing, wireframing to the prototyping process. The test results found that by applying UI/UX concepts and techniques to the interface design the design is more consistent, solid, harmonization, color alignment, font type and size according to the design system that has been determined.
Judul Paper: Implementation Of UI/UX Concepts And Techniques In Web Layout Design With Figma
Keyword: UI/UX, Figma, Prototyping, Design System
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Financial business is a business that focuses on the financial sector. One type of financial business is a provider of lending services in the form of money or goods. The Remedial Department is a department in a company engaged in the financial sector and has the task of marking, evaluating and recovering loans that have been issued by the company. In carrying out its duties the Remedial Department already has a system called Harbag, but this system is considered ineffective because it only contains HTML and does not have a database and architecture. So that the system can only do input and output only. Therefore, the Remedial Department has to input data several times. This research offers a solution in the form of creating an API that is useful for building systems to assist the work of the Remedial Department. This system is integrated with a web service that allows data to be centralized. Due to centralized data, the Remedial Department does not need to enter data repeatedly because data can be accessed between branches. This research was developed using the Personal Extreme Programing (PXP) method and utilizing PL/SQL in Oracle and SOA in SoftwareAG.
Judul Paper: Application of Web Api to Centralize Bookkeeping System Data
Keyword: web service, centralized data, Personal Extreme Programing, PL/SQL, SOA
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Financial management at Ignatius Slamet Riyadi Surakarta Graphic Vocational School currently still relies on manual methods for recording and reporting Education Development Contributions (SPP), which creates various administrative problems. This manual approach is not time-efficient and is prone to mistakes, data loss, and inaccurate reports. The purpose of this project is to create a financial information system for the school that is web-based. The system designed aims to increase the efficiency and accuracy of managing tuition payments, by providing real-time monitoring features for students and their parents/guardians, as well as assisting school principals in monitoring financial reports. This system development uses a prototype method which involves the stages of design, evaluation, coding, testing and system evaluation. The system can automatically record transactions, lower administrative errors, and expedite the report creation process, according to the testing results. With an easy-to-use interface, this system facilitates access for users according to their roles, namely admin, principal and students. In conclusion, implementing this system can improve financial management in schools, but it requires integration with other school administration systems and increased system security for future development.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a School Financial Information System Based on a Website
Keyword: Financial Information System, Prototype Method, Vocational School, Payment
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: XYZ University is very likely to face security risks in the implementation of the Academic Information System (SIAKAD), which includes various threats such as cyber attacks, data leaks, and unauthorized use of data. Therefore, this study aims to identify information security risks with an approach that follows the ISO 27005:2018 standard. The research method used involves several important stages in ISO27005:2018, starting from determining a clear scope and context as a basis for identifying, analyzing, and evaluating and determining appropriate actions against information security risks. The results of this study indicate that there are 4 data-related risks, 3 software-related risks, 6 hardware-related risks, and 5 risks in the people category, which have been identified. From the analysis results, there is 1 risk with an extreme level and 10 high-level risks. After evaluating the implementation of existing controls, there are 6 risks that exceed the risk acceptance level so that special actions are needed to manage these risks. Ultimately, this study provides a theoretical contribution in the application of ISO27005:2018 to analyze information security risks within the University. In addition, this study provides practical benefits for University management to be able to determine appropriate strategies and actions in managing information security risks. Keywords: Risk, Information Technology, Information Security, Academic Information System, ISO27005:2018
Judul Paper: Risk Management in XYZ University Academic Information Systems Using ISO 27005:2018
Keyword: Risk, Information Technology, Information Security, Academic Information Systems, ISO 27005:2018
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This research aims to design and build a Muggle Cloud service website integrated with WHMCS (Web Host Manager Complete Solution) and Tidio LiveChat. The background of this research is the need for a hosting platform that can manage hosting services, payments, and customer support effectively and efficiently. Many hosting companies currently experience difficulties in integrating account management systems, payment processes, and customer support, resulting in less than optimal service for users. The purpose of this research is to develop an integrated system that can solve these problems by providing a website that facilitates hosting service management and supports real-time interaction between customers and technical support. The method used in this research is the Waterfall software development model, which includes the stages of requirements analysis, system design, implementation, testing, and maintenance. Data were collected through literature studies, interviews with related parties, and analysis of existing systems. The result of this research is a Muggle Cloud service website integrated with WHMCS and Tidio LiveChat. The Muggle Cloud service website provides an effective solution for hosting service management and customer support. The implementation of this system not only simplifies the administration and payment processes but also increases responsiveness to customer needs and questions through the live chat feature. Future work from this research includes further development of additional features, improvements to system performance, and more in-depth analysis of user feedback to continuously improve the quality of service.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a Muggle Cloud Service Website Integrated with WHMCS & Tidio LiveChat
Keyword: Website, Services, Livechat, Integrations, Customers
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: The Prestige application is an online attendance system for Gresik Regency ASN. How is the functional feasibility of the Prestige application assessed, and what factors influence the employee gap from the Prestige application? In previous studies on attendance applications, only the impact of the application on employee performance was discussed. This study tested the application's functionality to ensure it meets the needs. Researchers, as instruments and data collectors, assessed the Prestige application and found problems that resulted in a decline in the quality of the Prestige application. The ServQual method, also known as the service quality concept, is a method used to test the nature of service quality and involved 90 questionnaire respondents. In this study, it was found that there was no forgot password feature, and importantly, there was a feature to display the total number of attendance points. The Reliability dimension received the highest score, and the Empathy dimension received the smallest score. As input, BKPSDM needs to add a forgot password feature and information regarding the total number of employee attendance points.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Prestige Application Service Quality in Gresik Regency Using the ServQual Method
Keyword: Prestige, Attendance, Employee, ServQua
Jurnal: KREA-TIF : JURNAL TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Data is a new mind; data is gold; data is a new mine. This is a parable that was as familiar in the digital era as it is today. Data can be utilized, among other things, to improve operational efficiency, spur innovation in a business, understand user needs, and encourage decision-making. Data from e-commerce can be collected in a variety of ways, including web scraping techniques utilizing Python and libraries like Selenium, Beautifulsoup, and Time. The web scraping methods at Shopee and Tokopedia used in this study are HTML Parsing and CSS Selector. This study found that the HTML Parsing and CSS Selector methods cannot be used for web scraping on Shopee owing to bot and CAPTCHA detection mechanisms. However, this method was successfully used on Tokopedia. We conducted 10 web scraping attempts on two product pages, which resulted in around 160–166 data points each time, with 3–18 duplications of data. The average execution time of a program is 1 minute and 0.5 seconds.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Web Scraping for Data Retrieval on E-Commerce Websites
Keyword: Web Scraping, E-commerce, Data Mining, HTML Parsing, CSS Selector
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Rumah Yatim, a National Zakat Management Institution under BAZNAS, manages various forms of donations across Indonesia through 20 branch offices. However, data management using Microsoft Excel has drawbacks, which led to the creation of an Online Social Fund Management Information System in North Sumatra using MySQL, PHP, HTML, and the Waterfall method. The system ensures transparent and systematic data management, making it easier for donors to donate online and providing real-time information on donation management. The new system has allowed Rumah Yatim to receive donations more efficiently and track them more regularly and transparently, resulting in better decision-making processes and more effective distribution of funds to those in need. The system has also helped streamline administrative tasks and reduce the time and resources required for manual data entry and report creation, leading to overall improved effectiveness and efficiency in operations.
Judul Paper: Online Information System for Social Fund Management at the North Sumatra Orphanage
Keyword: Information Systems, Social Fund, Rumah Yatim North Sumatera, Web, Waterfall
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: ceart disease is still one of the leading causes of death in Indonesia and the world for both men and women of all ages. To reduce the number of deaths from heart disease, it is, therefore, necessary to conduct research to analyze data related to the causes of heart disease. In this study, the decision tree series C4.5 algorithm was used to classify heart disease data. The decision tree series C4.5 algorithm is processed in rapidminer version 9.10 tools. through the stages of Pre-processing, Set roles, modeling the decision tree series C4.5 algorithm on training data, applying the model to data testing, and testing to calculate the accuracy of the model on data testing. Testing using the confusion matrix resulted in an accuracy rate of 80.43% and a classification error of 19.57% was obtained. As well as the results of the Visualization of AUC (Area Under Curve) from the ROC curve, the value of AUC: 0.798 (Positive class): Heart Disease.
Judul Paper: Classification of Heart Disease Using the Decision Tree Series C4.5 Algorithm with Rapidminer
Keyword: classification, algorithm decision tree series C4.5, rapidminer, heart disease.
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Balinese dance is a type of dance originating from Bali that has existed for a long time and has been passed down from generation to generation by Balinese people. Balinese dance has 3 kinds of categories, namely Wali Dance (sacred), Bebali Dance and Balih-Balihan Dance (Profane). Balinese dances that are sacred are usually performed on certain days or during religious ceremonies, while profane dances are usually performed for entertainment. In Bali, many types of Balinese dances are contested, such as Barong Dance, Jauk Manis Dance, Jauk Keras Dance, Baris Dance and so on. In this study, the design and development of a Balinese dance competition assessment application was carried out which aims to facilitate the performance of the competition organizing committee and the judges during the assessment and recording of the participants' scores after the competition is held and can display the values transparently to the public. Tests show that when the application is run, it gets a value of 312.3999996185303 on the application and a value of 312.4 in the manual assessment process. The dance assessment application and manual assessment have almost the same value with a percentage accuracy of 99.9%.
Judul Paper: Performance Analysis of the Mobile Based Bali Dance Competition Assessment System
Keyword: balinese dance, android, web, competition assessment
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Artificial intelligence (AI) has become one of the major contributors to the development of technology in the current era. One example is chatbot technology. On November 30, 2022, the leading technology company, OpenAI, launched ChatGPT, a conversational AI. The focus of concern in this context is the information service in Tegalrejo Village Government, which does not have an online information platform, causing issues such as the service being individualized and not widely distributed, making it ineffective. Accessing the service requires a visit to the village office, resulting in inefficiency. The aim of this research is to enhance the information service by developing a web-based information system utilizing AI through ChatGPT. The system development follows the prototype method with communication, planning, model design, prototype creation, and testing steps. The research results indicate that the developed system successfully meets user expectations. The system reflects high efficiency and effectiveness, with an average response time for short answers being approximately 1.99 seconds, while long answers require an average time of 12.04 seconds. Additionally, a questionnaire using the System Usability Scale (SUS) method involving 10 users obtained an average score of 87, indicating an "Excellent" level of satisfaction.
Judul Paper: Development of a Web-Based Information Service System by Utilizing AI in ChatGPT
Keyword: Information Services, Artificial Intelligence, Chatbot, ChatGPT, Prototype
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: PT Pos Indonesia is the oldest Badan Usaha Milik Negara (BUMN) in Indonesia. PT Pos Indonesia is known as a state-owned company operating in the logistics sector. This is because the core business of PT Pos Indonesia is a service for sending goods from one place to another, apart from selling stamps, sending money and so on. The development of technology and information has really helped the business processes at PT Pos Indonesia by providing various applications that are used, but the many applications available are not all integrated with one another. So in this research, a logistics platform design plan was carried out which will later integrate existing applications or systems at PT Pos Indonesia. This design will be in the form of a user interface, which is the design of the system interface. This research uses the System Development Life Cycle (SDLC) or waterfall method which has clear stages.
Judul Paper: Rancang Desain User Interface Digital Platform Logistik PT Pos Indonesia
Keyword: User interface, system, PT Pos Indonesia, Logistics
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: At present, BPOM Pekanbaru, in the field of inspection, still uses manual methods for archiving and tracking. Therefore, employees need a long time to do archives because they are still inputted into the Microsoft Excel application. Besides that, to know the status of the submission letter, employees have to go back and forth asking and checking documents from related parties to see whether it has been followed up or not. The purpose of this research is intended for employees who have access rights to make it easier to do archives. For employee tracking activities, it is enough to check the status of the system regarding the progress of the letter and whether it has been followed up or not. The method used is a waterfall; this method is suitable for archiving and tracking problems in the inspection division because it starts from the stages of problem analysis, system design, building the system, and testing the system that has been built. The results of this study are in the form of an archive and tracking information system in the inspection division so that employees can be facilitated in archiving and monitoring documents that have been submitted.
Judul Paper: Implementation and Design of an Archive Information System and Inspection Tracking at BPOM Pekanbaru
Keyword: system, information, Archives, Tracking
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: In accordance with the Regulation of the Minister of Health of the Republic of Indonesia Number 82 of 2013 concerning Hospital Management Information Systems, that every Hospital is required to organize SIMRS. SIMRS regulation aims to improve efficiency, effectiveness, professionalism, performance, and hospital access and services. RSIA Gizar will start implementing SIMRS in 2021, but the current system is still not optimal because patient registration is still done directly at the hospital, cannot be done online, which makes patient registration services slow. The method of data collection used in the preparation of this Final Project is the method of observation, interviews, literature study and the software development model using the waterfall method. So that the Design of an Outpatient Patient Registration Information System uses the waterfall method. At RSIA Gizar, it was made aiming to make it easier for patients to register online through a mobile-based application and also to make it easier for admin staff to register patients, manage medical record data and in making patient registration reports so that more effective and efficient..
Judul Paper: Design of a mobile-based outpatient registration information system at the Gizar Mother and Child Hospital
Keyword: Hospitals, Patient Registration, Information Systems.
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Online Shop Shaqueena is an independent business sector engaged in selling beauty masks and various types of skincare products. For the sake of smooth business, the Shaqueena Store maintains good relations with consumers. One of the things that is done to establish good relations with consumers is to provide rewards or awards to the best customers. Based on observations, the process of selecting and recommending the best customers at the Shaqueena store is still done manually and randomly without using the help of the system. This manual and random selection is ineffective because the selection process itself is time-consuming and results in a lack of accuracy on which customers will be rewarded. This study aims to implement the SMART method in the reward system for customers. In its application the system is built using web-based programming and the PHP programming language with MySQL as the storage database. The method used in this study is the SMART method. Where SMART has flexibility in weighting, so it is suitable to be applied to the selection of rewards where there is no assessment weight. The result of this research is a website-based decision support system.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Determining the Best Rewards for Customers Using the SMART Method
Keyword: Keywords - MySQL, Sale, PHP, Reward, SMART
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Low Cost Green Car (LCGC) is a new breakthrough made by the government in the automotive world, especially in Indonesia. With the support of environmentally friendly concepts this type of LCGC car has become an alternative for consumers who want a car especially in Indonesia. To estimate LCGC cars according to needs, you can use a decision support system with a simple additive weighting (SAW) method. Data obtained from observations and interviews conducted through sales and car mechanics or experts who are more knowledgeable about market conditions and community needs. The results achieved are designing a decision support system application that predicts LCGC cars that fit consumers' desires based on price, engine capacity, safety features, fuel economy, cabin accommodation. By determining the preference value of each alternative, ranking is made so that from the alternatives there is the best alternative.
Judul Paper: Simple Additive Weighting Method in Decision Support System for LCGC Car Selection
Keyword: LCGC, SPK,SAW
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Water quality is a critical parameter affecting environmental and land sustainability. To improve the understanding and management of water quality, this study proposes the application of data mining techniques using the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm. This study was conducted using data obtained from the Environment and Land Agency of South Sumatra Province, which includes various water quality parameters. The SVM algorithm was used to build a classification model that can predict water quality based on the measured parameters. Model evaluation was conducted using test data, and the results demonstrated the ability of the SVM model to classify water quality with significant accuracy. The implementation of data mining on water quality data in this environment can provide an important contribution to decision-making for monitoring and improving water quality in South Sumatra Province.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF DATA MINING FOR WATER QUALITY CLASSIFICATION USING THE SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE ALGORITHM IN THE ENVIRONMENT AND LAND OFFICE OF SUMMER PROVINCE
Keyword: Data Mining, SVM Algorithms, Water Quality, Sumsell
Jurnal: Lontar Komputer: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Informasi

Abstrak: The beauty industry has experienced rapid growth in recent years, driving high demand for beauty products. Putri Beauty Shop is one of the rapidly growing beauty shops in the Cirebon area. To improve sales strategies and understand customer purchasing patterns, Putri Beauty Shop needs to analyze sales data effectively. Traditional sales data analysis cannot provide in-depth insights into customer purchasing patterns. This can hinder Putri Beauty Shop from developing appropriate and effective sales strategies. This study applies the K-Means clustering algorithm to analyze Putri Beauty Shop's sales data during January 2024. The analyzed data consists of 122 rows with 22 attributes. Sales data includes product information, product categories, and sales amounts. The K-Means clustering algorithm is used to group sales data based on product characteristics. The analysis technique uses Knowledge Discovery in Database (KDD), a process for discovering new knowledge from collected data. The analysis results show that Putri Beauty Shop's sales data can be divided into 9 clusters, from cluster k = 2 to k = 9. Each cluster has different purchasing pattern characteristics. The best cluster is in cluster K = 8 with a DBI value of 0.021 derived from the measure Types Mixed Measures Davies Bouldin index value of 0.077, Numerical Measures Davies Bouldin index value of 0.114, Bregman Divergences Davies Bouldin index value of 0.114. Analysis of Putri Beauty Shop sales data with the K-Means Clustering Algorithm produces valuable insights regarding customer purchasing patterns. A thorough evaluation of various parameters, the number of clusters, and the optimal Davies Bouldin Index value, shows that the K-Means Clustering Algorithm produces the most optimal and informative data grouping.
Judul Paper: SALES DATA ANALYSIS USING K-MEANS CLUSTERING ALGORITHM IN PUTRI BEAUTY SHOP
Keyword: K-Means clustering algorithm, Sales Data Analysis, Putri Beauty Shop, Customer Purchasing Patterns, Sales Strategy
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: In the digital era, transforming motorcycle repair services has become a necessity to increase efficiency and convenience for vehicle owners. "Bengkel.in" has emerged as a leading platform that introduces a revolution in vehicle maintenance. This platform provides an integrated solution with a website development that makes it easier for vehicle owners to search, book, and monitor their vehicle maintenance process. The transformation of motorcycle repair services through "Bengkel.in" provides a more transparent and effective experience. Vehicle owners can easily find the nearest repair shop, view user reviews, and make appointments online. The website also provides detailed information about repair shop services, maintenance costs, and estimated completion times. Through "Bengkel.in", vehicle maintenance history data is also centrally stored, allowing vehicle owners to track maintenance history, service schedules, and spare part replacements more easily. This helps in maintaining optimal vehicle performance and preventing unexpected damage. Furthermore, this platform also provides workshops with the opportunity to increase visibility and expand their customer base through positive reviews and recommendations from other users. Thus, "Bengkel.in" not only facilitates vehicle owners but also supports the growth of motorcycle repair businesses in this digital era.
Judul Paper: PENGEMBANGAN WEBSITE BENGKEL.IN DALAM PLATFORM UNGGUL UNTUK PEMELIHARAAN KENDARAAN
Keyword: Bengkel.in, Vehicle maintenance, Service transformation
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: In the shipping service industry, more and more companies are competing to provide the best service through convenience packaged in an application. The service provided is information about customer delivery data using the shipping service. At this time, the application used is still in the development stage so its performance is not yet effective. Users who use this application, namely employees of PT. Samudra Mandiri Semesta, still have to do manual searches to provide information to customers. Users also have to update information to other users one by one because the program currently used cannot update automatically. The purpose of this study is to measure the quality of the shipping application used by PT. Samudra Mandiri Semesta employees to provide maximum information to customers using the Servqual method. The population used is employees at PT. Samudra Mandiri Semesta who use the application and the sample taken is 26 respondents. From the results of the study, the one with the highest servqual (gap) value is Assiurancie (guarantee) with a gap value of -0.81 and -0.35, so the shipping application manager at PT. Samudra Mandiri Semesta must further improve the quality and features in the application so that employees who access the application can confidently provide the right information to customers and the calculation of the lowest gap value is Tangible (physical evidence) which has a gap value of -0.35 and 0, then PT. Samudra Mandiri Semesta must add and perfect the features in the application.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF DEKSTOP-BASED SHIPPING APPLICATIONS FOR OPTIMIZING INFORMATION SERVICES USING THE SERVQUAL METHOD
Keyword: Application quality, Servqual, Shipping
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: In today's rapidly evolving technological era, many companies are striving to improve performance efficiency through the application of technology. One frequently needed application is how manual work can be simplified with the presence of a specific system. Based on this, this study examines the design of a website-based company transaction processing system using the Agile Development method. System development aims to provide an alternative solution to the challenges currently faced by the company. The system was built using one of the Agile Development methods, namely Adaptive Software Development (ASD), which has three main aspects: Speculation, Collaboration, and Learning. The research phase began with discussions regarding system planning and ideas with the leader and team members. The system used Figma tools for mockup design, and ReactJS and Google Language programming during the development stage. The transaction system is divided into two roles: Admin and Sales, and is then divided into menus Pricelist, Checklist, ISR, DR, Technical Spec, and Stock Position. The system also conducted testing and evaluation by mentors, as well as evaluation of the performance of team members involved in the project. Through the application of this method, it was found that the ASD method is considered suitable for use in systems that require adaptation and adjustment to client needs. The ASD method is also considered to build motivation and good communication within the team. The system has been well-developed and can achieve faster progress when implemented by a team. Further development by the team is needed to ensure the system meets requirements and streamlines company operations.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND BUILD A WEBSITE BASED COMPANY TRANSACTION PROCESS SYSTEM USING AGILE DEVELOPMENT METHOD
Keyword: Adaptive Software Development, Agile Development, Sistem, Transaksi, Website
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: PT. KIP is a new company developing in the food and beverage industry. Despite its strategic location close to the capital city and industrial areas, the company is experiencing difficulties in recruiting qualified workers. One of the obstacles is the company's limited resources in building an information system that is in line with current technological developments. In addition, the current system is experiencing problems due to the lack of a consistent methodological approach during the screening process. As a result, selected candidates do not always meet the company's criteria. This study aims to provide recommendations to companies to implement a more effective selection system or procedure, especially at the screening stage, using the simple additive weighting method, which is a common method in building decision support systems to optimize the recruitment process. The research methodology used is a qualitative descriptive method, based on problems, needs, and resources, so that the alternative solutions provided do not increase the burden or cost of implementation. The results of the proposed system for updating the draft procedure at PT. KIP were successfully implemented by adding a Google Form link as part of the employee recruitment process, making the screening process more effective and efficient compared to the previous procedure system that received job applications directly or via email. Data processing from the screening process using the SAW method is quite effective in presenting data on candidates with the highest qualifications based on the company's established criteria. Company management can view and contact prospective candidates for the next recruitment process based on the highest ranking, or can conduct further screening by prioritizing the highest weighting of benefit criteria and the lowest weighting of cost criteria.
Judul Paper: OPTIMIZATION OF THE RECRUITMENT PROCESS AT PT. KIP WITH A DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM APPROACH
Keyword: Optimization, Recruitment, Selection, Simple Additive Weighting
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Hair care is one of the main aspects of appearance that is often noticed by men. This trend is further strengthened by the rise of men's salon businesses, commonly called barbershops. Dangau Barbershop is one of the barbershops located on Jl. Suka Karya, Tuah Karya, Tampan District, Pekanbaru City, which is frequently visited by customers. In this study, researchers designed a website-based online booking system for Dangau Barbershop. This system aims to make it easier for customers to book barbershop services, improve the efficiency of booking management by employees, and increase customer satisfaction. The waterfall method was used in the development of this system. The stages include planning, analysis, design, development, testing, implementation, and maintenance. The results of the study show that the website-based online booking system designed can meet the needs of Dangau Barbershop. This system can make it easier for customers to book barbershop services, improve the efficiency of booking management by employees, and increase customer satisfaction.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING A WEB-BASED ONLINE BOOKING SYSTEM USING THE WATERFALL METHOD CASE STUDY: DANGAU BARBERSHOP”
Keyword: Barbershop,Booking, Waterfall
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: In facing the challenges of globalization and modernization that threaten the preservation of batik, this study proposes the use of the Daubechies Wavelet Method in a Content-Based Image Retrieval system for the automatic classification of batik motifs. Recognized as a UNESCO cultural heritage, Indonesian batik displays a diversity of motifs that depict profound historical and cultural values, especially from Java. These motifs are not only based on color and shape but also involve complex textures and details, which require adaptive technology that can accommodate these uniqueness. This study aims to develop a Content-Based Image Retrieval system that is sensitive to cultural diversity and enables more accurate and efficient cataloging. Through the integration of the Daubechies wavelet transform, this method improves the accuracy in identifying batik motifs with significant improvements in performance metrics such as 88.57% precision, 91.67% recall, and 88.97% F1-score. These results indicate that the use of the Daubechies wavelet transform significantly improves the ability of the Content-Based Image Retrieval system in managing complex variations of batik motifs. The application of this technology not only provides benefits for cultural preservation and education but also opens up opportunities for further development of Content-Based Image Retrieval applications in other cultural domains.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN METODE WAVELET DAUBECHIES UNTUK KLASIFIKASI CONTENT-BASED IMAGE RETRIEVALBATIK
Keyword: Batik, CBIR (Content-Based Image Retrieval), Klasifikasi, Pelestarian Budaya, Wavelet Daubechies
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Waste is a global problem that must be resolved to maintain the environment, especially in developing countries like Indonesia. A good understanding of waste will impact optimal waste management. Waste banks are one solution in waste management so that what was initially useless becomes marketable. In its implementation, waste banks must have real-time data collection and transparency of customer waste data. Technology is one of the main solutions for producing digital products that facilitate the public in accessing accurate information. By using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) algorithm, image data can be predicted with good accuracy. Along with current technological developments, various types of architectures are available, one of which is Mobilenet. This architecture has the ability to run machine learning models on mobile and IoT devices. In addition, the resulting model is quite good with an accuracy rate of 96% for Metal waste, 92% for Paper and Organic waste, 80% for Cardboard waste, 76% for Glass waste, and 72% for Plastic waste. The drawback of this model is that when making predictions with almost similar shapes and images that have many objects in them, the error will be greater so that there is a possibility of errors in predicting the results of the garbage image.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI ALGORITMA CNN MOBILENET UNTUK KLASIFIKASI GAMBAR SAMPAH DI BANK SAMPAH
Keyword: CNN, Mobilenet, Garbage, Waste Bank
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: PT Inspira Multi Teknologi is an IT association founded in 2018 and contributes to the development of industry-savvy IT specialists. Executive support from the IT department of PT Inspira Multi Teknologi is crucial to the company's ability to realize its vision and achieve its goals. Currently, IT resource management is a manual process that takes time, effort, and space and relies on paper records. This exploration is expected to plan an IT resource executive data framework that can help the IT office at PT Inspira Multi Teknologi in overcoming problems by planning IT resources where the development framework used is the Waterfall model and describes the system by utilizing UML and the program creation involves Laravel for the Backend and Respond JS for the Front end. IT asset management at PT Inspira Multi Teknologi is expected to be more effective, efficient, and well-organized with a comprehensive information system. This system supports the company's efforts in providing comprehensive IT service solutions for PT Inspira Multi Teknologi clients and offers long-term IT asset management solutions.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF A WEBP-BASED IT ASSET INFORMATION SYSTEM AT PT INSPIRA MULTI TEKNOLOGI JAKARTA
Keyword: Sistem Informasi, Aset, Web,Laravel, React JS, Waterfal
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: A computer network is a collection of computer devices that are interconnected and communicate with each other through communication media. The need for a computer network in a company can vary depending on the size of the company, industry, and business objectives. Optimal use of a computer network is currently also needed by the Mediterania Boulevard Residences Apartment in order to carry out routines and better performance. One aspect that has not been met in the office section of the Mediterania Boulevard Residences Apartment at this time is the less than optimal internet access that is not yet stable in terms of bandwidth or access speed. In addition, problems encountered in the office section of the Mediterania Boulevard Residences Apartment itself are that employees often open applications or application sites that are not related to work during working hours such as streaming videos that consume a lot of bandwidth. This is because there is no determination of the priority scale, if the priority of the application or service is not set correctly. Bandwidth management is the process of controlling and regulating the use of bandwidth or network capacity in a computer network. The goal is to ensure that every user or application gets fair and optimal access to available network resources. This research aims to improve the performance of computer networks, especially the internet network in the Mediterania Boulevard Residences Apartment by increasing efficiency in using resources so that it can prioritize and limit bandwidth by using simple queues and website filtering so that bandwidth distribution can be done evenly which can increase the speed of the internet network connection in each client of the Mediterania Boulevard Residences Apartment.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI SIMPLE QUEUE DAN FILTER WEBSITE UNTUK OPTIMASI MANAGEMENT BANDWIDTH PADA APARTEMEN MEDITERANIA
Keyword: Web Filter, Internet, Network, Bandwidth Management, Simple queue
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Rapid technological developments play an important role for companies to boost performance in optimizing operational performance and increasing company productivity to survive with very tight competition between other companies. PT. Stars Internasional is a company engaged in the production of shoes and sandals, the process of recording operations and business transactions that still use books and stationery, resulting in frequent errors due to recording, as well as improper placement and resulting in lost books and manual methods make the process of searching for transaction data also time-consuming. Therefore, it is necessary to design an information system that can perform the functions of stock recording, daily sales reports, operations, and sales data searches to be automated. The system is designed with UML (Unified Modeling Language) as a system model and the waterfall method is used for system development. With the design of a management information system that can automate the process of recording, stock management, sales recording, and operational recording, it is hoped that it can overcome the obstacles faced by the company and can increase the efficiency and effectiveness of PT. Stars Internasional's retail operations in the hope of being able to face increasingly tight market competition.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI MANAJEMEN INVENTORI PADA RETAIL PT. STARS INTERNASIONAL
