Keyword: Manajemen inventory, Sepatu, waterfall
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Agglomerative is one of the Hierarchical Analysis Clustering (HAC) methods which is part of the Unsupervised Learning concept with the aim of grouping data from the results of calculations on existing variables. In the Agglomerative method, there are distance calculation processes such as Manhattan and Euclidean to measure the similarity between objects. The hierarchical methods used in this study are the Single Linkage method, Average Linkage and Complete Linkage. Grouping Similarity Values ​​is necessary to be able to do assignments according to predetermined value groups. Each value in the variable is analyzed through a combination of distance method calculations with each hierarchical method. The results obtained that the Manhattan distance calculation method with the Single Linkage method is more varied (heterogeneous) with 17 clusters, while the Average Linkage method combined with the Manhattan distance calculation produces 24 clusters. The final analysis obtained from the Complete Linkage method combined with the Euclidean distance calculation produces 24 clusters.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF UNSUPERVISED LEARNING ON PHYSICAL VALUE OF STATE POLICE SCHOOLS USING CLUSTERING ANALYSIS METHOD
Keyword: Agglomerative, Clustering, Euclidean, Manhattan, Sameness Value,
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: Problems that often occur in e-commerce such as payment systems, very poor product quality, doubts about customer trust resulting in undesirable incidents, lack of promotion, displays and features that are still incomplete. making customers disappointed with these problems, so that customers have not been able to determine the best e-commerce for their daily use. Research was conducted with a comparative study of several e-commerce namely, Shopee, Tokopedia, Lazada, Blibli, Bukalapak, Jd.Id, and Zalora then conducted data analysis to find alternative criteria for each e-commerce. Aims to provide solutions in decision making to people who use e-commerce by implementing a decision support system to determine the best e-commerce using the weighted product method. Weighted product itself is a decision-making method by multiplication to connect attribute ratings where the rating of each attribute is raised to the power of the weight of the attribute in question. The results obtained are Shopee being the best e-commerce in the first rank, in second rank is Tokopedia, and in third rank is Zalora. The application of the wp method is used to provide the best alternative decision in determining the best e-commerce. The decision-making process is calculated using the weighted product method, starting with determining the criteria and alternative values, improving the weights, calculating the S vector, V vector, and assigning a ranking. The result with the highest value is the value selected as the first rank and states that the e-commerce is the best recommended for selection.
Judul Paper: SISTEM PENDUKUNG KEPUTUSAN MENENTUKAN E-COMMERCE TERBAIK MENGGUNAKAN METODE WEIGHTED PRODUCT
Keyword: E-Commerce, Sistem Pendukung Keputusan, Weighted Product
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Web phishing is a website designed to commit fraud by attempting to obtain sensitive information. This phishing process aims to capture highly sensitive information such as usernames, passwords, and credit card details by impersonating a trustworthy entity/legitimate organization and usually communicating electronically. Therefore, the author conducted an analysis using network forensic methods. Network forensic research was conducted using the Forensic Process Model, a digital forensic investigation process model, consisting of the stages of collection, examination, analysis, and reporting. The research was conducted over five months by taking data in the form of capture files from Network Protocol Analyzer (Wireshark). Wireshark allows users to observe data from an operating network or from data on disk, and immediately view/sort the captured data, starting from brief information and details to everything about the packet, including the full header and amount of data. Based on the results of the research that has been done, there are IP addresses that carry out phishing actions. To prevent data theft, a Mikrotik router is used to block web phishing and acts as a network, controller, or traffic regulator between networks. In this research, the author succeeded in obtaining the identity of the creator of the phishing website and succeeded in blocking the website.
Judul Paper: WEB PHISHING ANALYSIS USING NETWORK FORENSIC METHODS AND BLOCK SITE ACCESS WITH MIKROTIK ROUTER
Keyword: Mikrotik, Network Forensic, Phishing, Wireshark
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The implementation of patient registration at Pekanbaru Medical Center (PMC) Hospital has implemented a computerized system or uses computer devices. However, in the process there are still processes that still use conventional methods. This could cause problems in the future. Therefore, to ensure that patient registration can be carried out optimally at the hospital, a Web-Based Online Patient Registration Information System (SIMPAS) was built that can optimize the patient registration process at the hospital easily and aims to overcome the shortcomings of the previous system. By designing this patient registration information system, an example of the development of a web-based information system at PMC Hospital can be described by conducting a waterfall design and using Unified Modeling Language (UML) diagrams, namely use case diagrams, activity diagrams, sequence diagrams, and class diagrams. In developing the SIMPAS design for PMC Hospital, it can help the hospital when managing the patient registration system so that it is organized, effective, and efficient.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING A WEB-BASED PMC HOSPITAL OUTPATIENT REGISTRATION SYSTEM
Keyword: Registration, System, UML, Waterfall, Web
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Task management system in the IT division of PT Rikaryatama. The application used is Asana, which is a paid application where its use is intended for every IT task management at PT Rikaryatama and the procedures carried out are by managing tasks, projects, work flows with the company team, creating agendas and providing access to the teams involved. In this study, the author uses the COBIT 5 Framework with subdomains APO07, BAI09, BAI04, BAI10, DSS01, DSS05, and enters the maturity level of level 3 Defined Process, while APO013 enters level 4 Managed and Measureable when viewed from the rating scale, including level F which indicates that it has reached the Fully achieved value where there is a complete and systematic approach and full achievement. And in terms of the rounding scale of the capability model condition mapping index is Performed Process where the process of the Asana application system at PT Rikarya has been successfully implemented and has achieved the goals planned by the company. From the results of the gap or discrepancy calculations, it is known that all domains have not reached the target level and require further improvement and enhancement.
Judul Paper: AUDIT SISTEM INFORMASI MANAGEMENT PROJECT PADA PT. RIKARYATAMA MENGGUNAKAN FRAMEWORK COBIT 5
Keyword: CapabilityLevel, Cobit 5, Domain,Gap, Manurity Leve
Jurnal: PROSISKO : Jurnal Pengembangan Riset dan observasi Rekayasa Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Betel (Piper betle L.) is a species in the genus Piper that is very well known to the public. Betel consists of several types, namely red betel, wulung betel, green betel, gold betel, and black betel. However, people still need help to distinguish various types of betel. This study applies image processing techniques to detect different betel leaves using classification techniques with segmentation and feature extraction stages. The classification method used is the K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) method which is carried out on betel leaf objects to determine the type of betel leaf. This method consists of 5 stages, namely Region of Interest (ROI) detection, preprocessing, segmentation, first-order feature extraction, and classification. The image data used were 360, divided into 300 training data and 60 test data. The classification results were then divided into three types of betel, namely red betel, green betel, and black betel. The accuracy level of the classification results of betel leaf types was detected using a Multi-Class Confusion Matrix based on the proximity of statistical characteristics. The results of the study indicate that the Order 1 features used in this study are in accordance with the betel leaf classification system. The results of the classification test using the Confusion Matrix Multiyang achieved an accuracy value of 97.77%. The results of the study indicate that the Order 1 features used in this study are in accordance with the betel leaf classification system. The results of the classification test using the Confusion Matrix Multiyang achieved an accuracy value of 97.77%. The results of the study indicate that the Order 1 features used in this study are in accordance with the betel leaf classification system. The results of the classification test using the Confusion Matrix Multiyang achieved an accuracy value of 97.77%.
Judul Paper: K-NEAREST NEIGHBORD METHOD AND COLOR FEATURES FOR CLASSIFICATION OF BELT LEAVES BASED ON DIGITAL IMAGE
Keyword: Sirih (Piper betle L), CitraDigital, Confusion Matrix, K-Nearest Neighbor
Jurnal: Matrik : Jurnal Manajemen, Teknik Informatika, dan Rekayasa Komputer

Abstrak: Problems that often occur in e-commerce such as payment systems, very poor product quality, doubting customer trust resulting in undesirable events, lack of promotion, displays and features that are still incomplete. make customers disappointed with these problems, so that customers have not been able to determine the best e-commerce for their daily use. Research was conducted with comparative studies of several e-commerce, namely, Shopee, Tokopedia, Lazada, Blibli, Bukalapak, Jd.Id, and Zalora and then conducted data analysis to find alternative criteria for each e-commerce. Aims to provide solutions in decision making to people who use e-commerce by implementing a decision support system to determine the best e-commerce using the weighted product method. Weighted product itself is a decision-making method by multiplication to connect attribute ratings where the rating of each attribute is raised to the power of the weight of the attribute in question. the results obtained are that Shopee is the best e-commerce in the first rank, in second place there is Tokopedia, and in third place there is Zalora. The application of the wp method is used to provide the best alternative decision in determining the best e-commerce. The decision-making process is calculated using the weighted product method, starting with determining the criteria and alternative values, improving the weights, calculating the S vector, V vector, and assigning rankings. The result with the highest value is the value selected as the first rank and states that the e-commerce is the best and is recommended to be selected.
Judul Paper: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM DETERMINES THE BEST E-COMMERCE USING THE WEIGHTED PRODUCT METHOD
Keyword: E-Commerce, Sistem Pendukung Keputusan, Weighted Product
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: In today's rapidly developing technological era, a government agency needs an information system that is able to improve services to the public, especially in processing data and information to be more accurate and efficient. The administration of citizen services still uses manual methods such as citizen data is still input one by one from a ledger with ordinary bookkeeping records that do not yet use information technology and the internet. As a result, in this population administration data collection, population data is often lost which results in data duplication or re-recording so that the resulting reports are not appropriate or accurate. Storing population data and requirements that are stored by archiving can cause data or archive loss resulting in inefficiencies in accuracy, storage and also time. With the development of technology, this can be overcome by building a web-based information system that is able to provide information to citizens related to activities that will be held and appeals to citizens by providing services for submitting letters or citizen services, handling complaints and other administration. The design of this administration system uses the PHP programming language and UML (Unified Model Language) which consists of Use Case Diagrams, Activity Diagrams, ERD, LRS, Class Diagrams and Sequence Diagrams. The software that the author uses is MySQL, XAMPP and the Laravel framework.
Judul Paper: KAMPUNG KEBEMBEM RT 002/ RW 005 KELURAHAN SEPANJANG JAYA BEKASI WEB BASED ADMINISTRATION SYSTEM
Keyword: Information Systems, Subdistrict Administration, Web Based
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: This study examines the effectiveness of the Naive Bayes (NB) and K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithms in sentiment analysis of user reviews of the Vidio app on the Google Play Store. The performance of both models was evaluated using various metrics, including accuracy, precision, recall, and Area Under Curve (AUC). The results show that KNN outperforms Naive Bayes in several key aspects. KNN achieved an accuracy of 74.92% compared to Naive Bayes' 71.32%. In terms of precision, KNN also performed better with a value of 76.52%, while Naive Bayes achieved 71.61%. However, both models performed comparable in terms of recall, with KNN achieving 72.54% and Naive Bayes 71.46%. Interestingly, both models had very high and nearly equal AUC values, namely 90.10% for KNN and 90.00% for Naive Bayes, indicating excellent ability to distinguish positive and negative sentiment. Based on the overall evaluation results, the KNN algorithm is more recommended for implementing sentiment analysis on Vidio application user reviews.
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF NAIVE BAYES AND KNN ALGORITHM FOR SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF USER REVIEWS OF VIDIO APPLICATIONS ON GOOGLE PLAY STORE
Keyword: Analisa Sentimen, Naive Bayes, KNN, User Reviews, Performance Evaluation, Google Play Store
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: All kinds of community activities are inseparable from the help of technology. The development of the business world in Indonesia is experiencing tough competition. Consumer satisfaction is the degree of conformity between the desired product and/or service and the reality received. The level of suitability is the result of an assessment carried out by the customer based on his knowledge and experience. Information system applications technically can be defined as a set of components that are interconnected to support decision making and drive the company. As the operation goes on, it is certainly possible for money problems to arise including the user interface and user experience. To measure user satisfaction and comfort with the Brothersindo Website, you can do usability testing using the heuristic evaluation method. The heuristic evaluation method is a method used to find errors in interface design based on 10 heuristic evaluation principles.
Judul Paper: UI AND UX ANALYSIS OF THE PT WEBSITE. BROTHERSINDO TRUE SISTER USING THE HEURISTIC EVALUATION METHOD
Keyword: heuristic evaluation, sales website, user interface, user experience
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: In today's global era, engagement with technology, especially information technology, has become an unavoidable necessity. Technology plays a crucial role in education, for example, in the delivery of material using projectors. However, as educational needs increase, significant changes in learning methods occur. Currently, information technology, such as the internet, is often used as a learning medium due to its speed and ease of information delivery. One implementation of technology in education is through e-learning. Implementing e-learning combined with gamification will be useful for increasing student interest and satisfaction in learning, thereby improving user performance and productivity in completing assignments. At MTsN 4 Banda Aceh, student interest and satisfaction in learning tend to decline due to the prolonged pandemic. Therefore, a method is needed to revitalize student interest and satisfaction in learning. The research method used is quantitative with a descriptive approach. Meanwhile, the implementation of this research was carried out using the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) process using the waterfall model with testing using the SUS scale and Blackbox testing methods. The results of the study using the SUS scale obtained a score of 82, which indicates that the e-learning website can increase students' interest and learning satisfaction, while testing using blackbox testing functionally showed that the e-learning website has fulfilled the functional aspects.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE BASED E-LEARNING DESIGN USING GAMIFICATION METHOD IN THE DIGITAL CLASS MTSN 4 BANDA ACEH
Keyword: teknologi, website, e-learning, gamification
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Each region has its own local culinary treasures, ranging from recipes, ingredients, to unique cooking techniques. However, a lack of understanding and exposure to local cuisine often becomes an obstacle in introducing the beauty and diversity of traditional cuisine to the wider community. In the ongoing era of globalization, interest in exploring various cultures and enjoying a variety of typical culinary flavors is increasing. Culinary tourism has become an important aspect of modern travel. When traveling, tourists often seek authentic and unique dining experiences that reflect the character and culinary richness of a region. This requires them to find out about local restaurants, food stalls, and street foods that they may have never known before. The Lokalezat application is a website and application that will provide a complete solution for tourists who want to explore local cuisine. The purpose of this research is to create an attractive, interactive, informative and user-friendly UI/UX design, the method used is the Design Thinking method. Through this method, the test system usability scale obtained a final score of 70.5 towards the good category. Thus, the UI/UX design of Lokalezat produces a good UI/UX design and can be accepted by users.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE THINGKING DESIGN METHOD IN UI/UX DESIGN OF THE LOKALEZAT APPLICATION
Keyword: Local Culinary, Local Delicious Applications, User Interface, User Experience, Design Thinking
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: E-OSSA is an internal website which is only used around the Tasikmalaya District Court area. This website is a website used to order stationery items that will be used in various fields in the Tasikmalaya District Court. After conducting interviews with several related fields in the Tasikmalaya District Court, one of the most relevant aspects that became the main complaint was the difficulty in operating the system faced by users. In this case, many related fields revealed that they faced obstacles in understanding and mastering how to use the system because of the confusing interface. The purpose of this final project is that the author will develop an E-OSSA Information System that can assist the court in ordering and managing stationery supplies in an integrated and effective manner using the agile method which in each iteration, will carry out planning, analysis, design, implementation, and testing of the features to be developed. The benefits and results of the design and development of the Eossa system in this court can increase efficiency and productivity in the process of ordering and managing stationery supplies, thereby improving the quality of service.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI AGILE PADA PENGEMBANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI E-OSSA DI PENGADILAN NEGERI TASIKMALAYA
Keyword: design, information systems, agile methods, ordering ATK
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: Computer network infrastructure has become an important requirement in supporting various business sectors, including small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in the ever-growing digital era. This study aims to analyze the performance of the OSPF routing protocol on the network at Munzir Kitchen, especially in separating the network between production and management rooms. The use of a MikroTik router placed on the 2nd floor functions as an access point, but has limited coverage to the 1st floor. This problem is exacerbated by the limited capacity of the router and modem in handling many connections simultaneously, which can cause a decrease in service quality. Therefore, the application of the OSPF dynamic routing method is carried out to divide the network into several segments, with the aim of improving data security and maintaining the stability of network performance in each segment. Performance testing was carried out using the Traffic Generator Tool with various data packet sizes and transfer speeds. The test results show that the OSPF configuration works optimally, with almost the same data transmission and reception at transfer speeds of up to 100 Mbps. Thus, the implementation of OSPF routing is considered effective and good in improving network performance at Munzir Kitchen and can be implemented on a wider network scale.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF OSPF ROUTING PROTOCOL ON MIKROTIK ROUTERS AND PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS USING TRAFFIC GENERATOR TOOL (CASE STUDY: MUNZIR KITCHEN JAKARTA)
Keyword: Munzir Kitchen, OSPF, Traffic Generator Tool
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness and efficiency of the motor vehicle data input information system at UPTD SAMSAT Serang City using the COBIT 5 framework. The methodology used includes observation, interviews, and secondary and primary data collection. The assessment was carried out using the EDM02 (Ensure Continuous Monitoring and Evaluation) and APO12 (Assessing Risk) processes from COBIT 5. The results showed that the current vehicle data input system still faces several challenges, especially in terms of data validation and data duplication prevention. Based on these findings, recommendations are given to improve the data input process to make it more effective and efficient. Implementation of the improvements is expected to improve the quality of data generated and support SAMSAT's overall operations. This research provides practical contributions in the form of specific and measurable recommendations to improve the performance of information systems at UPTD SAMSAT Serang City and provides insight into the application of COBIT 5 in information systems audits.
Judul Paper: AUDIT OF THE MOTOR VEHICLE DATA INPUT INFORMATION SYSTEM IN THE SAMSAT REGIONAL TECHNICAL SERVICES UNIT, SERANG CITY USING COBIT 5 FRAMEWORK
Keyword: Audit, Information System, Motor Vehicle Data Input\, SAMSAT, COBIT 5, Data Validation
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: Spam is commonly used by both companies and individuals to continuously provide various kinds of information to their customers, both existing and potential customers. Generally, the information provided is product promotions or new product offers. However, the information provided may be unimportant and can be annoying to the recipient. This spam problem can be anticipated by creating a Machine Learning tool capable of detecting whether incoming information is spam or not by classifying the contents of SMS messages. Because the labels contained in this study only have two variables, this study uses the Binary Classification type by applying the Logistic Regression method to classify SMS messages. The purpose of this study is not only to create a spam detection tool, but also to obtain test results for the Logistic Regression method based on the detection accuracy that can be achieved. The result of this study is to obtain an SMS SPAM classification technique with a high level of accuracy.
Judul Paper: USING BINARY CLASSIFICATION TO DETECT SPAM IN SMS USING THE LOGISTIC REGRESSION METHOD
Keyword: Binary Classification, Logistic Regression, SMS, SPAM, Term Frequency, Inverse Document Frequency
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Steganography is an anti-forensic technique that allows criminals to hide information in other messages, making it difficult for investigators to obtain evidence of the original information in the crime. Therefore, an investigator is required to have the ability to find and extract it using the right tools when opening messages that have been inserted with steganography techniques. This study analyzes digital evidence using the static forensics method by applying the five stages of the National Institute of Justice (NIJ) framework and conducting steganography extraction on compromised files based on case scenarios involving digital crimes. The tools used include FTK Imager, Autopsy, WinHex, Hiderman, and StegSpy. The extraction results show that of the 10 files that have been compromised by steganography, 9 files were successfully extracted with a 90% success rate, while the other 10% did not find any steganographic files. It can be concluded that the extracted files from steganographic messages can be used as legal digital evidence.
Judul Paper: INVESTIGASI STEGO FILE MENGGUNAKAN FRAMEWORK NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF JUSTICE
Keyword: Anti forensics, steganography, NIJ, Hiderman
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: VLAN technology is a collection of several devices located on one or more LAN networks and configured by software so that they can communicate with each other while being located on the same channel. The network used is indihome 100Mbps. At SMA Fatahillah, it has had several very good facilities, but the school still has several shortcomings, namely in terms of its computer network, such as a poorly configured network management system, poor security configuration. The purpose of this study is to design a computer network and access control list as security at SMA Fatahillah. The method used in this study is the PPDIOO method (Prepare, Plan, Design, Implementation, Operate, Optimize). The results of this study are in the form of analysis and design of computer network architecture by applying VLAN topology which will then be simulated using the Cisco Packet Tracer application, based on the simulation that has been run, the design of the computer network architecture at SMA Fatahillah has been successfully run and connected to each other based on the division/configuration of their respective paths to maximize the ports on the switch with the implementation of VLAN technology making it easier to monitor if changes occur in the network. This simulation will provide an overview to Fatahillah High School if they want to change the LAN network to VLAN.
Judul Paper: FATAHILLAH HIGH SCHOOL VLAN NETWORK DESIGN
Keyword: VLAN Networking, Network Security, Cisco Packet Trace
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This study focuses on the design and implementation of a hotelier's room booking information system with the goal of building an efficient, reliable, and user-friendly solution. The system combines ease of use with broader accessibility, connecting guests with a wide selection of hotels, amenities, and prices that match their preferences. Through this system, hotel guests can browse important information such as available room types, offered amenities, hotel location, photos of rooms and amenities, and reviews from previous guests. In addition to providing benefits to hotel guests, a room booking information system also provides significant benefits to hotel management. With this system, management can efficiently manage room inventory, streamline the reservation process, and improve overall operational efficiency. Data collected through this information system can also provide valuable insights in optimizing marketing strategies, identifying demand trends, and improving guest satisfaction. However, creating and implementing a room booking information system is not an easy task. Each hotel has unique operational needs and challenges, so the system must be carefully designed and developed, taking all these factors into account. This study aims to provide an efficient, reliable, and user-friendly solution to help hotels maximize their services and achieve higher levels of customer satisfaction.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF A WEBSITE-BASED ROOM BOOKING INFORMATION SYSTEM IN A HOTEL
Keyword: Information Systems, Room Reservations, Websites
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Along with the development of technological advances nowadays, it is very useful for us in looking for information that is fast, precise and accurate in everyday life, especially in helping us complete our work. With the existence of a computerized system, it is hoped that it can help us with all the work that is difficult to do. becomes easy to do in order to get better results than before, Banjit Community Health Center. It requires a lot of overhaul of the network structure that supports and provides satisfactory services for community health center internet users. For this reason, the author wrote this thesis regarding internet network design, currently the Banjit Community Health Center is still using repeaters to spread the internet network throughout the community health center area and using WPA/WPA2 security so that the internet network at several points of the Community Health Center is less stable and feels slow for some users, by using The network design proposed by the author can improve the quality of the internet network at the Banjit Community Health Center.

Abstrak: This study aims to develop a Wireless Automatic Garage Door Controller using NodeMCU ESP8266. This system allows users to operate garage doors wirelessly via a WiFi network. In addition, this system is equipped with an ultrasonic distance sensor to detect the presence of vehicles or objects around the garage door. The research method used is an experimental research design that involves testing the system's functionality and evaluating the performance of automatic garage door control. Data were collected through a questionnaire survey and direct observation of system usage. The results of the study indicate that the Wireless Automatic Garage Door Controller system was successfully implemented. Functionality testing shows that the system can open and close the garage door automatically and detect the presence of vehicles or objects accurately. Data analysis using descriptive statistical methods shows that users tend to use the system with a moderate frequency. The average system usage is 3.36 and the standard deviation is 1.06. This system has advantages in ease of operation through a user-friendly interface and good security through additional security features. In addition, this system is responsive, effective, and efficient in controlling garage doors. In conclusion, the Wireless Automatic Garage Door Controller using NodeMCU ESP8266 provides positive results in controlling garage doors. This system can control the garage door well, respond to commands quickly, and detect the presence of vehicles or objects accurately.
Judul Paper: WIRELESS AUTOMATIC GARAGE DOOR CONTROLLER USING NODEMCU ESP8266
Keyword: Jaringan WiFi, NodeMCU ESP8266, Pintu garasi otomatis, Sensor jarak ultrasonik, Wireless Automatic Garage Door Controller
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika: Jurnal Pengembangan IT

Abstrak: Parking is a crucial issue in today's modern era. More and more people are using private vehicles, leading to an increasing need for parking spaces, especially in shopping centers such as malls and high-rise buildings. Limited information regarding parking availability makes it difficult for drivers to find available parking spaces. To address this issue, it is proposed to design and prototype a more modern parking system with an automated system. This system will be able to display information regarding parking availability and its location, thus assisting drivers in finding empty parking spaces. This research includes software and hardware testing. In software testing, an Arduino Uno program is used to control the components used. Meanwhile, hardware testing is carried out to test the performance of the infrared sensor using an Arduino Uno as a data processor from the sensor. The results of the infrared sensor testing and system testing indicate that everything runs well and all expected functions can run properly. In the infrared sensor test, the distance that allows the barrier to open can be detected, and information regarding the number of remaining parking slots can be displayed on the LCD screen.
Judul Paper: SMART PARKING BASED ON ARDUINO UNO FOR HIGH STORY BUILDINGS
Keyword: Smart Parking, Arduino Nano, Sensor Infrared
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The high level of patient mobilization requires fast communication between patients and health facilities and between patients and doctors. Another problem is the low level of patient understanding when registering using the website, causing many patients to still choose to register manually. Therefore, there is a need for information development that makes it easier for patients to carry out their activities. This study aims to design a mobile-based patient registration application that is easy to use for various groups to be more efficient and effective when registering and to analyze the application design implementation at Pandak I Community Health Center. This study applies the prototype software development method to the process of system requirements analysis, prototype creation, system testing and implementation. Data collection techniques used are through observation, interviews, and literature studies. This study is descriptive with the research population of patients and staff at Pandak I Community Health Center. The research sample is several patients and staff at Pandak I Community Health Center. The research instrument uses a validated questionnaire with 9 questions. The results of the study show that the patient registration display interface test is good (83%) and the admin display interface test is good (75%). The interface design can be run well so it can be implemented in the future.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF A MOBILE-BASED PUBLIC HEALTH CENTER PATIENT REGISTRATION SYSTEM
Keyword: patient registration, mobile-based, prototype method
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Cooperatives are business entities that aim to improve the welfare of their members. In its management, the Hikmah cooperative still uses a conventional system, where cooperative data is recorded in a ledger. Therefore, the use of this conventional system still faces several obstacles such as the risk of data damage and loss, difficulty in searching for data, and the need for a long time to serve a large number of members, resulting in ineffective savings and loan applications. Due to these obstacles, a computerized system is needed that can be used to facilitate members and cooperative administrators in managing cooperative data. The purpose of designing this system is to produce a more effective and efficient system that can be implemented in the Hikmah cooperative. With an information system that can be accessed online, it can speed up the process, making it more effective and efficient. The method used for system development is the Prototyping method. The Prototyping method can make it easier for users to understand the system that will be built later. The result of this research is the design of a website-based cooperative savings and loan information system.
Judul Paper: Application of the Prototype Method in Designing a Website-Based Savings and Loans Cooperative Information System
Keyword: system design, cooperatives, savings and loans, prototypes, websites
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: To increase knowledge about tourist attractions in Indonesia, both for Indonesians and internationals, geographic mapping that is in accordance with technological developments is needed. Information about tourist attractions in Indonesia, such as beaches, temples, dams, waterfalls, and other tourist locations can be accessed via the internet using a web-based Geographic Information System (GIS). The creation of the Indonesian Tourism Geographic Information System follows the Waterfall Model method which consists of 5 stages, namely design, analysis, coding and testing, implementation, and maintenance. The required data refers to the spatial data model in the Geographic Information System. The information presented in the Indonesian Tourism Geographic Information System includes information about regions, maps, photos, and the closest routes to tourist locations. The purpose of the Indonesian Tourism Geographic Information System is to provide benefits to both Indonesians and internationals so that they can easily obtain information about tourist attractions in Indonesia.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI GEOGRAFIS PERJALANAN PARIWISATA INDONESIA (NUSANTARA TRIP)
Keyword: Geographic Information Systems, Tourism, Indonesia
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: Currently in cyberspace there is an interesting phenomenon in the development of information systems. The business sector is the sector most affected, through e-commerce (electronic commerce) a business will get the same opportunities as other businesses. Family Craft is a micro, small and medium enterprise (MSME) engaged in the craft sector and is currently still growing, so it needs a means to develop its business through e-commerce. The purpose of this study is to create a website as a means of introducing the business and selling their products. The method used in this study is a prototype with stages of user needs communication (interviewing business owners), prototype design (designing the flow), prototype formation (designing the design), as well as testing, evaluation using PHP programming, Codeigniter Framework, MySql as a data storage database. For this system was tested using the black-box method. The result of this study is the design of a website-based online sales application at the Family Craft craft store, which can later be used as a reference for building e-commerce. Data collection by observation (direct observation), interviews (questions and answers), and literature studies
Judul Paper: APLIKASI SISTEM PENJUALAN BUSANA MUSLIM BERBASIS WEBSITE PADA TOKO NADA SWEET
Keyword: sales system, rapid application development, website
Jurnal: Conten : Computer and Network Technology

Abstrak: Currently in cyberspace there is an interesting phenomenon in the development of information systems. The business sector is the sector most affected, through e-commerce (electronic commerce) a business will get the same opportunities as other businesses. Family Craft is a micro, small and medium enterprise (MSME) engaged in the craft sector and is currently still growing, so it needs a means to develop its business through e-commerce. The method used in this study is a prototype with stages of user needs communication (interviewing business owners), prototype design (designing the flow), prototype formation (designing the design), as well as testing, evaluation using PHP programming, Codeigniter Framework, MySql as a data storage database. The result of this study is the design of a website-based online sales application at the Family Craft craft store, which can later be used as a reference for building e-commerce. Data collection by observation (direct observation), interviews (questions and answers), and literature studies
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN CRAFTZEN.ID FAMILY CRAFT MENGGUNAKAN METODE PROTOTYPE
Keyword: Information System, ecommerce, prototype, PHP
