Abstrak: Cryptography is a field of knowledge that uses mathematical equations to carry out encryption and decryption processes. This technique is to convert data into certain codes so that information cannot be read by anyone except authorized parties. One of the cryptographic methods commonly used is a symmetric algorithm that uses the same key when encrypting and decrypting so that the information is difficult to understand its meaning [6]. The purpose of carrying out Encryption and Encryption of data or text is to make the data we have more secure from attacks by irresponsible people. The software was built with the help of Visual Basic applications. After implementing the Decryption and Encryption process of Text with the Substitution Algorithm of Chipper with Plaintext INFORMATIKA using the application that has been designed and created, then testing has been carried out with Microsoft Excel which has produced the same Chiphertext results, namely the results of SXPYBWKDSUK. then it can be concluded that Decryption and Encryption of Text with the Substitution Algorithm of Chipper has been successfully carried out with Valid results or as expected.
Judul Paper: Application of Cryptography for Text Encryption and Decryption with Cipher Substitution Algorithm
Keyword: Cryptography, Encryption, Decryption, Plaintext, Chippertext
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Rumah Oleh-oleh Qiran, the largest souvenir center in Rokan Hulu, Riau Province, is experiencing issues with manual inventory and sales tracking, a lack of sales data analysis, and inadequate product arrangement. This study used the Fuzzy Multidimensional Association Rule Algorithm to analyze sales data and generate product association patterns. The main goal is to increase the inventory and sales management efficiency while also optimizing product arrangement based on purchase patterns detected through transaction analysis results. The data used consisted of 140 sales transactions from during June, 2023, with a minimum support 30% and a minimum confidence 25%. The analysis of data results the best-selling products are "Kue Bangkit" (33.58%) and "Gula Aren Rambah Kotak" (27.01%). "kue bangkit" and "gula aren rambah kotak" are the popular product combinations, with a support of 19.71% and a confidence of 72.97%. The application passed the User Acceptance Test (UAT) with a 75% score, indicating that it is applicable to use.
Judul Paper: Application of Fuzzy Multidimensional Association Rule for Analysis of Consumer Behavior Patterns
Keyword: Algorithm, Fuzzy Multidimensional Association Rule, Consumer Behavior, Sales Transactions, Web
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: This research aims to develop a wheeled robot control system using NodeMCU ESP8266 that can be controlled wirelessly through an Android application. This system uses a Wi-Fi connection to enable communication between the Android application and the wheeled robot controlled via NodeMCU. This wheeled robot is equipped with two DC motors that drive the robot's wheels and an L298N motor driver to control the direction and speed of the robot's movement. With the implementation of the Android application, users can control the robot remotely, providing flexible and easily accessible control. In this study, tests were conducted to evaluate system performance in terms of connection stability, response time, and accuracy of the wheeled robot's movements in responding to given commands.
Judul Paper: Controlling a Wheeled Robot Using NODEMCU Controlled via an Android Mobile Phone
Keyword: Robot Beroda, NodeMCU, Wi-Fi, Android, Pengontrolan Jarak Jauh, Internet of Things (IoT).
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This study examines the integration of the Agile Scrum framework as a project management approach in a software development context. The research objective was to evaluate the use of Agile Scrum for enhancing digital transformation initiatives. The findings indicate that the implemented system can be effectively utilized by the organization, aligning with its requirements. Additionally, the Agile Scrum methodology proved beneficial in increasing the adoption of SAP SuccessFactors within application consulting settings, emphasizing the need for flexible integration of project management practices to accommodate rapid business dynamics.
Judul Paper: Scrum Integration in Cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) Project Development
Keyword: SuccessFactors, Agile Scrum, Project Management
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: In the digital era, PT. Roda Insurance recognizes the significance of information technology in enhancing operational efficiency and customer service. This research explores system analysis, design, implementation, and performance evaluation to bridge the gap between vehicle insurance providers and customers. The findings indicate that the adoption of information technology can significantly improve business process efficiency and the quality of services provided to clients. Consequently, information technology not only facilitates internal management but also strengthens clients' trust in the company.
Judul Paper: Website Design as a Vehicle Insurance Information Media PT. INSURANCE WHEEL
Keyword: web, waterfall, information, media, vehicle, insurance
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak:
PT. BPR Kintamas Mitra Dana is a well-known bank in Batam that already has a company profile website. However, the website is outdated due to lack of product and design updates, impacting customer trust and comfort when accessing the company profile website. To help PT. BPR Kintamas Mitra Dana address this issue, the author decided to redesign and update the company's products on the company profile website. The website design and development process will begin with data collection, the external design process, and the implementation phase. The method used is Research and Development. The company considers the company profile website to be very satisfactory, both in terms of content, color, and layout. This allows the company to analyze and provide solutions to the partner company's problems, particularly regarding the company profile website that has not been updated for a long time. Therefore, the author will design and implement a new, more attractive and efficient company profile website.
This design process involves several stages: data collection, design, implementation, and evaluation. The results of this company profile website design will be implemented live (hosted), so partners and customers can access the website directly.
Judul Paper: Design and Implementation of Company Profile Website at PT. BPR Kintamas Mitra Dana
Keyword: company profile website, company profile
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The occurrence of the Covid-19 pandemic tests the resilience of the health service system in countries around the world, especially Indonesia, in responding and acting quickly and appropriately. This incident is a separate evaluation of the health service system in this country. As part of the global action plan to achieve Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) point number 3, namely ensuring a healthy life and supporting welfare for all and efforts to improve public health as measured by the Public Health Development Index (IPKM), therefore, an increase in quality of health services is needed. The quality of health services includes issues of performance and affordability among society. With the development of innovations in database technology aspect, namely big data and artificial intelligence, it is hoped that this can be a breakthrough in the world of Indonesian health so that the goals of Indonesia in improving public health can be achieved.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Big Data for Medical Checks and Health Consultations in Indonesia
Keyword: health care, public health, technology, big data, artificial intelligence
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak:
MSMEs (Micro and Small and Medium Enterprises) have an important role now in the economy. 96% of companies in ASEAN are MSMEs. Although MSMEs have shown their role, they still face various obstacles and constraints such as lack of information, transaction record tech, weak branding, promotion and infrastructure. The application of information technology will certainly make it easier for MSMEs to strengthen branding, business processing and enable cooperation with other parties to provide added value to MSMEs. The application of cloud computing or cloud computing is considered suitable for MSMEs that have limited resources in the form of capital, human resources (HR) and information technology infrastructure.

Responding to the importance of the application of information technology to these MSMEs, the research aims to design and build systems that can facilitate MSMEs by utilizing cloud computing technology with SAAS (software as a service). The system expectedly can produce the output which are the record of the transaction and its report for supporting the MSMEs business.
Judul Paper: The Idea of Implementation Of Cloud Computing Technology In MSME Booking System
Keyword: Keywords: MSMEs, transaction record, information technology, cloud computing
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: This research is an example of the implementation of artificial intelligence in software. This research was conducted with the aim of improving an existing feature, namely the feature for removing objects from videos. The method used is the object removal feature in Photoshop, which will be developed and implemented to further enhance this feature and improve the speed and ease of video editing. There are still many things that can be implemented with AI. Therefore, it is hoped that this research journal will inspire readers to develop AI implementations for everyday objects.
Judul Paper: Journal of Application of Artificial Intelligence in Object Removal in Video Editing
Keyword: AI
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: This academic research paper is intend to propose our team ideas into upcoming future society named society 5.0. We will be researching in how Artificial Intelligence (AI) can provide its technologies capabilities into Learning Management System (LMS). LMS has been an interest in the past few decades and has helped educators a lot in imparting knowledge to their students. And so we can see that LMS will be used a lot in the not so far away future. From this paper, we hope that our idea can be a potential researching material for the researchers.
Judul Paper: The Idea of Implementing AI into the Learning Management System
Keyword: Society 5.0; Learning Management Systems; Artificial Intelligence
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: The newly developing Kreator Pass startup business is struggling to gain recognition in the internet technology industry. As the times become more modern, businesses must adapt to the latest technological information and attract new business opportunities. Many emerging businesses are using social media platforms to seek fame and increase brand awareness, such as Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This research was conducted using qualitative methods through open-ended interviews. The research yielded analytical data showing that TikTok is gaining viewers and providing positive feedback on the development of Kreator Pass. The analytical data for YouTube indicates a high level of popularity and support for Kreator Pass, while the analytics for Instagram show negative results, with a lack of supportive viewers. Based on the data obtained, promoted videos need to be more engaging to attract viewers.
Judul Paper: Eksperimen Social Media Marketing Strategy Kreator
Keyword: Brand Awareness, Promosi Video, Sosial Media
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: The rapid development of information technology has made all aspects of human life more practical and efficient, especially the use of technology with artificial intelligence. Schools are institutions established with the aim of teaching students under the control of teachers/educators. Schools themselves consist of each level, namely from Kindergarten (TK) to Secondary School (SMP and SMA/SMK). In addition, there are schools that consist of a combination of several levels. With several levels in a school, the number of students in the school increases. This can certainly disrupt the effectiveness of school services. Therefore, this research on the application of chatbot applications is to (1) Discuss increasing the effectiveness of information services for schools that have several levels of education, and (2) Discuss solutions that can help students to obtain accurate information about schools anywhere and anytime only through the application. This research uses a literature study method based on several publications that have been reviewed previously. After conducting a literature study, it can be concluded that the implementation of artificial intelligence chatbot applications as an online service and information system in schools can improve the quality of services and information in schools to be more effective and efficient.
Judul Paper: Application of Artificial Intelligence in Chatbot Applications as Online Service and Information Systems in Schools
Keyword: Technology, artificial intelligence, chatbot, school, online information services
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: The increasingly developing human life cannot be separated from technology that can help daily life, the increasingly rapid development of technology has a significant effect on human life which provides facilities for its users, currently the pandemic has implemented health protocols for people to carry out activities safely and not endanger others. One solution to prevent transmission during a pandemic is to check body temperature first. With the presence of ai face recognition thermal which can improve the quality of health protocols and facilitate the process of identifying faces and temperatures simultaneously. Users will undergo facial verification and temperature measurements at the same time with accurate checking speed so as to prevent the spread of the virus.
Judul Paper: Application of Renewable Technology in the IT Field in the World of Business and Society Implementation of A.I Face Recognition Thermal
Keyword: Technology, Viruses, Facilities
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak:
Garbage is a part of human life. Garbage is an object / residual substance that is not used. Garbage should receive serious attention and handling. However, there are still many people who just throw away their waste at will, such as throwing wet waste into a dry trash can, which makes processing the waste difficult.

Currently, most people are aware of the bad effects of waste, including causing flooding, disease and odors that can interfere with life. But this is not matched by the behavior of the people themselves.

The purpose of this study is to try to find a way out of environmental sanitation problems, especially waste management. We also want people to be able to differentiate between organic waste and non-organic waste. Because there are still many people who do not know what kind of waste is classified into organic waste and non-organic waste. With the development of an increasingly sophisticated era, the use of Artificial Intelligence is expected to be able to crush the existing waste problem.
Judul Paper: Application of AI Technology to Build Waste Disposal Sites According to Type
Keyword: Garbage, Environmental Sanitation, Organic, Non-Organic
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: The human population in the world today is increasing rapidly, and as the population increases, the need for technology is also urgently needed to balance it. In today's digital era, technology is indispensable to meet human needs. Among them the application of technology in the field of environmental health. The application of technology in the health sector can be said to be very good, because in recent years, technology has helped scientists and doctors find drugs to treat various diseases. Aspects of human health and illness that all depends on the surrounding environmental factors. So, it is very important for humans to pay more attention to the surrounding environment in order to avoid unwanted diseases. It does not only occur due to natural factors, but also occurs due to factors from ourselves. This refers to the theory and practice of assessment carried out by scientists.
Judul Paper: APPLYING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE INNOVATION IN THE FIELD OF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH
Keyword: technology
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: Information Technology (IT) is a general term for any technology that helps humans create, modify, store, communicate, and/or disseminate information. IT combines computing and high-speed communications for data, voice, and video. IT is an integral part of human life today. Humans would have difficulty obtaining information or communicating long distance without the help of IT, especially in times like today. With the application and implementation of IT in society, activities carried out by the community will be greatly assisted. With increasingly advanced technology, the implementation of IT in people's lives will increase. However, although there are positive impacts of IT, such as long-distance communication, IT also has various negative impacts on society, such as society's dependence on IT itself.
Judul Paper: Utilization and Impact of Using Information Technology in the Social Sector
Keyword: But even though there are positive impacts of information technology such as long-distance communication, information technology also has various negative impacts on society
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Indonesia is one of the countries with 143.26 million internet users and is ranked 5th largest in the world. Internet users influence changes in consumer shopping behavior in Indonesia, from offline stores to online stores. E-commerce ranks second in Indonesia in the travel category and generated $ 2,417 in 2018. Tiket.com as an online travel agent is a business to customer (B2C) based e-commerce. Tiket.com was launched in 2011, but in the 2017 popular brand index ranking, Tiket.com ranked second and had a customer purchase intention level of 11.8. Ideally, Tiket.com could be ranked first because the company was first launched in the online travel agent sector. This study will study and analyze the quality of Tiket.com's website design on purchase intention. The purpose of this study is to provide input in designing and developing the Tiket.com website to increase user interest. This study uses partial least squares (PLS) 3.0 analysis. The results of this study indicate that ole is influenced by the quality of website design, product quality, and perceived information by 66.2%. Website design quality can be explained through its predictors, namely design and visual appeal, and innovation, at 55.2%. Of the six hypotheses proposed, all had a significant positive effect.
Judul Paper: Analysis of the Influence of Website Design Quality on Online Travel Agent Buying Interest
Keyword: website design quality, purchase interest, online travel agent, website
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Food hygiene is one of the important factors in maintaining health, however food hygiene has not fully been implemented in the community. Therefore, Artificial Intelligence technology is presented in Society 5.0 to improve food safety and quality. This study aims to analyze opportunities for utilization of AI technology in the food sector. In conducting research ranging from problem identification, standard search, data collection, data analysis, to conclusions and suggestions. The results of the study obtained the magnitude of opportunities to utilize AI technology in the food sector. AI technology can improve the safety of food hygiene and facilitate monitoring of environmental hygiene, workers, or food itself.
Judul Paper: Utilization of Artificial Intelligence in Improving Food Hygiene
Keyword: Food Hygiene, Health, Society 5.0, Artificial Intelligence
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: Online shopping has recently shown a very rapid development and plus there is a deadly virus that makes people afraid to leave the house, so an alternative way to not have to leave the house is to shop online. With the passage of time, there has been a change in shopping, where you usually have to go to the place directly, now you don't have to go directly to the place of shopping because of the existing technology. So with more and more people buying things online, the e-commerce site must look good and be easy to use. This research was conducted to design a website-based E-commerce design to make it more attractive. Making this research using data collection
Judul Paper: Website-Based E-Commerce Web Design at the Ida Shoes Store
Keyword: Online shopping, E-commerce, website
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: Promotion is a crucial activity in marketing. The success of a marketing campaign depends on how it is implemented. Effective promotion encompasses several elements, including advertising, personal selling, sales promotion, and publicity. Promotion is a marketing activity whose success is determined by how it is implemented. Promotional videos often include a comprehensive range of visualizations, motion pictures, and audio elements, often referred to as multimedia. Video reviews are marketing communications that can influence purchasing decisions. Braindo is an e-commerce marketplace focused on household appliances. This design utilizes a research and development method. In the research phase, the author analyzed data from questionnaires and interviews with three married couples, obtaining raw data in the form of questionnaires. In the development phase, the author designed a video review as an advertising medium.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of Video Reviews as Advertising Media on Marketplace Websites Using Research & Development Methods
Keyword: Promotion, Video, Media, Advertising, Advertising Media
Jurnal: Journal of Information System and Technology (JOINT)

Abstrak: Web services for data integration in Sikapeta and SITU2 applications are highly needed in the Faculty of Engineering, Unpas. Currently, there are at least three web service methods, namely Extensible Markup Language Remote Procedure Call (XML-RPC), Simple Object Access Protocol (SOAP), and Representational State Transfer (REST) ​​which have different specifications and require different algorithms to be used. This research focuses on analyzing suitable data integration models that can be implemented in Sikapeta and SITU2 applications. The research was conducted by evaluating the performance of three web service methods to obtain the best configuration. The evaluation process was carried out by measuring the speed of web services for all types of transactions in the three web services with latency parameters, namely the length of time required from sending a request by the client until the client receives the request results from the server. The results of the research will determine the web services that can be used to develop a data integration model for Sikapeta and SITU2 applications.
Judul Paper: Web Service Performance Measurement for the Integration of Ilmueta Data with SITU2
Keyword: data integration, latency, xmlrpc soap, rest, web service, merdekata, situ2
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: In today's digital era, smartphone use has become a widespread phenomenon, dominating our daily lives and signaling a significant shift in the way we communicate, work, and access information. However, this phenomenon has negative impacts, not only creating dependence on technology but also paving the way for the emergence of mental health disorders, such as Nomophobia, which is the anxiety about the unavailability or loss of access to smartphone use. This study develops an innovative approach to respond to the negative impacts of smartphone use by building NomophobiCare, a website-based expert system using the Certainty Factor method. System testing was conducted with 10 student respondents, demonstrating accuracy in accordance with manual calculations and expert knowledge representation rules. User Acceptance Test (UAT) was also conducted to evaluate the system's acceptance by end users, in this case the respondents. The UAT results showed an average acceptance rate of 96.4%, reflecting positive user responses and satisfaction with the system. With the ability to identify levels of nomophobia early, this system can provide benefits in prevention and identify early actions that can be taken to help manage and mitigate the negative impacts of smartphone dependence.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Certainty Factor Method in a Web-Based Expert System for Nomophobia Diagnosis in Adolescents
Keyword: Sistem Pakar, Certainty Factor, Nomophobia, Diagnosis
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Anxiety disorders are a mental health condition that can disrupt the quality of life of people with disabilities. This research aims to create a web-based expert system for Gumregah Management in Argorejo Village to facilitate early diagnosis and treatment of anxiety disorders. With limited access to specialist doctors, the system uses the Forward Chaining method to ensure easy and accurate diagnosis. Test results showed 100% accuracy from 15 patients, confirming the system's effectiveness in treating anxiety disorders in people with disabilities in areas with limited access to mental health services. This research contributes to solutions for diagnosing and providing early treatment of anxiety disorders in people with disabilities.
Judul Paper: Expert System for Diagnosing Anxiety Disorders in Disabled People Using the Web-Based Forward Chaining Method
Keyword: Anxiety Disorder, Expert System, Forward Chaining
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: The relocation of the capital city is one of the most controversial government policies in recent years. This policy has generated a variety of public sentiments, both supportive and opposed. Sentiment analysis is a technique needed to understand public sentiment on a topic. In this study, sentiment analysis regarding capital transfer utilizes the Naive Bayes algorithm. Comments on YouTube videos discussing capital transfer constitute the data used in this study. These comments are divided into two groups: positive and negative. The research results indicate that public sentiment towards the relocation of the capital city remains polarized. The majority of the public has negative sentiments towards this policy, while a small portion has positive sentiments. This study provides an overview of public sentiment towards capital transfer. The results can be used by the government to understand public aspirations and improve communication with the public regarding this policy.
Judul Paper: Naive Bayes Algorithm Optimization to Analyze Sentiment on Capital Relocation Content on YouTube
Keyword: Sentiment Analysis, Capital Relocation, Social Media, YouTube, Naive Bayes Algorithm
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Social media has become a way for people to socialize without meeting face to face, seek knowledge, sell, and so on. Analysis of the video “How Old is the Universe? (And How Do You Know?" aims to find out the public's response to educational videos on YouTube social media. With this research, it is hoped that social media can develop as an educational medium. First, 611 video comments were collected but only 100 comments could be analyzed. Then Pre-processing was carried out with the following steps: parsing, tokenization, stopword removal, and stemming. After that, comments were divided into 4 clusters based on the occurrence of the same words and their synonyms. Comments were also classified using 3 scales, namely negative, neutral, and positive. The initial 50 comments were manually classified while the other 50 comments used Rapidminer with the Naive Bayes method. Analysis of similar videos as comparative data also used the same steps. The results of the analysis showed a positive response of 65% with advantages in the use of animation and accurate scientific presentation. Based on the analysis, it can be concluded that YouTube is effectively used as an educational medium.
Judul Paper: Analysis of YouTube Videos as Educational Media Using the Naive Bayes Method
Keyword: youtube, social media analysis, sentiment analysis, education, social media
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: Rice is one of the many food crops that plays a vital role in the lives of all people, especially those in Asia. As one of the most important rice reserves in Indonesia, East Java plays a significant role in national-scale rice production. Therefore, efforts are needed to implement the K-means algorithm to improve the efficiency and productivity of the agricultural sector, especially the rice production process. The collected data compares the data centroid values ​​from two cluster numbers, namely 4 and 3. The initial number of clusters is 4. When using the elbow and silhouette methods, the correct number of clusters is 4. The number of the second cluster is 3 and has descriptions of high, medium, and low. The scientific basis of this research is to make a positive contribution to the development of the agricultural sector in East Java, improving rural welfare and developing more accurate and effective policies to maintain national food security.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the K-Means Clustering Algorithm in Rice Production in East Java Province in 2022
Keyword: Clustering, K-Means, Rice Production
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: This research article discusses sentiment analysis related to the BT Group's layoff policy against 55,000 employees as a result of the use of artificial intelligence (AI). The Naive Bayes method is used to classify sentiment on comments appearing on the YouTube platform regarding the policy. The main objective of this analysis is to understand the public's response and sentiment towards the BT Group's layoff policy. By using the Naive Bayes method, this article aims to provide in-depth insights into how artificial intelligence technology can influence corporate layoff policies, as well as public responses to these policies based on the sentiment analysis conducted. Thus, this article is expected to contribute to the understanding of the impact of the use of AI technology in the context of corporate policies, as well as public responses to these policies based on the sentiment analysis conducted.
Judul Paper: Classification of Sentiment Regarding the 55 Thousand Employee Layoff Policy by BT Group using the Naive Bayes Classification Algorithm
Keyword: PHK, Analisis Sentimen, Naive Bayes
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Cardiovascular disease is the main cause of death globally causing challenges in the world of health, including in Indonesia. Lack of public knowledge about cardiovascular disease is very dangerous if preventive measures are not taken immediately. Currently, the treatment of cardiovascular disease is done manually, takes a long time, costs a lot and the practice hours of cardiologists are short. To overcome this problem, researchers implemented an expert system that can diagnose cardiovascular disease and a web system is needed to identify symptoms and apply the certainty factor method as a decision-making tool in overcoming public uncertainty in early examinations. This system involves 6 disease data, 29 symptom data, and 20 case data. In this study, testing was carried out based on the results of expert validation with accuracy system test data, resulting in an appropriate level of symptom and disease compliance and an accuracy level of 100% obtained from 20 data checks.
Judul Paper: Cardiovascular Disease Diagnosis Expert System Using the Certainty Factor Method
Keyword: Cardiovascular disease, Expert System, Certainty Factor
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: In today's digital era, information technology plays a crucial role in driving business progress across various sectors, including the tourism industry. PT. Al Ahram Sarana Wisata, operating in Indonesia and offering services such as accommodation, airline tickets, and Hajj and Umrah pilgrimage services, is an example of a company that has integrated information technology and web-based systems into its operations. Critical factors such as IT maintenance, monitoring, and management not only support business processes but are also essential in achieving the company's business objectives. This study uses the Monitor and Evaluate (ME) domain of COBIT 4.1 to measure the IT maturity level at PT. Al Ahram Sarana Wisata. This study aims to evaluate IT maturity based on the maintenance, monitoring, and management processes, and to determine how far the current IT maturity level compares to the desired maturity level. The results of this study are expected to provide insights and recommendations for improving the implementation of IT in the company, so that business processes can run more efficiently and effectively.
Judul Paper: Evaluation of Information System Performance Using COBIT 4.1 at PT. Al Ahram Tourism Facilities
Keyword: Information Technology, COBIT 4.1, Monitoring and Evaluation
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Social media has become a way for people to socialize without meeting face to face, seek knowledge, sell, and so on. Analysis of the video “How Old is the Universe? (And How Do You Know?" aims to find out the public's response to educational videos on YouTube social media. With this research, it is hoped that social media can develop as an educational medium. First, 611 video comments were collected but only 100 comments could be analyzed. Then Pre-processing was carried out with the following steps: parsing, tokenization, stopword removal, and stemming. After that, comments were divided into 4 clusters based on the occurrence of the same words and their synonyms. Comments were also classified using 3 scales, namely negative, neutral, and positive. The initial 50 comments were manually classified while the other 50 comments used Rapidminer with the Naive Bayes method. Analysis of similar videos as comparative data also used the same steps. The results of the analysis showed a positive response of 65% with advantages in the use of animation and accurate scientific presentation. Based on the analysis, it can be concluded that YouTube is effectively used as an educational medium.
Judul Paper: Analysis of YouTube Videos as Educational Media Using the Naive Bayes Method
Keyword: youtube, social media analysis, sentiment analysis, education, social media
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: Election applications usually use the principles of decision support systems. One method of Decision Support Systems is the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method. However, this method has a drawback that is very vulnerable to input values ​​​​of 0. Therefore, this study optimizes the SAW method with a Likert Scale. The Likert Scale is used for the application input value. The combination of the Likert Scale and the SAW method can be used to assist in selecting participants for the Clean Village meeting. The Clean Village meeting is an annual agenda held by village residents. The Clean Village meeting usually discusses village activities to preserve the customs and culture of a village. Generally, the Clean Village is attended by all village residents. Due to limited funds, the village meeting is attended by representatives of village residents. Therefore, the Head of the Village must select participants for the Clean Village meeting. Participants in the Clean Village meeting are expected to be representatives of the opinions of village residents. With the Clean Village participant selection application, it is expected to solve village problems. The application has also been tested for functionality using the Blackbox method. Based on the results of the scenario testing, the application can run 100% according to the target. The success of the application is inseparable from the optimization of the SAW method with the Likert Scale.
Judul Paper: Optimization of the Simple Additive Weighting Method Using a Likert Scale in the Application for Selection of Participants in Hamlet Clean Meetings
Keyword: Optimization, SAW method, Likert Scale, Selection, Participants
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: Information Technology (IT) is the most important asset that every organization must have because it can help improve the effectiveness and efficiency of organizational performance. As a part of a government institution, the District Attorney's Office cannot be separated from the use of information systems. The mechanism for handling case files at the PALI District Attorney's Office is still carried out conventionally. However, along with the development of the times, the PALI District Attorney's Office has now used the Republic of Indonesia Attorney General's Management Information System (SIMKARI) to facilitate data processing or operations. The usability test research on the SIMKARI application uses the usability testing method using 5 criteria, namely Learnability, Efficiency, Memorability, Error, and Satisfaction. From the results of the tests that have been carried out, the average/mean value for the learnability criterion is 4.08, the efficiency criterion is 4.11, the memorability criterion is 4.00, the error criterion is 4.25, and the satisfaction criterion is 4.10. This indicates that the usability level of the SIMKARI application is included in the good criteria.
Judul Paper: Usability Testing of the Republic of Indonesia Prosecutor's Office Management Information System (SIMKARI) at the PALI District Prosecutor's Office
Keyword: Information Systems; SIMKARI, Usability Testing, Website, PALI District Attorney
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This study aims to predict student graduation rates using the classification method and the C4.5 decision tree algorithm. The data used include student data and Study Result Cards (KHS) with Semester Achievement Index (IPS) and Cumulative Achievement Index (IPK) criteria. The data is managed through the Knowledge Discovery in Database (KDD) stage with the help of the RapidMiner tool to facilitate prediction of student graduation rates. The application of data mining with the classification method and the C4.5 algorithm is used to analyze student graduation rates based on the information generated. The data calculation process using the C4.5 algorithm shows that the rate of students who graduate late or not on time is lower than the rate of students who graduate on time. This study involves testing through the cross-validation method and evaluation of the confusion matrix model which produces a prediction accuracy of 99.64%. In addition, evaluation using the AUC metric shows a value of 99.5%, indicating that the model has almost perfect ability in classifying. These findings confirm that the model can accurately predict student graduation rates.
Judul Paper: Application of Data Mining to Predict Student Graduation Rates Using the C4.5 Decision Tree Algorithm
Keyword: C4.5 algorithm, Decision tree, Data mining, Classification of student graduation, Decision making system
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: Government agencies in Indonesia have implemented various information technology facilities to support the public service process. One of them is Beringin District in Semarang Regency, Central Java Province, which has implemented a public service system. This public service system is implemented to improve the quality of service processes for all residents of Beringin District, Semarang Regency. Beringin District strives to provide the best service to the community by implementing a public service system. Some of the public service systems in Beringin District include: Population Services, Health Services, and Education Services. The system has been used for quite a long time by the community in Beringin District, but there are still several problems such as ease of use of the system, availability of information for the community, responsiveness of service officers, and quality of service. Therefore, research is needed to evaluate the acceptance of the public service system provided. This study uses the End User Computer Satisfaction (EUCS) theory. EUCS defines five independent variables: content, accuracy, form, ease of use, and timeliness, and one dependent variable: satisfaction. This study was conducted on 100 respondents who used the public service system in Beringin District, with sampling at the District office. By conducting this research, it is hoped that it can provide recommendations to stakeholders to improve the quality of the public service system in Beringin District.
Judul Paper: Analysis of User Satisfaction with the Public Service System in Beringin District, Semarang Regency Using End User Computer Satisfaction
Keyword: information systems, public services, government, End User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS)
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Putra darmawan travel is a company engaged in transportation services, located on Jalan Diponegoro No 64, Sidorejo, Salatiga City, Central Java. This company provides travel services, tours, car loans, and express packages. However, in carrying out its business business, this company has not yet applied SI / IT in its company operations, so he recommends to carry out strategic planning of information systems, aiming to assist in the preparation of information systems so that later they can have benefits and be in line with the goals and business processes that exist in the company. The preparation of the strategic design of this information system uses the ward and peppard method, with this method will be carried out several analyzes on the sons of travel darmawan in order to assist in the preparation of information system designs such as SWOT analysis, Value Chain, Five Porter's, Mc Farlan Strategic Grid whose output is in the form of proposed application portfolio recommendations in the form of Making SI Web travel, SI Promotion, SI Cashier,  Asset Sim, which can be used as a reference for the putra darmawan travel company to be applied within the next 2-5 years
Judul Paper: Information Systems Strategic Planning Using Ward and Peppard Methodology at Putra Darmawan Travel Salatiga
Keyword: ward and peppard, Information Systems Strategic Planning, SWOT, Value Chain, Mc Farlan's Strategic Grid
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

However, this method has a drawback that is very vulnerable to input values ​​​​of 0. Therefore, this study optimizes the SAW method with a Likert Scale.
