Judul Paper: Optimization of the Simple Additive Weighting Method Using a Likert Scale in the Application for Selection of Participants in Hamlet Clean Meetings
Keyword: Optimization, SAW method, Likert Scale, Selection, Participants
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: This study examines the level of user satisfaction of the Police Record Certificate (SKCK) application at the Kalidoni Police Station, using the Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) as the primary measurement tool. A quantitative descriptive approach was adopted to provide an in-depth analysis of the SKCK application's effectiveness. The study sample involved 100 randomly selected respondents, who were users of the application. The collected data were processed using the Statistical Package for the Social Sciences (SPSS) to calculate the CSI. The results showed a CSI value of 85.50, reflecting a significant level of satisfaction. This analysis also confirmed that the SKCK application complies with applicable regulations and standards. This study recommends strategies to maintain and improve the SKCK application service, including conducting regular training for staff, simplifying standard operating procedures (SOPs), and establishing a responsive team for user feedback. This study suggests conducting regular surveys using the CSI to ensure sustainable public service standards and identify opportunities for future improvement.
Judul Paper: Analysis of the Satisfaction Level of the SKCK Application (Police Record Certificate) Using the Customer Satisfaction Index Method at Kalidoni Police
Keyword: User Satisfaction, SKCK Application, Customer Satisfaction Index, Kalidoni Police.
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Currently, motorcycles are one of the main means of transportation used to facilitate our daily activities. The use of a motorcycle can causes significant damage to the motorcycle. Because of these problems, it is necessary to analyze, design and implement an expert system that can diagnose damage to motorbikes, the process of analysis and data collection is carried out by interviewing experts in the field so that the results can be accurate. The expert system developed using the forward chaining method is an advanced search that starts from several facts to get the result, from these results an expert system can be created that can diagnose motorcycle damage accurately and can be useful for its users.
Judul Paper: Expert System for Manual Motorcycle Vehicle Damage Diagnosis Using the Forward Chaining Method
Keyword: Motorcycle, Diagnosis, Expert System, Forward Chaining
Jurnal: Journal of Computer and Information Systems Ampera

Abstrak: Health is a crucial aspect of life. However, some areas often face distance constraints when accessing health facilities. The development of Android-based information technology is one solution to this problem. Health facilities can have an Android-based Home Care application in Madiun to facilitate Madiun residents in seeking medical treatment. To assist residents, the Home Care application must be user-friendly. One solution offered is to create an Android-based application. Because the majority of Indonesians own Android-based smartphones, residents are no longer awkward using smartphones. The second solution, to make it easier for residents to use the Home Care application, the application's interface must be made familiar. This study aims to design the interface (UI/UX) of the Android-based Home Care application. The UI/UX design uses the Design Thinking method. The Design Thinking method can provide solutions to all problems faced by residents seeking medical treatment. Because residents will access the application with a user-friendly UI/UX. The result of this study is the UI/UX of the Android-based Home Care application. The UI/UX has also been tested using the System Usability Scale (SUS) method. The SUS test results are "excellent."
Judul Paper: Utilization of Design Thinking Methods and SUS Testing for Android-Based Madiun Home Care Application UI/UX
Keyword: Design Thinking, SUS, UI/UX, Aplikasi Home Care, Android
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: This study aims to address the lack of research conducted on comparative algorithms in classifying Amenorrhea. Many people ignore or even do not understand Amenorrhea due to limited information on this issue. In this study, a comparison was conducted between four algorithms, namely k-NN, SVM, Decision Tree, and Naïve Bayes, to classify Amenorrhea using data from one of Google's data repositories. The results showed that the k-NN algorithm provided the highest accuracy value, namely 0.99. This finding can help in the development of more accurate and effective Amenorrhea diagnostic methods.
Judul Paper: Comparison of Machine Learning Algorithms for Amenorrhea classification
Keyword: Amenorrhea, k-NN, SVM, Naïve Bayes, Dataset
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: This study aims to evaluate the level of user satisfaction of TikTok and Instagram Reels applications using the End User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS) and Systematic Literature Review (SLR) approaches. The five main dimensions of EUCS analyzed include content, accuracy, format, ease of use, and timeliness. Primary data were collected through an online questionnaire involving 58 respondents using a random sampling method. In addition, a systematic literature analysis was conducted using the PRISMA model to strengthen the empirical findings. The results show that both applications achieved high levels of satisfaction across all dimensions, with content and accuracy being the most significant factors. TikTok excels in content variety and relevance as well as recommendation accuracy, while Instagram Reels excels in interface design. The combination of the EUCS and SLR approaches provides holistic insights into the user experience, which can be used by application developers to improve service quality.
Judul Paper: SYSTEMATIC LITERATURE REVIEW AND EUCS APPROACH: MEASURING TIKTOK AND INSTAGRAM USER SATISFACTION
Keyword: EUCS, Instagram Reels, User Satisfaction, SLR, Tiktok
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: PT XYZ is a company engaged in the production of packaging, especially packaging tubes that serve the needs of the cosmetics industry, oral care and other needs. The problem faced by PT XYZ is the accumulation of WIP that occurs in the warehouse. One of the factors of this problem is thought to be the inadequate capacity of the capping machine. Therefore, this company wants to know the relationship between the capacity of the capping machine and the accumulation that occurs in the warehouse. This study aims to assist the company in decision making so that the accumulation that occurs can be minimized. This study uses a simple linear regression analysis method for data processing. The completion of this statistical test will be carried out using SPSS software. In the SPSS software that was carried out, it was found that the normality test showed that the data was normally distributed with the influence of the capacity of the capping machine on the accumulation of WIP that occurred was 66.2% and the regression model was Y = 24323.616-(0.846)X. It can be concluded that there is a close relationship between the capacity of the capping machine and the accumulation that occurs. In addition, it was also found that the relationship between the two is inversely proportional as evidenced by the negative sign in the output correlations of -0.813. Thus, this research can be said to be valid, so it can be used as a consideration for PT XYZ in decision making.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF THE INFLUENCE OF CAPPING MACHINE CAPABILITY ON WORK IN PROGRESS PACKAGE AT PT XYZ USING SIMPLE LINEAR REGRESSION
Keyword: Capping Machine, Simple Linear Regression, Stacking
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: This study aims to evaluate user satisfaction on the Shopee Food and Go Food applications using the System Usability Scale (SUS) and End-User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS) methods. The results show that both applications provide a satisfactory experience for users. Go Food is slightly superior in ease of learning (Learnability, score 4.26) and timeliness of service (Timeliness, score 4.09), while Shopee Food has an advantage in ease of use (Ease of Use, score 4.03). The Spearman correlation test found a very strong relationship between application usability and user satisfaction, with a coefficient of 0.85. This means that improvements in application usability can significantly increase user satisfaction. This study recommends that Shopee Food focus on improving error management, while Go Food can improve the interface layout to provide better service.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF USEFULNESS AND USER SATISFACTION OF SHOPEE FOOD AND GO FOOD APPLICATIONS USING SUS AND EUCS METHODS
Keyword: go food, usability, user satisfaction, shopeefood, sus
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Over time, the companionship of feline companions has become a perennial aspect of our lives. However, a significant problem has emerged: the rapid reproduction of cats, resulting in uncontrolled overpopulation. This excess of pets has a significant impact on surrounding communities. The abundance of stray cats poses significant challenges, including increased public health risks due to the transmission of diseases such as rabies and toxoplasmosis, disruption of local ecosystems due to uncontrolled predation on birds and small wildlife, and issues of hygiene and well-being within communities. Furthermore, this situation strains social relationships among neighbors, leading to conflict and discomfort. To address this multifaceted problem, this study introduces an innovative artificial intelligence approach centered on the Collaborative Filtering model. The system utilizes machine learning techniques, including Collaborative Filtering, to enhance its functionality. Resembling popular matching platforms, the resulting system collaborates with local veterinary professionals and animal rescue organizations. Its ultimate goal is to facilitate the identification of responsible owners of cats, ensuring a dignified life for them. This pioneering approach promises to positively impact both the cat population and the community, and promote harmonious coexistence. The collaborative nature of this system, involving Rumah Steril and Lets Adopt Indonesia, underscores its potential to mitigate the challenges posed by the overpopulation of feral cats and promote a balanced and respectful relationship between humans and cats. The study yielded the following recommended cat IDs: 63, 58, 56, 22, 64, 35, 60, 39, 21, and 7.
Judul Paper: MANAGEMENT OF WILD CAT POPULATIONS THROUGH COLLABORATIVE FILTERING: IMPACT ON PUBLIC HEALTH AND LOCAL ECOSYSTEM
Keyword: Feral Cat Overpopulation, Collaborative Filtering, Health Risks, Ecosystem Disruption, Responsible Ownership
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: A security system with a high level of accuracy is needed to prevent data leakage, one way to prevent data leakage is to implement a face recognition biometric security system in a login system. In this study, the application of face recognition was carried out in the online workshop application login system (Mecha). The implementation is carried out using the Convolutional Neural Network method which is applied to android-based applications using tensorflow lite by adding assets with the .tflite extension to the Android Studio Integrated Development Environment (IDE) as well as the Google ML Kit library used as the pre-processing process. The results showed that the face recognition biometric security system can be applied to android-based applications and the Convolutional Neural Network method can be used to recognize faces even in dark conditions in online workshop applications (Mecha), the application of the Convolutional Neural Network method in online workshop applications (Mecha) provides average accuracy of 88.25%. With testing from genuine users of 99.25% and testing from non-genuine users of 77.25%.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN BIOMETRIC FACE RECOGNITION MENGGUNAKAN METODE CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK PADA APLIKASI BERBASIS ANDROID
Keyword: face recognition, convolutional neural network, android
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: This study aims to analyze the usability of the PoltekSSN LMS website using the System Usability Scale (SUS) method in the context of Human Computer Interaction (HCI). By involving 30 cadets from the Cryptography Engineering study program, this study evaluated the characteristics of respondents and the results of the SUS score calculation to assess the level of system usability. The research method used involved users in providing subjective assessments of the PoltekSSN LMS website. The results of the analysis included efficiency, memorability, error rates, and user satisfaction in using the online learning platform. With the SUS method approach, this study provided in-depth insights into user experience and system effectiveness. The analysis results showed a SUS score of 63.5, which indicates an acceptable level of usability but still has room for improvement. The conclusions of this study provide a strong basis for further development to improve the quality of online education services at the National Cyber ​​and Crypto Polytechnic. It is hoped that these findings can make a positive contribution to improving user satisfaction and the efficiency of the PoltekSSN LMS system.
Judul Paper: USABILITY TESTING ANALYSIS OF THE POLTEKSSN LMS WEBSITE USING THE USABILITY SCALE SYSTEM METHOD
Keyword: IMK, LMS,PoltekSSN,System Usability Scale,Usability
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: Companies that have implemented the use of technology will not be separated from data or information processing, however not all companies can maximize the processing of their data, one of which is in CV. Arfa Nusantara Teknologi, data of prospective employees who enter a company are not further processed. This study tries to process the data of prospective employees who enter a company with the aim of classifying prospective employee data based on the variables of technical test scores from the assessment team, the total value of skill weights, the minimum salary requested and the number of years of work experience by implementing the K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm, with the implementation of this algorithm, several classifications of prospective employee data will be produced, namely the best, quite good and less good which can help the assessment team in the company to make decisions in accepting the best prospective employees for the company and knowing the level of accuracy of the algorithm. In addition, this study tries several numbers of KNN neighborhood retrievals and applies K-Fold Cross Validation in determining the optimal classification model. The optimal model obtained had an average accuracy, precision, and recall of 100% for k = 4 and k = 5 in the 10 K-Fold Cross Validation trials. The best neighborhood value for the KNN algorithm was k = 7. The System Usability Scale test obtained a score of 80.21, falling into the B category.
Judul Paper: CLASSIFICATION OF CLOSED LABOR RECEPTION USING THE K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR (KNN) ALGORITHM
Keyword: Classification, K-Nearest Neighbor, K-Fold Cross Validation, Employment
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: In order to meet the demands of digital transformation in every business sector, the use of electronic information systems in the form of applications is increasing rapidly. Web-based and mobile applications are the most widely used information system platforms because they are suitable for their users' needs, requiring only an internet network to connect to the server. These servers certainly serve many users and many requests, where there are still many cases of cyber attacks that disrupt the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data and information. Therefore, improving application security by conducting application security assessments is necessary. The Application Security Verification Standard (ASVS) is one standard that has several levels of security requirements that can be adapted to the needs of application development in Indonesia. This study developed an application security assessment information system based on ASVS by applying the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) development method consisting of the processes of planning, design, construction, testing, operation, and maintenance of applications. Based on the test results, the developed application is able to provide application security assessment instruments that are in accordance with the requirements so that application owners or developers can independently improve application security, both for web-based and mobile applications.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF INFORMATION SYSTEMS SECURITY ASSESSMENT OF APPLICATIONS BASED ON APPLICATION SECURITY VERIFICATION STANDARD (ASVS)
Keyword: Mobile applications, Web applications, ASVS, application security, SDLC
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The Agile method is one of the approaches widely used in the development of modern information systems due to its flexibility and adaptability to change. This study aims to analyze the effectiveness of implementing the Agile method in information systems development through a Systematic Literature Review (SLR) approach. In this study, articles from 2020 to 2024 were collected for analysis, with a selection of 29 relevant literature. This study was designed to answer three key questions: 1) What Agile models are frequently applied, 2) What sectors and fields have implemented the Agile method, and 3) Which application platforms have the highest frequency of use in implementing the Agile method. The analysis results show that the Extreme Programming (XP) model is the most widely used with a percentage of 48%, followed by Scrum (31%), Feature Driven Development (FDD) (14%), and Disciplined Agile Delivery (DAD) (7%). The web platform is the main choice with the highest frequency, while the mobile platform dominates more specific applications. Overall, Agile methods have proven effective in various fields, such as education, health, and management, reflecting their flexibility in meeting the needs of information system development in various sectors.
Judul Paper: SYSTEMATIC LITERATURE REVIEW ANALISIS EFEKTIVITAS METODE AGILE DALAM PENGEMBANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI
Keyword: Agile Methods, Information Systems, Literature Review, Extreme Programming, Scrum
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: Heavy rains that occurred in Balikpapan City on August 9, 2024, caused significant flooding and landslides. This study aims to analyze this phenomenon using Himawari-8 satellite imagery data processed with SATAID software. The analysis was carried out through cloud top temperature measurements, Red, Green, and Blue (RGB) image interpretation, wind pattern analysis using streamlines, and atmospheric parameter calculations (CAPE, LI, and K-Index) to understand atmospheric dynamics. Low-Level Moisture Transport (LLMT) analysis was also conducted to describe the distribution of atmospheric moisture in the low layer (500–1000 hPa). The results showed a very low cumulonimbus cloud top temperature (-74.2°C) with a CAPE value reaching 628 J/kg and a K-Index of 34°C, indicating significant convection energy and high atmospheric instability. LLMT analysis showed strong moisture transport from the Makassar Strait towards Balikpapan, while wind patterns in the 925–500 hPa layer supported intense moisture convergence. The interaction between high humidity, convergent wind patterns, and atmospheric instability are the main factors supporting heavy rain events in Balikpapan.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF ATMOSPHERIC DYNAMICS FOR HEAVY RAIN EVENTS USING THE RED GREEN BLUE (RGB) AND CLOUD CONVECTIVE OVERLAYS (CCO) METHOD IN BALIKPAPAN (CASE STUDY 09 AUGUST 2024)
Keyword: Heavy rain, satellite image, Himawarti-8, SATAID, Balikpapan
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: Soybeans are a popular food crop. Estimated yields in Indonesia range between 1.2 and 1.5 tons per hectare, far below the potential yield of 2 to 2.5 tons per hectare. Diseases in soybean plants are one of the causes of low yields, so farmers must understand the diseases that attack soybeans to choose the right disease type and treatment. Laboratory disease monitoring processes are still inefficient and time-consuming. Computer vision and deep learning can now be used to recognize predictive information in objects, regardless of their location. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are the most commonly used deep learning techniques today. This study uses a CNN architecture, namely AlexNet, with hyperparameter tuning to classify soybean disease images. Hyperparameter tuning significantly influences model performance. The dataset used consists of 1,500 images of soybean leaf diseases, consisting of three classes: caterpillar, diabrotica speciosa, and healthy. Hyperparameter tuning on AlexNet CNN with batch size 12, dropout 0.2, Adam optimizer produces the best results in terms of accuracy value of 84%, precision 81.95%, recall 80.66%, and f1-score 80.96%.
Judul Paper: PEMILIHAN HYPERPARAMETER PADA ALEXNET CNN UNTUK KLASIFIKASI CITRA PENYAKIT KEDELAI
Keyword: AlexNet, Convolutional Neural Network, Hyperparameter, Kedelai, Klasifikasi
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: The current competitive situation in the academic community has encouraged each university to provide virtual services to its students starting from registration, teaching and learning activities, the implementation of the examination, to graduation. The virtual services provided must be supported by collaboration between existing service areas at the university, including academics, facilities and infrastructure, human resources, and finance. An enterprise portal is an enterprise-scale application which means it encompasses all/part of the organization's divisions in an integrated manner and interacts with each other, so that they can meet each other's data and information needs. Sikapeta is a portal to access Internship (KP) and Final Project (TA) services only through the website. In order to provide more optimal service, the university is expected to provide access through a mobile application for its students. This research was conducted using an innovative method to describe an enterprise portal that can show interactions between sections/divisions through the use of existing information technology infrastructure, and using a prototyping method to design an informative application interface for KP and TA academic services. The result of this research is a design of the Sikapeta interface for the mobile platform.
Judul Paper: PRAKTEK MOBILE PROTOTYPING UNTUK PERANCANGAN ANTARMUKA MELALUI LAYANAN SIKAPETA SEBAGAI PORTAL ENTERPRISE
Keyword: enterprise portal, Ilmueta, interface design, prototyping, mobile applications
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: The development of information and communication technology has influenced user participation and interaction in online platforms, such as providing reviews on an application on the Google Play Store. For companies, reviews can be used to determine user needs and can also be used as evaluation material to develop and improve their applications, but sometimes in a review there is a discrepancy between the content of the review and the rating given in the review, which means that the sentiment of a review cannot be seen from the number of ratings in the review. In a review, there can also be writing errors, both intentional and unintentional, which make the review difficult to read and understand. In this study, sentiment analysis was conducted with a case study of the Victoria Mobile Banking application to classify application reviews into positive or negative reviews and to provide a visualization of the results of the review analysis. The classification process in the system uses the Naïve Bayes method. The training data used were review data that had been automatically labeled using the InSet dictionary that had gone through word and weight adjustments. The classification algorithm was tested using a confusion matrix and produced a precision value of 90.4%, recall 100%, f-measure 95%, and accuracy 93.1%.
Judul Paper: Error 500 (Server Error)!!1500.That’s an error.There was an error. Please try again later.That’s all we know.
Keyword: Analisis Sentimen, Naïve Bayes, InSet, Text Mining
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Developing a queuing system is one way to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of service processes. One method that can be used in developing a queuing system is the prototype method. This method is a system development technique that uses a simple model of the system to be built, allowing developers to evaluate and optimize the system before its full implementation.

In this study, the prototype method was used to develop a queuing system with the aim of improving the effectiveness and efficiency of services at the Sukabumi Regency Land Office.

The researchers implemented this system by evaluating the system that had been developed. The evaluation results showed that the queuing system using the prototype method was able to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of the service process, with shorter patient waiting times and simpler registration procedures.

The conclusion of this study is that developing a queuing system using the prototype method can be an effective solution for improving the effectiveness and efficiency of services at the Sukabumi Regency Land Office.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN METODE PROTOTYPE PADA PENGEMBANGAN SISTEM ANTRIAN ONLINE DI KEMENTRIAN ATR/BPN KAB. SUKABUMI
Keyword: Pendaftaran,AntrianOnline,MetodePrototype
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: The implementation of the Game Development Life Cycle (GDLC) in the development of the Buana Ruh game is a process that uses a structured and orderly method in game development. The GDLC consists of several stages, such as initialization, pre-production, production, and application release. In the initialization stage, the development team will plan the concept, gameplay, and features to be used in the game. In the pre-production stage, the development team will prepare visual and audio content and test the game prototype. In the production stage, the development team will execute the plan and create the required content. In the production stage, the development team will conduct testing and debugging, and make necessary improvements before the game is launched. By implementing the GDLC in the development of the Buana Ruh game, it is expected to improve the quality and efficiency of game development.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI GAME DEVELOPMENT LIFE CYCLE DALAM PEMBUATAN GAME BUANA RUH
Keyword: Game, Game Development Life Cycle
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: The problem to be addressed in this research is the need for standardized regulation of main tasks and functions (tupoksi) for the secretariat of the City Education Office in East Java. The research method involves collecting data on the main tasks and functions of the secretariat from various cities, followed by semantic analysis using the PATH algorithm with the WS4J tool. The use of WS4J to assess the similarity of values ​​is limited to the relationship between words. Therefore, adjustments are made using the Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP) method to determine the relative value or weight. In AHP, there are two factors that are the criteria for determining the weight, namely the noun and verb categories. After that, calculating the accuracy to assess the extent to which the classification model is successful in predicting correctly, both in terms of positive and negative predictions, when compared to the overall model predictions. The final result of this research is a common fragment of the main tasks and functions of the secretariat from various City Education Offices in East Java. This common fragment can later be used as a consistent standard basis, which will help overcome various problems that arise due to non-standardized main tasks and functions.
Judul Paper: MEASUREMENT OF THE SIMILARITY OF THE MAIN TASKS AND FUNCTIONS OF THE SECRETARIAT OF THE CITY EDUCATION SERVICE IN EAST JAVA USING AHP
Keyword: Common Fragment, WS4J, PATH, Standardization, Department of Education.
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: A mobile application-based academic information system is an information system that provides academic information for students and lecturers that can be accessed from mobile devices from anywhere. With the existence of a mobile application-based academic information system, students and lecturers can be given alternatives to carry out academic activities on an online academic information system from mobile devices so as to provide convenience and flexibility. The research method was carried out by conducting interviews with lecturers and several students to obtain information about the needs of the academic information system. Meanwhile, the system designer's method uses the Scrum. Scrum is a framework that is suitable to be implemented in making academic information systems because Scrum is used in a work context that is quite complicated where cases cannot be predicted. The result of the implementation is that some of the information in the academic information system that can be accessed is the siakad login page, the siakad dashboard, and others so that it can maximize academic activities which of course can also make it easier for students and lecturers to get services and information about academic matters.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI AKADEMIK MOBILE DENGAN SCRUM FRAMEWORK
Keyword: Scrum, Mobile Application, Academic Information System
Jurnal: INDEXIA : INFORMATICS AND COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENT JOURNAL

Abstrak: PT Berdikari Jaya Bersama is a company engaged in the energy sector. This company produces diesel fuel. Its target market is industrial players who use diesel fuel in their business activities, such as factories, contractors, mines and hotels. For customers, there are several payment methods that they can take in diesel purchasing transactions, starting from COD (cash on delivery), 7 days, 14 days and 30 days. In the payment model, customers can pay at a later date after the diesel is delivered according to the number of days due. A common problem in the payment process is that customers may have internal financial constraints on the payment due date. This causes payments to be late. Based on the experience of people in the solar industry, the problem of late payments can actually be predicted based on several factors, such as the customer's business model, the role of the broker, the existence of cashback, the payment term taken, and the due day. In predicting late payments, companies usually analyze based on previous sales history. The existence of a system that predicts the accuracy of customer payments based on previous sales history data can help companies make decisions regarding their customers faster and more accurately. A decision tree, a type of data mining process, is generally a modeling representation of a problem consisting of a series of decisions leading to a solution, in stating the decision and providing a solution. The concept of a decision tree is to transform a set of data into a decision tree that represents the rules of a decision. In this study, the decision tree method is used to predict the accuracy of customer payments. This study produces a decision tree from the company's sales data, which is then used to make predictions on test data. Testing in this study resulted in an accuracy value of 82.25%, which is categorized as good,
Judul Paper: Pratama, Fajar D., Bhakti, Henny D., Payment Accuracy Prediction Application using Decision Tree72IMPLEMENTATION OF COMPANY CUSTOMER PAYMENT ACCURACY PREDICTION APPLICATION USING THE DECISION TREE METHOD
Keyword: data mining, decision tree, prediks
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: The rapid development of IS/IT has influenced manufacturing companies such as PT. ABC. PT ABC is a manufacturing company engaged in the production of light steel frames. The implementation of IS/IT is starting to be seen as a strategic investment by PT. ABC. Therefore, currently PT. ABC wants to invest in the implementation of E-manufacturing. However, before the E-manufacturing investment is carried out, PT. ABC wants to ensure the organization's readiness in implementing E-Manufacturing. Because E-manufacturing is an IS/IT strategy that requires high costs but the value and benefits provided to the organization cannot be ascertained. Therefore, in order for the implementation of E-manufacturing to support business goals, it is necessary to measure the readiness of PT. ABC through measuring the maturity of the alignment of IS/IT strategy with the Business. Through this measurement, the company can determine the extent to which the implementation of IS/IT strategy carried out in the company is in accordance with the business strategy. From these problems, this study will discuss how to measure the maturity level of alignment of S/IT and business strategies with the Strategic Alignment Maturity Model (SAMM). This measurement process involved 3 informants and 30 respondents. The results of this measurement indicate that the maturity level of IS/IT and Business strategy alignment at PT. ABC is at level 2 with an average value of 2.70 or a committed process, which means that the alignment of IS/IT and Business Strategy at PT. ABC is still low and limited, but the company has committed to aligning IS/IT with Business. The results of this study also explain that SAMM is an effective model for assessing the readiness of organizations/companies in implementing IS/IT through assessing the alignment of IS/IT and Business strategies.
Judul Paper: READINESS ANALYSIS OF PT. ABC IN THE IMPLEMENTATION OF E-MANUFACTURING THROUGH STRATEGIC ALIGNMENT MATURITY MODEL MEASUREMENT
Keyword: Alignment of IS/IT Strategy, Business Strategy, SAMM, E-manufacturing
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: The Sabilul Khoir Al-Qur'an Education Park (TPQ) is one of the institutions that has grown and operates in the Karangreja village community to educate early childhood. However, this institution does not yet have a digital management system for student learning outcomes. This causes the management of student learning outcomes information to be done manually in report books and it will take a lot of time. Based on these problems, this institution requires a TPQ e-report application design. The TPQ e-report application is designed as an Android application with the UCD (User Centered Design) method, where users are included in the prototype design. By using the user-centered design method, it is expected to help problems related to managing student learning outcomes information. To achieve usability, testing was conducted using a cognitive walkthrough approach, namely the evaluation of user interface (UI) usability. Based on the test results and evaluation results, the cognitive walkthrough test ended in the first iteration because participants were satisfied with the user interface. Evaluation scores such as the testing duration for each scenario were less than 30 seconds, and errors encountered by participants when using the interface design were minor errors with an error rate of less than 50%. This testing is done to ensure that the application has an attractive user interface and meets user satisfaction.
Judul Paper: UI/UX Design of the E-Report Application on Android-Based TPQ using the User Centered Design (UCD) Method
Keyword: E-Rapor, TPQ, User Interface (UI), User Experience (UX), UCD
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Sign language is very important for a particular group of people, namely deaf or mute communities. To be able to communicate with deaf or mute communities, people who are not deaf or mute need sign language to be able to understand the intentions or thoughts of those who are deaf or mute. Most conversations in sign language are carried out using the hands, where the hands and fingers are used to form unique poses or shapes, so that they can be recognized as having a specific meaning. The author proposes the development of a digital image recognition system to be able to recognize sign language. By using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method, which is part of Deep Learning or Machine Learning, the system will recognize the poses or shapes of the input sign language images, and provide output that matches the intention of the poses or shapes of the sign language images. This research began with data collection, both secondary data from the internet and personal data collected manually. The data then went through initial processing and classified with CNN, then obtained results for analysis. If the results are satisfactory, the model will be exported to be included in a web-based application for real-time use. Based on the test results, the best model for the architecture was the EfficientNet B4 model using the Adam hyperparameter optimizer and a learning rate of 0.001 along with a scheduler. Pretrained weights were used to improve accuracy, and a spatial transformer was added to attempt to make the model more robust. Coupled with the pretrained weights, the model was exported for real-time use. The real-time test results showed that the model was able to detect at least 23 of the 26 alphabets on an abstract background. When tested on a plain background such as black or white, the model was able to detect all 26 alphabets with almost perfect probability. This indicates that the method used is capable of addressing the presented problem.
Judul Paper: Sign Language Digital Image Recognition System Using Convolutional Neural Network and Spatial Transformer
Keyword: Convolutional Neural Network, spatial transformer, bahasa isyarat, klasifikasi real-time
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: The breakthrough of biometric recognition system technology is currently developing rapidly and greatly simplifies matters such as identity recognition or identity validation, and it is not uncommon for companies and other institutions to commonly implement human biometric-based recognition systems such as fingerprints, palm patterns, faces, or irises. A biometric recognition system has advantages and of course some limitations in terms of performance and comfort. Fingerprint and palm recognition require users to touch the sensor surface. In this way, users can feel uncomfortable and the risk of spreading viruses or bacteria is very high, also detection accuracy can be affected by factors such as sweaty and dry skin and skin distortion. Therefore, this study will carry the title Design and Construction of a Finger Vein Recognition Tool Using Raspberry Pi With Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) Method. This study uses a Raspberry Pi 4-based system with the help of IR LEDs and webcams for the process of acquiring finger vein image data, which is expected to be able to carry out the Finger Vein recognition process faster, and the use of the Convolutional Neural Network method which has been proven to produce better accuracy with the Deep Learning process. Of the 30 data sets used as system testers with embedded software and hardware, the accuracy reached 96.66%.
Judul Paper: Design of Finger Vein Recognition Tool Using Raspberry Pi with Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) Method
Keyword: CNN, Raspberry Pi, Finger vein
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: The Indonesian Ministry of Health states that 1 in 3 children in Indonesia suffers from stunting. Children's diet can be a direct contributing factor that can impact stunting. The problem that occurs is the lack of knowledge of mothers about stunting and child nutrition and how to provide nutritious food to their children. Based on this, this study aims to create a food recipe application accompanied by nutritional information for toddlers. This study uses the Agile methodology with the Scrum framework, with the use of the GitHub Project application as an activity monitoring tool during the application development project implementation. The application was built on a mobile platform using the Dart language and the Flutter framework. The main findings of this study are an application that can improve mothers' knowledge about stunting and child nutrition in accordance with the recommendations of the Indonesian Ministry of Health and UNICEF and provides easy software adjustments when needs change during development. Testing showed the application ran well according to the test case and was completed on time with a total of 487 hours or 61 working days. This application presents and stores nutritious food recipes, calculates the nutritional status of toddlers, and provides information on stunting issues and a stunting calculator.
Judul Paper: Nutritious Food Recipe Application Helps Prevent Stunting Using the Agile Framework Scrum Methodology
Keyword: Agile, Mobile Application, Product Backlog, Resep Makanan, Scrum, Stunting
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika: Jurnal Pengembangan IT

Abstrak: The research discusses website-based software engineering with a hybrid integration model at the relevant university. The research problem formulation produces website-based software engineering that is easy to use and accessible to active students, produces website-based software engineering services that are able to track complaint status, and the effectiveness and efficiency of the hybrid integration model between the Agile Scrum and V-Model methods in software engineering development. The research results to solve the problem using a qualitative descriptive method with the support of a hybrid Scrum and V-model integration model thus proposing a website-based Scrum V-Plus integration, the hybrid integration model utilizes the weaknesses of each method to complement each other, so that the role of Scrum as the initial stage of design is then developed in a structured and systematic V-model into a software engineering process development module. With the running Scrum V-Plus Integration Model, a prototype model design, website design and testing are carried out as a validation medium to prove that structured business process documentation has a significant impact on method collaboration in producing products. The study proposes the Scrum V-Plus Hybrid Model adopted from the collaboration of the two methods to play an important role in the structured engineering design stage, flexible as a whole in integrating several stages, so that the software design is well implemented as evidenced by the website integration model for students with active status using open data base connectivity restfulAPI on the deployment diagram based on the class diagram model equipped with boundary, entity and control. The hybrid integration model has a significant impact compared to separate use as evidenced by integration testing.
Judul Paper: Website Based Software Development Using a Combination of Scrum and V-Model Methods
Keyword: Development Software engineering, Scrum, V-Model, Hybrid, Website
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The Internet of Things (IoT) is a collection of devices that can collect and transmit data between sensors without human intervention. However, IoT security can be compromised due to its ubiquitous nature. Security vulnerabilities can be difficult to detect due to their diverse patterns. Therefore, a secure data transmission model is needed. Blockchain is a technology that can address three essential security requirements: availability, confidentiality, and integrity. In this study, we attempted to build an IoT security simulation using blockchain technology, where the security system utilizes a public blockchain model. The method used in this study is a public blockchain model that allows users to control applications connected to the emulator pin through smart contracts. This study utilized the Ethereum network, a test network that can be used without any transaction fees. This research is expected to provide solutions to security issues and challenges faced in IoT networks.
Judul Paper: Simulation of Blockchain Use in Internet of Things Network Security Using Pin Emulator: Public Blockchain Model
Keyword: blockchain, internet of things(IoT), simulasi,keamanan,smart contract
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: In its implementation, the Field Work Practice (PKL) activities at SMK Negeri 1 Sumenep are still ineffective because they are still carried out manually, so the PKL activity management process is still ineffective. Based on these problems, the implementation of a system is needed to manage PKL needs so that PKL activities can be carried out effectively and efficiently. Researchers developed a website-based PKL information system at SMK Negeri 1 Sumenep. Researchers used the Extreme Programming (XP) development method with the hope that the system can be developed quickly and agilely so that all the needs desired by stakeholders can be achieved. The results of the overall unit testing test produced a total of 45 test cases and 119 assertions, and for acceptance testing produced a total of 69 test cases with a value of 100% accepted. The results of the system usability scale (SUS) test for the entire system have an average value of 76.88 which is in the range of 70 - 80 with a value of "C" or "Good". So it can be concluded that the website-based PKL information system is in the acceptability range "acceptable".
Judul Paper: Developing a Website-Based Student Field Work Practice Information System (PKL) Using the Extreme Programming Method (Case Study: SMK Negeri 1 Sumenep)
Keyword: XP, SUS, unit testing, acceptance testing, PKL.
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Facial expression recognition is a critical challenge in image processing and human-computer interaction due to its complexity and variation. This study proposes a simple Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture to improve the efficiency of emotion classification on small datasets. The Jaffe dataset consists of 213 images of 256x256 pixels across seven expression categories. The images are resized to 128x128 pixels to speed up processing. The data is processed using a CNN architecture consisting of 3 convolutional layers, 2 subsampling layers, and 2 dense layers. We evaluate the model with 5-fold and 10-fold cross-validation for robust performance estimation, as well as hold-out techniques (70:30, 80:20, 85:15, and 90:10) for clear comparison of results. The results show the highest accuracy of 90.6% with a learning rate of 0.001 on a split of 85% training data and 15% test data, outperforming more complex models. Despite not using transfer learning or data augmentation, this model still outperforms traditional approaches such as Local Binary Pattern (LBP) and Histogram Oriented Gradient (HOG). Thus, this simple CNN architecture proves effective for facial expression recognition on small datasets.
Judul Paper: KLASIFIKASI EKSPRESI WAJAH MENGGUNAKAN COVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORK
Keyword: CNN, expressions, faces, deep learning, image processing
Jurnal: JURNAL TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI DAN KOMPUTER

Abstrak: The biggest challenge in the agricultural sector in Indonesia is climate change. Climate change triggers environmental changes that impact changes in plant responses. This study discusses Internet of Things (IoT) technology in recording microclimate data with thingsboard. The method used in this study is experimental with the design in this study consisting of sensor node design and recording system design with the Thingsboard platform. This study was conducted with seven tests including gateway connectivity testing with GSM, distance and signal quality testing, delay testing, device durability testing, The Things Network integration testing with Thingsboard, sensor accuracy and calibration testing, and packet loss testing. This study found that the Gateway has a stable GSM network so that the Gateway is able to send status updates to The Things Network and is able to receive data transmitted by sensor nodes. In addition, the LoRa device was identified to have a range limit of around 350 meters into the UB Forest. This is supported by the results of packet loss testing with the results on the LC node with a distance of 150 meters the packet loss value was 4%, and the BAU node with a distance of 200 meters to 300 m the packet loss value was 8%. This study also found that the integration between The Things Network (TTN) and Thingsboard in the LoRa system was successful and seamless. The system also boasts user-friendliness and effectiveness for microclimate data monitoring applications. The study also involved a calibration process using a regression method to demonstrate the success rate and accuracy, with results approaching 100%.
Judul Paper: PENGEMBANGAN INTERNET OF THINGS(IOT) DALAM PEREKAMAN DATA IKLIM MIKRO DENGAN PLATFORM THINGSBOARD
Keyword: Internet of Things, Thingsboard, Iklim Mikro, LoRa, UB Forest
Jurnal: JURNAL TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI DAN KOMPUTER

Abstrak: Rice growth and production cannot be separated from the strong influence of climate change. Climate change with high anomalies in recent years has caused a threat to agricultural production, especially rice crops. Therefore, a method is needed that can be used to optimize agricultural production results, one of which is by determining the best planting time for rice crops using a planting calendar. Forecasting using the ARIMA method can be done to predict future rainfall, so that it can be known when the best time for the start of planting. The prediction of the ten-year rainfall has been carried out using the ARIMA method (1,0,1) derived from historical data for 5 years in West Java province at the West Java Climatology station with the smallest AIC value of 2078.28. The ten-year rainfall prediction was produced for December of the 3rd ten-year in 2023 to June of the 2nd ten-year in 2024. The prediction results show that the optimal time for rice planting begins in November of the 3rd ten-year, when rainfall is expected to reach more than 50 mm/ten-year for the next few ten-years. This prediction is in line with the weather forecast from BMKG for the start of the 2023/2024 rainy season in West Java.
Judul Paper: OPTIMASI PERTANIAN PADI: PERAMALAN CURAH HUJAN BERBASIS ARIMA UNTUK PENENTUAN WAKTU TANAM YANG TEPAT
Keyword: ARIMA, Rainfall, Prediction, Planting Time
Jurnal: JURNAL TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI DAN KOMPUTER

Abstrak: The phenomenon of bullying on social media, particularly on Twitter, has become an increasingly concerning issue with significant impacts on users' mental health. To address this issue, automatic detection of tweets containing bullying content is crucial. This study aims to compare the performance of two novel natural language processing models, BERT (Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers) and XLNet, in classifying tweets containing bullying content. The research methodology involves collecting a dataset of tweets labeled as bullying or non-bullying. Text preprocessing is performed to clean and prepare the data before being used in model training. Both models, BERT and XLNet, are trained and tested using the same dataset. Performance evaluation is performed using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score metrics. The results show that both models have good capabilities in identifying bullying tweets, but XLNet shows superior performance compared to BERT with an accuracy rate of 95%. With a precision value of 100%, recall = 0.87%, and F1-score = 0.88%. XLNet is able to capture more complex context and language nuances in tweets, which contributes to higher classification accuracy. This research makes an important contribution to the field of social media bullying detection by demonstrating that the XLNet model is more effective than BERT. These findings can help platforms like Twitter identify and prevent bullying content, thereby creating a safer online environment for users, and can be used as a basis for the development of more sophisticated and efficient bullying detection systems in the future.
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF BERT AND XLNET MODELS FOR CLASSIFICATION OF BULLY TWEETS ON TWITTER
Keyword: Classification of Bully Tweets on Twitter, Text Mining, ModelBert and XLNet
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: This paper discusses the development of a mobile application for electric vehicle charging, named SONIKApp. SONIKApp is used to make reservations and control charging remotely. The reservation feature is necessary considering that charging electric vehicle batteries requires waiting time and the limited number of public electric vehicle charging stations (SPKLU) in Indonesia. The remote-based charging feature is also an important feature that allows users to control the electric vehicle charging process. SONIKApp is also connected to the SPKLU management system based on the OCPP 1.6 standard in real-time so that the data in the application is always the most up-to-date. This application was developed with the React Native front-end framework, so it can run on Android and iOS operating systems. The result is the creation of a SONIKApp mobile application that makes it easier for users to charge electric vehicles. SONIKApp has been tested for reservation and remote charging features based on OCPP 1.6, and the results are that the SONIKApp application has successfully implemented these features.
Judul Paper: Development of a Mobile Application for Charging Electric Vehicles According to OCPP 1.6 Standards
Keyword: electric vehicles, reservations, charging, OCPP, React Native, Spring Boot
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Gamification-based learning provides new experiences for students. The trend of using this gamification approach is increasingly popular at all levels of education, especially for early childhood education. This study aims to identify the most relevant gamification elements in early childhood education (PAUD) environments through Focus Group Discussions (FGDs) with PAUD teachers in Indonesia. The analysis of the findings shows that PAUD teachers have positive perceptions and preferences for gamification-based PAUD learning. Furthermore, the study also confirms that there are nine gamification elements suitable for implementation in gamification-based learning in PAUD environments: points and rewards, leaderboards, badges, challenges, leveling, progress markers, avatars, currency, and surprises. The results of this study can serve as a basis for future research related to the development of a prototype gamification-based PAUD learning system with a focus on interaction, rewarding, problem-solving, and providing challenges.
Judul Paper: Qualitative Analysis of Gamification Elements in ICT-Based Games for Early Childhood
Keyword: gamification, game design, digital learning, educational innovation, early childhood
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: Providing video files with varying bitrates is a primary requirement for Video On Demand services that implement adaptive streaming. This is achieved through transcoding, which produces multi-bitrate videos. The multi-bitrate transcoding process is time-consuming. The duration is proportional to the bitrate, frame size, and frame rate. To shorten the transcoding time, a prototype transcoding service was created using Mapreduce. The Mapreduce transcoding service consists of one master computer and several worker computers connected to a single LAN. Coordinated by the master computer, the worker computers perform the Map and Reduce processes. The Map process transcodes segmented videos. The Reduce process combines transcoded video segments with the same key parameters (bitrate, frame size, and frame rate) into a single, complete video. The transcoding service prototype was created using the FFMPEG Library for transcoding, SCP for file transfer, and RPC for communication between computers. In prototype testing, the number of worker computers was determined to be 7. The performance of the transcoding service is very satisfactory with an average transcoding effectiveness of 71.3% compared to transcoding using a single computer.
Judul Paper: Mapreduce in Transcoding Services
Keyword: Transcoding, Mapreduce, Multi-bitrate Transcoding
Jurnal: JURNAL TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI DAN KOMPUTER

Abstrak: According to the American Heart Association report, cardiovascular disease is the leading cause of global death. Phonocardiogram (PCG) and electrocardiogram (ECG) are commonly used to detect heart disease. The use of PCG signals provides better predictive results in detecting heart disease when compared to ECG. However, the use of PCG electronically requires complex signal analysis to classify heart conditions. This study aims to design a PCG signal classification system based on the feature extraction method using Short Time Fourier Transform (STFT) and the classification method using Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). The system design testing uses a secondary dataset with 2,575 normal PCG recordings and 665 abnormal PCG recordings in wav format. Performance testing uses variations of the Hamming, Hann and Blackman-Harris Window in the feature extraction section and variations in the number of convolution layers in the classification section. Based on the test results, the use of the Hamming Window in the feature extraction process and 4 convolution layers in the classification process provides the best results with an accuracy rate of 88.11%. This study proves that the use of the hamming window in the feature extraction section and 4 convolution layers in the classification section is the best model form of the PCG classification system based on STFT and CNN.
Judul Paper: Phonocardiogram Signal Classification Using Short Time Fourier Transform and Convolutional Neural Network
Keyword: Phonocardiogram, Short Time Fourier Transform (STFT), Hamming Window, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: In facing the COVID-19 pandemic, the Indonesian government issued several policies including Large-Scale Social Restrictions and the New Normal. This New Normal policy then became widely discussed by the public. Sentiment analysis of circulating opinions regarding the issue can be carried out so that the government can evaluate the policy. In this study, it is proposed to use Lexicon Senti-N-Gram for sentiment analysis with the aim of determining the effect of Lexicon Senti-N-Gram on Indonesian language sentiment analysis. This study used 350 tweet data divided into 229 positive class tweets and 121 negative class tweets. The evaluation results obtained using data with stemming are higher than data without stemming. The results of the system performance test on the Lexicon Senti-N-Gram obtained an accuracy value of 63.42%, precision of 77%, recall of 62.88%, and f-measure of 69.23% with an average kappa value between Annotators of 0.5395 for data that went through the stemming process. Based on the test results that have been obtained, it can be concluded that the stemming process and the process of translating words one by one can influence words based on their context.
Judul Paper: New Normal Policy Sentiment Analysis Using Automated Lexicon Senti N-Gram
Keyword: analisis sentimen, COVID-19,new normal, opini, twitter, lexicon, Senti-N-Gram
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Heart disease is one of the main causes of death along with other diseases. In the field of technology, data mining can be used to diagnose a disease sourced from patient medical record data. In medical dataset classification, Naive Bayes is one of the best methods used, but the Naive Bayes algorithm has a drawback that assumes that each feature in the data has no relationship with each other. Based on the shortcomings of the Naive Bayes algorithm, feature selection is added to select which features are important in the data. The purpose of this study is to determine the comparison of the accuracy results of Naive Bayes using several feature selections, namely Forward Selection, Backward Elimination, a combination of the union of the results of Forward Selection and Backward Elimination feature selection, Information Gain, Gain Ratio, and a combination of the union of the results of Information Gain and Gain Ratio feature selection. The data used in this study is heart disease data obtained from the UCI Machine Learning Repository. From the implementation of the modeling that will be carried out, the highest accuracy value of 91.80% is produced in the Naive Bayes algorithm with a combination of the union of the results of Information Gain and Gain Ratio feature selection using a comparison of training data and test data of 80:20. Meanwhile, the accuracy of Naive Bayes with a combination of union results from Forward Selection and Backward Elimination feature selection only has an accuracy value of 83.61%.
Judul Paper: COMBINATION OF FILTER AND WRAPPER BASED FEATURE SELECTION USING NAIVE BAYES IN HEART DISEASE CLASSIFICATION
Keyword: Heart Disease, Classification, Naive Bayes, Feature Selection, CombinationUnion
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: This research was conducted as an effort to preserve Timorese woven fabrics in the field of information technology, especially in the field of digital image processing, namely pattern recognition which is a solution to recognize woven images automatically. In this study, the classification of Timorese woven images applies the SURF (SpeededUp Robust Feature) method as a feature extraction with BoVW (Bag of Visual Words) representation while SVM (Support Vector Machine) is used as a classifier method. In order for BoVW performance to be better, an approach is used to determine the right number of clusters to group visual words patterns. The determination of the SVM classification algorithm parameters is carried out using the kernel and the multi-class SVM method used. Timorese woven image data used as many as 420 with 7 classes of image motifs will be divided into training data and test data using 5-fold cross validation. Based on the results of the experiments carried out, different results were obtained in testing the cluster values ​​and SVM parameters used. In visual words with a cluster value of 500 with a multi-class SVM classification algorithm, namely the OVO (One Versus All) method using a linear kernel, the best results were obtained in this study with an accuracy level of 98.10%. From the results of this study, a more accurate method for classifying Timor woven motif images was obtained.
Judul Paper: TIMOR WEAVING CLASSIFICATION USING SVM METHOD BASED ON SURF FEATURES WITH BAG OF VISUAL WORDS REPRESENTATION
Keyword: Klasifikasi,Tenun Timor, Speeded up robust features (SURF), Support Vector Machine(SVM
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: BEM (Student Executive Board) is the spearhead in carrying out governance among students and the media to convey aspirations in the form of welfare, security both verbally and in writing to the university. BEM elections in universities are routinely held every year. However, in BEM elections, some students cannot exercise their right to vote due to limited time provided by the election committee. In the implementation of the election, 3 types of lecture times are provided, namely regular afternoon at 08.00 - 17.00, evening at 17.45 - 09.30, and non-regular distance or online lectures are held every weekend. For elections, regular evening and non-regular students usually do not vote or choose because the time is held during the day. To overcome this problem, a system is needed that can be used anywhere without having to come to campus. One system that can be used is e-polvot or electronic polling and voting. However, to present the system requires readiness from both infrastructure and users. This study analyzes the readiness of STMIK Amik Riau students in accepting the e-polvot system. The purpose of this study is to analyze students' readiness to use the e-polvot system. The analysis of student readiness uses the Technology Readiness Index (TRI) model. This model has 4 variables, namely Optimism, Innovativeness, Discomfort, and Insecurity. The population used in this study was all students of STMIK Amik Riau with a total sampling technique. The results obtained in this study are that STMIK Amik Riau students are ready to accept the e-polvot system. This can be seen from the value obtained from this measurement, which is 3.93, which is categorized as HIGH.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN MODEL TECHNOLOGY READINESS INDEXUNTUK MENGUKUR TINGKAT KESIAPAN MAHASISWA DALAM PENERIMAAN SISTEM E-POLVOT
Keyword: Student Executive Board, Readiness, TRI Model, e-polvot, STMIK Amik Riau
Jurnal: JURNAL TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI DAN KOMPUTER

Abstrak: The J-KOPI (Jember Smart City) application is an application developed by the Jember Regency Government's Communication and Information Technology Office (DISKOMINFO). The J-KOPI application aims to become a "SuperApp" that provides a variety of information and various public services integrated with the Regional Apparatus Organizations (OPD) of the Jember Regency Government in one application. Based on observations and interviews with DISKOMINFO, it was found that there are several problems in the application that can reduce the quality of the user experience. This study aims to evaluate the user experience on the J-KOPI application to fix problems related to user experience and improve aspects that need to be improved. This evaluation uses the UEQ (User Experience Questionnaire) method to measure the level of user experience on the application and User Interviews to find more detailed problems. Initial evaluation with 30 respondents consisting of students, the general public and OPDs showed that the J-KOPI application has a neutral user experience level and a UEQ benchmark category of "Below average". In addition, 4 problem topics consisting of 11 problem points were found. Based on these problems, recommendations for improvement were designed and followed by retesting. The results of the improvements indicate that the user experience across all aspects of the UEQ questionnaire has been successfully enhanced, and the user experience on the UEQ benchmark for the Attractiveness and Stimulation scales reached the "very good" category. Meanwhile, the Perspicuity, Efficiency, Dependability, and Novelty scales reached the "good" category.
Judul Paper: EVALUATION OF USER EXPERIENCE "J-KOPI (JEMBER KOTA PINTAR)" APPLICATION USING SURVEY METHOD WITH USER EXPERIENCE QUESTIONNAIRED AND USER INTERVIEW
Keyword: aplikasi J-KOPI, user experience, user experience questionnaire (UEQ), user interview.
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Balinese wood carving art is the work of native Balinese wood carving artists who have extraordinary talents for decades. They work consistently and dedicatedly to create the best and high-quality works. In addition, they always include deep spiritual philosophy in their work. Begeh Ukir is an SME engaged in the Balinese carving art industry that has been established since 2000. The main product provided is sanggah, which literally means a place of worship. Hindu beliefs believe that the spirits of family ancestors inhabit the sanggah, where they are placed in a sacred corner or in an empty area of ​​the house. In facilitating and improving the understanding of human resource management incorporated into the Begeh Ukir SME through KMS which aims to ensure that knowledge can be passed on to the next generation. The knowledge stored in the KMS was successfully mapped in the form of Knowledge Mapping consisting of sanggah, bale, materials and philosophy. The KMSLC method applied to the development of KMS succeeded in developing an NLP-based AI chatbot with a percentage of knowledge accuracy generated of 75%.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF A KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM FOR BALI WOOD CARVINGS BASED ON ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
Keyword: Artificial Intelligence, KnowledgeManagement System, Website, Ukiran Bali
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: This research and development aims to produce a media product in the form of a PBL-based digital pocket book for Civics learning Theme 7 The Beauty of Diversity in My Country in grade IV of elementary school.  This study uses the ADDIE development method which has five stages, namely Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation and Evaluation.  Product validation trials in this study involved three experts, namely material experts, linguists and media experts.  In addition to these three experts, this development involved fourth grade students and teachers at SDIT Cendekia Islamic School Bekasi in product validation trials.  The collection of information in this study was obtained based on the results of observations and interviews with teachers and fourth grade students and questionnaires.  The validation results of material experts were 77.8%, linguists 85.4%, and media experts 88.75%.  So as to obtain the overall results of expert test validation with an average of 83.98%.  The results of product trials on One To One were 81.3%, Small Groups were 86%, and Field Tests were 91.3%, as well as teacher validation results were 91%.  Thus, this shows that PBL-based digital pocket book media is feasible to be used as an additional learning media for fourth grade elementary school students.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF DIGITAL POCKET BOOK MEDIA BASED ON PROBLEM-BASED LEARNING IN PPKN THEME 7 LEARNING CLASS IV PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: Digital pocket book, PPKN, Theme of the Beauty of Diversity in My Country
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This research aims to identify the process of implementing a game modification learning approach as an alternative solution in developing basic movements of hitting the ball based on previous research. This research was conducted at SDN Kramat Pela 09 morning, Kebayoran Baru, South Jakarta. The research method used was descriptive qualitative research method. Data collection techniques using observation, interviews and documentation. Based on the research findings that researchers found in the field, 6 out of 10 students mentioned that they preferred the modified baseball game compared to the commonly used baseball. In addition, students also prefer the modified baseball game because the number of people in one team is less than the regular baseball game, it also makes the field used smaller so that students do not need to run as far as the regular baseball game. The game is also carried out with a smaller field area compared to the field in ordinary baseball.
Judul Paper: GAME MODIFICATION LEARNING APPROACH AS AN ALTERNATIVE SOLUTION IN DEVELOPING THE BASIC MOTION OF HITTING THE BALL (QUALITATIVE DESCRIPTIVE STUDY ON PJOK SUBJECTS IN THE UPPER CLASS OF KRAMAT PELA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL 09)
Keyword: Modification of games, Development of basic movement, Hitting the ball, Kasti ball, PJOK
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The implementation of flipped classroom has become popular in higher education. However, few studies have conducted on how to expand various instructional strategies into a flipped classroom practice, which is important to learning. Meanwhile, prior studies have examined the effect of case-based learning (CBL) on improving student problem solving ability. The present study thus proposed a flipped classroom combined with CBL, an extension of the classic flipped classroom model. The present study also examined the effect of flipped classroom combined with CBL on students’ problem-solving ability. To compare the effect of CBL on student problem solving in a flipped classroom, we conducted a quasi-experimental design study with three classes involving 94 students in a private university in Indonesia. Across 7 weeks, where one experimental group received Flipped classroom combined with CBL and a second experimental group received the flipped classroom model, while the control group received regular classroom activities. The results indicated that learning through the flipped classroom combined with CBL resulted in better problem-solving ability compared to the flipped classroom model and conventional method. The findings imply that a flipped classroom combined with CBL is effective in cultivating students’ problem-solving ability and need to be replicated that involve larger groups of participants
Judul Paper: ENHANCING STUDENTS’ PROBLEM SOLVING THROUGH A FLIPPED CASED-BASED LEARNING
Keyword: Flipped Classroom, Case Based Learning, Problem Solving Ability.
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The world of education requires an interesting learning process for students, with the aim that the students being taught do not feel bored in following the learning process. Learning methods that use conventional methods are one of the causes of students feeling bored in the learning process. The research carried out was Classroom Action Research (PTK) with a cooperative learning model applied to third-semester students in the Information Systems study program at Unversitas Pignatelli Triputra. Cooperative learning is a teaching method that involves students studying in small groups to achieve common goals when completing assignments. It is based on the idea that when students work together and exchange knowledge, they learn more effectively. Based on the results of the data analysis that has been carried out, it is known that the initial reflection scores achieved by students were only 22.2% of students who achieved completeness, 55.5% in cycle I and cycle II, and as much as 83.3%. This shows that the use of appropriate teaching strategies can produce real improvements and help students learn enthusiastically and achieve the desired goals.
Judul Paper: THE INFLUENCE OF COOPERATIVE LEARNING MODELS TO INCREASE LEARNING MOTIVATION ON OBJECT-ORIENTED PROGRAMMING MATERIALS
Keyword: Motivation, Object Oriented Programming, Cooperative Learning, Learning model
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This research and development aims to deliver products, determine the feasibility, and effectiveness of the interactive media Articulate Storyline based on Problem-Based Learning in science learning for grade IV elementary school students. This research uses the ADDIE development model which consists of five stages, namely Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation, and Evaluate. Product validation trials were carried out by involving material experts, media experts, linguists, and fourth grade students of SDIT Cendekia Islamic School Bekasi City. Information collection was obtained from observations, interviews with fourth grade teachers, and questionnaires. The results of the material expert validation were 95%, media experts 96.6%, and linguists 97.9%. Thus obtaining the average overall result of the experts validation is 96.5%. The results of the one to one product trial were 82.1%, small group 88.5%, and field test 92.5%. As well as getting an increase in learning outcomes from the pre-test 72.76 and post-test 93.72. Thus, this shows that the interactive media Articulate Storyline based on problem-based learning is feasible and effective to be used as an alternative or additional learning media for grade IV elementary school students.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF ARTICULATE STORYLINE INTERACTIVE MEDIA BASED ON PROBLEM BASED LEARNING IN SCIENCE LEARNING IN CLASS
Keyword: Interactive Media, Articulate Storyline, Problem Based Learning, Natural Sciences, ADDIE
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: Speaking skills at the secondary school level teach students how to speak in public. The first step that teachers need to do is to apply a variety of knowledge about speaking skills so that students really understand what they will convey to others. Students can present factual, factual, and communicative information to others if they have a holistic view, obtained from various sources. This study aims to provide an understanding of assessment of secondary school student's speaking skills. For speaking, pupils might employ four method. One of the most commonly used methods is the improvisation method. This extemporaneous method, only prepares an outline of the theme or material that will be delivered to the listener. Then the outlines, students develop their own with the intellectual abilities that students have. This extemporaneous method is very beneficial for the development of students' speaking skills. Language factors and non-language factors also greatly support the effectiveness of students in speaking. So that these factors must be considered by students when speaking in front of an audience.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF STUDENTS' SPEAKING SKILLS BASED ON EXTEMPORANEOUS METHOD IN INDONESIAN LANGUAGE SUBJECT
Keyword: Extemporaneous method, Speaking skills, Knowledge, Student
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal
