Abstrak:
This research aims to evaluate the effectiveness of implementing the Project Base Learning model in Cyber
Business lectures for the Information Systems students of Pignatelli Triputra University, Class of 2022. The
research method used is an experiment with a Pretest-Posttest Design. The subjects of the study consist of
one class comprising 18 students. The testing process involved implementing conventional lectures from
the beginning of the semester until the midterm and then utilizing the project-based learning method until
the end of the semester. The test results indicate that the data are distributed normally and homogeneous,
and the hypothesis testing using the T-test shows that the use of the project-based learning lecture model
significantly affects learning outcomes compared to conventional lecture models. This study demonstrates
that the project-based learning model effectively enhances learning outcomes for Information Systems
students of Pignatelli Triputra University, Class of 2022, in the Cyber Business course. This lecture or
learning model is an alternative for teachers, educators, and schools to develop more effective, creative,
and innovative learning strategies.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF PROJECT-BASED LEARNING TO IMPROVE THE LEARNING OUTCOMES OF CYBER BUSINESS LECTURES FOR INFORMATION SYSTEMS STUDENTS OF PIGNATELLI TRIPUTRA UNIVERSITY CLASS
Keyword: Project based learning, Learning outcomes, Cyber bussiness, Classroom action reseearch
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: Vocational Schools also aim to produce human resources who are intellectual and ready to use in the world of work. Therefore, to prepare students who are able to compete in the 21st century is the responsibility of Indonesian educational institutions by implementing or equipping them with 4C competencies through superior programs. This research method uses a qualitative approach with a narrative study method. The purpose of this research is to find out the efforts made by schools to improve students' soft skills in the challenges of the 21st century. The findings of this research are regarding efforts to improve students' soft skills with several programs created by schools, including the existence of extracurriculars, literacy Fridays, P5 program (project to strengthen the profile of Pancasila students). apart from that, it is also to improve soft skills through entrepreneurship learning which is included in the Creative Products and Entrepreneurship
Judul Paper: EFFORTS TO IMPROVE STUDENTS' SOFT SKILLS ACCORDING TO THE CHALLENGES OF THE XXI CENTURY AT THE STATE VOCATIONAL SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE IN SERANG CITY
Keyword: 21st century, Vocational education, Soft skill
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This research was compiled with the aim of increasing the creativity of students by applying the Project Based Learning learning model to class IIIA students at SDN Semeru 1 Bogor. Creativity referred to in this study include; have curiosity, self-confidence, persistence, and high imagination and dare to express opinions. This type of research is Collaborative Classroom Action Research (PTKK), a type of research that examines learning problems in the classroom through reflection in an effort to find problems with various planned actions. The research design uses the Kemmis and Mc. Taggart. This research was conducted in the even semester of the 2022/2023 school year, in February. The subjects of this study were class IIIA students at SDN Semeru 1 consisting of 28 students. The object of research is the creativity of students. Data collection techniques using observation and interviews. Data were analyzed descriptively and presented in the form of tables and graphs. The results showed that there was an increase in students' creativity, namely in the first cycle of 69% (high), then in the second cycle it increased to 90% (very high). This means an increase of 21%. Thus the use of the Project Based Learning learning model in Theme 6, especially in the SBdP content of Decorative Works material can increase the creativity of class IIIA students at SDN Semeru I.
Judul Paper: INCREASING STUDENTS' CREATIVITY THROUGH PROJECT BASED LEARNING THEME 6 LEARNING MODEL CLASS III PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: Creativity, Project Based Learning Learning Model, SBdP
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The purpose of developing game-based interactive multimedia media is to determine the feasibility of game-based interactive multimedia media to be presented in the subject matter of 2D animation work procedures and to determine the effectiveness of game-based interactive multimedia media in the learning process of 2D animation work procedure material for Class XI Animation at SMKN 2 Surabaya . The development model used is the ADDIE model with the subject of the XI Animation class XI Animation students at SMKN 2 Surabaya. Media feasibility data was obtained from the results of validation instruments from learning design experts, materials and media, as well as individual, small group and field product trials. Media effectiveness data obtained from the results of the pretest and posttest values that have been through the analysis of t test data. From the analysis of the t test data, the results obtained are t count 17.57 and t table 1.995 indicating t count is greater than t table. So, it can be concluded from the results obtained, showing game-based interactive multimedia media 2D animation work procedure material is feasible to be applied in learning activities 2D animation work procedure material and is effective in improving learning outcomes in class XI 2D animation work procedure material at SMKN 2 Surabaya
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF GAMES-BASED INTERACTIVE MULTIMEDIA TO IMPROVE STUDENTS' LEARNING OUTCOMES IN 2D ANIMATION WORK PROCEDURES MATERIAL CLASS XI 2D ANIMATION SUBJECT ANIMATION AT SMK NEGERI 2 SURABAYA
Keyword: Development, Interactive Multimedia, Games
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to develop problem-based learning-based audio-visual animation in social studies learning with the theme "My Hero" as a distance learning video for fourth grade elementary school students. Respondents in this study were students of class IV. The development model used is ADDIE with modifications to the implementation stage, with analysis, planning, development, implementation and evaluation stages. Data collection techniques used are observation, interviews, and questionnaires. The recapitulation of problem-based learning audio-visual animation conducted by media experts scored 98.21%, material experts scored 83.33%, and linguists scored 100%. The results of the recapitulation of the test for grade IV students in the one to one stage involved 4 students and 1 class teacher getting a score of 89.5%. Therefore, audio-visual animation based on problem-based learning can be said to be valid and appropriate for use in distance learning for fourth grade elementary school students.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF ANIMATED AUDIO-VISUAL MEDIA BASED ON PROBLEM-BASED LEARNING IN SCIENCE LEARNING CLASS IV PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: Animation, Audio visual, IPS, ADDIE
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The aim of this research and development is to develop an E-LKPD based on Problem Based Learning that is suitable for use by 4th grade elementary students. This research was conducted in 4th grade at SD Negeri Mustikasari II, Bekasi in June 2021. This research uses Research and Development (R&D) method by ADDIE. There are five steps in this reseacrh, including: analyze, design, development, implementation and evaluation. The techniques of collecting data used in this research are interviews and questionnaires. The respondents in this development are an expert material lecturer, an expert media lecturer, an expert linguist lecturer and thirty grade students at SD Negeri Mustikasari II, Bekasi. The results indicate that E-LKPD based on Problem Based Learning is considered very feasible, as seen from the results of the overall average score of 95% according to experts and student questionnaires of 81,7% for the one-to-one stage, 82,2 % for the small group stage and 83,8% for the field test stage. E-LKPD is considered very feasible, so it can be used by students as one of the electronic teaching materials in studying the obligations and rights of living things and the environment.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF E-LKPD BASED ON PROBLEM BASED LEARNING FOR PPKN LEARNING IN CLASS IV PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: E-LKPD, Problem Based Learning, Development
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: Project Based Learning (PjBL) is the latest learning model innovation that is deliberately designed to bridge learning theory and learning practice, especially those related to creativity, work design in the form of projects oriented towards product and concept acquisition and to improve learning outcomes in the form of students' video editing skills. This study aims to determine the effect of the Project Based Learning (PjBL) learning model on video editing skills in Audio Video Processing Engineering subjects. The research used a quasi-experimental design with a posttest only control group design. The research subjects were students of Multimedia Department Vocational High School totaling 68 students. Data collection was carried out tests for video editing skills. The research hypothesis was tested using t-test. Descriptive statistics research results show the average value of video editing skills of students who apply the Project Based Learning (PjBL) learning model reaches 82.53 while those who learn using direct learning (Direct Learning) is 74.15. The results of the research hypothesis show that the difference between the two numbers shows a significant difference in the results of video editing skills
Judul Paper: THE INFLUENCE OF PROJECT BASED LEARNING (PjBL) ON VOCATIONAL STUDENTS' VIDEO EDITING SKILLS
Keyword: Learning Model, Project Based Learning (PjBL), Video Editing Skills, Learning Outcomes, Department Vocational High School
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The purpose of this study was to find out the use of social media Instagram as a learning medium for product marketing materials in the multimedia department of SMKN 1 Surabaya. The research method used is a qualitative method, while the research design used is a case study. Methods of data collection using observation, interviews, and documentation studies. To test the validity of the data using the credibility test (Internal Validity) and Transferability test (External Validity). The subjects in this study were students of class XII Multimedia. Data collection using interviews, observation, and documentation was used to determine the characteristics of students, knowledge of sources related to Instagram social media, and the number of project assignments. The main results of this study indicate that students can utilize Instagram social media as a learning medium in creative and entrepreneurship product subjects to carry out product marketing and promotion, providing the latest references to students can provide stimulation their creativity, in the implications of working on projects using Project Based Learning learning model.
Judul Paper: USE OF INSTAGRAM SOCIAL MEDIA AS LEARNING MEDIA PRODUCT MARKETING MATERIALS CREATIVE PRODUCTS AND ENTREPRENEURSHIP SUBJECTS CLASS XII MULTIMEDIA SMKN 1 SURABAYA
Keyword: USE OF INSTAGRAM SOCIAL MEDIA AS LEARNING MEDIA PRODUCT MARKETING MATERIALS CREATIVE PRODUCTS AND ENTREPRENEURSHIP SUBJECTS CLASS XII MULTIMEDIA SMKN 1 SURABAYA
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak:
This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of cooperative learning model type make a match in improving the learning outcomes of students in class X Multimedia at SMK Ketintang Surabaya in basic computer and network subjects. The research was conducted with experimental method and used Nonequivalent Control Group Design. The research subjects consisted of two classes, namely the control class and the experimental class.

The experimental class applied the make a match type cooperative learning model, while the control class applied conventional learning. The research data were collected through observation sheets and learning outcome tests. The results showed that the cooperative learning model of make a match type could be implemented well by teachers and students. The normality test results showed that the data were normally distributed and the homogeneity test results showed that the data were homogeneous. In addition, the results of hypothesis testing showed that there was a significant increase in the learning outcomes of students who applied the make a match type cooperative learning model compared to students who applied conventional learning. This research shows that the cooperative learning model of make a match type is effective in improving student learning outcomes in basic computer and network subjects at SMK Ketintang Surabaya. This learning model can be an alternative for teachers and schools in developing more effective and innovative learning strategies.
Judul Paper: USE OF MAKE A MATCH TYPE COOPERATIVE LEARNING MODEL TO IMPROVE LEARNING OUTCOMES OF CLASS
Keyword: Utilization, Make A Match, Learning Outcomes, Computers and Basic Networks
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This research uses a type of development research (R&D) using the ADDIE model (Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation, Evaluation) to design effective learning by making letter cards for kindergarten-aged children. The research subjects were teachers and students of Bunga Bangsa Kindergarten. The results of this study indicate that the use of letter card learning media increases student involvement in learning and helps students to be able to read beginning. Product development in the form of letter cards is based on product needs in learning at Bunga Bangsa Kindergarten. The development of this product produces letter cards that are needed in learning at the kindergarten level and are expected to be able to easily help students to be able to read at the beginning. In conclusion, the development of these letter cards can help increase student involvement in learning and help students to be able to read for starters. The development of this product has also gone through validation stages from media experts and material experts as well as individual trials which have shown positive results
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF LETTER CARD LEARNING MEDIA FOR STUDENTS AT BUNGA BANGSA KINDERGARTEN, PAKAL DISTRICT, SURABAYA
Keyword: Development, Learning Media, Letter Cards
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to develop problem-based learning-based audio-visual animation in social studies learning with the theme "My Hero" as a distance learning video for fourth grade elementary school students. Respondents in this study were students of class IV. The development model used is ADDIE with modifications to the implementation stage, with analysis, planning, development, implementation and evaluation stages. Data collection techniques used are observation, interviews, and questionnaires. The recapitulation of problem-based learning audio-visual animation conducted by media experts scored 98.21%, material experts scored 83.33%, and linguists scored 100%. The results of the recapitulation of the test for grade IV students in the one to one stage involved 4 students and 1 class teacher getting a score of 89.5%. Therefore, audio-visual animation based on problem-based learning can be said to be valid and appropriate for use in distance learning for fourth grade elementary school students.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF ANIMATED AUDIO-VISUAL MEDIA BASED ON PROBLEM-BASED LEARNING IN SCIENCE LEARNING CLASS IV PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: Animation, Audio visual, IPS, ADDIE
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to develop contextual based e-magazine on the content in social studies lesson class V elementary school. The method used is the Research and Development (RnD) with the development process using the model ADDIE (Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation, and Evaluation). However, due to the Covid-19 pandemic this research is only up to the development phase. Data collection techniques used are observation, interview and questionnaire. Respondents in this research are one material expert lecturer, one media expert lecturer, one linguist lecturer, three 5th graders of elementary school for one to one phase, and twelve students for small group phases. The results of the feasibility of 1) Media expert validation obtained a score of 96,15%, 2) Material expert validation obtained a score of 93,75%, 3) Linguist validation obtained a score of 85%. Based on the results of the validation of the experts, overall a score of 92,4% was obtained in the very good category. The test to 5th graders of elementary school is resulting in average score of 93,33% for one-to-one phase and 96,67% for small group phase which was included in the very good category so that the product was declared suitable for use.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF CONTEXTUAL-BASED ELECTRONIC MAGAZINES IN THE CONTENT OF SOCIAL SCIENCE LESSONS FOR CLASS V PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: E-Magazine, Contextual, ADDIE
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to develop interactive learning videos based on the Capcut application and determine the validity, practicality and effectiveness tests of interactive learning videos based on the Capcut application developed. The research method used is Research and Development (R&D) with a 4-D model, namely defining (Define), designing (Design), developing (Develop) and disseminating (Disseminate). The research subjects that have been carried out are students of class VIII SMPIT Bina Bangsa. Data were collected using validity tests, practicality tests, and effectiveness tests in the form of questionnaires from media experts, material experts, and student respondents. The results of the study showed that the results of the validity test of the assessment from 2 media experts were 97.00% (very valid), and the assessment of 1 material expert was 90.00% (very valid) it can be concluded that the assessment of 3 validators was 94.67% (very valid), In addition, the results of the assessment of 15 students had a practicality value of 91.99% (very practical), and the effectiveness value was 89.45% (very effective). Therefore, it can be said that interactive learning videos based on the CapCut application can be developed and applied in informatics subjects.
Judul Paper: Digital Transformation Technology (Digitech)
Keyword: Development, Learning Videos, Interactive, Capcut, Informatics
Jurnal: Jurnal Penelitian Mahasiswa Teknik dan Ilmu Komputer (JUPITER)

Abstrak: In Moyo Hulu District, many farmer groups do not receive fertilizer according to the area of ​​land they own, even though fertilizer is always distributed annually. This causes dissatisfaction among farmers, who then buy fertilizer from third parties at very high prices. This problem often occurs due to a lack of transparency between the head of the farmer group and its members. This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of equal fertilizer distribution based on land area using the K-Means and K-Medoids algorithms in farmer groups in the Moyo Hulu District area. This study uses quantitative data collection methods and data mining methods with the K-Means and K-Medoids algorithms in the clustering process using the Davies-Boulden index for validity testing. The K-Means algorithm produces a Davies-Bouldin value of -0.554, while the K-Medoids algorithm produces Davies-Bouldin values ​​of -1.580 and -0.878. Based on the Davies-Bouldin value, the K-Means algorithm shows better performance in grouping data on fertilizer recipient farmers in Moyo Hulu District compared to the K-Medoids algorithm.
Judul Paper: Clustering of Fertilizer Recipient Farmers Based on Land Area Using the K-Means and K-Medoids Algorithms
Keyword: K-Means, K-Medoids, Fertilizer Receipts, Agriculture, Davies Bouldin Index
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: With the rapid development of information technology, artificial intelligence (AI) has become a center of attention in various industries, including business. AI offers the potential to increase operational efficiency, improve decision-making, and provide a better customer experience. This study aims to analyze the legal aspects of the implementation of artificial intelligence technology in business information systems from the perspective of Law Number 11 of 2008 concerning Electronic Information and Transactions. The method used in this study is a qualitative literature review with data collected from Google Scholar for the period 2012-2024. The results of the study indicate that the implementation of artificial intelligence (AI) technology in business information systems raises a series of complex legal issues that must be carefully addressed in accordance with the existing legal framework in Indonesia, especially in the context of Law Number 11 of 2008 concerning Electronic Information and Transactions (UU ITE). Various legal aspects that need to be considered include personal data protection, responsibility for decisions generated by AI systems, implications for business competition, information security, the validity of electronic evidence, and compliance with regulations of certain business sectors.
Judul Paper: Legal Analysis of the Implementation of Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology in Business Information Systems
Keyword: Law, Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology, Business Information Systems, Transactions, Regulations
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Cinema is one of the most enjoyable forms of entertainment. In Palembang, there are many cinemas to choose from to spend time. However, a person can only enjoy one at a time. When choosing a cinema, many criteria can be considered, such as price, facilities, service, or distance. In choosing the best cinema to watch a movie, these criteria can be helpful. To get the best results in choosing a cinema, one can use decision-making. This study uses the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method to help decide which cinema is worth choosing. The process of making a decision using SAW includes determining criteria consisting of benefits and costs, deciding on alternatives, creating a decision matrix, normalizing, and ranking the alternatives to find the highest value. After the existing process is carried out, the final result of using the SAW method in decision-making for choosing a cinema is that Cinepolis is at the top of the list.
Judul Paper: Decision Making System in Choosing a Cinema in Palembang for Customers Using Simple Additive Weighting (SAW)
Keyword: Decision Support Systems, SAW, Cinema, Benefits, Cost
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: The issue of food security has been a global concern in recent decades. Population growth, unbalanced by increased food productivity, has led to an imbalance that could potentially lead to a food crisis. One technology being developed to increase food productivity is the smart agriculture system, a method that integrates control and monitoring systems for crop commodities using internet access, commonly known as the Internet of Things (IoT). The use of IoT in agriculture is expected to improve crop yields and crop quality for farmers. The waterfall method, a classic linear system, is used in this study. The Smart Agriculture System designed for this study utilizes a NodeMCU ESP-8266 microcontroller, relays, a YL-69 soil moisture sensor, a DHT-11 sensor, a water pump, and Thingspeak cloud computing. The design of this smart agriculture system is expected to be a solution to increasing agricultural productivity.
Judul Paper: Perancangan Smart Agriculture System Berbasis Internet of Things
Keyword: Technology, Food, IoT, Agriculture, Sensors
Jurnal: Jurnal Penelitian Mahasiswa Teknik dan Ilmu Komputer (JUPITER)

Abstrak: Users often have to manually compare and evaluate each marketplace, which takes significant time and effort. Furthermore, the information available to users about marketplaces is very limited. The information provided by marketplaces is incomplete or difficult to assess objectively. Users often rely on user reviews or information found online, making it inadequate for making informed decisions. Therefore, a study was conducted by researchers to help determine the best marketplace among teenagers in Makassar City. This analysis was conducted in Makassar City, Ujung Pandang District, using the Multi-Attribute Utility Theory (MAUT) method. By applying the MAUT method in this assessment analysis, the final results are ranked from the highest alternative value to the lowest alternative value. The purpose of this study is to help users identify the best and most popular marketplaces among teenagers. The benefits of this study are to implement the MAUT method in selecting the best marketplace and to help sellers understand consumer behavior. Based on calculations obtained using the MAUT method, Shopee is in first place with a value of 0.81, TikTok is in second place with a value of 0.74, Tokopedia is in third place with a value of 0.64, and Lazada is in fourth place with a value of 0.43 and last place is Blibli with a value of 0.02. For further research, it is possible to add more marketplaces and compare using other methods.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Selection of the Best Marketplace Among Teenagers Using the Multi-Attribute Utility Theory Method in Makassar City
Keyword: Multi-Attribute Utility Theory, Analisis, Remaja, Marketplace, Sistem
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The current system for selecting the best employees at the Mitra Dhuafa Cooperative, Kedungjati District Branch, uses a manual system, which only calculates the number of cross-out ratings in transactions and net incoming members for that month. This is certainly not fair in its calculation because some employees do not only focus on finding incoming members but also focus on reducing problematic members. The purpose of this study is to build a decision support system (DSS) for selecting the best employees using the SAW method. The basic concept of the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method is to find the sum of the weights of the performance ratings on each alternative for all criteria. The decision support system criteria are based on attendance, administration, target achievement, problem solving, and discipline. The results of the study can be the best recommendation for leaders to determine the best employee performance. The employee selection sequence resulting from the application of the SAW method is A4 with a final score of 0.841.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Selecting the Best Employee Performance using the Simple Additive Weighting Method
Keyword: SPK, SAW, Employees, Alternatives, Criteria
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: The information system for strengthening the capacity of students & alumni and student organizations (Siskama) is a website-based information system that functions to facilitate the management of student, alumni and student organization activities. The case study of this research is the Faculty of Engineering, Gorontalo State University. The development method used in the development of Siskama is the prototype method. Siskama is built with the PHP (Hypertext Preprocessor) programming language with the use of the Laravel Framework, and MySQL as database management. The results of the system testing show that Siskama can accelerate the process of information exchange by entering activities, and facilitate the monitoring of student & alumni activities and ORMAWA with activity verification. In addition, Siskama can maintain the validity of activity proposals by having a track record of development and verification processes. This study concludes that the data collection of interactions between entities in activity management has added value to increase the effectiveness and efficiency of the process of strengthening the capacity of students & alumni and student organizations in higher education.
Judul Paper: Designing an Information System for Strengthening the Capacity of Students, Alumni and Student Organizations Using the Laravel Framework
Keyword: Students, Alumni, Student Organizations, PHP, Larave
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: The security and confidentiality of a message are important. The message owner certainly does not expect the data they have to be seen by unauthorized parties. Therefore, to maintain the confidentiality of the message, a message security method called a cryptographic algorithm is required. One of the cryptographic techniques often used is Caesar Cipher. In this study, a message security system was developed. This system applies the Caesar Cipher algorithm and in the process uses the Java NetBeans program to obtain ciphertext. The method applied in this development research is the waterfall model including the stages of requirements analysis, design, implementation, and testing. The program code was written in Java using NetBeans IDE 8.2 software. This study resulted in an encryption and decryption process using Caesar Cipher with the same key in the form of the alphabet a-z which will produce a ciphertext that is difficult to understand, making messages more secure, both messages sent and received. Thus, it can be concluded that message security with the Caesar Cipher algorithm has been proven to be implemented in Java NetBeans.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Caesar Cipher Algorithm for Message Security Using Java NetBeans
Keyword: Cryptography, Caesar Cipher, Message Security, Java, NetBeans
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: Data security and confidentiality are crucial. Data security is inextricably linked to data security. In computer science, there are many forms of data security, one of which is the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES). AES is a form of data security that can be used to protect data from interference or attacks by others. AES itself is a form of cryptography that consists of several processes in encrypting data. The encryption process in AES itself is Add Round Key, Sub Bytes, Shift Rows, and Mix Column. The result of this research is the introduction of the AES algorithm in cryptography on a plaintext in round 0 and 128 bits using mathematical calculations from the Rijdnael algorithm.
Judul Paper: Get to know Advance Encryption Standard (AES) as a Cryptographic Algorithm for Securing Data
Keyword: AES, Cryptography, Rijdnael, Data Security
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Public spaces are places where people can gather to achieve specific goals and are essential for Bandung residents' activities, especially during their holidays. However, all public activities have been disrupted since the Covid-19 pandemic. The pandemic, which has been ongoing for two years, has impacted many sectors, one of which is how people operate in public spaces. Therefore, people must compromise, coexist, and make peace with Covid-19 to remain productive, a condition known as the new normal. One way to implement the new normal is through social distancing. However, a problem has arisen: people often lack awareness of the crowd conditions in public spaces in Bandung. The most common source of information for checking crowd conditions in public spaces is through social media platforms like Instagram. An application to address this issue is being developed using software prototyping. An Android-based application can help the public address this issue. The results will be presented in the Development of a Crowd Detection Application in Public Spaces for the Implementation of the New Normal in Bandung. This application will utilize GPS and geofencing technology as parameters for users visiting public spaces and to detect crowd levels.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF A CROWD DETECTION APPLICATION IN PUBLIC SPACES IN THE IMPLEMENTATION OF NEW NORMAL IN THE CITY OF BANDUNG
Keyword: Public Space, New Normal, Geofencing, Crowd Level
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: CV Trivecta Commindo is a company engaged in creative services and communication. The company is divided into three departments: an open space called SPASIAL, a shop called Norm, and a canteen called Four-Calendar Canteen. The company currently has 73 employees, consisting of permanent employees and interns. Every three months, the company holds a student internship program to fill vacant positions in the SPASIAL department. The current intern selection process only looks at interview scores and does not consider the suitability of the applicant's major. This makes it difficult for companies to select prospective interns who will be accepted to match the position requirements. The Internship Recruitment Management Information System can help provide recommendations for companies in determining interns who are suitable for the position requirements in the company. The TOPSIS (Technique for Order Preference by Similarity of Ideal Solution) method is a multi-criteria decision-making method used to make decisions about prospective interns who are suitable for the company's needs. The results of this study can facilitate companies, especially the head of the personnel department, in determining which interns will be accepted to match the position requirements in the company.
Judul Paper: SISTEM INFORMASI MANAJEMEN PENERIMAAN PEGAWAI MAGANG DI CV. TRIVECTA COMMINDO
Keyword: Internship Employees, Management Information Systems, Decision Making Systems, TOPSIS
Jurnal: Jurnal Penelitian Mahasiswa Teknik dan Ilmu Komputer (JUPITER)

Abstrak: The emergence of a variety of tile and paint designs encourages stores to provide a variety of these products. However, the wide variety of tile and paint products also makes it difficult for consumers to choose a design that suits their expectations, especially if there is a product incompatibility. To overcome this problem, building material stores need to provide information and product images that can affect consumer satisfaction. One solution that can be taken is to use Augmented Reality (AR) technology in selecting floor tile products at building material stores. Therefore, in this study, an Augmented Reality (AR) application was built as a tile product simulation for consumers at building material stores based on Android. This application was built using Unity 3D as well as the AR Foundation package and AR Interaction Toolkit which functions to simulate and interact with Augmented Reality (AR) objects. With this Augmented Reality (AR) application, consumers can directly see a realistic image of the product application, making it easier for them to choose the right product. This can also help store employees in providing explanations and suggestions to consumers, as well as minimizing the risk of product incompatibility.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF AUGMENTED REALITY APPLICATIONS AS SIMULATION OF TILE PRODUCTS FOR ANDROID-BASED BUILDING MATERIALS SHOP CONSUMERS
Keyword: Augmented Reality, Android, Mobile Application, Simulation
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: CV. Supri Group is a company engaged in the field of Applicator, Contractor and Distributor of Gypsum Ceiling, PVC, Aluminum Frame & Steel Roof services. Procurement of goods is carried out by checking the available goods and then making a list of goods that need to be procured by the warehouse department, then for the purchase quantity, an intuitive estimate will be carried out based on the previous month's sales data by the Operational Manager and then an order is placed to the supplier by the admin. In the procurement process, operational managers still often have difficulty determining the number of goods that must be procured in order to continue to meet consumer needs and not cause a buildup of goods for a long period of time. Currently, CV. Supri Group has 22 suppliers, the majority of which are located in the city of Bandung. With the increasing number of choices and each supplier having different prices, distances, qualities and completeness, it makes operational managers difficult to determine these aspects. Based on these problems, a system will be created that can calculate the determination of the number of goods procured using the Single Exponential Smoothing (SES) forecasting method and to help determine suppliers can use the Weighted Product (WP) method that can make decisions by considering certain aspects. Based on the test results, it can be concluded that this system can help Operational Managers in determining the quantity of goods procured and determining suppliers.
Judul Paper: SISTEM INFORMASI MANAJEMEN PENGADAAN DI CV. SUPRI GROU
Keyword: SIM, Pengadaan, Single Exponential Smoothing, Weighted Product
Jurnal: Jurnal Penelitian Mahasiswa Teknik dan Ilmu Komputer (JUPITER)

Abstrak: Indonesia is an archipelago stretching from Sabang to Merauke. Currently, Indonesia has 34 provinces, and with these 34 provinces, Indonesia is very rich in tourist destinations. Due to the many diverse tourist attractions, tourists can choose where they will vacation. Despite the many diverse tourist attractions, there are still complaints from tourists who say they have little time to search for information regarding tourist attractions and make travel plans to the tourist attractions they want to visit. So they only vacation to places they have previously visited. The development of an e-tourism application to provide recommendations for tourist attractions while facilitating tourists to plan trips to the displayed tourist attractions is expected to provide convenience for tourists who are still confused in determining the tourist attractions they want to visit. For the application development method itself, using Waterfall, and the application is based on Android mobile, using the Kotlin programming language for the client, and the Golang programming language for the server, and uses the Instagram API to get recommendations for popular tourist attractions, and the Tiket.com API to make it easier for tourists to book plane tickets and hotels. The development of this application achieved a test percentage result of 79.71%, which is expected to make it easier for tourists to find and plan trips to popular tourist attractions on Instagram.
Judul Paper: APLIKASI E-TOURISM UNTUK MEREKOMENDASIKAN PERJALANAN SESUAI DENGAN TEMPAT WISATA YANG SEDANG POPULER DI INSTAGRAM
Keyword: E-Tourism, Android, Instagram, Recommendations, Tiket.com
Jurnal: Jurnal Penelitian Mahasiswa Teknik dan Ilmu Komputer (JUPITER)

Abstrak: PD. FOKUS, located in Cianjur Regency, is a t-shirt printing company that uses manual and digital screen printing techniques. In running its business, PD. FOKUS requires information that can help its business development, including information related to sales targets, the most orders based on buyer groups, and sales fluctuations. However, the information currently obtained cannot meet these information needs. Based on the results of usability testing, PD. FOKUS has difficulty understanding the current data visualization presentation, which takes around 80 seconds or more. Therefore, it is necessary to create a visualization form that can help the company understand the information more easily. Data visualization can help in extracting information using statistics and building visualizations into a form that can be used for future business development. In this study, the appropriate visualization and dashboard were successfully created to meet the information needs desired by the company. Based on the test results, the visualization application created can help the company understand information more quickly, which is less than 60 seconds for each required information
Judul Paper:
APPLICATION OF DATA VISUALIZATION IN PD. BANDUNG FOCUS
Article Sidebar
Keyword: Data Visualization, Dashboards, Descriptive Statistics, Printing
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Security is a crucial aspect of everyday life, both in personal and professional contexts, particularly in protecting property from the threat of theft, vandalism, and other criminal activities. Therefore, many parties install surveillance systems such as CCTV. However, traditional CCTV with local storage such as hard drives or DVRs has its weaknesses, primarily due to its vulnerability to physical damage by criminals. With the development of information and communication technology, access to CCTV equipment has also evolved from wired to Wi-Fi, and storage media has been replaced by smaller SD cards. However, weaknesses related to physical damage to storage media still remain. To address this, the use of smartphones as security tools is now increasingly popular. Equipped with high computing power, various sensors, quality cameras, and good internet connectivity, smartphones can be transformed into security devices that can monitor situations in real time and upload recordings directly to cloud storage, thus protecting against attempts to damage or theft of physical devices. Users can also access recordings anytime via the internet, increasing flexibility and convenience in maintaining the security of their property. This research uses a descriptive approach with a case study method to examine the implementation of smartphones as a cloud-based intelligent security system. Based on implementation and testing results, smartphone use has proven effective in supporting active security monitoring and management. Built-in sensors in smartphones enable fast and accurate threat detection, while integration with cloud storage provides secure, flexible, and easily accessible storage. Therefore, the combination of smartphones and cloud storage can be a solution for modern security needs.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Smartphones as Cloud Storage Based Smart Security
Keyword: CCTV; intelligent security; cloud storage; smartphones
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Product marketing in today's business can be done easily with the rapidly developing information technology. Many stores conduct buying and selling activities online. Noru Label is a bag store that sells tote bags and laptop bags that relies on social media and marketplaces as a sales medium. Some problems experienced by the Noru Label store are the long transaction process due to the lack of product information such as stock, price and product descriptions on social media, some potential customers even cancel orders because the admin does not respond quickly to messages. Another problem is the high cancellation rate of sales in the marketplace at 34% because customers misread the product description, while the product is already packaged and ready to be shipped, which is detrimental to the Noru Label store. In addition, there are requests for returns due to goods received by customers damaged during the shipping process and customer errors in placing orders. This study created an E-commerce website using a Content Management System (CMS) on the Noru Label store to facilitate the shop owner and customers in the transaction process and not harm the store. Search Engine Optimization (SEO) is implemented on the E-Commerce website to increase promotions to cover a wider market segment. The results of this study are that with an E-commerce website, customers can explore products with more comprehensive information and clearer descriptions, faster transaction processes, and no product returns. The use of SEO as an additional promotional strategy for the Noru Label store can carry out marketing with a wider market reach. The results for the use of SEO, on July 17, 2024, on the Google search engine with the keyword Noru Label store product, namely Luna Gingham Sleeves, the Noru Label store was ranked sixth on the first page. This can increase store visibility and attract more customers.
Judul Paper: Implementation of CMS-Based E-Commerce using the Business Model Canvas Method on Noru Label
Keyword: E-Commerce; CMS; BMC
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Technology plays a crucial role in business development, particularly in the business world, with its advancements making it easier for users to perform tasks quickly and efficiently, including financial reporting. This study examines the implementation of a website-based Financial Reporting Information System at PT. Tirta Boga, a company focused on selling staple foods such as mineral water, rice, and food. Despite having used computerized financial reporting for almost five years since its establishment in 2019, PT. Tirta Boga still faces challenges in the process of creating financial reports using Microsoft Excel, which is time-consuming and produces suboptimal reports. This study aims to introduce an efficient Financial Reporting Information System to assist PT. Tirta Boga administrators. Using prototype methods and blackbox testing, the system implementation successfully meets business needs by presenting cash flow reports, product sales reports, profit and loss reports, and capital change reports. The adoption of this system is expected to improve the efficiency and quality of PT. Tirta Boga's financial reporting, support better decision-making, and accelerate the overall business process.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Financial Report Information System
Keyword: financial statements; information Systems; administrator
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Channa fish health is the main foundation for successful cultivation. The challenge of accurate disease diagnosis remains a serious obstacle for farmers. Lack of understanding of the disease, difficulty in accessing reliable sources of knowledge, and limited information about Channa fish health problems are concerns. This study focuses on diagnosing Channa fish diseases based on symptoms experienced and can be identified in the behavior and condition of the fish. The problems faced are the lack of knowledge of farmers regarding Channa fish diseases, difficulty in obtaining assistance from aquatic veterinarians, and limited information about diseases in Channa fish from previous studies. The purpose of this study is to support Channa fish farmers, especially in controlling Channa fish diseases to achieve good reproductive results and reduce reproductive losses. This study uses knowledge obtained from experts who have experience in controlling Channa fish diseases, then implemented it into a website-based expert system to overcome these problems. In this study, the Certainty Factor method was used to measure the confidence level of Channa fish disease diagnosis. The results showed that the expert system was able to diagnose Gyrodactylus sp disease in Channa fish with a percentage of 89.25%, which is equivalent to the percentage carried out in manual calculations. The novelty of this research is that it focuses on developing a Channa fish disease diagnosis system using the Certainty Factor algorithm. The system integrates an inference engine and the Certainty Factor algorithm, with the results presented through a website interface. Therefore, this system successfully combines Certainty Factor for Channa fish disease diagnosis and can be used as a guide for fisheries practitioners.
Judul Paper: Channa Fish Disease Consultation Using a Web-Based Certainty Factor Algorithm
Keyword: certainty factor algorithm; disease diagnosis; expert system; channa fish
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Technology plays a crucial role in business development, particularly in the business world, with its advancements making it easier for users to perform tasks quickly and efficiently, including financial reporting. This study examines the implementation of a website-based Financial Reporting Information System at PT. Tirta Boga, a company focused on selling staple foods such as mineral water, rice, and food. Despite having used computerized financial reporting for almost five years since its establishment in 2019, PT. Tirta Boga still faces challenges in the process of creating financial reports using Microsoft Excel, which is time-consuming and produces suboptimal reports. This study aims to introduce an efficient Financial Reporting Information System to assist PT. Tirta Boga administrators. Using prototype methods and blackbox testing, the system implementation successfully meets business needs by presenting cash flow reports, product sales reports, profit and loss reports, and capital change reports. The adoption of this system is expected to improve the efficiency and quality of PT. Tirta Boga's financial reporting, support better decision-making, and accelerate the overall business process.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Financial Report Information System
Keyword: financial statements; information Systems; administrator
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Poverty levels are influenced by factors such as a lack of adequate employment opportunities or a job that is unable to provide for family and children. In addition, one reason why the poverty problem has not been resolved is that survey results show that government assistance often does not match the needs of the population. Furthermore, the distribution of social assistance carried out by the government is also not on target and uneven. This could be caused by inaccurate validation data. The purpose of this study is to identify the results of K-means Clustering with primary data obtained from the Data and Information Technology Center of the DKI Jakarta Provincial Social Service and group the poverty level in DKI Jakarta Province using the K-means Clustering method. The research method is based on the use of the K-means clustering algorithm. The conclusion drawn is that the use of the K-Means Clustering method can be applied to group poverty clusters in DKI Jakarta Province. In the testing process on 8000 DKI Jakarta population data, 14 data were obtained. The test was carried out with the number of tested clusters K = 4. Calculating the distance of each data to the initial centroid using the Euclidean Distance equation. The results obtained were the 1st centroid 14.966629547095765 and the 2nd centroid 22.045407685048602. From the 11 iterations processed, the clustering results were obtained, namely the 3rd iteration. Because the 3rd iteration was chosen as the most suitable for several main reasons. First, the centroids did not change much after this iteration, indicating that the algorithm had achieved stability. Second, there was a significant decrease in inertia, indicating that the total distance from the points to their centroids had been optimally minimized. Finally, visual validation showed that the data had been well clustered according to the calculated centroids.
Judul Paper: Poverty Level Clustering Using the K-Means Method in DKI Jakarta
Keyword: clustering; k-means; data mining; poverty in Jakarta
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Transportation is a means or vehicle commonly used by some people in Indonesia to move goods or people from one place to another. Transportation is essential for daily activities, but over time, congestion has become common in large cities like Jakarta. Accidents are often caused by overuse of transportation in an area. Therefore, the government has urged people, especially in densely populated urban areas, to use public transportation. There are many types of public transportation, from public transportation to the currently trending online transportation, with many developers and companies from both domestic and international. With the many online transportation options, user review data is needed to assess user satisfaction levels or comments from applications such as Gojek and InDrive. Therefore, a sentiment analysis was conducted on user review data from Gojek and InDrive applications collected from the Google Play Store platform in June 2024 using Google Play Store scraping. The dirty data obtained was cleaned through preprocessing and labeled using lexicon-based methods. After that, the data was split to produce training and testing data. After obtaining the training data, the weight per word is calculated using TF-IDF and later the testing data will be classified using the K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) algorithm into two separate labels, namely positive and negative. That in testing using K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN), using the same k, namely k = 3, the accuracy obtained on the gojek application dataset is 72% using a data ratio of 80:20 from 860 data, while the accuracy obtained on the indrive application dataset is 85% using a ratio of 80:20 from 1477 data.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of Gojek and Indrive User Reviews on Google Playstore Using the K-Nearest Neighbor Algorithm
Keyword: gojek; indrive; analisis sentimen; k-nearest neighbor(knn); text mining
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Education plays a crucial role in improving the quality of Human Resources (HR) to support a country's development. The importance of education as a development indicator is also evident in the inclusion of education as one of the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). However, education in Indonesia remains unequal, particularly at the Senior High School (SMA) level, which exhibits lower enrollment compared to Elementary School (SD) and Junior High School (SMP). This study will categorize provinces in Indonesia based on education indicators at the Senior High School (SMA) level. This study uses the Cross-Industry Standard Process for Data Mining (CRISP-DM) method as a reference for the data mining process. This study utilizes a clustering algorithm to cluster provinces by comparing several algorithms, including K-Means, Agglomerative, and K-Medoids. The comparison results show that the Agglomerative algorithm performs better than other algorithms. The parameters used in the Agglomerative model are the Average linkage method and the Euclidean distances metric. The results show that the use of the Agglomerative algorithm produces two clusters with the lowest Davies–Bouldin Index (DBI) value of 0.497. Cluster 1 consists of 33 provinces with higher education levels, while Cluster 2 consists of one province with a lower education level, namely Papua. These results indicate significant inequality in the quality of education in Indonesia.
Judul Paper: Application of the Agglomerative Clustering Algorithm to Group Provinces in Indonesia Based on Education Indicators
Keyword: education indicators; high school (SMA); crisp-dm; agglomerative clustering
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Indonesian cuisine is not just food, but rather an Indonesian cultural identity rich in flavor and diversity. However, amidst the rapid development of the times, there is minimal interest among young people in learning traditional recipes and a lack of tools that can help preserve traditional recipes, which can threaten the sustainability of Indonesia's culinary richness. This research responds to this challenge by developing a mobile-based application containing Indonesian recipes called MANGAN (Regional Food) as a solution to promote and preserve Indonesian cuisine. By using the Multimedia Development Life Cycle (MDLC) approach, the MANGAN application was successfully produced with a colorful display, compatibility with Android OS version 8 and above, and presents recipes from various regions in Indonesia. Innovative features such as the explore menu, favorite menu, and creator profile are included to increase the appeal of young people to cooking traditional dishes. In this research, there are several stages such as the concept stage discussing the background and objectives of the application, with a focus on Indonesian society, especially young people, to encourage learning and preservation of Indonesian cuisine. The application design includes user flow and rough sketches, while material collection involves collecting images and icons from trusted sources. The assembly stage implements the design using the JAVA programming language. The pilot phase involved distributing questionnaires to several young Indonesians to gather feedback on the MANGAN app. The final phase involved distributing the app for use by the Indonesian public, especially young people. MANGAN is expected to shift young people's perceptions of traditional cuisine, provide easily accessible information, and encourage creativity in cooking. Thus, MANGAN can be an effective solution for promoting and preserving Indonesian cuisine, as well as helping to change young people's perceptions of Indonesia's rich traditional culinary heritage.
Judul Paper: Multimedia Development Life Cycle Method in Making Archipelago Recipe Applications to Preserve Indonesian Culture
Keyword: Indonesian cuisine; mobile-based applications; multimedia development life cycle
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: In 2022, West Java experienced an increase in crime rates. According to data from the Central Statistics Agency (BPS), West Java ranked ninth in Indonesia for crime in 2021. Furthermore, according to the Coordinating Ministry for Political, Legal, and Security Affairs (Kemenko Polhukam), West Java experienced a 69 percent spike in crime rates in 2022, ranking fifth in Indonesia. The purpose of this study is to use a data mining approach to group regencies/cities in West Java based on crime rates, thus assisting local police in mapping and implementing more effective and decisive crime prevention and enforcement, thereby reducing crime rates in West Java. The research data used is crime data in West Java from 2019 to 2021, covering nine types of crimes: theft, fraud, assault, arson, rape, drug trafficking/abuse, gambling, murder, and human trafficking. The analysis method uses the K-Medoids algorithm with Rapidminer tools to group crime patterns into groups that have similar characteristics. Grouping is done based on certain attributes such as 9 types of crimes and the districts/cities where the crimes occurred. The results of this study can be stated as accurate because the final results of using tools and manual calculations get the same results, with the results in the form of clustering of district/city status divided into 2 clusters, namely safe and vulnerable with a DBI value of 0.761. This study obtained the results, namely, the safe cluster consists of 3 districts/cities, including Kuningan Regency, Pangandaran Regency, and Banjar City while the vulnerable cluster consists of 16 districts/cities, including Bandung Regency, West Bandung Regency, Bekasi Regency, Bogor Regency, Ciamis Regency, Cianjur Regency, Cirebon Regency, Garut Regency, Indramayu Regency, Karawang Regency, Majalengka Regency, Purwakarta Regency, Subang Regency, Sukabumi Regency, Sumedang Regency, and Tasikmalaya Regency.
Judul Paper: Clustering of Crime in West Java Province Using the K-Medoids Algorithm
Keyword: data mining; clustering; k-medoids; crime
Jurnal: Bit (Fakultas Teknologi Informasi Universitas Budi Luhur)

Abstrak: The main problem in this research is that there have been threats and attacks on computer networks and Administrators or network managers have difficulty in detecting and monitoring the network for 24 hours. The research was conducted to test and analyze in order to obtain attack and threat data as evidence that occurs on computer networks and overcome them; develop a network security system using network forensics so that it can help protect the system in maintaining security on the network; as well as detect and handle possible attacks early on so as to minimize attacks on the network security system. This research shows that: 1) through the analysis of evidence of infiltration Firewall Filter will block IP Addresses suspected of sending abnormal data packets on the network system; 2) the methods applied by network forensics include Detection, Checking, Analysis, Notification and Action; 3) The Network Forensics developed is able to detect and block when an attack/infiltration occurs so that after implementing real-time email notifications, it is also necessary for action/action, namely network monitoring that can make it easier for administrators to monitor the network system or know any changes that occur in the SD Muhammadiyah 1 Jakarta network using the Telegram Application.
Judul Paper: Network Security System Development Using Network Forensics
Keyword: network forensics; network security system
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: Population administration plays a crucial role in Indonesia, as it is involved in various activities. At the local government level, the Population and Civil Registration Office is responsible for this. In West Jakarta, the Population and Civil Registration Sub-Department is the government agency responsible for technical matters related to population administration. Based on 2020 data, the population of West Jakarta reached 2,434,511. The Sub-Department is responsible for providing services to the public, which involves various responses and opinions from the public. Some opinions are positive and constructive, while others feel dissatisfied with the services provided or do not meet expectations. This study aims to analyze public views on the administrative services of the Population and Civil Registration Sub-Department in the West Jakarta City Administration using a machine learning approach, with the CountVectorizer extraction feature and the K-Nearest Neighbor algorithm. The dataset used comes from an online form accessible to the public. The results of the analysis of 386 reviews showed that there were 311 (80.57%) positive reviews and 75 (19.43%) negative reviews with the best testing carried out using a K value of 3, with an accuracy rate of 83%, precision of 82%, and recall of 100%.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of West Jakarta Population and Civil Registration Department Service Reviews Using the K-Nearest Neighbor Algorithm
Keyword: sentiment analysis; dukcapil; ID card; service; Admin; population administration; countvectorizer; k-nearest neighbor
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Data mining can be utilized in various disciplines, such as the Solo Latri Grocery Store, to boost sales and determine grocery sales. The current problem is that determining grocery sales at the Solo Latri Grocery Store cannot determine customer purchasing patterns or the number of customers making grocery purchases simultaneously. This research seeks to develop a web-based application that integrates the Apriori algorithm into the staple food product bundling recommendation process. The Solo Latri Grocery Store will create an association model or rule to increase sales. By utilizing the CRISP-DM method, it is possible to obtain important information regarding concurrent transaction patterns using the Apriori algorithm. This investigation is supported by a sales transaction dataset for the period February 1 to April 20, 2023. The results show that the Apriori algorithm with a minimum support value of 50% and a minimum confidence value of 50% produces seven best item set combinations. The best results are a support value of 95.38 percent, a confidence value of 100 percent, and a lift ratio of 1.97.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Application Using Apriori for Bundling Recommendations for Basic Food Products
Keyword: Data Mining; Apriori Algorithm; Rule Association; Product Bundling
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Sukabumi Regency is one of the regencies in West Java that has several facilities and infrastructure, one of which is public open spaces that are useful places for activities for the daily needs and interests of the general public such as the town squares namely Cisaat Square, Palabuhanratu Square, Jampang Kulon Square, Purabaya Square and Cicurug Square. However, in Sukabumi Regency there are still some town squares that are not well maintained so that there are articles or opinions from visitors who are not good about the town square. Therefore, it is necessary to develop or evaluate by the local government to make public open spaces in Sukabumi Regency even better. Before carrying out development and evaluation, data information or analysis related to public opinion on the public open spaces is needed, one of which is by conducting sentiment analysis. This study conducted a public sentiment analysis of the town square as a public open space in Sukabumi Regency using the Naïve Bayes algorithm in conducting sentiment analysis and data taken from visitor reviews of the place in the 2019-2023 period on the Google Maps website and obtained 2698 sentiment data consisting of 2254 positive sentiment data and 444 negative sentiment data with the accuracy results of the algorithm used in the model created which had an accuracy of 92%, a precision value of 90%, a recall value of 53% and a fi-score of 67%. The frequency of words obtained from the results of sentiment analysis found the 5 most frequently appearing words based on their sentiment class, namely positive sentiments are steady, good, clean, hang out and nice. While the 5 negative word frequencies are garbage, dirty, slum, traffic jam and order. The results of this study related to sentiment analysis are expected to help the local government, especially the Land and Spatial Planning Office of Sukabumi Regency to be used as information as reference material or recommendations for the development and evaluation of public open space objects in Sukabumi Regency in the future.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Naïve Bayes Algorithm for Sentiment Analysis towards the Square as a Public Open Space in Sukabumi Regency
Keyword: sentiment analysis; public open space; square; Naïve Bayes
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Chatbot advancements have been widely adopted by various companies as support for customer service. Chatbot itself is a technology that simulates or imitates human-like conversations through text messages. Essentially, the development of the Chatbot system in this study aims to facilitate users who want to learn programming in the Python programming language. Although there are already web-based applications for this purpose, namely Google Colab, the interface of this web application is difficult to use when programming on the small screens of mobile devices. With this background problem, the author developed a Chatbot system that can assist users in programming Python via WhatsApp. Execution of program code sent via WhatsApp is implemented by utilizing the Python programming language feature to execute program code in string form. In addition, the author provides a program code management feature for multiple users, so that this Chatbot system can be used by many users simultaneously.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a Python Programming Environment Using the Chatbot Method on the WhatsApp Platform
Keyword: Chatbot; Python; Whatsapp; Teknologi; Software
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: Almost all organizations have made information technology a necessity and essential for the organization in carrying out various business processes, including PT Kimia Farma Tbk. KIFEST is an integrated employee information system application for Kimia Farma's internal employees that displays all applications on one main application page. With easy access to these applications, of course, threats and risks are possible. These risks will result in losses for a company, so it is important to carry out existing risk management by identifying and measuring them. The purpose of this study is to analyze the risk management of the KIFEST Information System. To conduct the risk management analysis, the ISO 31000 method was used. The results of this study obtained 27 possible risks with 5 risk levels. The risk levels are ranked from highest to lowest, the list of risk management analysis results can be used as a benchmark and basis for decision making, with recommendations for treatment suggestions in the form of mitigation and risk sharing.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Risk Management in the Kimia Farma Employee Self Technology Information System
Keyword: kimia farma employee self technology; manajemen risiko; sistem informasi; ISO 31000
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: A guava variety called Crystal Guava shows potential for development in Indonesia due to its suitability to the soil, climate, and weather conditions in Indonesia, as well as increasing market demand. However, crystal guava plants remain vulnerable to pests and diseases that can inhibit growth and cause losses for farmers. If pest and disease attacks on crystal guava plants are not immediately diagnosed and treated, the consequences can include plant death, fruit damage, and a significant decrease in production. This study developed an expert system application that aims to assist farmers in diagnosing pests and diseases in crystal guava plants. In this study, the Certainty Factor Method is used as a reasoning tool to estimate the level of confidence in diagnosing pests and diseases that attack crystal guava plants. The Certainty Factor algorithm processes input uncertainty values ​​from users using single premises and conclusions to produce diagnostic values ​​in the form of percentages. The expert system is supported by 8 knowledge bases containing information related to pests and diseases in crystal guava plants. The expert system built shows that the system is able to diagnose root rot disease with a confidence value of 97.60%.
Judul Paper: Expert System for Diagnosing Pests and Diseases of Crystal Guava Plants Applying the Certainty Factor Method
Keyword: diagnosis of pests and diseases of crystal guava plants; expert system; certainty factor method
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Information is the result of processing data and facts that can be understood and conveyed to describe a situation or condition. Currently, information is important and is needed in various fields. Information is very useful for describing a condition, such as in the world of cooperation, information is needed to provide an overview of partners who will collaborate. International Office is an information website managed by the Institute for Cooperation and International Relations (LKHI) to provide various information about the Muhammadiyah University of Sukabumi (UMMI) to all partners who collaborate. In addition to providing information to partners, the International Office is also useful for providing information on international activities that can be followed by students and making it easier for lecturers to find information on activity data. After several years of operation, the International Office experienced a decline in users due to the website no longer being suitable for current user interests and needs. This study aims to increase user interest and attraction to the website by conducting a deeper understanding of user characteristics and needs using the User Persona approach. Where from the understanding of the User Persona approach, researchers can understand more deeply the needs and desires of users towards the website which are then used as a basis for redesigning the User Interface (UI) and User Experience (UX) to provide an overview of the implementation of user characteristics and needs. After the UI/UX redesign in accordance with the understanding of the interests that users want, this research produces a more attractive website appearance so that there is an increase in interest by 21% and a liking for the appearance by 18% and provides an overview of the implementation to make it easier for developers when making changes to the website.
Judul Paper: UI/UX Design of the Muhammadiyah University of Sukabumi International Office Website Using a User Persona Approach
Keyword: User Interface; User Experience; User Persona; Figma
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: In carrying out its duties, Human Resources Development (HRD) assisted by staff and admin of KJPP NDR has a problem concerning the confidentiality of important documents or work reports to be maintained by unauthorized parties. Due to the lack of information on how to obtain documents and to make it easier for an HRD to carry out their duties by providing assessments for employees with a better system, a web-based Employee Assessment Application was created at KJPP NDR. The purpose of this research is to create a web-based application. The application of the AES 256 cryptographic algorithm functions as a security for important documents in the form of assessment data made into scores/numbers obtained from 6 Employee Assessment Criteria Data. The criteria data are in the form of Responsibility, Communication Skills, Attendance, Initiative, Discipline and Creativity. During the encryption and decryption process of 32 bytes/characters, the AES 256 cryptographic algorithm is used with a comparison method and a key with the same length or symmetric key. The web-based PHP programming language is used to create this document security application.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES-256) Cryptographic Algorithm to Secure the Employee Assessment Database at KJPP NDR
Keyword: AES 256; document; HRD; KJPP NDR; Cryptography
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: CRM is the process of building relationships to acquire and retain customers in order to gain profits. One example of communication in CRM can be seen in the field of education, namely schools in establishing relationships with students' parents. SMP Negeri 18 Kota Tangerang is one of the formal education centers in Indonesia that prioritizes parents' satisfaction with school services. Problems faced include parents not being updated with school information and their children's academic progress. In addition, sometimes summons from homeroom teachers addressed to students' parents are not delivered due to the negligence of the children who often forget. Therefore, a computerized system is needed to assist the process of delivering information to students' parents. This study will design a website using the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) approach. The research was conducted through the framework of dynamic CRM method, which is a series of stages in implementing CRM. Data collection in this study was carried out through interviews, environmental observations, and documentation. Modeling used UML, and PHP as a programming language. This study resulted in an e-CRM system that can improve information services from SMP Negeri 18 Kota Tangerang to students' parents. The final product is an e-CRM model with features derived from this research, including information creation, grade input, mail delivery, and the submission of criticism and suggestions. A report printing feature is available for principals to evaluate school services.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Dynamic CRM Framework in Improving Information Services for Parents of Students at SMPN 18 Tangerang
Keyword: customer relationship management; framework dinamic of CRM; layanan sekolah
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: The Android-based Posyandu Activity Information System is a technology solution designed to support the efficient and effective management and reporting of Posyandu activities. This study aims to develop a mobile application that can assist Posyandu officers in recording, monitoring, and reporting Posyandu activity data. The development method used is the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method with a prototype approach. The developed application has key features including recording Posyandu participant data, activity schedules, monitoring toddler growth and development, and routine reporting of Posyandu activities. Testing was conducted using functional testing scenarios and usability testing to ensure the quality and performance of the application. The evaluation results show that this application can help improve the efficiency of Posyandu activity management and make it easier for officers to track and report Posyandu activity data. This information system is expected to be a solution to support public health programs, especially in efforts to improve the quality of Posyandu services in the Kuranji area.
Judul Paper: ANDROID-BASED POSYANDU ACTIVITIES INFORMATION SYSTEM IN KURANJI
Keyword: Information Systems, Efficiency and effectiveness, Mobile Applications
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: PT HIPI has an IT division located at the head office and staffed by only one IT staff member. In practice, the IT division often encounters challenges, including poorly organized requests for goods or services from users, a lack of urgency for each task received, and a lack of documentation for each completed task. Based on these challenges, a web-based helpdesk information system was designed to register and organize each user request. This information system was created using the PHP programming language and a MySQL database. The main function of this helpdesk information system is to enable users to create tickets to the IT division for IT-related requests or procurement. Tickets created through the application can be organized and tagged based on their urgency level and completion status. Reports on each completed task can be downloaded periodically through the application. This application makes it easier for users to create requests and monitor the completion status of their requests. Furthermore, this application can assist the IT division in managing each incoming request so that all received requests are well organized. The helpdesk information system was tested using UAT testing on users. Based on this test, the results obtained were 86% so it can be concluded that the helpdesk information system designed at PT HIPI in this study obtained very good results.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS DAN PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI HELPDESK BERBASIS WEB MENGGUNAKAN FRAMEWORK CODEIGNITER PADA PT HARAPAN INTI PERSADA INDAH (HIPI)
Keyword: Helpdesk, Ticketing System, Monitoring System, User Acceptance Test, Equivalence Partitioning
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: The development of digital technology has had a significant impact on various aspects of life, including education. Mobile learning, which is learning based on mobile devices such as smartphones and tablets, offers a new, flexible and adaptive way to support students' learning processes. This study aims to analyze the influence of mobile learning on student learning outcomes in the digital era. Using a literature review method, this study examines various studies related to the use of mobile learning in learning at the school level.
