The results of the study indicate that mobile learning significantly increases student motivation, engagement, and understanding of learning materials. Mobile learning enables more interactive and personalized learning through the use of multimedia, so students can learn anytime and anywhere. However, challenges faced in implementing mobile learning, such as limited internet access and potential distractions from non-learning applications, require special attention. This study concludes that with adequate infrastructure support and appropriate usage guidelines, mobile learning can be an effective tool for improving student learning outcomes in the digital era.
Judul Paper: THE INFLUENCE OF MOBILE LEARNING ON STUDENT LEARNING OUTCOMES IN THE DIGITAL ERA
Keyword: Mobile Learning, Digital Era, Education
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: PT. Carton Scheduling XYZ Problems, Delays and Losses Haunt. PT. XYZ, a carton manufacturing company, is faced with obstacles in meeting consumer demand in a timely manner. This results in losses for companies and consumers. This problem originates from a production scheduling system that is not yet optimal, namely the FCFS system which prioritizes the order of product arrival without considering the duration of work. As a result, products with short lead times have to wait a long time in queues, causing long downtime on the factory floor. The solution to overcome this problem is the use of the genetic algorithm method, a heuristic search algorithm inspired by the process of biological evolution.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF HYBRID GENETIC ALGORITHM TO OPTIMIZE COMPLEX PRODUCTION SCHEDULING AT PT. XYZ
Keyword: Production,, Scheduling, Hybrid Genetic Algorithms
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: The Nusantara Bakery Company is a company operating in the food sector, selling and producing bread. Currently, Nusantara Bakery still uses a conventional data management system for recording production results and recording sales using paper media to record every order and production transaction for sold or expired bread. In the current digital era, the use of Android devices and information technology has become so widespread and efficient. Therefore, this research will design an Android application for processing ordering and production data at the Nusantara Bakery bakery using the waterfall method. The aim of this research is to create an Android application that makes it easier for companies to record production and sales results and makes it easier for sales to order goods. The design of using this application consists of an administrator who makes it easier to manage production data, orders and payments computerized easily using an Android mobile or computer so that the business process runs faster because sales can place orders or request goods directly from the Android mobile application. . Assist leaders in monitoring or evaluating existing business developments at the Nusantra Bakery company.
Judul Paper: Goods Invontory Management System at Nusantara Bakery Company Based on Android
Keyword: Information System, Inventory, Android Application
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: The Android-based Posyandu Activity Information System is a technology solution designed to support the efficient and effective management and reporting of Posyandu activities. This study aims to develop a mobile application that can assist Posyandu officers in recording, monitoring, and reporting Posyandu activity data. The development method used is the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method with a prototype approach. The developed application has key features including recording Posyandu participant data, activity schedules, monitoring toddler growth and development, and routine reporting of Posyandu activities. Testing was conducted using functional testing scenarios and usability testing to ensure the quality and performance of the application. The evaluation results show that this application can help improve the efficiency of Posyandu activity management and make it easier for officers to track and report Posyandu activity data. This information system is expected to be a solution to support public health programs, especially in efforts to improve the quality of Posyandu services in the Kuranji area.
Judul Paper: ANDROID-BASED POSYANDU ACTIVITIES INFORMATION SYSTEM IN KURANJI
Keyword: Information Systems, Efficiency and effectiveness, Mobile Applications
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The significant growth in the number of vehicles in Indonesia each year increases the need for efficient and secure solutions for vehicle access management. This study examines the application of Optical Character Recognition (OCR) technology on license plates to improve efficiency and security in vehicle access, especially in areas that require strict control such as offices and shopping centers. The method used is an experimental quantitative approach to test the accuracy level of OCR in recognizing characters on vehicle license plates. The results show that OCR is able to achieve an average accuracy level of 72% in detecting license plates and the area of ​​origin of the vehicle. This technology has great potential to improve access efficiency and security, reduce queues, and facilitate parking area management.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF NUMBER PLATE OCR TECHNOLOGY TO IMPROVE VEHICLE ACCESS EFFICIENCY AND SAFETY
Keyword: OCR Technology, Vehicle Access, Efficiency, Security, License Plates
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: This study aims to optimize the ESP32-CAM based home security system by integrating YOLOv4 and image pre-processing techniques (Gaussian filter, Median filter, Histogram Equalization, CLAHE) to improve object detection accuracy in various lighting conditions. Testing was conducted by comparing the performance of YOLOv4 with and without pre-processing in terms of precision, recall, and F1-score, as well as measuring image quality through SNR, PSNR, MSE, and SSIM. The system was tested in real-time in various conditions (morning, afternoon, evening) and integrated with the Telegram application for notifications. The results show that YOLOv4 with pre-processing has a higher precision (0.98) than without pre-processing (0.9425), although the recall is lower (0.551). Pre-processing improves detection stability, especially in low-light conditions such as nighttime, but reduces recall and F1-score. In real-time notification testing, YOLOv4 with pre-processing provides faster delivery time, especially at close to medium distances (0.8-1.1 seconds). PIR sensors are proven to be less reliable due to their slower transmission time (2-4 seconds). In conclusion, the integration of YOLOv4 and image preprocessing significantly improves the detection performance and efficiency of the ESP32-CAM-based home security system, especially in providing faster and more accurate notifications under various lighting conditions, making it a more effective solution for modern security systems.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF YOLOv4 WITH IMAGE PRE-PROCESSING FILTERS FOR OPTIMIZATION OF ESP32-CAM BASED HOME SECURITY MONITORING SYSTEM
Keyword: YOLOv4, Pre Processing Gambar, ESP32-CAM
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Jalan Raya Mayjen Yono Suwoyo is a road located in the center of Surabaya with a high traffic volume and unstable subgrade conditions. Damage to this road can disrupt the comfort and safety of road users. Therefore, it is important to understand the types of damage, the extent of damage, and how to handle the damage. The Pavement Condition Index method is used as a tool to evaluate the level of road pavement damage. This method can identify, classify, and determine the type of damage and the pavement condition index value, as well as provide repair methods according to the damage to the road pavement.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS KERUSAKAN JALAN MENGGUNAKAN METODE PAVEMENT CONDITION INDEX (PCI) (PADA JL MAYJEN YONO SUWOYO, SURABAYA)
Keyword: Road damage, Pavement Condition Index, Type of road damage
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: Surabaya City has several Type B Terminals, one of which is the Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal located on Jalan Joyoboyo Surabaya, East Java. The Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal has an area of ​​11,134 m2. The Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal operates from 06.00-22.00 WIB and is guarded 24 hours a day. The problem found at the Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal is that many of the facilities there are not used properly. The purpose of this study is to determine the level of passenger satisfaction with the performance of the Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal using the Importance Performance Analysis (IPA) method. The results of this study indicate that there are several indicators that do not meet passenger satisfaction in the reliability variable -0.11 in question (X1.1) and -0.01 in question (X1.3), the Responsiveness variable -0.06 in question (X2.1) and -0.07 in question (X2.3), the physical appearance variable (Tangible) -0.01 in question (X3.2), the Assurance variable -0.13 in question (X4.2), the Empathy variable -0.11 in question (X5.3).
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN METODE IPA (IMPORTACE PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS) UNTUK MENGUKUR TINGKAT KEPUASAN PENUMPANG PADA KINERJA TERMINAL INTERMODA JOYOBOYO SURABAYA JAWA TIMUR
Keyword: Passenger Satisfaction, Joyoboyo Intermodal Terminal, Importance Performance Analysis, Surabaya
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: Supplier/seller selection is a multi-criteria problem where each criterion has different importance and uncertain information. Supplier selection based on low-price offers is no longer efficient. PT. AM faces obstacles related to the number of incoming packages that do not match the data and delivery in fulfilling orders, as well as the increasing percentage of late deliveries. The instability that occurs is not necessarily due to other factors that tend to be far from the company's plans and estimates. Therefore, a measurable evaluation is necessary in the company's decision-making regarding supplier/seller selection. This research approach uses the Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP) in the decision-making support process for a complex and measurable problem. This complexity and measurability use fuzzy to accommodate the uncertainty that occurs during decision-making. Based on the results of calculations that have been carried out using the Fuzzy AHP method and assessment using a rating scale, it is known that PT. AM obtained the calculation results of each criterion in this study with quality criteria of 0.2829, delivery criteria of 0.2096, price criteria of 0.1457, service criteria of 0.0984, packing ability criteria of 0.1466, and seller characteristics criteria of 0. 1172. Based on these calculations, the quality criteria are the main priority in selecting sellers.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF THE DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM USING THE NINJA POINT V3 APPLICATION USING THE FUZZY-AHP APPROACH FOR COMPANY EVALUATION
Keyword: Supplier/Seller Selection, FAHP, Quality Criteria.
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: The utilization of technology in the tuition fee payment system at the Digital Technology University is still not optimal, because the payment system used is still manual. Student tuition fee payment transactions are still carried out by transfer but the data input is manual. The design stage includes the design of tables, databases and forms. This payment system is expected to support the work of financial employees to create reports quickly, efficiently, and accurately. This information system is designed using the PHP Programming Language and MySQL as a database visualized using the UML model. The research method used is a qualitative method with case study research on the Digital Technology University campus. While data collection is carried out using observation, interviews and library methods. The conclusion of this study is that the PKL Proposal for a Digital-Based Payment Information System Using the PHP Programming Language at the Digital Technology University is expected to be implemented and can facilitate BAAK in processing payment data quickly and actually, and be able to handle deficiencies that occurred before the system was used.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE-BASED SISFOMBA DESIGN USING PHP PROGRAMMING LANGUAGE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY
Keyword: MySQL, Payment, PHP, Website.
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The MTQ Mobile Media Center (Musabaqah Tilawatil Quran) is an Android-based application designed for the Quran Tilawatil Development Institute (LPTQ) in West Sumatra. This application aims to provide solutions to overcome problems in organizing MTQ events in the region. In the current era of globalization, the use of information technology and computer devices has become an inevitable part of almost all aspects of life. LPTQ as the institution responsible for managing MTQ events in West Sumatra is no exception to this. Therefore, the dissemination of information and efficient administrative management are very important in ensuring the success of MTQ events. The MTQ Mobile Media Center is here as a solution to meet these needs. This application offers various features specifically designed to facilitate MTQ event management, including information dissemination, participant management, activity scheduling, score collection, and monitoring match results. In addition, this application also provides access to training materials, study materials, and MTQ-related content that can be accessed by users. In designing the MTQ Mobile Media Center, design validation is necessary involving competent experts in their fields. Design validation aims to ensure that the application meets functional, aesthetic, safety, and user satisfaction requirements. Thus, it is hoped that the MTQ Mobile Media Center can be an effective tool in supporting the West Sumatra LPTQ in organizing MTQ events, improving management efficiency, and increasing participant participation.
Judul Paper: MOBILE MEDIA CENTER MTQ UNTUK LPTQ SUMATERA BARAT BERBASIS ANDROID
Keyword: Mobile Media Center MTQ, LPTQ West Sumatra, Android, Information Management
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: This study of production risks and behavior of hydroponic vegetable farmers aims to assess the risks of hydroponic vegetable production during 5 harvest periods, measuring the parameters of farmer behavior in facing risks. The research method is quantitative. Respondents numbered 5 people who were determined intentionally. Data analysis used the coefficient of variation [CV] method, and the Moscardi and de Janvry method to measure the parameters of farmer behavior in facing risks [Ks] by calculating the most real production input value. The results of the study show: 1] Production risk in hydroponic vegetable farming is categorized as low, because the Coefficient of Variation [CV] value obtained is 0.31% [less than 0.5], so hydroponic vegetable farming is low risk; 2] The most real production input for hydroponic vegetable farming in respondents is labor, with an unstandardized coefficient value of 3,670. This value shows a positive sign, meaning that the addition of labor can increase the risk of hydroponic vegetable production; 3] Parameters of hydroponic vegetable farmers in facing risks [K[s], found 2 respondents in the risk taker category, and 3 respondents in the risk averter category.
Judul Paper: RISK ANALYSIS OF HYDROPONIC VEGETABLE PRODUCTION USING THE COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION (KV) METHOD AND ASSESSMENT OF FARMERS' BEHAVIOR USING THE MOSCARDI AND DE JANVRY METHOD
Keyword: risk,, production,, vegetables,, hydroponics,, coefficient of variation,, farmer behavior
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: This study aims to test the effectiveness of the use of the talking stick method on the learning outcomes of fourth-grade science students at SDN 04 Madiun Lor. The research method used in this study is a quantitative approach with an experimental research method. The data source in this study was the fourth-grade students of SDN 04 Madiun Lor. This study used a data collection technique in the form of a test conducted at the end of the learning activity. In this study, the researcher used instruments in the form of teaching modules and evaluation questions with multiple choice types that were tested first before being used in the study. Data analysis used in the study consisted of prerequisite tests consisting of normality and homogeneity tests as well as hypothesis testing. The results of the study showed that the talking stick learning method was more effective to use and had an effect on learning outcomes in science learning in fourth-grade students of SDN 04 Madiun Lor when compared to the use of conventional learning methods.
Judul Paper: Error 500 (Server Error)!!1500.That’s an error.There was an error. Please try again later.That’s all we know.
Keyword: Effectiveness, Learning Outcomes, Science, Talking Stick Method.
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: The design of a quiz system using interactive multimedia that is run on a website platform aims to meet the needs of Database learning in the Informatics Management study program at Unes Padang. The presentation of materials and quizzes that have been held so far has not been effective and efficient. The objectivity of student quiz assessments has not been effective, efficient in its implementation. The technical presentation of materials and the process of implementing quizzes and assessments are still conventional and have not been integrated in real time. The design of the quiz system is run on an online website platform. The design method uses the System Development Life Cycle (SDLC) with a Waterfall model approach consisting of 5 stages, namely, a) Analysis b) Design c) Implementation d) Maintenance e) Planning. Multimedia design refers to the Multimedia Development Life Cycle (MDLC) method. The programming language used is PHP, and the database application uses MySql data processing. The system design tool uses the Unified Modeling Language (UML) method using 4 (four) diagrams according to design needs, namely Usecase Diagrams, Activity Diagrams, Sequence Diagrams, and Class Diagrams. This e-learning with interactive multimedia quizzes produces output documents in the form of learning outcome reports and quiz assessment results accurately and objectively.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING A WEB-BASED INTERACTIVE MULTIMEDIA QUIZ SYSTEM IN DATABASE COURSES
Keyword: Information systems, system design, web base, recapitulation of learning outcomes, UML, MYSQL
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: Choosing a car type often presents difficulties for users in determining which car is suitable. This car selection can be assisted by using a decision support system because a common problem is that it is not easy to determine the right car for the user. The Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP) method is a suitable method that can be used to provide recommendations for car types that can be chosen by someone. There are six criteria used in this study to assist AHP in calculating and providing alternatives. These criteria are Fuel Type, Engine Capacity, Passenger Capacity, Transmission, Safety Features, and Price. The results obtained from the AHP calculation after 20 trials on the system so that it can be known that the accuracy percentage of this system is 80%.
Judul Paper: CAR SELECTION DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM USING THE AHP (ANALYTICAL HIERARCHY PROCESS) METHOD
Keyword: Mobil, Sistem Pendukung, Keputusan, Analitycal Hierarchy Process (AHP)
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: In this digital era, Information Technology is developing very rapidly and has many benefits, so it greatly facilitates jobs that require data processing, recording and other things related to information systems. The recording system at the UHAMKA Information Technology Development Agency still uses manual methods, such as writing in books, and printing using a printer, this is very dangerous if the book or paper is exposed to water or torn. Therefore, in this study a web-based information system for recording assets and borrowing goods at the UHAMKA Information Technology Development Agency was designed. The methods used were observation and interviews as well as literature studies, using the Agile system development method. The development method with the Agile Development Method approach in developing the system, which emphasizes rapid adaptation to changes in the system. This recording system provides a display, number of goods, item data, borrower personal data, loan date and return date.
Judul Paper: INFORMATION SYSTEM FOR RECORDING ASSETS AND LENDING GOODS USING AGILE DEVELOPMENT METHODS AT BPTI UHAMKA
Keyword: Recording Information Systems, Multimedia Tools, Agile Methods
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

MOBILE MEDIA CENTER MTQ UNTUK LPTQ SUMATERA BARAT BERBASIS ANDROID
Harry Setya Hadi

Abstrak: This study aims to improve students' interest and learning outcomes in social studies at SMPN 4 Karang Anyar in the 2021/2022 academic year through the application of the Problem Based Learning (PBL) method. This study used a Classroom Action Research (CAR) design with two cycles, where each cycle consisted of two meetings. The subjects of this study were 30 ninth-grade students. Data collection methods used in this study included observation sheets, questionnaires, and documentation. Data analysis techniques used were observation to observe student and teacher learning activities, tests to measure student learning outcomes, and documentation. From the results of this study, it was found that students' interest in learning increased from 74.00% in cycle I to 82.2% in cycle II, resulting in an increase of 8.2%, which can be categorized as a very strong increase. Thus, it can be concluded that the Problem Based Learning method is effective in improving students' interest and learning outcomes in social studies for ninth-grade students at SMP Negeri 4 Karang Anyar in the 2021/2022 academic year.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE PROBLEM BASED LEARNING METHOD TO INCREASE INTEREST AND LEARNING RESULTS IN SCIENCES IN CLASS IX STUDENTS OF SMPN 4 KARANG ANYAR ACADEMIC YEAR 2021/2022
Keyword: Learning outcomes; Problem Based Learning (PBL); Interest; SMPN 4 Karanganyar.
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: This study aims to identify problems related to the management of physical Student Identity Cards (KTM) at Perwira Purbalingga University (UNPERBA) and design an information technology-based solution that can improve efficiency and convenience in higher education administration. The identified problems include the risk of damage and loss of physical KTMs and delays in the process of changing data on KTMs. Using observation methods and secondary data analysis, this study highlights the need for adopting a digital KTM solution based on a mobile website. The design of this system is expected to facilitate student access to KTMs, avoid the risk of damage and loss, and accelerate the process of data validation and changes. Through the implementation of this solution, UNPERBA is expected to improve administrative efficiency, provide better services to students, and contribute to digital transformation in the field of education. The results of the study are presented in a mobile web-based digital KTM system.
Judul Paper: SISTEM MANAJEMEN KARTU TANDA MAHASISWA DIGITAL BERBASIS MOBILE WEBSITE UNIVERSITAS PERWIRA PURBALINGGA
Keyword: system, Student Identity Card, Mobile Website, Waterfall Model
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Abstrak: This study explores the use of motion graphic animation video as an educational tool for elementary school students about the importance of early waste management. The goal is to provide students with a deeper understanding of waste, its processing, and environmental awareness. By focusing on aspects such as the definition of waste, the processing process, and its negative impacts, this study aims to provide more effective policy recommendations for waste management. It is hoped that by presenting information through motion graphics, students will be more engaged and understand issues surrounding waste better. This step is expected to raise awareness of the importance of good waste management practices from an early age, create a more sustainable school environment, and shape a generation that cares about the environment. Therefore, this study also assesses the level of student satisfaction with motion graphic animation video as an educational medium.
Judul Paper: MAKING ANIMATED MOTION GRAPHIC VIDEOS AS AN EDUCATIONAL MEDIA ON THE IMPORTANCE OF PROCESSING WASTE FROM AN EARLY TIME
Keyword: Educational Media, Motion Graphics, waste, Waste Processing
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: This study aims to develop learning media using educational games, namely the snakes and ladders game on the Hijaiyah letters for children volume 1 of the Kamila Qur'an House which can be played on Android Smartphones. The creation of game media is made so that children in learning Hijaiyah can be more fun. The method used in the development of this research media is the Luther method which consists of six stages, namely: concept, design, collection of materials, manufacture, testing, and distribution. The result of the development of the Luther method is the snakes and ladders hijaiyah game application or Ularji based on Adobe Animate that can be run on Android Smartphones. This application was tested through alpha testing, and the application function runs well. In addition, beta testing was also carried out with a percentage result of 88.4%, this shows that this game application is worthy of use and the Ularji game can be used as an alternative media and can also increase interest in learning the hijaiyah letters from the beginning.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF LEARNING MEDIA ON HIJAYIAH LETTER MATERIAL USING EDUCATIONAL GAMES BASED ON ADOBE ANIMATE
Keyword:
Learning Media, Games, Hijaiyah Letters, Adobe Animate
Abstract
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: Inventory is a list of all items belonging to an institution, whether a school, company, or government, used as a tool for its operational activities. SMK Negeri 1 Kaligondang is one of the reference schools in the Purbalingga area that carries out this activity. However, in its management, SMK Negeri 1 Kaligondang inventories tools and materials manually, namely by typing directly in Microsoft Excel. In addition, the data storage system is not centralized so that the head of the department cannot check the items in his own department. Therefore, a tool and material inventory system is needed to overcome this problem. In this study, the author designed and built a website-based inventory system at SMK N 1 Kaligondang. The creation of this system was carried out using the Rapid Application Development system development method. From the results of the Black Box test, it can be seen that the construction of this system is in accordance with the needs of the user, in addition, the features designed are appropriate and successful without experiencing obstacles. From the results of these tests, it can be concluded that the website-based inventory system at SMK Negeri 1 Kaligondang has been proven to be usable well and reaches a wider range of users and is suitable for implementation at SMK Negeri 1 Kaligondang.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF A WEBSITE-BASED INVENTORY SYSTEM FOR TOOLS AND MATERIALS AT SMK NEGERI 1 KALIGONDANG
Keyword: Inventaris, Rapid Application Development, Website
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This study aims to analyze and classify the population density levels of sub-districts in Banyumas Regency in 2021. This study uses secondary data from related agencies, namely the Banyumas Regency Central Statistics Agency, namely data on population and sub-district area in Banyumas Regency in 2021. These data were then analyzed using IBM SPSS statistics 25 software. Cluster analysis was carried out using the K-means clustering method. The results of the study show that there are 8 sub-districts with low population density levels, namely Lumbir, Wangon, Kebasen, Kemranjen, Sumpiuh, Gumelar, Pekuncen, and Kedungbanteng Districts. Three sub-districts with moderate population density levels are Ajibarang, Cilongok, and Sumbang Districts. Then there are 16 sub-districts with high population density, namely Jatilawang, Rawalo, Tambak, Somagede, Kalibagor, Banyumas, Patikraja, Purwojati, Karanglewas, Baturraden, Kembaran, Sokaraja, South Purwokerto, West Purwokerto, East Purwokerto, and North Purwokerto.
Judul Paper: CLUSTING DISTRICTS IN BANYUMAS DISTRICT BASED ON POPULATION NUMBER AND AREA AREA USING K-MEANS CLUSTERING METHOD ANALYSIS
Keyword: Population density, Cluster analysis, K-means clustering
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Abstrak: Inspection is an effort to detect and correct unsafe conditions in the workplace to prevent accidents. The purpose of inspections is to identify potential hazards, assess risks, and control safety. Reasons for inspections include safety, quality, compliance, maintenance, and product testing. Workplace accidents are caused by unsafe conditions, unsafe acts, and human interaction with the work environment. Pipeline inspections use ultrasonic testing methods to observe fluid damage. Residual Life Assessment is used to evaluate the remaining life of equipment. The UT method checks pipe thickness using four measurement points. Personal protective equipment (PPE) such as helmets and gloves is used to reduce the risk of accidents. The data collection process must be thorough and complete.
Judul Paper: PERHITUNGAN RESIDUAL LIFE ASSESMENT (RLA) DENGAN MENGGUNAKAN METODE ULTRASONIC TESTING (UT) TERHADAP HASIL INSPEKSI PADA PIPELINE GAS DI PT. XYZ
Keyword: Inspection, Safety, Ultrasonic testing, Residual Life Assessment, Maintenance
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Abstrak: The science literacy scores of students in Indonesia are in the low category. One of the causes is the selection of learning resources. Teaching materials as learning resources are learning tools needed in the teaching and learning process. The teaching materials used in Semarang City have an unbalanced science literacy content. The imbalance in the science literacy content in class VIII of SMP Negeri 24 Semarang is evidenced by the student learning outcomes in the Integrated Science subject. The purpose of this study was to determine the feasibility test and readability test of Integrated Science teaching materials based on science literacy with the theme of Application of Style in Life for the learning of class VIII students of SMP Negeri 24 Semarang. The type of research used is Research and Development (R and D) which consists of four stages: the stage of collecting information followed by making a product design, product revision with validation from two experts, then the product readability test to class VIII students of SMP Negeri 24 Semarang in the Integrated Science subject. The results of the study indicate that the Integrated Science teaching material product is very suitable for use with a percentage of five categories, namely 88.24% content suitability, 90.63% presentation, 94.23% language, 90.38% graphics, and 90.74%. The Integrated Science teaching material has an average readability level of 88.42%, so it is included in the easy to understand category.
Judul Paper: FEASIBILITY ANALYSIS OF SCIENTIFIC LITERACY-BASED TEACHING MATERIALS ON THE THEME OF STYLE
Keyword: scientific literacy, teaching materials, suitability, readability
Jurnal: Educational Technology Journal

Abstrak: Metal casting is a process that produces products, using greensand sand mold media. Greensand sand molds are easy to make and can be recycled and are cheaper. The main composition of greensand sand is silica sand, water, bentonite and additives. Additives have an important role in changing the properties of greensand molding sand, one of which is seacoal. This study aims to determine how the addition of seacoal additives affects the characteristics of greensand molds, while the composition by adding seacoal variations of 0.4%, 0.9%, and 1.8%. Molding sand tests carried out include testing water content, clay content, compressive strength and GFN. The standard composition of greensand sand was tested as the main standard, namely 0% (without using seacoal) compared to variations of greensand sand with the addition of seacoal. The test results showed changes in the test values ​​of water content and clay content which increased before adding seacoal compared to after adding 0.4% variation, but then there was an increase in the addition of 4%, 0.9% and 1.8% variations. For GFN test results decreased from all variations. Permeability testing showed an increase in the initial test value, but at variations of 4%, 0.9% and 1.8% the test value decreased.
Judul Paper: ANALISA PENGARUH PENAMBAHAN SEACOAL TERHADAP KARAKTERISTIK PASIR CETAK GREENSAND
Keyword: Greensand, Seacoal, Permeabilitas, GFN
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Abstrak: The purpose of this forecast is to determine the number of BPJS Kesehatan participants in the next five periods so that the Purwokerto government can predict the number of BPJS Kesehatan participants in the next five periods (October 2023, November 2023, December 2023, January 2024, and February 2024) and improve health services to address the surge in BPJS Kesehatan KC Purwokerto participant registrations. The data used is the number of participants in the period October 2022 - September 2023 which is then analyzed using the Double Exponential Smoothing method from Brown. The smoothing results obtained with an alpha of 0.4 and a MAPE value of 0.2641% which is classified as very accurate. The forecast results of the number of BPJS Kesehatan KC Purwokerto participants in the next five periods using the Double Exponential Smoothing method from Brown with an alpha of 0.4 in the October 2023 period were 1,338,709 people, the November 2023 period were 1,346,982 people, the December 2023 period were 1,355,255 people, the January 2024 period were 1,363,528 people, and the February 2024 period were 1,371,801 people.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE DOUBLE EXPONENTIAL SMOOTHING BROWN METHOD IN FORECASTING THE NUMBER OF PARTICIPANTS IN BPJS KESEHATAN KC PURWOKETO
Keyword: Health, Insurance, MAPE, Time Series
Jurnal: Bulletin of Social Informatics Theory and Application

Abstrak: Manual processing of archive data can hamper the performance of an agency, one of which is the Faculty of Science and Engineering, Perwira University, Purbalingga. Recording incoming and outgoing mail data using manual methods is feared that the letter data will be easily damaged or lost and the writing will be difficult to read by employees over time which will later lead to errors and have obstacles in terms of data security. Therefore, a computerized system is needed to handle the process of managing, disposing, archiving, and recapitulating incoming and outgoing mail reports so as to minimize errors or mistakes, data security and data loss. The Letter Management Information System is designed using PHP and MySQL. Because it is web-based, this application has the advantage of being easy to operate, the admin can manage it by logging in as a user so that it can manage incoming and outgoing mail and can search for data and print reports. The results obtained from the implementation of this Letter Management Application are to replace the conventional process to be digitalized so that it can run faster, more effectively and efficiently and can help the faculty in terms of archiving, letter administration, and providing information on incoming letter reports, outgoing letter reports and disposition.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF A WEB-BASED LETTER MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEM AT THE FACULTY OF SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING PERWIRA PURBALINGGA UNIVERSITY
Keyword: Mail Management, Archiving, PHP, MySQL
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: A vise is a mechanical tool commonly used to hold or clamp a workpiece by utilizing a threaded axis to open and close the jaws. The use of a vise in machining, sawing, drilling, and grinding processes. One type of vise needed today is a multiple axis bench vise. In this study, a design analysis of a 3-axis bench vise (2 rotational axes and 1 translational axis) was carried out using the finite element method. The vise design was created using Autodesk Inventor, with a jaw opening of 5 inches, a clamping jaw width of 5 inches, and a jaw opening depth of 3.25 inches. The vise material is FC 25 cast iron. The design variation of the vise is in the thickness of the moving jaw part that is in contact with the fixed jaw. The clamping force is calculated based on the transporter shaft specifications. Finite element simulations use Simulia Abaqus. The simulation results are Von Mises stress, which will be compared with the yield stress of FC 25 cast iron to produce a safety factor value. The safety factor of the multi-axis vise design when static loads are applied. All maximum stresses from the design variations are above the yield stress of the vise material. This results in a safety factor value below 2. Based on the resulting safety factor value, the vise is not safe from plastic deformation. Therefore, a reassessment of the design or materials used is necessary.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF MULTI-AXIS VICE DESIGN USING FINITE ELEMENT METHOD
Keyword: greensand, seacoal, permeabilitas, GFN
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Manual processing of archive data can hamper the performance of an agency, one of which is the Faculty of Science and Engineering, Perwira University, Purbalingga. Recording incoming and outgoing mail data using manual methods is feared that the letter data will be easily damaged or lost and the writing will be difficult to read by employees over time which will later lead to errors and have obstacles in terms of data security. Therefore, a computerized system is needed to handle the process of managing, disposing, archiving, and recapitulating incoming and outgoing mail reports so as to minimize errors or mistakes, data security and data loss. The Letter Management Information System is designed using PHP and MySQL. Because it is web-based, this application has the advantage of being easy to operate, the admin can manage it by logging in as a user so that it can manage incoming and outgoing mail and can search for data and print reports. The results obtained from the implementation of this Letter Management Application are to replace the conventional process to be digitalized so that it can run faster, more effectively and efficiently and can help the faculty in terms of archiving, letter administration, and providing information on incoming letter reports, outgoing letter reports and disposition.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF A WEB-BASED LETTER MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEM AT THE FACULTY OF SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING PERWIRA PURBALINGGA UNIVERSITY
Keyword: Mail Management, Archiving, PHP, MySQL
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The development of the manufacturing industry is increasingly rapid in the country, one of which is the manufacturing industry that produces machine components that are mostly made of metal. The heat treatment process is one way to improve the mechanical properties of steel. This study aims to determine the effect of variations in quenching media and holding time on the hardness value and microstructure of S45C steel. The heating process with a temperature of 850°C, and quenching media with SAE 10W-30, SAE 15W-40, and SAE 20W-50 oil media with holding time of 30 minutes, and 50 minutes. The results of the highest hardness value of 31.30 HRC at a holding time of 30 minutes and 31.87 HRC at a holding time of 50 minutes. From the results of the analysis it is known that the oil cooling media has a significant effect on increasing the hardness value. Testing the microstructure of the oil cooling media provides rapid cooling, which results in different characteristics and properties of the material.
Judul Paper: THE EFFECT OF COOLING MEDIA VARIATIONS ON THE MECHANICAL PROPERTIES AND MICRO STRUCTURE OF S45C STEEL
Keyword: Mechanical Properties, S45C Steel, Hardness Value, Microstructure
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

The heat treatment process is one way to improve the mechanical properties of steel. This study aims to determine the effect of variations in quenching media and holding time on the hardness value and microstructure of S45C steel. The heating process with a temperature of 850°C, and quenching media with SAE 10W-30, SAE 15W-40, and SAE 20W-50 oil media with holding time of 30 minutes, and 50 minutes. Judul Paper: THE EFFECT OF COOLING MEDIA VARIATIONS ON THE MECHANICAL PROPERTIES AND MICRO STRUCTURE OF S45C STEEL
Keyword: Mechanical Properties, S45C Steel, Hardness Value, Microstructure
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: Friction Stir Spot Welding (FSSW) is a derivative process of Friction Stir Welding (FSW). Hook defects that occur in FSSW welding can be overcome by providing an interlayer. The method used is by adding an electroplating interlayer with pin and pinless variations on the toll. Shear tensile testing of joints with pins and without interlayers produces a value of 4.4 kN. The results of the Vickers hardness test obtained the highest value on the pin profile and without the use of an interlayer of 132 HV at a dwell time of 8 s.
Judul Paper: PENGARUH INTERLAYER ELEKROPLATING CU PADA MECHANICAL PROPERTIES SAMBUNGAN FSSW MATERIAL AA6061-T6
Keyword: FSSW, Interlayer Cu, AA6061, hook defect
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Keyword: greensand, seacoal, permeabilitas, GFN

Abstrak: A lathe is a machine that plays a crucial role in manufacturing operations. It is essential for machining cylindrical workpieces with precise dimensions. Therefore, a lathe with a high level of precision is essential for manufacturing operations. Lathes generally have a large frame, which is essential for the stability of the turning process. This study conducted a design and finite element analysis of a small lathe frame for general manufacturing operations. Finite element analysis was performed on the force, pressure, and displacement components on each x, y, and z axes at a predetermined nominal cutting depth and feed rate.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND ANALYSIS OF FINITE ELEMENTS OF SMALL CONVENTIONAL LATHE FRAME FOR REGULAR MANUFACTURING JOBS
Keyword: Lathe, design, analysis, manufacturing
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: Creeper machine is a tool to flatten the latex lumps that come out of the mobile crusher which will become creep sheets at the grinding and crumbling station located in the rubber factory. This study aims to determine the maintenance and repair methods of creeper machines at the rubber processing factory of PT. Perkebunan Nusantara VII Unit Rejosari Pematang Kiwah Rubber Factory. The methods used in data collection are introduction and observation, interviews and discussions, literature studies and data collection in the field. The results of this study indicate the need for Preventive Maintenance, Corrective Maintenance and Breakdown Maintenance types of maintenance on the Creeper Machine at PTPN VII Unit Pematang Kiwah so that the machine can work optimally.
Judul Paper: CREEPER MACHINE MAINTENANCE AND REPAIR METHOD IN THE RUBBER PROCESSING FACTORY PT. PERKEBUNAN NUSANTARA VII REJOSARI UNIT
Keyword: Creeper, corrective maintenance, preventive maintenance, breakdown maintenance
Jurnal: Perwira Journal of Science and Engineering (PJSE)

Abstrak: A natural disaster is a natural event that poses a risk or danger to human life. The consequences of these disasters include loss of life and property, loss of people, and damage to the environment. Jepara Regency has areas prone to natural disasters, including areas prone to abrasion, flooding, landslides, and tornadoes, which generally occur in residential areas, causing damage to homes and the surrounding environment. This damage requires attention because it will impact the declining quality of life of the community if there is no proper and planned anticipation/handling. The purpose of this study is to identify the distribution of housing in disaster-prone locations in Jepara Regency. Descriptive analysis is used in the study to examine the problems and physical conditions of locations prone to natural disasters. Another expected outcome of this study is to identify the characteristics of housing in disaster-prone locations so that it can be considered in providing policy directions and recommendations for managing housing in disaster-prone locations in Jepara Regency.
Judul Paper: IDENTIFICATION OF HOUSING IN DISASTER PROne LOCATIONS IN JEPARA DISTRICT
Keyword: identification of residential areas prone to disasters
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Laptops are one of the most widely used devices in today's modern era. They come with a variety of specifications and prices. This naturally makes it difficult to choose a laptop that suits the buyer's needs. To facilitate the selection of a laptop that is comfortable and meets the buyer's needs, a decision support system is needed to assist buyers in selecting the right laptop. This decision support system uses the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method, which is a weighted summation method of all available data. The results of this study are suggestions or references for selecting and determining the laptop to purchase according to needs based on predetermined laptop criteria from various laptop variants available in IT Stores.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Selecting Laptops at IT Stores Using the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) Method
Keyword: Decision Support Systems, SAW, Laptop, Hard Disk, Benefits, Cost
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: This study aims to develop interactive learning videos based on the Capcut application and determine the validity, practicality and effectiveness tests of interactive learning videos based on the Capcut application developed. The research method used is Research and Development (R&D) with a 4-D model, namely defining (Define), designing (Design), developing (Develop) and disseminating (Disseminate). The research subjects that have been carried out are students of class VIII SMPIT Bina Bangsa. Data were collected using validity tests, practicality tests, and effectiveness tests in the form of questionnaires from media experts, material experts, and student respondents. The results of the study showed that the results of the validity test of the assessment from 2 media experts were 97.00% (very valid), and the assessment of 1 material expert was 90.00% (very valid) it can be concluded that the assessment of 3 validators was 94.67% (very valid), In addition, the results of the assessment of 15 students had a practicality value of 91.99% (very practical), and the effectiveness value was 89.45% (very effective). Therefore, it can be said that interactive learning videos based on the CapCut application can be developed and applied in informatics subjects.
Judul Paper: Development of Interactive Learning Videos Based on the Capcut Application in Informatics Subjects in Class VIII
Keyword: Development, Learning Videos, Interactive, Capcut, Informatics
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: In Moyo Hulu District, many farmer groups do not receive fertilizer according to the area of ​​land they own, even though fertilizer is always distributed annually. This causes dissatisfaction among farmers, who then buy fertilizer from third parties at very high prices. This problem often occurs due to a lack of transparency between the head of the farmer group and its members. This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of equal fertilizer distribution based on land area using the K-Means and K-Medoids algorithms in farmer groups in the Moyo Hulu District area. This study uses quantitative data collection methods and data mining methods with the K-Means and K-Medoids algorithms in the clustering process using the Davies-Boulden index for validity testing. The K-Means algorithm produces a Davies-Bouldin value of -0.554, while the K-Medoids algorithm produces Davies-Bouldin values ​​of -1.580 and -0.878. Based on the Davies-Bouldin value, the K-Means algorithm shows better performance in grouping data on fertilizer recipient farmers in Moyo Hulu District compared to the K-Medoids algorithm.
Judul Paper: Clustering of Fertilizer Recipient Farmers Based on Land Area Using the K-Means and K-Medoids Algorithms
Keyword: K-Means, K-Medoids, Fertilizer Receipts, Agriculture, Davies Bouldin Index
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: A chatbot is a computer program designed to interact with humans through a conversational interface. Batik is a unique and distinctive traditional textile art originating from Indonesia. However, in this modern era, interest in traditional batik is declining, especially among the modern generation. Therefore, the use of a batik chatbot is one solution to increase awareness and appreciation of the beauty and cultural values ​​of batik today. In this research, a chatbot was developed that provides relevant, interesting, and easy-to-understand information about batik. This chatbot aims to provide information to the wider public and introduce the cultural values, aesthetics, and uniqueness of Indonesian batik. Thus, it is hoped that it will encourage interest and a desire to preserve batik as a valuable cultural heritage. This chatbot was developed using a deep learning architecture based on NLP (Natural Language Processing) with an LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) model to improve accuracy in providing appropriate answers. Through training with 4000 epochs, the chatbot successfully achieved 100% accuracy. With this chatbot, the public can easily ask text-based questions about batik, such as the history, origins, and meaning of batik motifs.
Judul Paper: Batik Chatbot Development Using the Long Short-Term Memory Method
Keyword: chatbot, batik, program, computer, NLP
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Nadhifa Shop, founded in 2017 by Dita Artanti Willa, was initially a small business focused on selling beauty products. As the online shopping trend grew, the store began selling various additional products such as clothing and home furnishings. However, Nadhifa Shop faced challenges in product promotion and expanding market reach. To address this, it proposed building a website based on the Wix platform using the Prototype development method with 6 stages: requirements gathering, quick design, build prototype, user evaluation, refining prototype, and implementation/final product to perfect the resulting prototype. This website has several menus: Home, About, Contact, and Shop as well as several other features that can expand market reach, increase visibility, and ultimately, drive business growth.
Judul Paper: Strategy to Increase Nadhifa Shop's Market Reach through a Wix-Based Website
Keyword: Nadhifa Shop;, Metode Prototype, Website, Platform Wix, Jangkauan Pasar
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: PT Gerbang Sinergi Prima is a subsidiary of PT PLN (Persero) Pension Fund which operates in the field of ICT (Information and Communication Technology). The current system has adopted a semi-modern approach in data management, but still found several obstacles such as data constraints scattered across several files, unplanned equipment maintenance, inadequate vehicle monitoring. Therefore, a web-based construction management support service monitoring system is needed to help handle these activities. The system development method used for system design is the SDLC or Software Development Life Cycle method with the Waterfall model and uses the UML (Unified Modeling Language) approach in system design. This study designs the Construction Management Support Service System (MSSC) which is a website-based monitoring system that aims to simplify the management of employee data, tools, and assets used in construction service activities. This study concludes that the implementation of the monitoring system has succeeded in simplifying the management of construction service activity data at PT Gerbang Sinergi Prima, with a positive contribution to increasing the effectiveness and efficiency in sharing information and monitoring construction service operational activities.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Construction Management Support Service Monitoring System at PT Pintu Sinergi Prima
Keyword: system, monitoring, construction management, website, waterfall
Jurnal: Digital Transformation Technology (Digitech)

Abstrak: With the rapid development of information technology, artificial intelligence (AI) has become a center of attention in various industries, including business. AI offers the potential to increase operational efficiency, improve decision-making, and provide a better customer experience. This study aims to analyze the legal aspects of the implementation of artificial intelligence technology in business information systems from the perspective of Law Number 11 of 2008 concerning Electronic Information and Transactions. The method used in this study is a qualitative literature review with data collected from Google Scholar for the period 2012-2024. The results of the study indicate that the implementation of artificial intelligence (AI) technology in business information systems raises a series of complex legal issues that must be carefully addressed in accordance with the existing legal framework in Indonesia, especially in the context of Law Number 11 of 2008 concerning Electronic Information and Transactions (UU ITE). Various legal aspects that need to be considered include personal data protection, responsibility for decisions generated by AI systems, implications for business competition, information security, the validity of electronic evidence, and compliance with regulations of certain business sectors.
Judul Paper: Legal Analysis of the Implementation of Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology in Business Information Systems
Keyword: Law, Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology, Business Information Systems, Transactions, Regulations
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Cinema is one of the most enjoyable forms of entertainment. In Palembang, there are many cinemas to choose from to spend time. However, a person can only enjoy one at a time. When choosing a cinema, many criteria can be considered, such as price, facilities, service, or distance. In choosing the best cinema to watch a movie, these criteria can be helpful. To get the best results in choosing a cinema, one can use decision-making. This study uses the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method to help decide which cinema is worth choosing. The process of making a decision using SAW includes determining criteria consisting of benefits and costs, deciding on alternatives, creating a decision matrix, normalizing, and ranking the alternatives to find the highest value. After the existing process is carried out, the final result of using the SAW method in decision-making for choosing a cinema is that Cinepolis is at the top of the list.
Judul Paper: Decision Making System in Choosing a Cinema in Palembang for Customers Using Simple Additive Weighting (SAW)
Keyword: Decision Support Systems, SAW, Cinema, Benefits, Cost
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: In this digital era, the internet has become an essential need for many people. Internet networks require an integrated working system between hardware and software components so that they can be used simultaneously. The importance of monitoring internet networks is realized by the existence of Network Administrators. One of the monitoring techniques for Unifi Access Points is by using the Unifi Network Management Controller. This study responds to problems with the Unifi Access Point at BPR X Batam which experiences weak signals and limitations in surfing the internet. By designing a Mikrotik captive portal hotspot system integrated with the UniFi Controller, this study proves that administrators can easily manage hotspot management. The results show that the Unifi Network Management Controller makes it easier for hotspot users with a captive portal, allows admins to monitor user activity, and manage and monitor wireless devices. In addition, this study provides a solution to the problem of weak signals and limited internet access on the Unifi Access Point.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Network Management Controller on Unifi Based Networks
Keyword: Unifi Network Management Controller, Hotspot Captive Portal, Mikrotik, Access Point, Monitoring Jaringan
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Sending or exchanging data is a common activity in the information technology realm. The data sent often contains critical information and therefore requires stringent security measures. To maintain data security, cryptography techniques can be used. In the world of cryptography, various algorithms are used to encrypt data. The sophistication of information technology demands strong data protection in various fields. One solution that has been developed is the use of cryptographic algorithms, including the Enhanced Dual RSA Algorithm. In this study, we explore the application of the Enhanced Dual RSA Algorithm in the context of data protection. We discuss the basic principles of this algorithm and implementation steps to secure data. The performance and security analysis of this algorithm are also evaluated to ensure its effectiveness in protecting sensitive data. This study aims to provide insight into the use of the Enhanced Dual RSA algorithm as an important strategy in efforts to protect data integrity and confidentiality in the digital era.
Judul Paper: Application of Shamir Adleman's Enhanced Dual Rivest Algorithm for Data Security
Keyword: Kriptografi, Fermat’s Little Theorems, Enhanced Dual RSA, Enkripsi, Dekripsi
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The current system for selecting the best employees at the Mitra Dhuafa Cooperative, Kedungjati District Branch, uses a manual system, which only calculates the number of cross-out ratings in transactions and net incoming members for that month. This is certainly not fair in its calculation because some employees do not only focus on finding incoming members but also focus on reducing problematic members. The purpose of this study is to build a decision support system (DSS) for selecting the best employees using the SAW method. The basic concept of the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method is to find the sum of the weights of the performance ratings on each alternative for all criteria. The decision support system criteria are based on attendance, administration, target achievement, problem solving, and discipline. The results of the study can be the best recommendation for leaders to determine the best employee performance. The employee selection sequence resulting from the application of the SAW method is A4 with a final score of 0.841.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Selecting the Best Employee Performance using the Simple Additive Weighting Method
Keyword: SPK, SAW, Employees, Alternatives, Criteria
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: The information system for strengthening the capacity of students & alumni and student organizations (Siskama) is a website-based information system that functions to facilitate the management of student, alumni and student organization activities. The case study of this research is the Faculty of Engineering, Gorontalo State University. The development method used in the development of Siskama is the prototype method. Siskama is built with the PHP (Hypertext Preprocessor) programming language with the use of the Laravel Framework, and MySQL as database management. The results of the system testing show that Siskama can accelerate the process of information exchange by entering activities, and facilitate the monitoring of student & alumni activities and ORMAWA with activity verification. In addition, Siskama can maintain the validity of activity proposals by having a track record of development and verification processes. This study concludes that the data collection of interactions between entities in activity management has added value to increase the effectiveness and efficiency of the process of strengthening the capacity of students & alumni and student organizations in higher education.
Judul Paper: Designing an Information System for Strengthening the Capacity of Students, Alumni and Student Organizations Using the Laravel Framework
Keyword: Students, Alumni, Student Organizations, PHP, Larave
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Posyandu in the working area of ​​the UPT Puskesmas of North Moyo District located in Sumbawa Regency, West Nusa Tenggara which provides health services to the local community. The process of data collection, processing, and recapitulation of target data and visits to the Posyandu is long. There is no percentage graph of the target number and visits to the Posyandu per data. The activities during Posyandu registration carried out by the community are not conducive. Until the report checking will be carried out directly by the head of the Puskesmas. From the problems that arise in the Posyandu working area of ​​the UPT Puskesmas of North Moyo District, the solution obtained is the application of information technology. Therefore, the author built a web-based Posyandu Management Information System (SIMPADU) with a qualitative method of data collection that includes observation, interviews, documentation, and literature studies and uses the prototype method as a software development method. This SIMPADU application was built using the PHP programming language with the Bootstrap framework, and MySQL as a database. Using Black-box Testing for system testing. This application is useful for the community, integrated health post cadres, health workers, and heads of community health centers.
Judul Paper:
Design of a Posyandu Management Information System (SIMPADU) to improve the quality of Posyandu services
Authors
Duwi Kartini Aprilia
Keyword: Sistem Informasi Manajemen, Prototype, Web, Bootstrap, Blackbox Testing, Posyandu
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Health is very important for humans, especially eye health because the eyes are one of the five important senses. If the eyes experience disorders or diseases, this will have a negative impact on human life. This research aims to design and build a web-based system that uses the Forward Chaining Method to diagnose eye diseases. This system will be used as a reference in consultations with doctors. Currently, the process of diagnosing eye diseases at the Kimia Farma Clinic is still done manually, namely by visiting the clinic to consult about the eye disease experienced. With this system, it is hoped that public expenses and time required for disease examinations can be minimized. This website-based system uses the PHP (Hypertext Preprocessor) programming language, and uses a database and system design with the help of UML (Unified Modeling Language). System testing is carried out using Blackbox Testing. The method used in this study is Forward Chaining to describe the rules or principles from data on 32 symptoms and 14 types of eye diseases that decrease vision without red eyes explained by experts.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Forward Chaining Method for Web-Based Diagnosing Eye Diseases
Keyword: Implementation, Forward Chaining, Web, Blackbox Testing, Expert systems
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: Users often have to manually compare and evaluate each marketplace, which takes significant time and effort. Furthermore, the information available to users about marketplaces is very limited. The information provided by marketplaces is incomplete or difficult to assess objectively. Users often rely on user reviews or information found online, making it inadequate for making informed decisions. Therefore, a study was conducted by researchers to help determine the best marketplace among teenagers in Makassar City. This analysis was conducted in Makassar City, Ujung Pandang District, using the Multi-Attribute Utility Theory (MAUT) method. By applying the MAUT method in this assessment analysis, the final results are ranked from the highest alternative value to the lowest alternative value. The purpose of this study is to help users identify the best and most popular marketplaces among teenagers. The benefits of this study are to implement the MAUT method in selecting the best marketplace and to help sellers understand consumer behavior. Based on calculations obtained using the MAUT method, Shopee is in first place with a value of 0.81, TikTok is in second place with a value of 0.74, Tokopedia is in third place with a value of 0.64, and Lazada is in fourth place with a value of 0.43 and last place is Blibli with a value of 0.02. For further research, it is possible to add more marketplaces and compare using other methods.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Selection of the Best Marketplace Among Teenagers Using the Multi-Attribute Utility Theory Method in Makassar City
Keyword: Multi-Attribute Utility Theory, Analisis, Remaja, Marketplace, Sistem
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Climate change can impact plants, particularly on temperature and water humidity, light intensity, and soil moisture. With technological advances, Smart Agriculture can regulate temperature, water, lighting, and soil moisture according to plant needs to achieve better yields. Therefore, a tool is needed that functions like Smart Agriculture but is equipped with an automatic light intensity control system using the Internet of Things, which is relatively new in the world of agriculture. Lighting itself is a very important factor for plants because with lighting, plants will carry out the process of photosynthesis to produce the main product in the form of carbohydrates stored as food reserves. In this study, the author discusses Service Workers in lighting. This technology allows web apps to be run through existing browsers. Which is a proxy client written in JavaScript. So the application can be opened when the network is offline. The goal is to break the process of sending messages from the application, meaning messages do not need to wait for the previous process to complete. By building this service, researchers hope to be able to structure data in the database and obtain structured data. IoT allows electronic devices to connect to the internet, collect data, and provide intelligent solutions. This study focuses on the use of IoT for lighting monitoring in the context of smart agriculture. By implementing a structured data service system, this research aims to improve the efficiency of lighting control in horticultural crops. Thus, this research has great potential to increase agricultural productivity and help farmers meet the challenges of modern agriculture.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Service Data for Lighting Monitoring in Smart Agriculture
Keyword: agriculture, pencahayaan, service worker, internet of things, smart system
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Agriculture in Indonesia is a crucial sector, aimed at increasing food and industrial production and boosting exports. Indonesia produces staple crops such as rice, corn, sweet potatoes, cassava, peanuts, and soybeans. One of the most productive regions producing food to meet basic needs is the island of Sumatra. Sumatra's climate is ideal for agricultural activities due to its evenly distributed rainfall throughout the year. Food crop production in Sumatra has increased since 1993, with significant land expansion. Meanwhile, agricultural yields in Sumatra are highly vulnerable to global climate change, particularly annual temperature increases. Predicting agricultural yields is essential to maximize staple food production in Sumatra. This study aims to determine the best algorithm for predicting agricultural yields for food crop commodities, namely rice, corn, peanuts, soybeans, cassava, and sweet potatoes in Sumatra, using a machine learning regression model. Therefore, this study is expected to serve as a reference for developing agricultural research on the island of Sumatra. The methods used are Machine Learning, namely Random Forest (RF), Decision Tree (DT), Gradient Boosting (GB), Extra Tree (ET), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Artificial Neural Network (ANN). The R2 coefficient values ​​for rice production are 0.897; 0.893; 0.957; 0.968; 0.928; and 0.909, respectively. Meanwhile, for the production of other staple foods, the values ​​are 0.754; 0.786; 0.721; 0.913; 0.509; and 0.90, respectively. The Extra Tree model obtained the highest R2 coefficient value and was more accurate than the other models.
Judul Paper: Prediction of Sumatran Food Crop Yields using Machine Learning Methods
Keyword: ANN, Decision Tree, Extra Tree, Gradient Boosting, Random Forest, SVM
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Over time, modern technology has advanced rapidly in various fields, including animal husbandry. Animal husbandry is the business of breeding and caring for livestock to meet demand. The development of the livestock sector, particularly broiler chicken farming, has increased significantly. This growth is driven by high population growth and increasing purchasing power. To produce good and profitable broiler chickens, environmental factors such as housing systems, health care, and disease prevention must be considered. Technology can help diagnose diseases in broiler chickens through web-based expert systems. Expert systems are a branch of artificial intelligence that mimics the knowledge of an expert and attempts to use it to solve problems like an expert. Case-based reasoning is a method used to solve new problems based on experience in similar cases that have occurred in the past. The purpose of this research is to create an expert system to assist farmers in diagnosing diseases in broiler chickens. The system can diagnose 10 types of listed broiler chicken diseases by considering previous symptoms. Symptom data is taken from sources verified by veterinarians. Trial results show this system provides accurate diagnostic results. It is hoped that this system will improve the health quality of broiler chickens and reduce losses for farmers.
Judul Paper: Expert System for Diagnosing Diseases in Broiler Chickens Using the Case Based Reasoning Method
Keyword: Technology, Animal Husbandry, Expert Systems, Broiler Chickens, Case Based Reasoning
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Over time, technology has developed rapidly, influencing every aspect of life. One example of its application is computer systems. However, sometimes problems arise with computers during use. These problems occur when computers are used too routinely, are not maintained, and are rarely serviced. This is understandable because many users are unaware of computer problems. To address this issue, an expert system was created that uses the Android-based forward chaining method as a tool for diagnosing computer hardware damage. Forward chaining is a method of finding conclusions based on existing data or facts. This system displays questions about the symptoms of the damage that occurs and is answered by the user. The system then matches the user's answers with rules that have been acquired from an expert, and the diagnosis results are displayed after all questions are answered. This system also includes information about the symptoms of hardware damage that can occur, in the damage dictionary menu. This system was built using the Flutter framework developed by Google with version 3.2. With this application, even novice computer users can identify the characteristics of computer hardware damage and find solutions to solve damage problems on their computers
Judul Paper: Application of the Forward Chaining Method in an Android-Based Computer Hardware Damage Detection Expert System
Keyword:
Expert Systems, Computers, Forward Chaining, Android, Flutter
Abstract
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: A computer network is a network that can connect one computer to another or consists of several computers that are interconnected so that it allows several computers to communicate with each other and exchange data with the aim of providing and receiving services in the form of data or information. Hotspot implements a system with a "plug n play" access feature. In the Hotspot menu there is a Hotspot server profile menu which is used as a place to store general configurations of the hotspot server. Likewise with the Hotspot User Profile which is used as a place to store configurations from hotspot users. In addition, there is also a Hotspot User where in this section it is used to fill in the username, password and profile from the stored ones. At SMK Darussholihin NW Kalijaga, where the problem is that the user and bandwidth of students and the LAB-TKJ room have not been managed properly so that this makes the use of internet access unlimited so that it often causes slow internet connections. In addition, time management also needs to be applied to the network so that it does not affect students in the learning process and student focus is not diverted. Therefore, to overcome this problem, it is necessary to carry out user, bandwidth and scheduler management in order to limit the use of internet access by students and those in the TKJ Lab room and hotspot.
Judul Paper: Management of Local Area Network (LAN) Hotspot Configuration at Darussholihin NW Kalijaga Vocational School Using the Vulnerability Scanning Method
Keyword: Hotspot, Plug n play, Server Profile, User, Bandwidth
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: Data security and confidentiality are crucial. Data security is inextricably linked to data security. In computer science, there are many forms of data security, one of which is the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES). AES is a form of data security that can be used to protect data from interference or attacks by others. AES itself is a form of cryptography that consists of several processes in encrypting data. The encryption process in AES itself is Add Round Key, Sub Bytes, Shift Rows, and Mix Column. The result of this research is the introduction of the AES algorithm in cryptography on a plaintext in round 0 and 128 bits using mathematical calculations from the Rijdnael algorithm.
Judul Paper: Get to know Advance Encryption Standard (AES) as a Cryptographic Algorithm for Securing Data
Keyword: AES, Cryptography, Rijdnael, Data Security
Jurnal: TEKNIK INFORMATIKA

Abstrak: The security and confidentiality of a message are important. The message owner certainly does not expect the data they have to be seen by unauthorized parties. Therefore, to maintain the confidentiality of the message, a message security method called a cryptographic algorithm is required. One of the cryptographic techniques often used is Caesar Cipher. In this study, a message security system was developed. This system applies the Caesar Cipher algorithm and in the process uses the Java NetBeans program to obtain ciphertext. The method applied in this development research is the waterfall model including the stages of requirements analysis, design, implementation, and testing. The program code was written in Java using NetBeans IDE 8.2 software. This study resulted in an encryption and decryption process using Caesar Cipher with the same key in the form of the alphabet a-z which will produce a ciphertext that is difficult to understand, making messages more secure, both messages sent and received. Thus, it can be concluded that message security with the Caesar Cipher algorithm has been proven to be implemented in Java NetBeans.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Caesar Cipher Algorithm for Message Security Using Java NetBeans
Keyword: Cryptography, Caesar Cipher, Message Security, Java, NetBeans
Jurnal: InfoTekJar : Jurnal Nasional Informatika dan Teknologi Jaringan

Abstrak: The rapid development of the times, the increasingly rapid advancement of technology, which greatly facilitates people in communication. One thing that is very often done is communicating using computers, while a computer network is needed to secure information or messages. Accompanied by an increase in a threat to technology, including the security and confidentiality of messages or information. When exchanging data, confidentiality and security are very important in data communication, both for privacy purposes or individuals, as well as for collective security. One way to ensure the security and confidentiality of messages or information is by using cryptography techniques. Cryptography is a data security method that can be used to maintain data confidentiality, data authenticity, and also the authenticity of the sender. Data that has been sent will be converted into a specific code and can only be opened by the recipient who has the key to change the code back, so that the confidentiality of the message or information can be maintained. In creating this cryptographic website, the researchers used the Vigenère Cipher method. The Vigenère Cipher is a method for encrypting alphabetic text using a series of different Caesar ciphers based on the letters of the keyword and is a very simple form of polyalphabetic substitution. This website was created using the PHP programming language, and it is hoped that this application can address these issues.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Text Data Security using the Web-Based Vigener Chiper Cryptography Method
Keyword: Cryptography, Vigenere cipher, technology, data security, code
Jurnal: Jurnal ELTIKOM : Jurnal Teknik Elektro, Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Social assistance is a gift given to people in need, which can be in the form of goods or money.
