Keyword: Deep Learning, CNN, Down Syndrome, Image Classification, ResNet
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study developed an automated identification system based on the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify Betta Splendens, a fish species with high economic value in Indonesia. The system aims to improve accuracy and efficiency in the identification process. The research was divided into several experiments, where the data was split into 320 images for training, 80 for validation, and 100 for testing. We used two optimizers, Adam and RMSprop. The Adam optimizer experiments conducted two stages with learning rates of 0.0001 and 0.001, each with 100 and 200 epochs. The results showed that a lower learning rate (0.0001) with 200 epochs yielded the best test accuracy of 71%, while a learning rate of 0.001 caused accuracy to stagnate at 66%, indicating potential overfitting. The RMSprop optimizer with a learning rate of 0.00001 demonstrated good stability, though with slightly lower accuracy than Adam. This study highlights the importance of selecting the appropriate learning rate and number of epochs to achieve an optimal balance between training, validation, and testing accuracy, ensuring the model generalizes well to new data.
Judul Paper: Betta Fish Identification System Based On Convolutional Neural Network
Keyword: Betta splendens, Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), Fish classification, Image identification
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: The purpose of this study is to evaluate the effectiveness of the EfficientNetB1 model in identifying fish diseases across two distinct datasets: South Asian Fish Diseases and Salmon Fish Diseases. The South Asian Fish Diseases dataset includes seven categories: red bacterial disease, aeromoniasis, gill bacterial disease, fungal saprolegniasis, parasitic disease, and white tail viral disease. The Salmon dataset is divided into two parts: FreshFish and InfectedFish. Using the EfficientNetB1 algorithm, each dataset was separately trained and tested to predict species and disease. Results showed an accuracy of 98.14% for the South Asian Fish Diseases dataset and 99.18% for the Salmon Diseases dataset. These findings support the argument that the model possesses sufficient capability to detect diseases affecting various fish species. This suggests that the model could be a valuable tool in the aquaculture industry for disease management and detection strategies.
Judul Paper: Comparison of EfficientNetB1 Model Effectiveness in Identifying Fish Diseases in South Asian Fish Diseases and Salmon Fish Diseases
Keyword: Convolutional Neural Network, Classification, EfficientNetB1, Fish Disease
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: The lack of specialized tools to check the condition of ornamental fish has hindered effective management. This research proposes a novel software architecture that uses the YOLOv9 model combined with RT-DETR to enable accurate and timely identification of ornamental fish conditions including fish diseases, empowering farmers and hobbyists with a valuable resource. This integration is done using Soft Voting Ensemble Learning technique. To achieve this goal, an Android mobile application successfully classified healthy fish and accurately identified common diseases such as bacteria, fungal, parasitic, and whitetail. Based on the test results, the integration accuracy of the YOLOv9 and RT-DETR models produced a high result of 0.8947 while the stand-alone YOLOv9 showed 0.8889 and the stand-alone RT-DETR of 0.8904. Recommendations are given for the combination of YOLOv9 and RT-DETR in condition detection and diagnosis of ornamental fish diseases.
Judul Paper: Real-time Detection Transformer (RT-DETR) of Ornamental Fish Diseases with YOLOv9 using CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) Algorithm
Keyword: CNN, Disease Detection, Real-time Detection Transformer (RT-DETR), Soft Voting Ensemble Learning, YOLOv9
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Software Defect Prediction Dataset as a component of the Software Defect Prediction model has a very vital role. However, NASA Software Defect Prediction has a problem with imbalance in minority data. This study compares the performance of oversampling techniques in overcoming this. A total of 90 oversampling techniques in the form of SMOTE and its variants were used. The results of this study indicate that there is no oversampling technique that is able to overcome this. The original dataset without oversampling shows good performance at the level of accuracy and f1-score but has low performance on auc-score and g-score. Several oversampling techniques show increased performance on auc-score and g-score, unfortunately at the same time showing a decrease in performance on accuracy and f1-score.
Judul Paper: Comparison of Oversampling Techniques on Minority Data Using Imbalance Software Defect Prediction Dataset
Keyword: Software Defect Prediction, Oversampling, SMOTE
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Air pollution is an urgent global environmental problem, with significant impacts on public health and ecosystem stability. This research aims to develop an air quality classification model using the Global Air Pollution dataset from Kaggle, which consists of 23,463 rows of data and 12 features, including important variables such as Air Quality Index (AQI), PM2.5, NO2, and O3. Decision Tree, Random Forest, and Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithms are applied to perform classification, with a focus on hyperparameter tuning to increase model accuracy. The research results show that the Decision Tree provides the best results with an accuracy of 99.89% after tuning hyperparameters using the Grid Search method. The SVM model showed an improvement of 94.89% to 99.32%, while Random Forest recorded an accuracy of 96.87% with no significant improvement after tuning. Importance feature analysis identified PM2.5 and AQI as the dominant factors in influencing air quality, with PM2.5 having the highest importance value of 0.93. This research confirms that machine learning can be an effective tool for integrating and classifying air pollution. It is hoped that the integration of this model into a real-time air quality monitoring system can help make more responsive and precise decisions in dealing with air pollution problems.
Judul Paper: Evaluation of the Decision Tree Model for Air Condition Classification on the Global Air Pollution Dataset
Keyword: Decision Tree, Air Quality Index, Air Pollution, Machine Learning, Classification
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: The perceptions and expressions shared by the public on social media play a crucial role in shaping the reputation of government institutions, such as the Ministry of Finance MOF (Kemenkeu) in Indonesia which also has faced increased scrutiny, particularly on Twitter. This study analyzes public sentiment towards the Indonesian Ministry of Finance (MoF) through Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) on Twitter data. Using a dataset of 10,099 tweets from January to July 2024, this study combines IndoBERT for sentiment classification and Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) for topic modeling. Here, LDA was tested across four scenarios that considered various combinations of stopwords removal and stemming techniques, resulting in coherence scores of 0.314256, 0.369636, 0.350285, and 0.541752. The most optimal results were achieved in the scenario of stopwords removal without stemming (with 0.314256 coherence score). The main results show: 1) Identification of four main topics related to MoF: Economy, Budget, Employees, and Tax; 2) The dominance of negative sentiment (6,837 tweets) compared to positive sentiment (198 tweets) across all topics; 3) The effectiveness of IndoBERT in handling the complexity of the Indonesian language, especially in interpreting context and language nuances; 4) The importance of proper preprocessing, with a scenario of removing stopwords without stemming resulting in the most relevant topics. This study provides valuable insights for MoF to understand public perception and identify areas that require special attention in public communication and policy.
Judul Paper: Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis for Enhanced Understanding of 'Kemenkeu' Tweets
Keyword: Aspect Based Sentiment Analysis, Latent Dirichlet Allocation, IndoBERT, Kementerian Keuangan, Twitter
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: In an era where tourism plays a pivotal role in economic development, the need for effective navigation through diverse attractions has never been more critical. This research presents a cutting-edge tourism recommendation system tailored for Batang Regency, leveraging Content-Based Filtering (CBF) to deliver personalized suggestions that enhance the tourist experience. By categorizing tourist attractions into Culinary, Culture, Accommodation, Nature, and Leisure, and employing the Haversine formula for precise geographical calculations, our system prioritizes recommendations based on user preferences and proximity. Recommendation testing yielded an impressive average F1 Score of 0.965, underscoring the system's accuracy and relevance, particularly in straightforward user scenarios. However, the research also identifies challenges in more complex cases, suggesting the need for future enhancements through hybrid models and the integration of user feedback. This innovative approach not only streamlines the decision-making process for tourists but also aims to boost local tourism, making it an invaluable tool for both visitors and the Batang Regency community. Join us in exploring how technology can transform the way we experience travel, ensuring that every journey is tailored to individual desires and needs.
Judul Paper: Optimization of Tourism Destination Recommendations in Batang Regency Using Content-Based Filtering
Keyword: Content-Based Filtering, Mobile Application, Recommendation System, Tourism, Haversine Formula
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study aims to compare the performance of three clustering algorithms, namely Fuzzy C-Means, K-Means, and DBSCAN, in grouping houses based on their specifications and prices. The data used includes features such as price, building area, land area, number of bedrooms, number of bathrooms, and availability of garages. The performance of these algorithms was evaluated using Silhouette Score and Davies-Bouldin Score to determine the quality of cluster separation. The results indicate that K-Means achieved the best performance with the highest Silhouette Score of 0.7702 for two clusters, followed by Fuzzy C-Means, which excelled in handling overlapping clusters. DBSCAN, while effective in detecting outliers, showed suboptimal performance for this housing dataset. These findings suggest that K-Means is the most suitable clustering method for housing data, while Fuzzy C-Means and DBSCAN can serve as alternatives depending on the data characteristics. This research is expected to assist in making the house searching and classification process more efficient and provide additional insights for developers in shaping housing market strategies.
Judul Paper: Comparison of Clustering Algorithms: Fuzzy C-Means, K-Means, and DBSCAN for House Classification Based on Specifications and Price
Keyword: Clustering, K-Means, Fuzzy C-Means, DBSCAN, Housing Classification, Real Estate Analysis
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study examines user sentiment towards online vehicle tax renewal applications by utilizing the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm. The data was collected from user reviews on the Google Play Store for three major applications: New Sakpole, Sapawarga, and Timsalut. The reviews were preprocessed through steps including normalization, case folding, tokenization, and stopword removal. The SVM algorithm was then applied to classify the reviews into positive or negative sentiments. A comparative analysis was performed with K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and NaÃ¯ve Bayes, with SVM demonstrating the best performance, achieving an accuracy of 76.5%. In addition to accuracy, metrics such as precision, recall, and F1-score were also evaluated to provide a more comprehensive assessment of the models. The results indicate that while these applications help facilitate vehicle tax payments, there remains significant user dissatisfaction, particularly related to technical issues and usability concerns. This study offers valuable insights for application developers, highlighting areas for improvement in functionality and user experience to better meet public expectations.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of Online Vehicle Tax Renewal Application Users Using Support Vector Machine Algorithm
Keyword: Sentimen Analysis, Support Vector Machine, Online Tax Renewal, Data Review, Machine Learning
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This research analyzes public sentiment towards the topic of the House of Representatives' Right of Inquiry on Twitter using Naive Bayes Classifier and Decision Tree algorithms. The goal is to compare the effectiveness of the two algorithms in political sentiment analysis. . The research methodology includes data collection from Twitter, data pre-processing, sentiment classification, and result analysis. Sentiment analysis reveals the dominance of positive sentiment related to the DPR's Right of Inquiry. However, this study has limitations in terms of dataset size and depth of text-based sentiment analysis. This research contributes to a better understanding of public sentiment towards political issues in Indonesia and highlights the importance of proper algorithm selection in social media sentiment analysis.  Development suggestions include exploration of deep learning techniques, integration of multimodal analysis, data balancing (oversampling or undersampling) and improvement of pre-processing so that the model is better able to capture negative contexts. The results of the study showed excellent performance of both Naive Bayes Classifier and Decision Tree algorithms with accuracy above 95%. Decision Tree excels with an accuracy of 99%, while Naive Bayes Classifier performs better with an accuracy of 96%. The results with the Confusion Matrix test are precision 0.98, recall 1.00, and F1-Score 0.99.
Judul Paper: Comparison of Naive Bayes Classifier and Decision Tree Algorithms for Sentiment Analysis on the House of Representatives' Right of Inquiry on Twitter
Keyword: House of Representatives' Right of Inquiry, Public Sentiment, Twitter, Decision Tree, Naive Bayes Classifier
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Stunting or stunted toddlers is a chronic nutritional disease caused by prolonged nutritional intake. The prevalence of stunting in Tlogo village is 14.4%, the highest in Kanigoro sub-district. This study aims to apply the Random Forest classifier algorithm to classify stunting status in toddlers and measure the Confusion Matrix value. This type of research is quantitative in the form of numerical descriptions, the data used in this study are secondary data derived from the archives of the Blitar Regency Health Office, especially in Tlogo village, Kanigoro sub-district. The data processing process begins with data collection, data selection, Random Forest implementation, and Confusion Matrix testing. During the implementation process, the Jupyter Notebook application was used. Testing was carried out by dividing the data into three scenarios consisting of training data and test data. The best scenario found was using 80% training data and 20% test data, with an accuracy of 90%, a precision of 71.4%, and a recall of 62.5%. These results indicate that the Random Forest model in this study is still not good at predicting cases of stunting in toddlers.
Judul Paper: CLASSIFICATION OF STUNTING TODDLER USING RANDOM FOREST CLASSIFIER IN BLITAR DISTRICT
Jurnal: JUITA : Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: Mistakes in decision making often occur in various companies, as well as in the online store Mezzaluna Signature Depok. The availability of stock of goods with customer demand is not synchronized, sometimes there is a shortage of products or vice versa, this makes inefficiency in managing goods because Mezzaluna Signature Depok does not have a manual or computerized recording system, resulting in frequent data loss and sales reports that are not real-time and require a long time to find goods. The purpose of this research is to produce an inventory information system that can manage inventory data so that there are no data errors and reduce delays in fulfilling stock for customers, and it is a solution offered for the Mezzaluna store to overcome all existing problems. The development methodology used is the waterfall method, which is oriented towards structured and linear stages in software development. These stages include needs analysis, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance. Testing is carried out using black-box testing, where the focus is on testing the functionality of the software without exposing its internal structure. The tools used are UML, using the PHP programming language and the MySQL database. The final result of this research is the development of a database system that has the ability to manage company data and prevent data duplication, to make it easier for the Owner to purchase goods, so that stock in the warehouse can avoid unwanted shortages or excesses.
Judul Paper: RANCANG BANGUN SISTEM INFORMASI IVENTORY STOCK BARANG USAHA FASHION PADA TOKO ONLINE MEZZALUNA SIGNATURE DEPOK
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: The method that can be used in expert systems is Naïve Bayes Diabetes Mellitus is a chronic disease that occurs in the pancreas that cannot produce enough insulin, there are 3 types of diabetes mellitus, namely; Type 1 Diabetes, Type 2 Diabetes and Gestational Diabetes of these three types of disease occurs due to genetic factors and obesity. Expert System is a computer system that has been entered into a knowledge base and a set of rules used to solve problems like an expert. The purpose of the study is to create an expert system to diagnose diabetes mellitus with the naïve bayes method with the variables used are the symptoms experienced by the user, knowing the level of accuracy of the system with the number of respondent data used as many as 23 from the data that has been analyzed with the accuracy value of each type 1 diabetes disease accuracy value 4.280889%, type 2 diabetes accuracy value 6.633111, Gestational Diabetes accuracy value 1.868.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE NAÏVE BAYES METHOD TO DIAGNOSE DIABETES MELLITUS
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: A common problem faced by Solid State Drive (SSD) users is the difficulty in determining whether their SSD is damaged. Users haven't made any preparations to secure their important data, but suddenly the SSD is severely damaged. Recovering important data can be difficult, and it may be impossible to retrieve important data from the damaged SSD. A damaged SSD can still be used for a few days or several uses, but if it is completely damaged, it cannot be repaired. This study aims to reduce losses for SSD users in securing important data. This allows SSD users to prepare for data security well in advance and avoid significant losses. This study determines SSD damage by applying the K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR method to the system to determine the damage status of an SSD. Based on the test results, the accuracy value in this study was 80%, using manual calculations and using the Rapid Miner application.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR METHOD IN DETECTING SSD DAMAGE
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: The Tangerang City Library and Archives Service (DPAD) was established in accordance with Tangerang City Regional Regulation Number 08 of 2016, following the merger of the Regional Archives Office and the Regional Library Office based on Regional Regulation Number 13 of 2014. Observations of the official website of the Tangerang City DPAD indicate the need for a system capable of providing optimal services to the public. The presence of this system is very important considering the performance of the previous system was considered inefficient in providing services in the field of libraries and archives. The PIECES analysis method was used in this study, including Performance, Information, Economy, Control, Efficiency, and Service. System development was carried out through an object-oriented analysis approach using the Unified Modeling Language (UML), as well as the PHP programming language and MySQL database. The Tangerang City DPAD implemented a web-based system, where PHP 5, Laravel Framework, and MySQL were used for database design, and Visual Studio Code was used as supporting software in program creation. The results of this study are to develop a library and archive website development system so that it can be implemented effectively and efficiently, so that the public can be more interested in accessing the website to meet library and archiving needs.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE DEVELOPMENT OF THE LIBRARY AND ARCHIVES SERVICE BASED ON LARAVEL FRAMEWORK AT DPAD CITY OF TANGERANG
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak:
This study was motivated by several cases, such as the guided learning activities at MAS Taman Raya Balingka, which currently employ lectures with packaged novels. There are no art and culture subject textbooks for students due to a shortage of textbooks in the library. There are no Android-based learning media designed by teachers. As a solution to meet the learning needs, the short story writer created a learning tool for Traditional Arts using MIT App Inventor. This study is a Research and Development (R&D) study using the Hannafin and Peck development method, with development procedures including Needs Assessment, Design, and Development/Implementation. The results of this study are Arts and Culture learning media created using MIT App Inventor.

The training equipment obtained was tested for product validity, practicality, and product energy using a questionnaire. The product testing results from the validity experiment by three experts obtained a score of 0.87 (valid benchmark), the practicality experiment by two experts obtained a score of 0.83 (high benchmark), and the effectiveness experiment by 15 experts obtained a score of 0.78 (very high benchmark). The smartphone-based Arts and Culture training equipment, as well as training equipment, has been proven to be valid, practical, and effective.
Judul Paper: CLASS X CULTURAL ARTS LEARNING MEDIA PLANNING USING MIT APP INVENTOR AT MAS TAMAN RAYA BALINGKA
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This research is motivated by the results of interviews conducted by the author at SMA Negeri 4 Pariaman. From the interview results, the author learned that the Informatics subject still uses the lecture method, the use of technological media is not optimal because the media used is still in the form of PowerPoint media. This is seen as less effective in its implementation. Thus, the purpose of this study is to design Informatics learning media using Canva to increase the effectiveness of the learning process. In this study, Informatics learning media has been designed using Canva at SMA Negeri 4 Pariaman by implementing Research and Development (R&D) development that follows the 4-D approach model, which consists of the steps of Define, Design, Development, and Disseminate. Product testing in this study includes validity testing, practicability testing, and effectiveness testing. The results of the study indicate that this Informatics learning media has been used in the learning process of Informatics subjects. The results of the validity test involving three validators produced an average value of around 0.82, indicating that this product is valid. The results of the practicality test conducted by three examiners yielded an average score of approximately 0.91, indicating that this product is practical. Meanwhile, the results of the effectiveness test involving one Informatics teacher and 27 students yielded an average score of approximately 0.96, indicating that this product is highly effective.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN MEDIA PEMBELAJARAN INFORMATIKA MENGGUNAKAN CANVA DI SMA NEGERI 4 PARIAMAN
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: Visitor data or the number of visitors at a particular location is crucial information to be obtained. This data can serve various purposes, particularly in enhancing customer satisfaction. For instance, predicting the number of visitors at tourist destinations enables tourism management to be better prepared for welcoming and providing optimal services to arriving visitors. Visitor count data can also be employed to automatically restrict visitors during the COVID-19 pandemic, ensuring a safe and comfortable environment with limited attendees. To acquire visitor data, a system capable of accurate visitor detection is required. This research utilizes computer vision to detect visitor faces. The developed system, programmed in Python, functions by detecting visitor faces and conducting a count based on the detected faces. To prevent the same visitor from being detected multiple times, a facial recognition method with dynamic facial data collection is implemented in this study. The constructed system successfully counted 27 out of 28 visitors over a two-day period. However, the system has limitations, particularly in terms of the restricted detection area. Therefore, a physical mechanism mandating visitors to undergo facial scanning and registration needs to be established, ensuring recorded data corresponds to the actual visitor count.
Judul Paper: Real-Time Visitor Counting with Dynamic Facial Recognition using Python and Machine Learning
Keyword: Computer Vision, Face Recognition, Machine Learning, Visitor Counter
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Cantika Paint is a paint shop located in Karawang, West Java, Indonesia, with five branches spread across Karawang. Currently, data processing, such as sales reporting and stock checking, is still done manually by employees. This is very inefficient and risks errors. Sending sales reports manually every day makes it difficult for employees. Therefore, a REST API system for a store management application using nodeJS has been created with data management and processing stored in a database system that aims to prevent data redundancy that causes losses for Cantika Paint and to facilitate viewing of processed data information. The software development method used in developing this application is the SDLC (System Development Life Cycle) with a waterfall model. This system was developed using the nodeJS programming language with the expressJS framework as the backend and API services, then using the EJS (Embedded JavaScript) view engine as the front-end, and PostgreSQL as the database. The results of the system development are able to manage sales data, stock items, and shipping more securely and more accurately.
Judul Paper: RANCANG BANGUN REST API APLIKASI MANAJEMEN TOKO MENGGUNAKAN NODEJS PADA CANTIKA PAINT
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: Madu Mabali is a honey business in Bali that markets its products through offline sales and online media such as Instagram and Facebook as online promotional media. Therefore, it is necessary to analyze the influence of social media usage (Instagram and Facebook) on Madu Mabali brand awareness. This research was conducted using quantitative methods. The analysis technique used was multiple linear regression analysis with the help of statistical calculation tools in the form of SPSS 26. The population in this study were Madu Mabali consumers. The data collection technique in this study was the distribution of questionnaires to 50 respondents who were Madu Mabali consumers. The sampling technique used was purposive sampling. The results of this study showed a positive and significant influence between Instagram usage on Brand Awareness, there was a positive and significant influence between Facebook usage on Brand Awareness, and there was a positive and significant influence between Instagram and Facebook usage simultaneously on Brand Awareness.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS PENGARUH PENGGUNAAN MEDIA SOSIAL TERHADAP BRAND AWARENESS PADA MADU MABALI
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: The problems that exist in the subject of network infrastructure administration, the material for evaluating and configuring dynamic routing, the learning media for network infrastructure administration are still conventional, as a result of the less interesting learning media, it has an impact on student learning outcomes that are less than satisfactory, there is no interactive learning media that is used as a supporting medium for the learning process. This study aims to produce valid and practical interactive learning media. This study uses the Research and Development (R&D) method with the ADDIE development model. The subjects of this study were 32 students as samples. The data collection technique used a questionnaire with a Likert scale. The results of this study show an average value of the validity test for media experts of 0.7 with a valid category and material experts of 0.718 with a valid category. For the practicality test, the teacher's response reached 92.08% with a very practical category and for student responses reached 89.62% with a very practical category.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF INTERACTIVE LEARNING MEDIA IN THE SUBJECT OF NETWORK INFRASTRUCTURE ADMINISTRATION AT SMK NEGERI 2 PADANG
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: The development of information and communication technology in the current era has a significant impact on the mindset and learning methods of students, where in the learning process students must be able to compete by utilizing existing technology. Pancasila Tambolaka Vocational School is trying to find ways to convey knowledge or subject areas effectively. Especially for computer and basic network subjects in grade X, where much of what should be done with practice, but must be done without face-to-face, where this can have an impact on students' lack of understanding in the network lessons given. Therefore, this study aims to create an interactive learning media to support the teaching and learning process to be more relevant. The learning method used in this study is problem-based learning. The results of this research are applications that are made according to expectations and in accordance with the subjects used
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF INTERACTIVE LEARNING MEDIA BASED ON PROBLEM BASED LEARNING IN CLASS X OF PANCASILA TAMBOLAKA VOCATIONAL SCHOOL
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: To improve service in the use of work services, store employees at Quenross provide performance assessments set by the store owner for each employee, but currently the Quenross store is experiencing obstacles related to performance assessments because the assessments still use conventional methods, causing store owners to have difficulty in assessing employees as evaluation material. This study creates a system that can provide solutions to these problems. The system designed in this study is a medium to help store owners evaluate the performance of Quenross store employees in decision making. The method used in this study to determine the best employee is the SAW (Simple Additive Weighting) method with the criteria used being work experience, orderliness, discipline, length of service and achievements from the results of the study determined that the best employee is Rido with a value of 0.709.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF THE SAW METHOD TO DETERMINE THE BEST EMPLOYEES IN THE QUINROS SHOP
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: MyPertamina is a digital financial services platform developed by PT Pertamina. Its purpose is similar to applications such as OVO and Dana. Users who utilize the MyPertamina application for transactions at gas stations face several significant problems. These include difficulty when trying to open the MyPertamina application, limited LinkAja payment options at some gas stations, frequent failures when trying to register an account, and cases where transactions are successful but reward points are not added. Based on these problems, this study will implement two classification algorithms, namely Naïve Bayes and K-Nearest Neighbor, in conducting sentiment analysis of reviews on the MyPertamina application. The review dataset tested is divided into three sentiment labels: negative, neutral, and positive, with a total of 1500 review data scraped from the Google Play Store. From the test results, the Naïve Bayes algorithm has an accuracy rate of 75% and the K-Nearest Neighbor algorithm has an accuracy rate ranging from 56% to 73%.
Judul Paper: COMPARISON OF NAÏVE BAYES AND K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR ALGORITHM IN SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF MYPERTAMINA APPLICATION REVIEWS
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: The use of information technology materials at SMP Negeri 1 Bukittinggi is still limited to PowerPoint presentations. With the advancement of information and communication technology (ICT), many software programs can be used to create interactive learning materials. The results of an initial survey on the implementation of computer systems learning at SMP Negeri 1 Bukittinggi showed that no teachers used interactive learning materials using Google Sites. IT facilities and infrastructure such as computers, LCD projectors, and internet at SMP Negeri 1 Bukittinggi are available but have not been utilized optimally. Learning media is an important factor in improving student learning outcomes. Selecting learning materials that are appropriate to the needs and characteristics of students can help them understand the content of the lesson. This study aims to create interactive learning materials that are valuable, practical, and effective to help students master the computer systems subject. The research method used is research and development (R&D) using the 4D development model (identify, design, develop, and disseminate). The results show that interactive learning media has value based on authenticator assessments in each aspect. Interactive learning media is considered practical based on observations and feedback from teachers and students. This shows that interactive learning media has proven to be effective as a learning medium to improve student learning outcomes.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF INTERACTIVE LEARNING MEDIA BASED ON GOOGLE SITE FOR LEARNING COMPUTER SYSTEMS CLASS VIII SMPN1 BUKITTINGGI
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: This study will implement the XGBoost algorithm to conduct aspect-based sentiment analysis in the comments column of the iPhone 14 Pro YouTube video review, which aims to measure the performance level of the XGBoost algorithm in classifying reviews into two classes, namely the positive-negative sentiment class, while also knowing the advantages and disadvantages of the iPhone iPhone 14 Pro. From the test results obtained a fairly high level of accuracy, which ranges from 89% to 97%. In addition, from this study it can also be seen that the advantages are in the aspects of brand image and performance. Meanwhile, for its weaknesses, the iPhone 14 Pro still receives a lot of negative sentiment, especially in the design and specifications aspects.
Judul Paper: ASPECT-BASED SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF IPHONE 14 PRO USING XGBOOST ALGORITHM
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: There are many ways to access the information needed by the public easily and quickly, such as through websites. The eCampus academic website is used daily by students of Singaperbangsa University, Karawang. UNSIKA students have many negative and positive opinions about the eCampus website. To determine the quality of the eCampus website, a usability evaluation was conducted using the System Usability Scale method. The advantage of this SUS is that the usability results appear as a score of 0-100, the required analysis calculations are also quite easy, and the SUS has been proven valid and reliable. The purpose of this study was to determine the usability assessment of the eCampus website using the System Usability Scale method. The data collection method used Simple Random Sampling using questionnaires via Google Form and paper media given to 154 students of Singaperbangsa University, Karawang. The questions used were then tested for validity and reliability using the IBM SPSS Statistics 25 application. The results of the question validity test showed that all questions were valid and significant because the 2-tailed significance was below 0.05 and the Cronbach's Alpha value was 0.851, which means the questions used were reliable. The calculation results from the System Usability Scale method obtained a SUS value or score of 50.3 for the usability of the eCampus academic website, which is in the OK category, meaning the website is quite good but still below average.
Judul Paper: USABILITY EVALUATION OF THE ECAMPUS UNIVERSITY OF SINGAPERBANGSA KARAWANG ACADEMIC WEBSITE USING THE USABILITY SCALE SYSTEM METHOD
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Education plays a key role in shaping individual character. As COVID-19 spreads, the Minister of Education and Culture of the Republic of Indonesia recommends online learning in all schools, including SDN Tunas Jaya. The impact of this pandemic has significantly reduced student learning outcomes. This study aims to cluster the development of student learning outcomes at SDN Tunas Jaya using the K-Means algorithm in Data Mining. The Elbow method determines cluster optimality, resulting in 4 clusters with an SSE of 0.400. Evaluation of the Silhouette Method (0.399) and Davies-Bouldin Index (0.749) confirms the 4 clusters. Of the 141 students, cluster 0 is "low" (35 students), cluster 1 is "sufficient" (46 students), cluster 2 is "good" (25 students), and cluster 3 is "very good" (35 students). Analysis of average learning outcomes shows a decline in several subjects. These results are expected to provide information to identify learning strategies that need improvement.
Judul Paper: GROUPING LEARNING RESULTS OF TUNAS JAYA SDN STUDENTS USING THE K-MEANS ALGORITHM
Jurnal: JISKa (Jurnal Informatika Sunan Kalijaga)

Abstrak: According to data from the Indonesian Ophthalmologist Association (PERDAMI), cataracts are the leading cause of blindness in Indonesia. Over time, marked by technological advances, a method for predicting eye diseases has emerged, called machine learning. The machine learning model that has been created must first go through a deployment phase. This deployment phase requires another technology called cloud computing. Google Cloud Platform is one of the cloud computing platforms that includes App Engine and Compute Engine, which can be utilized for the machine learning model deployment process. This study uses a comparative method, namely comparing the performance of App Engine and Compute Engine, which were previously measured using load testing techniques to obtain the performance to be compared. The performance comparison was carried out by measuring the response time, standard deviation, error rate, throughput, and CPU utilization on both services. The conclusion obtained from this study shows that Compute Engine is superior to App Engine in terms of response time, standard deviation, throughput, and CPU utilization. Meanwhile, the error rate of both services is the same, namely 0%.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS PERBANDINGAN PERFORMA APP ENGINE DAN COMPUTE ENGINE PADA GOOGLE CLOUD PLATFORM DALAM MEMPREDIKSI PENYAKIT MATA DENGAN MODEL CNN
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: The information technology audit conducted at the legal services office, in this case FNS and Partners, used COBIT 5.0 with the DSS03 and DSS06 domains. The research was descriptive and used primary and secondary data, using interview and questionnaire techniques. The use of COBIT 5.0 with the DSS03 and DSS06 domains for the audit process at FNS and Partner is expected to improve its IT annually. The total number of respondents who filled out the questionnaire were 10 users of information technology services at the legal services office. The maturity level obtained for DSS03 and DSS06 was at level 2, while the GAP that occurred in DSS03 was at 1 and 2 for DSS06. In the future, services in Manage Business Control and Manage Problem can be improved further to be even better.
Judul Paper: AUDIT TEKNOLOGI INFORMASI PADA KANTOR PELAYANAN HUKUM DENGAN MENGGUNAKAN COBIT 5.0
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: In today's digital era, Information and Communication Technology (ICT) has become a significant common phenomenon. This ICT development affects various aspects of human life, including the livestock industry. This study aims to analyze and predict the amount of poultry meat production in West Java using a simple linear regression method. The main problem raised is the fluctuation of the amount of poultry meat production each year. The data used comes from Open Data Jabar, covering the poultry meat production period from 2013 to 2022. A simple linear regression method is applied to determine the relationship between the independent variable, namely the year of production, and the dependent variable, namely the amount of poultry meat production. The results of the analysis show an increase in poultry meat production in West Java. The resulting simple linear regression equation is Y = 383,271.006 + 23,318.594X, where X is the year of production and Y is the amount of poultry meat production. Model evaluation was carried out using RMSE, MSE, and MAPE. The evaluation results show variations in the level of prediction accuracy that vary from year to year. The prediction for the next five years shows a consistent increase in poultry meat production. The production volume is estimated to reach 919,598.67 tons in 2023, 942,917.26 tons in 2024, 966,235.85 tons in 2025, 989,554.45 tons in 2026, and 1,012,873.04 tons in 2027.
Judul Paper: PREDICTION OF AMOUNT OF POULTRY MEAT PRODUCTION IN 2023-2027 USING LINEAR REGRESSION
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: Breast cancer is a type of cancer frequently diagnosed in women. In Indonesia, breast cancer is the type of cancer with the second highest incidence rate after cervical cancer. Identifying breast cancer at an early stage is crucial to prevent its rapid development, in addition to developing preventive methods. Machine learning (ML) methods can be used to identify breast cancer. In the case of breast cancer classification, the majority of the data used experiences class imbalance between breast cancer and non-breast cancer. To overcome this problem, the Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique (SMOTE) with the extra tree algorithm is used. Extra Tree was chosen because of its ability to handle complex cases and a high level of accuracy. Experimental results show the success of the Extra Tree method with SMOTE, with an accuracy rate reaching 96.71%, Recall of 95.29%, Precision of 96.13%, F1 Score of 95.61%, and Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 99.46%. These findings indicate that the use of this method makes a positive contribution to improving the classification ability of breast cancer, which can potentially improve the success of early detection and management of this disease in clinical practice.
Judul Paper: CLASSIFICATION OF BREAST CANCER USING EXTRA TREE WITH SMOTE
Jurnal: jurnal ilmu komputer dan informasi

Abstrak: The gaming industry is considered a potential market for Indonesia's creative economy. In 2017, gaming industry revenue reached a record high of $880 million USD. The development of the gaming industry in Indonesia since early 2015 can be said to be very high, and the market reach is very broad. There are 43.7 million active gamers in Indonesia, ranking 16th in the world in terms of gaming revenue. Therefore, sentiment analysis is needed as a way to make decisions based on a review without having to read the entire review, and to conduct market research on public reviews. This study aims to analyze the sentiment of user reviews on the Steam platform using the Naïve Bayes algorithm. Gaming platforms like Steam are popular places for users to share their experiences and opinions about the games they play. Sentiment analysis provides valuable insights for game developers and stakeholders to understand user responses to their products. This study uses game review data from Kaggle, focusing on 2021, which goes through filtering processes such as case folding, tokenizing, stopword removal, and stemming using RapidMiner. The data was then divided into training data (1050 examples) and testing data (494 examples) after a filtering process. The Naïve Bayes algorithm was applied to the training data to form a classification model. The test results showed an accuracy of 80.97%, a positive recall of 78.49%, and a negative recall of 86.67%. The precision for positive predictions reached 93.10%, while the precision for negative predictions reached 63.73%. The F1-Score, a combination of precision and recall, reached 84.68%. The results of accuracy, recall, precision, and F1-Score indicate the model's ability to identify positive and negative sentiments. The results of this study indicate that the Naïve Bayes algorithm can provide good sentiment analysis in classifying user reviews on the Steam platform. This research can also provide valuable insights for game developers and related parties in improving the quality of their products.
Judul Paper: ANALISIS SENTIMEN REVIEW PUBLIK PENGGUNA GAME ONLINE PADA PLATFORM STEAM MENGGUNAKAN ALGORITMA NAÏVE BAYES
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: In general, pears are a commonly consumed fruit by Indonesians, namely Asian pears (Pyrus pyrifolia) which have a characteristic sweet, sour, and crunchy taste. This fruit is a popular fruit in Indonesia because of the high consumption of pears by Indonesians, as evidenced by imports from China, Australia, South Korea, and the United States which reached 69,000 tons in 2012. In addition, this fruit has a unique taste and contains a lot of water, pulp and sweet taste. Found in tropical soil, this fruit also contains nutrients such as A, B1, B2, C, E, K, niacin, pantothenic acid, and folacin, as well as various vitamins. The method used is Convolution Neural Network (CNN) and Neural Network (NN) by using the architecture of the two methods to obtain a comparison of the results of the level of accuracy. For the accuracy level parameters, it is divided into 6 parts for the train data as follows, the percentages are 50%, 55%, 60%, 65%, 70%, and 75%, then from the training results, the accuracy level of the two algorithms will appear with the highest accuracy level for the CNN method (98%) and NN (93%). After training, a test process will be carried out using a confusion matrix to obtain validation results, for the CNN method the accuracy level gets 97%, precision level 97%, sensitivity_recall 97%, f1_score 97% and for the NN method the accuracy level gets 86%, precision level 89%, sensitivity_recall 86%, f1_score 86%
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF THE PERFORMANCE OF CNN AND NN ALGORITHM ON PEARS
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Tracking is used in business and logistics to track the movement of goods and optimize the supply chain. PT Asri Berkah Mirai (ABM) is a shipping tracking service company that has not fully utilized technology. They need a shipping information system that makes it easier to understand information. This application was created to help Drivers, Field Officers, and Operational Managers in managing information on shipping goods, receiving goods to creating invoices. This application was created using the Extreme Programming (XP) method for fast, efficient, low-risk, flexible, and predictable software development. With features for managing Travel Routes and other shipping information, this application can process performance data quickly. Using the Laravel framework and the Ionic React framework, as well as several programming languages ​​​​such as PHP, Java Script, Type Script, CSS, and MySQL Database. Therefore, this study aims to design and build a vehicle tracking application using the Exteme Programming method at PT Asri Berkah Mirai based on Mobile. This application has a Travel Route management feature that includes shipping status, Details of Fuel Transportation Money, Details of Toll Road Transportation Money, Meal Money, Vehicle Maintenance Details, Delivery Letters, and Invoice creation.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT OF A VEHICLE TRACKING APPLICATION USING EXTREME PROGRAMMING METHOD AT PT ABM ON A MOBILE BASIS
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: At SMKS Mutiara Bangsa, registration forms for new students are still filled out in person at the school. Furthermore, all student and teacher information, as well as information about classes, subjects, attendance, and grades, are still stored on paper, increasing the risk of data loss or corruption and incurring high costs. Academic data at SMKS Mutiara Bangsa Purwakarta is still processed manually, with each piece of information stored in a single file. Naturally, there is a risk of data loss or destruction, and the procedure remains ineffective in terms of information services. The Rapid Application Development method was used in this study. The stages of the rapid application development method are business modeling, data modeling, application generation, testing, and turnover. Ionic and Laravel serve as frameworks, PHP, JavaScript, and CSS serve as programming languages, MySQL serves as databases, and Visual Studio Code serves as tools. Therefore, this study aims to design and build a mobile-based school academic information system using the rapid application development method at SMKS Mutiara Bangsa Purwakarta. It is anticipated that having this academic information system will facilitate the administration of the school's academic data.
Judul Paper: SIAS DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION USING RAD METHOD AT MOBILE BASED MUTIARA NANGSA PURWAKARTA VOCATIONAL SCHOOL
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: SMKN 1 Pasuruan is an educational institution at the vocational school level. Karya Raharja Cooperative is a cooperative with many members, but the processes used are still manual. This system is less efficient because most use notebooks and MS.Excel tools. Therefore, to solve the problem of creating a solution, namely building a website-based Savings and Loan Application at the Karya Raharja Cooperative of SMKN 1 Pasuruan using the Laravel framework. The research method in compiling this research is the data collection method. This method aims to support in obtaining information in achieving research objectives. The Waterfall SDLC method is included in the software development process that has systematic stages to improve data processing, lending and payments for the data to be tested. In the system design stage, several designs are produced, including Use Case Diagrams, Activity Diagrams, Flowcharts, DFDs, and ERDs. Furthermore, the savings and loan cooperative application system can be developed by adding barcode features, transactions by virtual accounts, and an integrated database and designed into a mobile application.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING A WEB-BASED SAVINGS AND LOAN APPLICATION AT KARYA RAHARJA COOPERATIVE
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak:
Smart Village is a government program designed to improve the quality of life and well-being of village communities by utilizing information and communication technology to implement village services managed by the village community. In this technologically advanced era, services in Pucangsari Village are still conducted offline, particularly for correspondence, resulting in ineffective service delivery by both the government bureaucracy and the community.

The purpose of this study is to implement the Smart Village program to streamline the Pucangsari Village government's public service bureaucracy by creating a Village Service System (SiDesa) application and streamline community access to village information. Data was collected through literature review, interviews, and observations. This study also discusses the benefits of implementing the Smart Village program and analyzes the system requirements for designing the Village Service System (SiDesa) application in Pucangsari Village. The methodology used in this study is the waterfall method. Testing results obtained in this study using a black box and questionnaire with 20 respondents yielded a response rate of 88.7%. Therefore, with this percentage, this application is highly suitable for use.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM SMART VILLAGE TERINTGRASI BERBASIS MULTIPLATFORM UNTUK PELAYANAN PUBLIK DI DESA PUCANGSARI
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: English animal name recognition for early childhood is an important aspect of foreign language learning at the Kindergarten (TK) level. However, conventional learning methods that often rely on books as media are less engaging for children, thus reducing the effectiveness of learning. Previously, the method used for animal name recognition still used images and projectors. This study aims to design and implement interactive learning media based on Augmented Reality (AR) that can foster kindergarten children's interest in recognizing animal names using English. This study uses the Multimedia Development Life Cycle (MDLC) method which includes six main stages: concept, design, material collecting, assembly, testing, and distribution. Tests conducted on this application were blackbox testing and questionnaires. From the results of the questionnaire testing of this application by taking 10 respondents was 84.8%. This application can create a more interesting and enjoyable learning experience for kindergarten children.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN DAN IMPLEMENTASI MEDIA PENGENALAN NAMA HEWAN MENGGUNAKAN BAHASA INGGRIS UNTUK ANAK TK
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: Traditional economy has supported the community for years, pressures due to population growth, climate change, and changing market dynamics have forced a reassessment of the economic approach used. However, the focus of the community's problem in starting the agricultural sector in rural areas is fast and appropriate capital. Related to the problem, a cooperative organization was established, which is an important element in the Indonesian economy, so that cooperative activities play a role in achieving economic prosperity, both for its members and for the surrounding community, Cooperative CV Arya Guna Usaha The loan offered has an interest of 5% with a minimum limit below 10 Million and a loan term of 10 weeks. The payment system is carried out weekly, and the cooperative seeks customers engaged in businesses such as stalls, traders, home industries, and the like. And the discovery of the problem of losses in selecting customers to be served in subsequent loans with large data and manual processing, resulting in losses in closing the books once a month, in that problem a solution was proposed by managing cooperative customer data by utilizing data mining to facilitate the determination of data processing, using the k-means algorithm for the feasibility of receiving subsequent loans. The method used as a reference consists of 9 (nine) stages, namely, determining the problem, determining the objectives and scope, searching for literature, data collection, methods used, research processes and results, analysis, drawing conclusions. The data obtained at this stage will be prepared or cleaned. The data will be reprocessed to eliminate less important data in the data processing process later, and 5 data attributes are obtained, namely, customer name, family, loan-to, principal loan, amount of arrears Very smooth (SL) Smooth (L), Not smooth (L). By using the k-means algorithm, the results of the cluster are 4, namely the number of cluster 0 contains 48 data, cluster 1 contains 33 data, cluster 2 contains 16 data, and cluster 3 contains 17 data with a total of 114 data. The conclusion of this study is the application of the k-means algorithm using rapidminer software for clustering cooperative customer data and minimizing losses of CV. Arya guna usaha to subsequent loan recipients, and determining whether or not customers are eligible for subsequent loans with the provisions of very smooth, smooth, not smooth. Further research can explore and compare other clustering algorithms, to see whether the algorithm can provide more accurate results or provide a new perspective in determining customer eligibility.
Judul Paper: CLASSTERIZATION OF COOPERATIVE CUSTOMER LOANS USING THE K-MEANS ALGORITHM
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Waikuri Lagoon is a lake-shaped lagoon tourist attraction where water comes from seawater that enters through the cracks in the coral reefs, this lagoon located in East Nusa Tenggara has beautiful views. Therefore, it is necessary to analyze reviews of Waikuri Lagoon to find out the opinions of tourist visitors about the place. Data is obtained by the Scrapping technique. After that, the data is labeled Negative, Neutral and Positive according to the rating, then in the Preprocessing stage, the data is cleaned to reduce word attributes. Next is the N-GRAM and TF-IDF stages. For the Classification process, it is divided into 9 tests with the Confusion Matrix and Multi-Class Support Vector Machine Algorithm with Linear, Polynomial, RBF and Sigmoid kernels, the results are derived into Accuracy, Precision, Recall and F1-Measure. The highest accuracy in the 90:10 test gets an accuracy of 90.67% for the Polynomial and RBF kernels. Precision in testing 10:90 for linear kernel, 20:80 linear and sigmoid kernel, 30:70 and 40:60 test data and test data and training data for sigmoid kernel got precision of 93.85%. highest recall 50:50 testing for polynomial kernel and 90:10 test data and training data for Polynomial and RBF kernel got Recall of 98.67%. highest f1-measure in testing 90:10 test data and training data for Linear, Polynomial and RBF kernel Get F1-Score of 95.09%.
Judul Paper: SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF WAIKURI LAGUNA TOURIST VISITOR REVIEWS ON GOOGLE MAPS USING MULTI-CLASS SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE
Jurnal: Data Science: Journal of Computing and Applied Informatics

Abstrak: The At-Taqwa Multimedia Community Training Center (BLKK) in Cirebon is a multimedia job training institution under the Indonesian Ministry of Manpower and Transmigration that currently uses manual procedures for information management, registration, and certificate issuance. This leads to ineffectiveness and inefficiency in the implementation of training activities. This study aims to implement a website-based multimedia training information system to improve the effectiveness and efficiency of the training process at the At-Taqwa Multimedia BLKK in Cirebon. The development of this information system uses the Extreme Programming (XP) method with HTML, CSS, PHP, and JavaScript programming languages. The Laravel framework is used to accelerate the development process. This system is designed with three types of users: admin, participants, and instructor trainers, who have different features and access rights according to their roles in the training process. The results of the system implementation show increased effectiveness and efficiency in managing training information, the participant registration process, and certificate issuance. This system allows participants to register online, access training materials, and print certificates independently.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI SISTEM INFORMASI PELATIHAN MULTIMEDIA BERBASIS WEBSISTE MENGGUNAKAN METODE EXTREME PROGRAMMING
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: Finance plays a crucial role in everyday life, particularly in meeting basic needs through a stable income. The development of digital technology, particularly Financial Technology (Fintech), has brought innovations such as digital money and e-wallets, which are increasingly popular, particularly during the Covid-19 pandemic. One popular form of online income is filling out reward questionnaires, where the rewards are typically sent to international e-wallets such as PayPal. However, withdrawing funds from these online activities with small balances is often challenging. This study aims to design and build an Android-based mobile money changer application using the Waterfall method, to facilitate user currency exchange and provide clear rate information and adequate transaction history features. The application was developed through systematic stages, starting from requirements analysis, system design, implementation, and testing, using the Dart programming language and Android Studio as a code editor. Testing was conducted using the blackbox method, and the results showed that the application functioned well, with key features such as user registration, login, currency exchange, exchange rate check, and transaction history successfully implemented and tested.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT OF MOBILE MONEY CHANGER APPLICATION USING ANDROID BASED WATERFALL METHOD
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This study focuses on the implementation of the K-Means algorithm to cluster countries based on total domestic coffee consumption. The data used in this study were taken from 25 countries available on the Kaggle.com website. The background of this study is to understand coffee consumption patterns in various countries with the aim of formulating more effective coffee marketing and distribution strategies, especially for the Indonesian market. This study conducted tests using the Elbow method to determine the optimal number of clusters and evaluation with the Silhouette Score to assess the quality of the clustering. The clustering results showed the formation of two main clusters, one cluster consisting of 24 countries with low to medium coffee consumption, while Brazil with very high coffee consumption formed a separate cluster. The average Silhouette Score of 0.91 indicates that the resulting clustering quality is very good, which can be used as a basis for decision-making related to coffee marketing and distribution strategies.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF CLUSTERING TO GROUP TOTAL DOMESTIC COFFEE CONSUMPTION BY COUNTRY USING THE K-MEANS ALGORITHM
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Information systems facilitate better communication and increase operational productivity. With today's technological advances, information systems can handle massive amounts of data, enable in-depth data analysis, and provide critical insights for business strategy and public policy. Furthermore, the implementation of a robust information system can help organizations respond to societal demands and improve transparency and accountability in data and information management. This study aims to design and build a web-based Laboratory Management System (SiMaLab) application at CIC HUB, Catur Insan Cendekia University, which comprises several laboratories. Currently, document management and activity scheduling at CIC HUB are still performed manually, leading to issues such as difficulty in document retrieval and potential scheduling conflicts. To address these issues, the Rapid Application Development (RAD) method was used in developing this application, utilizing the Laravel framework and the HTML, CSS, PHP, and JavaScript programming languages. System testing was conducted by testing the login form and several application menus, including the dashboard, submission, documents, profile, and logout. The test results show that the application functions well and can assist the Head of Laboratory and Laboratory Coordinator in managing documents, monitoring activity progress, and reducing potential schedule conflicts, so that laboratory operations can run more efficiently.
Judul Paper: CREATION OF A WEB-BASED LABORATORY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM USING THE RAPID APPLICATION DEVELOPMENT METHOD
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Education plays a crucial role in improving the quality of human resources (HR) in Indonesia. However, economic factors often hinder access to a proper education. The government has addressed this issue with the Smart Indonesia Program (PIP), a scholarship program for underprivileged students. SMPN 3 Cihampelas is one of the recipients of this program, but the process of identifying PIP recipients remains challenging, particularly in ensuring targeted assistance. This study aims to implement the Naive Bayes algorithm to classify the eligibility of PIP recipients based on several attributes, such as Residence Type, Transportation, Parental Occupation and Income, and KPS and KIP recipients. Testing was conducted using RapidMiner software and Cross Validation techniques. The results showed an accuracy rate of 97.24%, precision of 72.73%, recall of 88.89%, and an AUC of 0.886, categorized as Good Classification. Therefore, it can be concluded that this algorithm can be implemented effectively to support decision-making regarding PIP recipients at SMPN 3 Cihampelas.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF THE NAIVE BAYES ALGORITHM USING CLASSIFICATION METHOD IN DETERMINING STUDENTS RECIPIENT OF INDONESIA PINTAR PROGRAM AID
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The development of technology and information currently affects human performance, especially in data processing. By utilizing an information system, it can support data processing so that it is easy to use and obtain accurate data information. CV. Teknologi Multi Guna is a company engaged in general trade and services, which offers various solutions for school or office needs and various other materials. In presenting its inventory reports, CV. Teknologi Multi Guna is still manual, namely stock reports are still recorded in books. so that errors and discrepancies often occur between report records and actual stock in the store. Inaccurate stock reports can affect the actual number of goods in stock and sales transactions. By building and designing a web-based inventory information system, it can improve the quality of data processing more effectively and efficiently so that it can help companies in making decisions quickly. In addition, the purpose of the inventory system design research in this company is to design a system that can present sales history reports and stock reports that can be downloaded to facilitate data archiving. This ATK inventory information system was created using MySQL as a database, this system was created using the PHP programming language. The aim of this research is to design an inventory information system that can process and create more accurate stock reports and minimize errors and asynchronous information between reports and actual stock conditions.
Judul Paper: SISTEM INFORMASI INVENTORY ALAT TULIS KANTOR BERBASIS WEBSITE
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: This study aims to design and develop an information system that can present and provide information about Sarang Lemo nature tourism. The background of this study is based on this tourism has just been opened and not many people or tourists know about Sarang Lemo nature tourism, the need for an information system that is able to provide complete, fast, and accurate information. Currently, the delivery of information about Sarang Lemo nature tourism is still ineffective and has not attracted enough tourists to visit. The objectives of this study are (1) To determine the Website-Based Tourism Information System in Sarang Lemo Nature Tourism (2) To determine the level of feasibility for promotional media Website-Based Tourism Information System in Sarang Lemo Nature Tourism. This study uses a research and development (R&D) approach using the ADDIE (Analysis, Design, Development, Implementation, Evaluation) development model and a system testing method with the System Usability Scale (SUS). From the results of the final evaluation conducted on the tourism information system, the respondents gave a score of 83.85, which is included in grade A according to the SUS percentile rank chart. This shows that this system is easy for users to use to obtain the information they need.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND BUILDING OF A WEBSITE BASED TOURISM INFORMATION SYSTEM IN SARANG LEMO NATURAL TOURISM
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Pregnancy is a blessing for a mother in carrying out her role as a mother. Of course, every pregnant woman certainly hopes for her fetus to grow healthily. The very high maternal mortality rate according to data from the Ministry of Health (Kemenkes) is caused by pregnant women who are not aware of the danger signs of pregnancy, such as pregnant women who experience severe nausea or dizziness so that insufficient food and nutritional intake can affect the mother's health and fetal development. This study aims to create an information application about danger signs of pregnancy based on Android to increase awareness and knowledge of pregnant women about danger signs of pregnancy. The method used in this study is the case study method with the waterfall development method. The results obtained from testing the pregnancy information application, namely the author used blackbox testing and obtained valid testing or all systems were successfully run. As for the usability testing, the average result was 71.25 indicating that the value is in the C+ grade for the percentile rank. These results also indicate that the information application about danger signs of pregnancy has good and acceptable properties.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT OF AN INFORMATION APPLICATION ABOUT DANGER SIGNS OF PREGNANCY IN PREGNANT WOMEN BASED ON WEBSITE AND ANDROID USING THE WATERFALL METHOD
Keyword: GrabFood, application usability, usefulness, simple linear regression
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This research is motivated by the inability to predict food stock, which often leads to shortages or excess stock. The purpose of this research is to create a digital prediction application that can predict food sales, optimize food preparation through computer calculations, and make stock planning and scheduling more effective and efficient. The method used is K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) with a system developed using the PHP programming language. This system utilizes sales information of the most purchased food ingredients as a reference. The results show that this system is able to process food sales predictions with a classification accuracy of best-selling products of 88.571% and a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 0.338. Test data shows White Cabbage as the best-selling product. This approach is expected to reduce shortages or excess stock of food ingredients and increase efficiency in food preparation.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN DATA MINING UNTUK PREDIKSI PENJUALAN PRODUK TERLARIS MENGGUNAKAN METODE K-NEAREST NEIGHBOR PADA CV. NUANSA KARUNA LESTARI
Keyword: Satisfaction Level, Shopee Application, Gen z, Simple Regression Method
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: Islamic boarding school payment bills are fees that must be paid by students or their parents (guardians) to the boarding school to obtain educational services, accommodation, and food during their stay at the boarding school. At the Hidayatul Mubtadi'in Islamic Boarding School (PPHM), the payment billing process is still carried out manually by distributing billing letters only two weeks before the boarding school holidays. This practice often causes miscommunication between financial administrators and guardians. This study aims to design and build an Android-based student payment billing information system application as a solution to this problem. The development method used is the waterfall method. The results of application testing using the Blackbox method show that all features run smoothly without any errors, indicating that this application is effective in meeting the stated objectives. In addition, Usability Testing using the SUS Score method obtained a score of 73. Based on these results, it can be stated that the application is effective in helping to reduce miscommunication, speed up the billing information process, and increase transparency and accuracy in billing management as well as helping guardians monitor student payment track records.
Judul Paper: ANDROID-BASED STUDENT BILL PAYMENT APPLICATION DESIGN
Keyword: Distribution requirement planning, schedulling
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Informatika Komputer

Abstrak: Bung Tomo Cheap Pharmacy is one of the pharmacies in Samarinda City. Pharmacies certainly require an information system to check the number of available drugs in order to provide optimal drug sales services to the public. Drug stock data management at Bung Tomo Cheap Pharmacy is still not computerized. In the management process, incoming and outgoing drug data is still done manually using a drug stock book and an additional Microsoft Excel application without an integrated data management system. This results in unstructured drug data, prone to errors when entering data, which will affect the preparation of pharmacy operational reports. Therefore, an information system is needed to manage drug data in the pharmacy. The purpose of this study is to create a web-based drug inventory information system to solve problems that arise at Bung Tomo Cheap Pharmacy, as well as to support efficiency and optimization in drug data management at the pharmacy. The system was developed using the waterfall method, with features needed by pharmacy owners and employees. The results show that the developed web-based drug inventory information system successfully improved the efficiency of drug data management at Bung Tomo Cheap Pharmacy, as well as being able to integrate drug data, minimize input errors, and accelerate the process of producing pharmacy operational reports.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF A WEB-BASED MEDICINE INVENTORY INFORMATION SYSTEM AT CHEAP BUNG TOMO PHARMACY
Keyword: You Tube Maximum, rapfight, Epic Rap Battle of Presidency 2024, Naïve Bayes, Support Vector Machine(SVM)
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Technological developments have increased business competition through online platforms, including in the shoe laundry industry. Dahlia Laundry, established in 2019 in Cirebon Regency, faces challenges in adopting technology to compete in the digital era. Key issues include manual ordering and payment processes, the lack of an integrated information system for online ordering, and the absence of a computerized data collection system and database-based transaction recording. This research aims to build a laundry ordering website application using web engineering methods. This website will optimize Dahlia Shoe Laundry's business processes by providing online ordering features and managing sales reports. Developed using the MERN framework and JavaScript programming language, this application can be accessed by both operations and customers. The research results in a laundry ordering website application that has been tested using the black box method. Testing shows that the application functions according to user needs, with each feature being 100% valid. This system provides computerized data collection and database-based transaction recording and sales reports, increasing operational efficiency and Dahlia Laundry's competitiveness in the digital era.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE BASED SHOE LAUNDRY INFORMATION SYSTEM DESIGN USING WEB ENGINEERING METHODS
Keyword: Risk, House of Risk, oprasional, oprational
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Technological developments can bring changes in all aspects of life, including shopping. Indonesian society has experienced a change in shopping methods from traditional to modern methods. The use of e-commerce has become a significant element in everyday life, but there are often problems experienced by its users. An example of a problem that is often encountered is the suitability of the interface display to user needs, this can affect user comfort and reduce the effectiveness of application users. Shopee and Tokopedia are the most popular shopping platforms with the highest number of visits during 2023. This study aims to determine the implementation of kansei in both applications. The study uses the Kansei Engineering Type 1 (KEPack) Method, this method involves multivariate analysis consisting of Principal Component Analysis (PCA), Factor Analysis (FA), Partial Least Square (PLS) and Multivariate Statistical Analysis. This study involved 94 participants who were students who used e-commerce. The results of the display analysis using the Kansei Engineering method obtained results in the form of a display recommendation matrix table between the recommended design elements "Simple" and "Attractive" used as a benchmark in making designs because they have a strong influence on user emotions from the 5 kansei words tested, the design results that have been made can be accepted by respondents with a result value of 82 in grade scale B.
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE STUDY BETWEEN USER INTERFACE (UI) DESIGN OF TOKOPEDIA AND SHOPEE APPLICATIONS ON USER PREFERENCES USING THE KANSEI ENGINEERING METHOD
Keyword: SPAM technology, water services, PDAM Majalengka, BIJB, customer satisfaction
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Fieldwork practice is one way for Vocational High School (SMK) students to achieve psychomotor aspects. This study aims to design and implement a website-based Fieldwork Practice (PKL) Information System at SMK Negeri 1 Kerinci, as a solution to overcome obstacles in managing PKL data which is currently still done manually. The website-based information system is expected to increase efficiency and effectiveness in the PKL administration process, facilitate information access, and minimize human error. This study uses the System Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method with the implementation of the CodeIgniter3 framework, PHP-based application development and MySQL as a database. There are six main stages, namely: planning, analysis, design, implementation, testing, and maintenance. The results of the system testing show that the system workflow meets validation standards.
