The results of this system development provide an effective solution to increase product visibility, facilitate transactions, and increase customer satisfaction
Judul Paper: Design and Development of a Web-Based E-Commerce System for Umkm Bobapeer Using Flask Framework
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This research is motivated by the need for a more practical and systematic cat feeding device. Irregularities in feeding cats can have negative impacts on their health, such as digestive problems and malnutrition. The aim of this study is to design and develop an automatic cat feeder that effectively regulates feeding according to predetermined times. The method used is the prototype method, which includes stages such as data collection, planning, design, prototype development, and testing. This device uses Arduino Uno as the main controller, with additional components such as an RTC to set feeding schedules, a servo motor to open and close the food container, a load sensor to measure the food weight, and a buzzer as an alarm when food runs low. The system also utilizes a solar panel as a power source. The results show that the automatic cat feeder functions as expected, capable of delivering food on time and in the desired portions. Additionally, the device operates well using solar power as its main energy source.
Judul Paper: Automatic cat feeder based on arduino uno
Keyword: Arduino Uno, automatic feeder, RTC, servo motor, solar panel Arduino Uno, automatic feeder, RTC, servo motor, solar panel
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The growth of eggplant plants is greatly influenced by environmental conditions, especially pH and soil moisture. These parameters need to be monitored regularly to ensure optimal conditions for the plant. In this study, an Internet of Things (IoT)-based monitoring system was developed to monitor soil pH and moisture in real-time. The system uses pH sensors and humidity sensors connected to microcontrollers and combined with IoT connectivity to send data to a cloud platform. The data collected can be accessed through a mobile application, allowing farmers or land managers to monitor soil conditions remotely. The results of the implementation show that the system is able to provide accurate and real-time information on soil pH and moisture, as well as provide notifications when these parameters are outside the optimal range. With this system, it is hoped that farmers can take corrective action quickly to maintain the condition of
Judul Paper: IoT-Based pH and Soil Moisture Monitoring System for Optimizing Eggplant Plant Growth
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The rapid development of information technology has had a significant impact on various aspects of life, including life in rural areas. One of the challenges faced by many villages is the limited access to information, which can lead to misunderstandings between the village government and its citizens. The lack of transparency in information delivery hampers public participation in decision-making and village development. In this regard, a village website can be an effective solution to improve information access by providing important data such as announcements, activities, and public services. The design of the village website must consider ease of access and user comfort. Therefore, this research aims to design the User Interface (UI) and User Experience (UX) of the village website using the Design Thinking method. This method focuses on user needs by creating intuitive, user-friendly, and informative designs. The result of this research is a prototype of the village website, designed with attention to information readability and ease of navigation. This prototype can serve as a reference for the development of other village websites to enhance transparency, accountability, and public participation in village activities. Thus, it is expected that this village website will strengthen the relationship between the village government and the citizens, as well as accelerate the development process at the village level.
Judul Paper: Design thinking in user interface and user experience design for jurang village website
Keyword: information technology, village, website, user interface, user experience teknologi informasi, desa, website, user interface, user experience
Jurnal: JATI : Jurnal mahasiswa Informatka

Abstrak: In the present time, to determine the cupping point, the clinic still uses the conventional method which takes a long time. One of the problems faced by the therapist is that they still have to open a book when they are facing a new cases while treating a patient. Which will hinder the treatment process. Thus, a computer based tool is needed that can help to obtain information about the cupping point. Expert Systems are a type of artificial intelligence that allows a computer to work in accordance with the thoughts of a subject matter expert in order to find a solution and solve a problem. The output of this expert system application is an application that aims to determine the cupping point using the Dempster Shafer method. The Dempster Shafer method for testing expert system applications begins with the owner's data entry of diseases, symptoms, and rules, after which the trapist can determine the cupping point for the patient based on the expert's thoughts, namely the owner himself.
Judul Paper: Design of an Expert System Application for Cupping Treatment Using the Dempster Shafer Method
Keyword: Expert System Dempster Shafer Cupping Cupping Point Cupping Clinic
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: In a company that the selection of the right supplier is an important factor in the success of a company. In the cement industry, selecting the right supplier can affect the quality of raw materials and ultimately affect the quality of the final product. Therefore, the Semen Padang company needs to select suppliers carefully and based on clear criteria. The MOORA (Multi-Objective Optimization by Ratio Analysis) method is a decision-making method that can be used to assist the Semen Padang company in choosing the best supplier. This method can be used to select suppliers based on certain criteria and assign a weight value to each criterion. In the MOORA method, this weight value is used to rank each supplier tested By implementing the MOORA method at Semen Padang companies, it is hoped that the company will be able to select suppliers more efficiently and accurately. This method can help companies evaluate supplier selection criteria and choose the supplier that best suits their needs. Thus, it can improve the quality of the final product and help Semen Padang companies achieve their business goals. Software or program, which is a set of instructions that allows hardware to be able to process data. UML is a standard language based on diagrams or drawings that aims to visualize, define and build models. Use Case Diagrams, Class Diagrams, Sequence Diagrams, and Activity Diagrams. PHP is a programming language used to translate program code base into machine code that can be understood by computers by adding HTML. PHP is known as a scripting language, which integrates with HTML tags, is executed on the server, and is used to create dynamic web pages such as Active Server Pages or Java Server Pages. PHP Hypertext Preprocessor is a multifunctional open source script that is very suitable for developing a website.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System (SPK) for Selection of the Best Supplier Using the MOORA Method
Keyword: PHP Diagrams Website Metode MOORA Supplier Selection of the best suppliers
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Bandwidth instability is a serious problem where the need for using the internet is in the process, it is necessary to manage bandwidth so that bandwidth is properly organized but changes that will be made to bandwidth management require experts in Mikrotik routers, so an application is needed to manage this bandwidth and can be used by ordinary people so that errors in configuration will be avoided because the configuration is done automatically as desired and can certainly help bandwidth management at a lower cost. Making this application by using data collection methods by taking data at PLN Muara Labuh area, interviewing field supervisors, studying literature that supports problem solving and Unified Modeling Language (UML) for software designers along with software testing. The application is built using django.
Judul Paper: Development of Microtik Router Bandwidth Management Applicatio at PLN Office Muara Labuh
Keyword: Network Automation Bandwidth Mikrotik Python
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Along with the rapid development of the times and technology today, in everyday life humans are never separated from their activities to interact with electronic equipment that helps and makes human work easier. One of them is an automatic safe with security using face recognition and fingerprint sensors so that jewelry and other valuables are more secure with a double security system on the safe. This final project aims to develop a technology that utilizes several types of sensor components, where the sensor component involves a vibration sensor to send an SMS gateway if the safe moves, and sim800l will send the coordinates of the safe in the form of an SMS gateway. And GPS will track the location of the safe according to the coordinates. The buzzer will sound to provide a sign or notification.
Judul Paper: Jewelry Safe Security Tool with Face Recognition and Fingerprint Based on Arduino Mega 2560 Controlled by Smartphone
Keyword: Face Recognition Fingerprint Sensor Getar Sim800L
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: A hotel is a company managed by its owner by providing food, beverage, and room facilities for sleeping to people who are traveling and are able to pay a reasonable amount according to the services received without any special agreement. The design of the Sanaya GuestHouse Hotel room reservation information system that has been designed has several items that can be seen, namely hotel facility data consisting of free Wifi, Parking. Hotel room type data consists of Deluxe, Twin, Single and for hotel room price data consists of 280 thousand to 420 thousand. The information system design that has been designed also displays an admin page for managing the hotel website database that has been designed. Hotel customers in booking a room are required to register an account in order to book a hotel room according to the desired choice that is already available on the hotel website. The website-based hotel room reservation information system (WEB) makes it easy for customers to find out hotel information and the room reservation system at Sanaya Guest House.
Judul Paper: Development of a Web-Based Hotel Room Information System (Sanaya Guest House Syariah)
Keyword: Sharia Website Hotel Room Information System
Jurnal: J-SAKTI (Jurnal Sains Komputer dan Informatika)

Abstrak: UPT. Batipuh Selatan Community Health Center is one of the health service centers which is one of the developing health institutions. With a large number of patients, it causes quite serious problems in obtaining information about health services such as patient data, employee data, and also drug data that has been used by the health center. Based on these problems, in this study the author took the title Web-Based Health Service Information System at Batipuh Selatan Community Health Center. The Health Service Information System at UPT. Batipuh Selatan Community Health Center is Web-Based and can be accessed anywhere and anytime. This system was created using PHP and MySQL as a database. The research methods used by the author to obtain data are Observation, Interviews, Literature and analytical methods, namely data analysis and system analysis. The test results show that the system can run well according to its function, and it can be concluded that the program the author created received a good response from the health center.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Health Service Information System at the South Batipuh Community Health Center
Keyword: Health Service Information System South Batipuh Community Health Center Website
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The processing of vegetable waste in the Bukit Surungan market in Padang Panjang City has not been maximized. This causes a lot of vegetable waste to be neglected, so proper processing is needed to deal with vegetable waste. Composting technology is the right solution to deal with vegetable waste in the Bukit Surungan Vegetable Market in Padang Panjang City. The composting method used is composting with Takakura Susun and the addition of EM4 (Effective Microorganism) with variations in the addition of organic waste per 1 day, 3 days, 5 days, and 7 days. The results of this study indicate that within 12 days the compost can be used, with the treatment of adding organic waste every day for 7 consecutive days. The resulting compost content shows a C/N ratio of 10.96, carbon 12.50 with the physical properties of the compost being blackish in color, smelling of earth, and textured like soil with a water content of 19%, a temperature of 270C and a pH of 6.8.
Judul Paper: Processing Vegetable Waste from Bukit Surungan Market, Padang Panjang City Using Takakura Susun
Keyword: EM4 Compost Cabbage and Mustard Greens Organic Waste
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Computer-based information systems have become essential for meeting the needs of society. Many fields have utilized computer-based information systems as a means to simplify work, from the business world to academic circles, and almost all fields utilize computers as tools to facilitate work. One example is tax calculations in a company with an information system that can be calculated instantly, quickly, and more efficiently. The results of the research are in the form of a web-based application as a platform for companies to manage taxpayer data, and make it easier for companies to process it.
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based Monthly Tax Report Data Processing Information System at the Unilever Padang Depot
Keyword: Unilever Padang Website Tax Report Information System
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: In accepting foster children, there are usually certain criteria that must be met by prospective foster children, such as age, health, education, and so on. In addition, there are also criteria that must be met by orphanages, such as the number of bedrooms, educational facilities, and so on. In this situation, it is important to have a system that can assist in decision making so that errors do not occur in the selection of prospective foster children. This study aims to implement the VlseKriterijumska Optimizacija I Kompromisno Resenje (VIKOR) method in the assessment to select prospective foster children who will enter the Hanifa III Kampung Orphanage and also a tool to speed up the selection. The VIKOR method can determine the rank of each child which is determined from the value generated from several calculation processes and make it a solution, in carrying out the calculation process there are several criteria that are the benchmark for carrying out the process, namely Child Status (C1), Parental Employment Status (C2), Parental Income (C3), and Child Education (C4). The results of this study indicate that the VIKOR method can speed up the selection for prospective foster children who will be accepted at the Hanifa III Orphanage in the village where the results are seen from the ranking where the ranking is taken from the smallest result of the VIKOR method calculation process.
Judul Paper: Design of a Decision Support System for Accepting Foster Children at the Hanifa III Orphanage Using the Vikor Method
Keyword: Decision Support System (SPK) VIKOR Method Orphanage for Foster Children Hanifa III
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: This research aims to design a VPN network system by utilizing a public network, where this system aims to provide security by using IPSec in providing confidential information through the L2TP tunnel method from the server to the branch/client computer and vice versa. VPN is implemented using the layer 2 tunneling protocol (L2TP) using two Mikrotik routers. There are only minor changes to the computer network configuration to minimize costs and implementation time. Testing is carried out to implement security on the network using the command prompt, where the admin observes packet loss and delay parameters to determine the improvement in the quality of security on the network.
Judul Paper: VPN Server Implementation Using L2TP Protocol and IPSEC Method
Keyword: Virtual Private Network (VPN) Mikrotik L2TP IPsec
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: Mountain climbing requires high vigilance and preparedness related to various conditions that may be faced. In order to improve the safety and comfort of climbers, this research designs and builds a system for detecting ground level, air pressure and temperature as well as monitoring the health of climbers with Telegram notifications based on Arduino Mega 2560. This system uses Arduino Mega 2560 technology, a board-based micro-controller that can be programmed for various applications. The system is able to detect and monitor ground level, air pressure, temperature and climbers' health conditions in real-time. In addition, the system is also integrated with Telegram, a popular communication platform. The Telegram notification facility is used to send information and alerts from the system to climbers or support teams. Thus, preventive measures or emergency treatment can be taken immediately if there is a significant change in conditions. With the design of this system, it is expected that the safety and comfort of mountain climbers can be better guaranteed, and the risk of accidents and unwanted health conditions can be minimized. This research contributes to the development of supporting technology for safer and more comfortable mountaineering activities
Judul Paper: Design of a System for Detecting Ground Height, Air Pressure and Temperature and Health Monitoring for Climbers During Mountain Climbing Using Telegram Notifications Based on Arduino Mega 2560
Keyword: Arduino Mega 2560 NodeMCU 8266 BME280 MLX90614 LCD LED Buzzer
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Current technological developments are very helpful for users in any case. This includes helping authorities determine whether someone is abusing drugs. Drug abuse is a serious problem that affects an individual's health and quality of life. This study aims to develop an expert system that can assist in the process of diagnosing drug users using the Naïve Bayes method. The Naïve Bayes method is a classification method based on Bayes' theorem with the assumption that all attributes used in the classification are independent. The attributes used in this study are age, gender, history of drug use, and symptoms. This study uses data from individuals who have been diagnosed as drug users. The results of this study are producing a diagnosis of the type of drug consumed with an accuracy value. There is one drug user who was diagnosed with methamphetamine abuse with an accuracy value of 0.4468.
Judul Paper: Application of an Expert System in Diagnosing Drug Users Using the Naïve Bayes Method
Keyword: Naïve Bayes Expert System for Diagnosing Drug Diseases BNN
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: The information system for mosque activities and finances that takes place every month so that information on activities and finances by the mosque and the community to monitor incoming and outgoing funds because it is related to alms and government assistance, it is very important to report regularly and online on financial transactions. This research is in the form of a System Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method which produces quality work stages that are in accordance with the objectives of the system.
Judul Paper: Activity Management Information System
Keyword: Information Systems, ordering, sales
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Floods frequently occur in Indonesia, including Padang City. Frequently changing weather conditions make it difficult to predict whether the weather has the potential for flooding. This early warning system is a form of disaster management that aims to take quick and appropriate action in predicting floods using data mining techniques. This research is a process for predicting flood disasters using the K-Means Clustering method. Data obtained from the BMKG are grouped into one or more clusters and then processed. Data analysis and processing use the RapidMiner v.5.3 tool. The results of this study obtained clusters that become levels of flood disaster danger consisting of low, medium, and high levels.
Judul Paper: Application of Data Mining for Early Flood Warning Using the K-Means Clustering Method (Case Study of Padang City)
Keyword: Data Mining Clustering K-Means Rapid Miner BMKG Early Warning
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: The development of technology and information has changed people's behavior from an industrial society to an innovative society. This change can be seen from the growth of people's consumption habits from trading through physical stores (offline) to trading through electronic systems, or what is often referred to as. Online shopping. The logistics service is a distribution operator in the downstream region, whose job it is to deliver products from the delivery center of the online store to the end customer. Logistics services must fulfill consumer demands in accordance with the Service Level Agreement (SLA). Uncertain demand is the biggest challenge for logistics service providers. As in the case study used in this study, PT ABC experienced an overload when fulfilling requests from PT XYZ, an e-commerce company. The overload was caused by PT ABC's reluctance to face a very significant increase in demand due to changes in the selling price of product A at PT XYZ's online store. This study proposes a model to predict the selling price of product A at PT XYZ's online store using a Monte Carlo simulation model with independent variables. The simulation was run with 1000 trials and produced the lowest MAPE out of 322 trials, namely 0.122%.
Judul Paper: Prediction of Product Selling Price Volatility in E-Commerce for Independent Stockashtic Data
Keyword: E-Commerce Forecasting Monte Carlo Industrial Revolution
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Advances in information and communication technology are growing rapidly in all directions so that a lot of information is produced from technology and is applied in various fields. In the field of information technology, an inventory system is also needed which is used to view the stock of goods at UD. Anugrah Jaya Tani. UD. Anugrah Jaya Tani is a kiosk that sells various herbicides. The use of chemical herbicides is intended so that they do not affect cultivated plants but affect the growth of weeds. Therefore, it takes herbicides or substances that are selective and precise in controlling weeds. Inventory systems are one of the parts that can also be developed with the existence of internet resources. The internet can play a role in facilitating activities. This is because inventory activities require communication between the parties involved in this matter. The purpose of using an inventory system where the most basic is being able to align customer demand with existing supply or control existing inventory. The results of this study are to determine the amount of stock of goods to be marketed, create a system that can be accessed by anyone, and create an attractive consultation layout. Inventory is storage owned by a company to be traded or used for company operations. All items are referred to as an inventory system, depending on the type of the Company's business
Judul Paper: Inventory System Design for Stock of Herbicides at UD. Anugrah Jaya Tani Using the PHP Programming Language and MySql Database
Keyword: Planning Inventory system stock design marketing Herbicides
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This study describes the design of an expert system using the Fordward Chaining method to diagnose psoriasis supported by a MySQL database and the PHP programming language. From the research conducted at RSUD M. Djamil, it can be concluded that the old system used is ineffective because the process is time-consuming and space-consuming, resulting in less efficient employee performance. After conducting research at RSUD. M. Djamil Padang by collecting data using interviews and other methods, it can be concluded that the information system used is still not optimal. Therefore, the design of the output design, input design, file design and program flow of the new system was carried out. The results of the analysis were applied to an expert system application program. The new information system designed is expected to improve the quality of information and performance in the future.
Judul Paper: Design of an Information System for Processing Production and Cake Ingredient Data by Applying the FIFO Method Using the Java Programming Language and Mysql Database (Sultan Cake Case Study)
Keyword: PHP MySQL Sistem Pakar Fordward Chaining
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This study describes the design of an expert system using the AHP and Topsis methods to diagnose Toyota car brake failures supported by a MySQL database and the PHP programming language. From the research conducted at Cempaka Mobilindo Padang, it can be concluded that the old system used was ineffective because the process was time-consuming and space-consuming, resulting in less efficient employee performance. After conducting research at Cempaka Mobilindo Padang by collecting data using interviews and other methods, it can be concluded that the information system used is still not optimal. Therefore, the output design, input design, file design and program flow of the new system were designed. The results of the analysis were implemented into an expert system application program. The new information system designed is expected to improve the quality of information and performance in the future.
Judul Paper: Application of AHP and TOPDID Methods in Web-Based Expert System Applications for Diagnosing Damage to Toyota Car Braking Systems in Cempaka Mobilindo Padang
Keyword: PHP MySQL Topsis AHP Expert System
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This study describes the design of a report card processing information system supported by a MySQL database and the PHP programming language. From the research conducted at SMA N 7 Padang, it can be concluded that the old system used was ineffective because the process was time-consuming and space-consuming, resulting in less efficient employee performance. After conducting research at SMAN 7 Padang by collecting data using interviews and other methods, it can be concluded that the information system used is still not optimal. Therefore, the output design, input design, file design and program flow of the new system were designed. The results of the analysis were implemented into an expert system application program. The new information system designed is expected to improve the quality of information and performance in the future.
Judul Paper: Information System for Processing Academic Report Cards at SMAN 7 Padang Using the PHP Programming Language and MySQL Database
Keyword: PHP MySQL Raport Database Sistem Informasi
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: The development of science and technology (IPTEK) in the world of electronics and telecommunications is currently experiencing very significant progress, this is evidenced by the existence of a variety of new and sophisticated inventions that can minimize time and energy not only used for computers, era globalization requires humans to create a control system that makes it easier for humans to use it. The damage produced by livestock waste to communities around rivers is livestock waste that is disposed of into rivers will damage river water because the waste will dissolve in river water and can destroying communities that use rivers as a resource for them. Therefore this system is made by designing, manufacturing and implementing system components which include a microcontroller as a controller, a thermocouple sensor is used to measure the temperature resulting from burning livestock waste. Peltier modules and solar cells are the main energy producers in thermoelectric generators. The voltage sensor is used to measure how much voltage is generated which will be displayed in the application menu. HC-05 Bluetooth module as a liaison between the microcontroller and the mobile application via a smartphone. Buzzer and Led as indicators on the battery when the battery is only 20% left. Batteries as a storage medium for power generated from the burning of livestock waste. The results showed that the tools that were made could function properly and could be developed for a larger scale.
Judul Paper: Alternative Electric Energy Production Using Microcontroller Based Mobile Applications
Keyword: Electrical Energy Microcontroller Mobile Application
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: PDF files are one of the document files that are classified as having sufficient size larger than other document files. Currently, the use of applications as information is increasing commonly used. But there is a problem that is often encountered, namely the need for a safe place great for storage. Therefore, compression is needed to reduce the size of the application data. Data compression is a process of converting a set of data into a form of code to reduce the need for data storage space. The Five Modulus method is wrong a data compression algorithm. To find out the results of the compression process is done through the ratio compression and space saving. The results to be known, the compression ratio and space saving. According to the test results The tests that were carried out show that the data that originally had a larger size can be very well compressed on the application of the Five Modulus method in compressing document files (PDF).
Judul Paper: Application of the Five Modulus Method in Compressing Document Files (PDF) for Teaching Material Development
Keyword: Compression Document File (PDF) Five Modulus Method
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Management of transaction data in the retail business under study is still carried out conventionally and has not been integrated, this causes the complexity of calculating the number of transactions and stock of goods. For this reason, an analysis of sales transactions was carried out using the k-means method using sales transaction data for 24 samples of goods. There are 3 clusters formed with iteration calculations carried out in 4 iteration stages. The first cluster (Selling Goods) produced 7 items, the second cluster (Selling Goods) produced 5 items and the third cluster (Unsold Goods) produced 12 members. The results of this clustering analysis are used to implement business IT applications in retail business transactions.
Judul Paper: IT Management with K-Means Clustering for Grouping Stock of Goods
Keyword: clustering k means it management persediaan
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Computer-based information systems have now become an important matter for meeting the needs of society. Many fields have used computer-based information systems as a means to facilitate work, both from the business world to academics and education and almost in all fields use computers as a tool to facilitate work. One of them is tax calculations at a company with an information system that can be done instantly, quickly and more efficiently. The results of the research are in the form of a web-based application as a forum for companies to manage taxpayer data, and make it easier for companies to process it
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based Monthly Tax Report Data Processing Information System at the Unilever Padang Depot
Keyword: Information systems Taxes Web
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This study discusses the development of an expert system for diagnosing skin diseases in humans using a hybrid approach combining Forward Chaining and Certainty Factor methods. This system aims to assist medical personnel and lay individuals in accurately identifying and diagnosing skin diseases. The hybrid method used combines the advantages of various artificial intelligence techniques, such as rule-based and artificial neural networks, to improve diagnostic accuracy. Patient data and medical information are used as input, and the system provides fast and reliable diagnostic recommendations. The results of this study are expected to improve skin health services, enable early detection of skin diseases, and optimize patient care.
Judul Paper: Expert System for Diagnosing Skin Diseases in Humans Using Hybrid Methods
Keyword: Sistem Pakar Penyakit Kulit Hybrid Forward Chaining Certainty Factor
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The health service information system at the Kambang Community Health Center is a system that provides services to the public regarding information related to the Kambang Community Health Center based on a website. The system's performance in conveying information from the Community Health Center to the public still uses social media applications, and the management of patient data that has been treated is still done manually and does not use technology. Therefore, researchers want to design a web-based health service information system, with this new system design, which previously provided information still using other social media, and patient data management for treatment was still manual, with this website it is hoped that it can provide convenience to the Community Health Center for collecting patient data, and the public can easily receive information provided by the Community Health Center, as well as provide a website-based identity.
Judul Paper: Implementation of a Web-Based Public Service Information System at the Kambang Community Health Center
Keyword: Information Systems, Public Services, Web, Community Health Centers, Health.
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: In the competitive culinary industry, particularly within the café sector, maintaining high service quality and operational efficiency is essential for business sustainability. Employee performance significantly influences both productivity and customer satisfaction, making an effective performance assessment system vital for fostering motivation and consistency among staff. This study implements a Decision Support System (DSS) based on the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method to evaluate employees across key criteria, such as attendance, daily performance, attitude, and teamwork. By applying the SAW method, the DSS enables a straightforward, objective, and data-driven approach to identifying top-performing employees, thus assisting management in recognizing outstanding contributions and boosting overall team motivation. The goal of this research is to ensure that the system can be easily implemented in the café environment and has a substantial impact on improving both employee performance and morale, contributing to enhanced service quality and operational success.
Judul Paper: Optimizing The Selection Of Best Employees Using The Saw Method
Keyword: Employee performance Decision Support System (DSS) Simple Additive Weighting (SAW)
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Network security has become a critical issue in today's digital era, given the numerous threats that can compromise the integrity and confidentiality of data. One approach to address this problem is by using encryption and authentication techniques. Encryption transforms data into a form that cannot be read by unauthorized parties, while authentication ensures that only legitimate users can access the system. This research develops a network security system that implements encryption using the RSA (Rivest-Shamir-Adleman) algorithm and a two-factor authentication (2FA) mechanism. The results of the testing show that the combination of these two techniques significantly improves network security, reducing the potential for data breaches and unauthorized access. The system also facilitates the management of encryption keys and user verification processes. This study is expected to contribute to enhancing the resilience of network security, particularly in environments vulnerable to cyber threats.
Judul Paper: Development Of Network Security Systems Using Computer-Based Encryption And Authentication Techniques
Keyword: Network Security, Encryption, Authentication, RSA, Security System
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: The rapid development of Information and Communication Technology (Infocom) has led to significant advancements in business decision-making, particularly through the application of Big Data and Artificial Intelligence (AI). This paper explores how these technologies are utilized to enhance business decision-making processes, providing organizations with valuable insights and predictive capabilities. Big Data refers to the vast amount of structured and unstructured data generated from various business activities, while AI leverages algorithms and machine learning techniques to analyze this data, uncover patterns, and make informed predictions. The integration of Big Data and AI enables businesses to improve efficiency, optimize resource allocation, and gain a competitive edge in a dynamic market environment. The paper discusses various applications, including predictive analytics, customer segmentation, and supply chain optimization, highlighting their impact on strategic and operational decision-making. Moreover, it addresses the challenges associated with the implementation of these technologies, such as data quality, privacy concerns, and the need for skilled professionals. Ultimately, the study emphasizes that the synergy between Big Data and AI, when effectively implemented, can drive data-driven business strategies and foster innovation.
Judul Paper: The Application Of Big Data And Artificial Intelligence In Business Decision-Making Based On Infocom Technology
Keyword: ig Data, Artificial Intelligence, Business Decission Making, Predictive Analytics, Machine Learning
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: In the era of rapid digitalization, network security has become a critical concern for organizations and individuals alike. The role of Information and Communication Technology (ICT) in enhancing network security is pivotal in safeguarding sensitive data and maintaining the integrity of digital infrastructures. This paper explores the various ways ICT tools and strategies can be applied to strengthen network security measures, particularly in the context of emerging cyber threats. By leveraging advanced technologies such as firewalls, encryption, intrusion detection systems, and artificial intelligence, organizations can better prevent, detect, and respond to potential security breaches. Additionally, the integration of ICT in cybersecurity practices supports real-time monitoring, threat analysis, and proactive risk management. The findings highlight the importance of adopting a comprehensive and adaptive approach to network security, emphasizing the need for continuous updates and innovations to address the evolving landscape of cyber threats. Overall, ICT plays a crucial role in creating resilient network security frameworks that ensure the protection of data and digital assets in an increasingly connected world.
Judul Paper: The Role Of Information And Communication Technology In Enhancing Network Security In The Cyber Era
Keyword: Network Security, Information Communication Technology, Cyber Threats, Intrusion Detection, Risk Management
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This research examines the application of the Agile Scrum method in developing the MBKM Report mobile application at Universitas Putra Indonesia YPTK Padang. Agile Scrum was chosen because of its ability to adapt to changes quickly and increase interaction between application users and the development team. This research applies a qualitative descriptive method with data collection techniques through observation, interviews and literature study. The initial development stage starts from needs analysis, design using Unified Modeling Language (UML), to application implementation and testing. The research results show that Agile Scrum can improve the quality of applications and the efficiency of the resulting development process. It is believed that the implementation of the MBKM Report application can speed up the process of reporting and monitoring MBKM activities and improve academic services at Universitas Putra Indonesia YPTK Padang
Judul Paper: Application of the Agile Scrum Method in Designing the MBKM-Report Mobile Application at Putra Indonesia University YPTK Padang
Keyword: Agile Scrum MBKM Mobile Application
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: The challenge of maintaining accurate and efficient inventory management is a significant issue faced by retail companies. Ineffective inventory management can lead to stockouts, overstocking, and increased operational costs. The objective of this research is to develop an Inventory Management Information System (IMIS) to address these issues by streamlining inventory tracking, minimizing manual errors, and providing real-time data for better decision-making.This study employs a system development methodology that includes requirement analysis, system design, implementation, and evaluation. The IMIS is developed using PHP and MySQL for backend processes, ensuring the system is robust and scalable. Key functionalities of the system include automated inventory updates, low stock alerts, and comprehensive reporting tools.The results of this research indicate that the implementation of the IMIS significantly enhances the accuracy and efficiency of inventory management. The system provides real-time visibility into stock levels, which enables timely restocking and reduces instances of stockouts and overstocking. User feedback highlights high satisfaction with the system's ease of use and its positive impact on operational workflows.In conclusion, the developed IMIS proves to be a valuable tool for retail companies, improving inventory management practices and contributing to more informed strategic decisions through detailed data analysis. This research underscores the importance of integrating information technology solutions in retail operations to enhance efficiency and effectiveness.
Judul Paper: Development of Inventory Management Information System in A Retail Company
Keyword: Inventory Management Information System Retail Company Real-time Data Operational Efficiency
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Technological developments, particularly the internet, have transformed the landscape of business and public services in today's digital era. The concept of "Smart Village" has emerged as an innovative approach to utilizing information and communication technology to improve the quality of life of communities at the village level. This research focuses on the readiness of the village in the Asam Kumbang Village Head Office, West Sumatra Province, towards becoming a Smart Village. Through the implementation of an information system designed using UML (Unified Modeling Language) and web-based using PHP and MySQL, it is hoped that various problems can be overcome, such as limited access to information, complex administrative management, and limited community participation. The purpose of this research is to improve the quality of service, improve resource management, and encourage local economic growth through connectivity with tourists and business actors to create local economic opportunities and realize the vision of a more modern and efficient village.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of the Nagari Information System Towards a Web-Based Smart Village at the Wali Nagari Asam Kumbang Office in Pesisir Selatan Using the PHP Programming Language and MySQL Database
Keyword: Information Systems, Smart Village, UML, Web, Php and My Sql
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The Women's Savings and Loans Program is one of the Indonesian government's efforts to develop rural savings and loans opportunities, strengthen women's institutions, and encourage the reduction of poor households and job creation. The decision support system for the selection of recipients of women's savings and loans funds aims to determine the profitability of lending to women's groups in UPK in North Rao district. Suboptimal decision-making can interfere with the provision of women's savings and loans funds. This system is made by the Electre method (Elimination et choix traduisantla realite). The aim is to help the UPK of Pohjois Rao Subdistrict to provide objective and targeted assistance based on different levels of importance from each criterion. System created using the Electre method, (Elimination et choix traduisantla realite). The aim is to help the North Rao Subdistrict UPK provide assistance objectively and purposefully based on different levels of importance from each criterion. Calculations are carried out for each criterion in this system, which then shows the rating results from the highest to the lowest, so that it can be used as a reference for UPK to determine borrowers.
Judul Paper: PNPM WOMEN'S SAVINGS AND LOANS (SPP) DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM USING THE ELECTRE METHOD
Keyword: SPK
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Providing Direct Cash Assistance (BLT) in Kuranji District, Padang City, is still done manually, which can result in inaccurate decisions and take a long time, so that assistance is often not on target. The solution to this problem is to use a decision support system with the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) method. The SAW method is a weighted addition that produces accurate ranking decisions. The design of this SPK application uses the PHP programming language and MySQL database, which can process data quickly and accurately for making decisions on the feasibility of receiving BLT in Kuranji District, Padang City. By implementing the SAW method, the process of determining the eligibility of BLT recipients becomes faster and more accurate. The research results show that people who are worthy of receiving BLT are those who have the five highest scores in the ranking, while those ranked below five are considered not worthy of receiving assistance. Based on the values produced by the calculation and ranking of the SAW method, this can be a reference in determining BLT recipients at the Kuranji District Head Office, Padang City. The use of the PHP programming language and MySQL database in this system supports the performance of the Kuranji District Head's Office in managing BLT recipient criteria data and storing BLT data safely, minimizing the risk of data loss.
Judul Paper: Application of the SAW Method in SPK to Determine Communities Who Are Eligible for BLT Assistance (Case Study: Communities in Kuranji District, Padang City)
Keyword: Direct Cash Assistance Decision Support System SAW PHP MySQL
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: The advancement of science facilitates the development of new technologies that signify the progress of society. MTsS Muhammadiyah Kurai Taji aims to incorporate information technology into its data processing activities. Currently, the school relies on manual methods for processing student data, which often results in inaccuracies, particularly in classifying underprivileged students and other categories. This manual approach has led to challenges in maintaining valid data, which in turn complicates the decision-making process for scholarship allocations. To address these issues, the author proposes the development of a web-based A decision Support System (DSS). A DSS is a computer-based information system designed to support organizational decision-making. The proposed system will utilize MySQL database management to ensure the accuracy and validity of the data. By implementing this web-based information system, the school will benefit from increased time efficiency in data retrieval and scholarship processing. Additionally, this system will streamline reporting processes and improve the identification of students eligible for scholarship assistance, thereby addressing the current challenges faced by the school.
Judul Paper: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR SCHOLARSHIP RECIPIENT SELECTION USING THE SIMPLE ADDITIVE WEIGHTING (SAW) METHOD
Keyword: Decision Support System Scholarship PHP MySQL Simple Additive Weighting
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Crafts are a very strong identity for a region. Among the many crafts in Indonesia, there is a craft called embroidery or commonly called embroidery. One of the embroideries found in the archipelago is Koto Gadang Embroidery which is a handicraft decorating cloth with thread traditionally done by the people of Koto Gadang, one of the villages in IV Koto District, Agam Regency, West Sumatra Province. Koto Gadang Embroidery as one of the superior handicrafts of West Sumatra province has uniqueness in terms of motifs, patterns, history, and meaning. This embroidery is often made to decorate shawls, baju kurung, and other traditional equipment. So far, tourists visiting Koto Gadang get information from local people and tourists who have visited before and get information from review sites from the internet and unofficial videos distributed on YouTube and social media such as Facebook and Instagram, the form of existing videos also describes little information and is minimal, making visitors not interested. Seeing the rapid development of technology, especially in the media sector, there is a need for effective information media to support the delivery of information about Koto Gadang embroidery.
Judul Paper: Koto Gadang D&D Embroidery Audio Visual in Audio Visual Form
Keyword: Audio Visual Promotional Media for Koto Gadang Embroidery
Jurnal: NJCA(Nusantara journal of computers and ITS application

Abstrak: Internet technology can simplify human life in the economic industry, one example of which is the use of internet technology in restaurants and cafes. One technological development is electronic payments. Based on data from Bank Indonesia, the number of electronic money transactions during 2019 continued to increase every month. E-Money is a very potential alternative in encouraging increased financial inclusion. However, not all restaurants or cafes utilize this technology, such as Zea Corn Blend. The payment process at Zea Corn Blend has not fully utilized technology, as evidenced by the availability of cash only payments, which creates limitations for customers who do not carry cash. Therefore, Zea Corn Blend requires a system that can provide cashless payments. Research results show that electronic or cashless payments have an impact on customers in the form of convenience and speed in making transactions.
Judul Paper: Implementation of QR Code Technology in the MSME Business Payment System "Zea Corn Blend"
Keyword: E-Money Cashless Payment Technology
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Consumers find it difficult to get bus ticket reservation information and it is less efficient in terms of time and cost because consumers have to come directly. The web is one of the services obtained by computer users connected to the internet. This web provides information for computer users connected to the internet. A website or site can be interpreted as a collection of pages used to display text information, still or moving images, animations, sounds, and/or a combination of all of these, both static and dynamic, which form a series of interconnected buildings where each is connected to the internet network.
Judul Paper: Ticket Ordering Information System
Keyword: Transportation online bus ticket information system
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The main problem encountered in stock supplies and ordering rice is that there are many factors in various types of rice that can influence the quality of the rice itself. There needs to be an assessment to determine the quality of rice. This can be done using a model that can determine the quality of rice in accordance with the criteria desired by consumers. to get the best quality rice. This will have a good impact on the company if the quality of the rice matches consumer demand, as a result the company will experience an increase in production because the type of rice meets the criteria desired by consumers. And the rice company exports its rice to rice shops and restaurants. In designing a stock inventory and rice ordering information system using PHP and MySQL, we can integrate these two technologies to build a web application that is effective and efficient in managing stock inventory and carry out the rice ordering process. With this system, it is hoped that it can help rice business owners manage stock inventories, carry out ordering processes more quickly and easily, and increase business efficiency and productivity.
Judul Paper: Design of a Stock Inventory and Rice Ordering Information System Using the PHP Programming Language and MySQL Database (Case Study: Huller Armaini)
Keyword: System Information Unified Modelling Language MySql PHP Database
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: This study describes the design of an expert system using AHP and Topsis methods to diagnose Toyota car brakes supported with MySQL database and PHP programming language. From the research carried out at Cempaka Mobilindo Padang it can be concluded that the old system used is ineffective due to the processes that are carried out taking time and space, thus making the performance of employees less efficient. After conducting research on Cempaka Mobilindo Padang by collecting data using interview methods and other methods, it can be concluded that the information system used is still not optimal. Hence the design of the output design, input design, file design and program flow of the new system are carried out. The results of the analysis are applied into an expert system application program. The newly designed information system is expected to improve information quality and performance in the future
Judul Paper: Web-Based AHP and Topsis Methods for Diagnosing Damage to the Toyota Cempaka Padang Car Braking System
Keyword: Expert System Topsis System Information PHP Database
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Wedding photography is an integral part of the creative industry. Leveraging IT, Pict Story Wedding Photographers chose an integrated approach by designing a web-based booking and financial information system. The integration of PHP and MySQL allows developers to produce web applications that are not only responsive and interactive, but also efficient in data management and storage. The combination of PHP as a server-side programming language and MySQL as a database server provides a robust solution for building reliable and effective websites. The dominant manual booking process can create uncertainty in the shooting schedule, while unautomated financial management can slow down the financial reporting process. The purpose of this research is to build a web-based information system, with the aim of increasing efficiency and effectiveness in booking and financial management at Pict Story Wedding Photographers. The implementation results show that the design of a web-based booking and financial information system, implemented with PHP and MySQL, provides a positive contribution, allowing for ease in conducting booking and financial management at Pict Story Wedding Photographers easily and efficiently.
Judul Paper: Designing a Web-Based Booking and Financial Information System for Pict Story Wedding Photographers Using the Php Programming Language and Mysql Database
Keyword: Wedding Photography Booking PHP MySQL Financial Management Information System
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: SDN 15 Ulakan Tapakis is one of the institutions engaged in the field of education located in Ulakan Tapakis District, Padang Pariaman Regency. The school management system at SDN 15 Ulakan Tapakis has not been computerized and well integrated, so it still has many shortcomings in meeting the needs of the school or agency, especially in handling school management activities. So far, work and information are still done manually, namely for bookkeeping the system is still written in a ledger and the use of Microsoft Excel which does not use computerized technology. This manual process has many risks that can occur such as data loss, scattered archives, damage and requires a long time in searching and presenting the required data. For this reason, computerized data collection is needed as a tool in recording school data. Therefore, the author conducted research to build a management information system at SDN 15 Ulakan Tapakis, using the PHP programming language and MySQL database. With this school management information system, it can facilitate searching for data and information, as well as making reports more quickly and effectively at SDN 15 Ulakan Tapakis.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a School Management Information System Using the Php Programming Language (Case Study: Elementary School 15 Ulakan Tapakis)
Keyword: PHP MySQL School Management Information System
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: One of the economic drivers is MSMEs, traditional food MSMEs can be an important factor in economic growth. The increasing recognition of traditional foods can boost the economy and create jobs, another thing that will happen is helping preserve local traditions and culture. In maintaining traditional culinary class and facilitating access to information about traditional culinary, a facility is needed that can become a place for consumers to obtain information such as the location and price of traditional foods. Therefore, a system using the web is needed as an efficient alternative to disseminating information, because by using the web, information can be accessed more flexibly on various devices. In developing the "njajan" application, the data collection methods used were observation and interviews. While the software development method chosen was waterfall. The waterfall method is one of the SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) models. Testing of the application uses the black box testing method, this is done to determine the success of the functionality of the features that have been created and testing the appearance of the admin. The application of the waterfall model is appropriate in designing a web-based "njajan" system using the Laravel framework, the software project can run well and according to the stages of the Waterfall method: requirements, design, implementation, verification, and maintenance.
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based "Njajan" System for Promotion and Marketing of Traditional Culinary in the Jepara Region
Keyword: SDCL Waterfall Traditional Culinary Snack System
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: Loyal customers have a positive impact on a company, both through repeat purchases and product recommendations to others. However, in the business world, various factors can influence a customer's decision to switch to a competitor, such as price, product quality, and service. Therefore, it is important for companies to understand customer behavior and make strategic decisions to maintain and increase their loyalty. In this study, the RFM (Recency, Frequency, Monetary) and Naïve Bayes methods were used to analyze customer behavior and predict customer churn. The CRISP-DM approach was used in the solution steps, including the stages of business understanding, data understanding, data preparation, modeling, evaluation, and implementation. Through RFM analysis, five different customer segments were identified: at-risk customers, best customers, lost customers, loyal customers, and promising customers. Each segment has different characteristics and behavioral tendencies, providing valuable insights for companies in understanding customer needs and preferences. The results of the Naïve Bayes evaluation showed that the model stored in pickle format has equivalent performance to previously tested models. The model's accuracy, recall, and fl-score were all around 0.81, or 81%, indicating good accuracy in predicting customer churn. Using the pickle model offers companies advantages in terms of time and cost efficiency.
Judul Paper: Customer Churn Analysis for Fashion Campus Products Using the RFM Analysis Method and Naïve Bayes Algorithm (Case Study of the Bakti Achmad Zaky Foundation)
Keyword: Pelanggan Churn RFM Analysis Naïve Bayes CRISP-DM
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: West Java province and one of the densely populated cities in Indonesia. Therefore, predicting and analyzing food prices based on historical data is useful for identifying trends and providing useful information for the government and the public. This study developed a model using gated recurrent units (GRU), a specific version of a recurrent neural network (RNN), to predict the prices of chicken, rice, shallots, eggs, and garlic in traditional markets in Bandung. The GRU model was trained using a dataset from the National Strategic Food Price Information Center. The dataset was collected from January 2018 to February 2023. The experimental results showed that GRU was successfully implemented for forecasting the prices of chicken eggs, rice, shallots, chicken, and garlic. The best model produced Mean Absolute Errors (MAE) of 338.1, 341.8, 118.3, 133.1, and 4.3 for the prices of garlic, shallots, eggs, chicken, and rice, respectively.
Judul Paper: Analysis And Forecasting of Foodstuffs Prices In Bandung Using Gated Recurrent Unit
Keyword: RNN GRU MAE food price predictions
Jurnal: Jurnal Esensi Infokom: Jurnal Esensi Sistem Informasi dan Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: The drug availability search application in Prabumulih City is an Android-based drug availability search application that functions to make it easier for people to search for the availability of the desired drug at the nearest pharmacy without having to first go to several pharmacies to check the drug they want, making it more effective and efficient. In addition to being Android-based. The application was designed using the RAD method used to design Android-based applications, namely Android Studio. The Drug Availability Search Application at Pharmacies in Prabumulih City can present more effective and efficient information to find the location of pharmacies that provide the desired drug, and find out detailed drug information.
Judul Paper: Designing an Android-Based Application for Selling and Purchasing Medicines at the Padang Lalang Prabumulih Pharmacy
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Bintang Plafon Prabumulih Shop is one of the shops engaged in the sale of ceilings located on Jalan Cincin Sindur, Sindur Village, Cambai District, Prabumulih City, South Sumatra Province, in ordering goods at the shop is still done by coming in person or via telephone. Therefore the author tried to create a web-based ordering system using PHP and MySQL to make it easier to order goods online. web-based goods ordering system using PHP programming language with the help of UML in helping to design the system to be created. This design uses the waterfall method, so it can be concluded that this system is feasible if the goods ordering system is implemented at Bintang Plafon Prabumulih Shop.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the CodeIgniter Framework in Creating the Prabumulih Bintang Ceiling Ordering Website
Keyword: Codeigniter, Booking, Ceiling, Website, Waterfall
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Business Intelligence (BI) is a system or application that plays a role in data management in a company or organization with the aim of producing relevant information. The BI approach also includes the process of collecting company operational data and integrating that data into a data warehouse to meet company needs. In this study, the methods used to support Business Intelligence include OLAP (Online Analytical Processing) and ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) methods. The OLAP method consists of several techniques, including Drill-down, Roll-up, slicer, dice, and pivot. This method allows users to analyze data in detail, summarize, cut, and pivot data as needed. Meanwhile, the ETL method consists of three stages. The first stage is extraction, which aims to retrieve data from various sources and make it usable anywhere. The second stage is Transformation, which converts existing data into the desired format. The third stage is Loading, which is the process of entering or sending data to a destination, such as an application or database. The result of this study is the creation of a Dashboard containing revenue data. The purpose of this dashboard is to make it easier for managers to analyze data and draw conclusions regarding the steps to be taken for company progress. Power BI was used to create this dashboard because it offers a variety of relevant features. Besides assisting with dashboard creation, Power BI also enables the use of ETL and OLAP methods to integrate previously disparate or fragmented data into a unified whole, not just using Power BI but also with the assistance of R Studio.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Business Intelligence on Revenue Data case study (PT. Pos Indonesia)
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: Based on observations that have been carried out at the 3KG LPG Gas Base in Purun Timur Village, problems were found regarding the management and ordering process where the existing gas data management has only used a simple method, namely by recording in a ledger regarding gas orders ordered by retailers and reconfirming to customers by telephone or via WhatsApp that the order has been recorded. The owner of the 3KG LPG gas order only informs the availability of gas stock at certain hours so that retailers do not know the availability of gas stock periodically. This is certainly less effective and efficient in terms of time and energy. Therefore, an online 3KG LPG gas management and ordering application is needed that can place orders and provide information on the availability of 3KG LPG gas. The research method used is a qualitative descriptive method, while for the system development method using the RAD (Rapid application development) method.
Judul Paper: Android-based Management and Ordering Application for the 3KG LPG Gas Base in Purun Timur Village
Keyword: Applications, Management, Gas, Android, LPG
Jurnal: Journal of Scientech Research and Development

Abstrak: The Yii Framework is a high-performance component-based PHP framework for developing large-scale web applications. The system implemented at SMK Negeri 2 Prabumulih still uses a semi-manual method, namely using MS-Excel, such as the lack of data storage media, and inventory data has not been integrated. This is the background for this research. Inventory is an asset, an activity of recording assets or goods as well as managing asset data owned by an organization professionally for the smooth operation of its operations. The result of this research is an inventory system design with the Yii framework using the UCD (User Centered Design) concept which is expected to help resolve the obstacles that occur. By using an inventory system that can help the infrastructure department, principals, and teachers in obtaining and managing inventory items accurately and in a faster time. In designing this system, the user-centered design method is used with the Unified Modeling Language (UML) system modeling tool, which consists of use case diagrams, activity diagrams, and class diagrams.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Yii Framework in Building an Inventory System at SMK Negeri 2 Prabumulih Using the User Centered Design (UCD) Model
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: The purpose of this research is to create a Design of Order Receipt Management Information System, Case Study: PT Aulia Jaya Corp, in addition the author hopes that users can understand the purpose of this system. The research method used is to use the interview method and field observation. After that the author designed, analyzed, and drew conclusions that previously the Order Receipt Management Information System at PT Aulia Jaya Corp was not always developed, so that by making this application program it can be used to simplify work such as, inputting data, orders and shipping, searching data, and making reports to be more accurate.
Judul Paper: Design of an Order Receiving Management Information System at PT Aulia Jaya Corp Java Based
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Posyandu is one of the UKBM managed and organized from, by, for and with the community. Posyandu is held to provide convenience to the community in obtaining basic health services, thereby accelerating the reduction of maternal and infant mortality rates. Considering that Posyandu is very important, it is necessary to have a service transaction media and integrated web-based SIP (Posyandu Information System) reports. In this study, researchers tried to utilize web-based information technology and SMS gateway features to facilitate the processing, searching, knowing the development of pregnant women and toddlers or babies and facilitate notification of Posyandu service activity reporting data with SMS gateway features for Posyandu participants in Sukarami Village, Muara Enim Regency. With the Posyandu information system website, it is hoped that it can overcome the problems that occur in Sukarami Village, Muara Enim Regency. This is the background for this study. In collecting data, researchers used qualitative descriptive methods including direct observation, interviews and literature studies. So it was obtained data that there was no access that facilitated online Posyandu data processing. In designing this system, the Descriptive Qualitative method is used with the DFD (Data Flow Diagram) and ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram) system modeling tools. This system was created using the PHP language and the Mysql database server.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Mother and Child Posyandu Application Design (Case Study: Sukarami Village Posyandu)
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: DApp NFT minting is the process of creating non-fungible tokens (NFTs) within a decentralized application (DApp). NFTs are unique digital assets created using blockchain technology, resulting in uniqueness and verified ownership. Essentially, the DApp NFT minting process involves the following steps: Preparation: Users need to access a DApp that supports NFT minting. Typically, these DApps run on a specific blockchain platform, such as Ethereum or Binance Smart Chain. Ownership Verification: Before users can mint, they must be verified as the owner of the digital asset they wish to convert into an NFT. This process ensures that the resulting NFT is directly linked to ownership of that asset. Smart Contract Creation: In this step, the DApp interacts with a predefined smart contract to create the NFT. This smart contract contains the logic for managing the creation, registration, and ownership of the NFT. Minting Process: Once the requirements are met and the smart contract has been instructed to create the NFT, the minting process begins. The digital asset data representing the NFT is encrypted in the form of a unique token on the blockchain. Metadata Addition: NFTs typically include metadata that provides additional information about the digital asset, such as a title, description, creator signature, relevant images, videos, or links. Addition to the Network: Once an NFT is successfully created and metadata added, it is uploaded to the blockchain and can be accessed by anyone through a smart contract address or an NFT marketplace connected to the DApp. Ownership and Transactions: Once an NFT is owned by someone, they have full control over it. They can display, trade, sell, or transfer ownership through blockchain transactions. NFT Minting DApps offer a transparent, verifiable, and unique way to create, acquire, and own digital assets online. This has provided an opportunity for artists, content creators, and collectors to create, participate in the NFT ecosystem, and expand their digital experience. However, because NFTs and their ecosystem are still in their infancy, it is important for users to exercise caution, conduct research, and understand the legal and security aspects before engaging in NFT activities.
Judul Paper: Rancang Bangun Sistem Informasi Minting Defiapp (Dapp) Non Fungible Token (Nft) Berbasis Website pada Ethereum Blockchain
Keyword: Non Fungible Token (NFT), Ethereum, Blockchain, Dapp, Cryptocurrency
Jurnal: Jurnal Esensi Infokom: Jurnal Esensi Sistem Informasi dan Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: The development of the tourism industry is now accelerated by the process of globalization and also the rapid development of technology. Traveloka is one of the Online Travel Agent companies engaged in airline ticket booking services and online hotel reservations and other services. This study aims to determine the effect of service quality on Traveloka consumer trust and loyalty, as well as to determine the role of trust in mediating the influence of trust quality on Traveloka consumer loyalty. Data collection was carried out through questionnaires distributed to 200 respondents, which were then processed using SmartPLS software version 3.3. The results of the study indicate a positive and significant effect of service quality on consumer loyalty directly or indirectly with mediation from trust.
Judul Paper: Mediation of Consumer Trust on the Effect of Service Quality on Traveloka Consumer Loyalty
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: A door is a surface that facilitates circulation between spaces enclosed by a wall as an entry and exit access. The door requires a key to ensure the door is completely closed and cannot be opened except by the person who has the key. Traditional door lock systems that use physical keys have several weaknesses, including physical keys can be lost or stolen which causes security risks for homeowners. Therefore, to improve security and convenience in managing door access, a door lock control system with a Bluetooth sensor was created to recognize voice commands for door access control. The methodology used is field research that collects data from the field through observation and literature studies. For the system development method, the waterfall model is used. The design of the door lock control system uses Arduino Uno, Bluetooth hc-05 module, and 5v relay. The result of this research is a tool that can work by locking and unlocking the door via voice commands. With the presence of a door lock control system
Judul Paper: Rancang Bangun Prototype Sistem Kontrol Kunci Pintu Berbasis Voice Recognition Arduino Uno & Sensor Bluetooth
Keyword: Arduino Uno, Sistem Kontrol Kunci Pintu, Voice Recognition, Waterfall, Sensor Bluetooth
Jurnal: Jurnal Esensi Infokom: Jurnal Esensi Sistem Informasi dan Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: Internal control is an important activity in a company, because if there is inappropriate management it will cause major losses for the company. To avoid the possibility of deviations, an internal control system is needed that can assist management in carrying out company operations, especially in the control environment, risk assessment, control activities, information and communication, and supervision in operational activities carried out by management based on company standard operating procedures. The purpose of this study is to analyze how the internal control system is implemented at PT. SISFOMEDIKA Yogyakarta. The analysis tool uses the COSO framework, the analysis method uses a qualitative descriptive method. The results of the study indicate that PT. SISFOMEDIKA Yogyakarta has implemented an internal control system well. Overall, both from the control environment activities, risk assessment, control activities, information and communication, and supervision have been carried out well. The internal control system is adequate and runs effectively and efficiently. The Articles of Association (AD) and Bylaws (ART) at PT. SISFOMEDIKA Yogyakarta can assist management in preparing effective plans and assist the process of control and supervision of deviations from planning that occur, such as operations that do not comply with standards and errors in work procedures.
Judul Paper: Analysis of the Implementation of the Internal Control System at PT. SISFOMEDIKA Yogyakarta
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: The rapid growth of technology and information in Indonesia presents business opportunities for entrepreneurs, especially local brands, both large and small. This study aims to outline marketing strategies and increase sales volume for local brands. The research method used is a descriptive approach through a literature review. One local brand currently in the spotlight is Aerostreet, which promotes quality shoes at affordable prices through effective branding strategies. Suboptimal offline marketing efforts have prompted Aerostreet to expand its presence into the digital realm. Along with the adoption of online marketing through the Shopee platform, there has been a significant surge in Aerostreet product sales volume. In addition to reaching the domestic market, Aerostreet is now also able to penetrate the international market.
Judul Paper: Optimizing Local Brand Marketing Through E-Commerce Platforms
Keyword: Marketing Strategy, Local Brand, Market, Sales Volume.
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: This study aims to determine whether Perceived Ease of Use influences Behavioral Intention to Use, Perceived Usefulness influences Behavioral Intention to Use and Behavioral Intention to Use influences Perceived Usage of SIAK at the Nusantara Business Institute. The research method used is an associative research method.
