The population in this study is all active students of the Nusantara Business Institute in the even semester of 2022/2023 who have used the SIAK application for at least 2 semesters, totaling 550 students. The results of the study Perceived Ease of Use significantly influences Behavioral Intention to Use towards the use of SIAK at the Nusantara Business Institute, Perceived Usefulness significantly influences Behavioral Intention to Use towards the use of SIAK at the Nusantara Business Institute, Behavioral Intention to Use significantly influences Perceived Usage towards the use of SIAK at the Nusantara Business Institute.
Judul Paper: Application of the Technology Acceptance Model (TAM) Method to the Use of the Nusantara Business Institute's Academic Information System Application
Keyword: TAM Model, Structural Equation Model (SEM), SIAKAD, Nusantara Business Institute, Applications
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Information technology has the potential to improve the quality of a given situation. Besides being classified as a process of organizing information, it also identifies the components of an integrated system, ensuring that organizational operations are more efficient, effective, and effective. A system that transforms data into valuable information is necessary for information retrieval. This demonstrates the crucial role computers play in computer-based information systems. In Pulogadung, East Jakarta, you'll find the Al-Barokah Wholesale Store. Consequently, the system's ultimate goal is to achieve the company's objectives, namely, achieving the desired profit level. Complex problems can be broken down into groups using the Analytical Hierarchical Process (AHP) method, which can then be arranged in a hierarchy, giving the impression of a more organized and systematic approach. Meanwhile, the purpose of a decision-making system is to ensure the smooth running of the inventory process. Companies will gain numerous benefits and become more organized by using a computerized system.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of a Web-Based Sales and Purchasing Decision Support System at the Al-Barokah Store
Keyword: Analytical Hierarchical Process (AHP) Decision Making System Technology
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: The basement of a company building is the area most exposed to air pollution from parked motor vehicles. If the air flow in this company building is not properly vented, the resulting pollutant gases will certainly pollute the surrounding environment. Carbon monoxide is one of the gases that is harmful to human health and is generally obtained from motor vehicles. In this case, a tool is needed that can detect carbon monoxide levels in real time. The carbon monoxide detection tool developed in this study uses the internet-based MQTT protocol, which can be viewed in real time. The results obtained are in the form of data stored in a database and will be displayed on the website co-monitoring.com, which can be used to monitor carbon monoxide exposure in real time.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a Realtime Carbon Monoxide (CO) Monitoring System Prototype Using the Internet-Based MQTT Protocol
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknik Informatika (JUTIF)

Abstrak: A marketing strategy is a way to introduce goods or services to increase their selling power. In today's information technology era, online marketing is one of the most reliable marketing strategies. Therefore, it is necessary to design an application platform that can market products so that they become known. Online marketing applications connected to social media and marketplaces are an option and are specifically designed for MSMEs to introduce products to consumers and utilize marketplaces that function as a place to buy and sell products. The development of this online marketing application uses the Web Development Life Cycle (WDLC) method and the Unified Modeling Language (UML) for the system modeling design of this application. Testing of this marketing application was conducted to determine the success of the functionality of the features that have been created. Testing of its appearance and use was done by distributing questionnaires to MSME members. The test results showed that the application was suitable.
Judul Paper: Designing Online Marketing Applications for Connection with Marketplaces as a Marketing Strategy to Increase Sales for MSMEs
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Neighborhood associations (RT/RW) and residents' associations (RUK) are government institutions that interact and relate directly to the wider community. Like other government institutions, these institutions also have administrative systems to serve the community. However, while other government institutions have computerized administrative systems, RT/RW administration systems are still manual, which certainly creates problems for RT/RW officers because they cannot work effectively and efficiently. In order for RT/RW officers to work more effectively and efficiently, a computerized system needs to be built. In building this computerized system for RT/RW officers, the RAD (Rapid Application Development) method is used. This method is a system design that is faster in the design process compared to the waterfall method. By using the RAD method, a system is produced that is completed on time according to the plan, so it can be immediately implemented by RT/RW officers. So that RT/RW officers can immediately work more effectively and efficiently like in other government institutions.
Judul Paper: RT Level Administrative System Design Using Rad Method (Case Study Rt 03 / Rw 04 Kel. Jatibening Baru)
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: In this era of globalization, everything has become easier, including transactions. All of these conveniences can be achieved simply by using a smartphone and the internet. This convenience has led to a consumerist nature in society. Therefore, it is important to manage money wisely so that every transaction we make can be managed properly. To ensure that daily transactions can be managed effectively, a mobile application was created that allows users to easily record transactions anytime, anywhere. The application was developed using R&D methods. The application was developed using the Swift language and SQLite for its database. The results of the application will be tested by entering transaction data into the application.
Judul Paper: Personal Financial Management Application on the IOS Platform Using the Swift Programming Language
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Managing incoming and outgoing mail at the Main Inspectorate of the Ministry of Tourism and Creative Economy involves a lot of paperwork that must be filled in to record and categorize incoming and outgoing mail. This is related to the security of the letters or information stored because if not managed properly the paper can be damaged or lost. Storing letter information by writing in a journal results in writing reports whose data must be calculated one by one. The Incoming and Outgoing Mail Management Information System can simplify the work of officers by inputting letter data into the system so that there is no need to fill out too many files and letter information can be stored in a database. Officers can also easily create reports because incoming and outgoing mail is stored according to letter categories that have been systematically managed. The research method used is grounded research, a research method based on facts and using comparative analysis that aims to conduct empirical generalizations, establish concepts, prove theories, and develop theories where data collection and data analysis run simultaneously. Therefore, an Incoming and Outgoing Mail Management Information System Application at the Main Inspectorate of the Ministry of Tourism and Creative Economy Based on Java Netbeans using a MySQL database was designed.
Judul Paper: Design of an Incoming and Outgoing Mail Management Information System at the Main Inspectorate of the Ministry of Tourism and Creative Economy Based on Java Netbeans
Keyword: Information Systems; Incoming and Outgoing Mail Management; Ministry of Tourism and Creative Economy
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Engineering and Technological Science (JAETS)

Abstrak: West Tabongo Village has significant potential in the field of Karawo embroidery craftsmanship, producing a variety of embroidery patterns on fabric that can be made into clothing and various attractive souvenirs. This study aims to determine the effect of training on creating Instagram accounts as a marketing strategy for Karawo products in West Tabongo Village, Gorontalo. The research method used was descriptive quantitative, using questionnaires distributed to respondents who had received the training.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Instagram Account Creation Training as a Marketing Strategy for Karawo Products for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises in West Tabongo, Gorontalo
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Residential-based businesses such as boarding houses and rental properties are still sought after by property owners, as they are highly promising, despite the significant capital outlay. This study aims to simplify the process of searching for information and booking rental properties (female boarding houses and rental properties) and the facilities provided by the owners online for prospective boarding house and rental properties, as well as for the facilities provided by the owners. Researchers believe that an Information System, as an implementation of business strategy, is necessary for the development and exchange of electronic information, such as marketing, sales, and customer service information. Property commodities, which are part of this business strategy, require online information services, especially in the process of booking rental properties (female boarding houses and rental properties), which currently have an inefficient service system and are only carried out offline. The difficulty of quickly marketing Mr. Rizky's boarding house and rental property, located at Jalan Melati, Pondok Melati Jati Warna, Bekasi, has prompted Mr. Rizky, as the owner of the rental house, to seek a way to simplify his marketing by creating a boarding house booking application (female boarding house) and website-based contact. Testing was conducted using Blackbox testing and UAT testing conducted on as many as 20 prospective boarding and rental residents, with a percentage of 90%, stating that the Boarding House and Rental Booking website that had been created could work well. And with a total of 13 respondents with a percentage of 65%, stated that from the results the application that was run had no errors. The system design to describe the proposed system design uses object-oriented UML (Unifield Modeling Language) modeling, namely use case diagrams, activity diagrams and class diagrams that can facilitate system creation, website creation using the PHP programming language and MySQLi database. This information service is acceptable and has good design comfort and efficiency, so it can help prospective boarding and rental house residents in finding information about occupied rooms and allows customers to get detailed information about the boarding and rental rooms they are looking for.
Judul Paper: "Rizky" Home Rental Booking Application Using a Web-Based Incremental Model
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Earnings management is a manager's action in manipulating or engineering financial reports or accounting information so that the recorded profit amount is in accordance with the manager's wishes, both for personal interests and company interests. The research method used is a descriptive method with the type of data used is secondary data. This study aims to determine the effect of GCG Mechanisms, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow on Earnings Management. The sample used is 6 service companies in the infrastructure, utilities, and transportation sectors listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange for the period 2014-2018. The independent variables used are GCG mechanisms measured by Independent Commissioners, Institutional Ownership and Managerial Ownership, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow while the dependent variable is Earnings Management. The analysis technique used is multiple linear regression. The results show that individually only the Free Cash Flow variable has an effect on earnings management. While together the variables of Independent Commissioners, Institutional Ownership, Managerial Ownership, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow have an effect on Earnings Management.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Good Corporate Governance, Leverage and Free Cash Flow Mechanisms on Profit Management in Infrastructure, Utilities and Transportation Sector Service Companies
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Earnings management is a manager's action in manipulating or engineering financial reports or accounting information so that the recorded profit amount is in accordance with the manager's wishes, both for personal interests and company interests. The research method used is a descriptive method with the type of data used is secondary data. This study aims to determine the effect of GCG Mechanisms, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow on Earnings Management. The sample used is 6 service companies in the infrastructure, utilities, and transportation sectors listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange for the period 2014-2018. The independent variables used are GCG mechanisms measured by Independent Commissioners, Institutional Ownership and Managerial Ownership, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow while the dependent variable is Earnings Management. The analysis technique used is multiple linear regression. The results show that individually only the Free Cash Flow variable has an effect on earnings management. While together the variables of Independent Commissioners, Institutional Ownership, Managerial Ownership, Leverage, and Free Cash Flow have an effect on Earnings Management.
Judul Paper: The Influence of Good Corporate Governance, Leverage and Free Cash Flow Mechanisms on Profit Management in Infrastructure, Utilities and Transportation Sector Service Companies
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Studying history is a crucial component of education, as it plays a role in fostering the identity and characteristics of a nation. However, conventional history learning often does not attract students' attention and makes them bored. Thus, the purpose of this study is to create interactive multimedia learning media about inspirational Indonesian historical figures that can arouse students' interest and enthusiasm in learning history. This educational media was developed using the MDLC (Multimedia Development Life Cycle) method which includes six steps, namely conceptualization, design, material extraction, production, evaluation, and dissemination. This learning media contains material about inspirational Indonesian historical figures, such as Raden Ajeng Kartini, Ki Hadjar Dewantara, Mohammad Hatta and others, presented in the form of text, audio, video, images, and animation. This learning media is also equipped with interactive features, such as quizzes and games, which can increase student engagement and skills in learning history. The results of testing this learning media indicate that this learning media has a high level of feasibility in terms of content, appearance, and function. Therefore, this interactive multimedia learning media about inspiring Indonesian historical figures can be an alternative choice as an efficient and interesting learning media for history lessons in schools.
Judul Paper: Designing Interactive Learning Media About Inspirational Indonesian Historical Figures Using the MDLC Method
Keyword: learning media interactive multimedia inspirational historical figures MDLC construct 2
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: With the development of information technology that is increasingly developing over time, the role of computers is currently very important in all aspects of life, especially the business aspect. Harapan Baru is an MSME that sells household furniture, data processing is still done manually, therefore, by utilizing information technology that has developed, it is expected to help Harapan Baru by increasing buying and selling power. This study uses a prototype method and is designed using Unified Modeling Language (UML). For website creation using Hyper Text (PHP) programming, and the database uses MySql. The result of this study is web-based online sales at Harapan Baru, for customers there are features for purchasing transactions, tracking goods, payment notes, while for Harapan Baru admins, there are features for managing product data, and customer order reports.
Judul Paper: E-Commerce Site Design at PO Harapan Baru
Keyword: Internet Website Sales Information System
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: E-Learning is a distance learning method using internet technology. So far, e-Learning has been widely implemented in institutions and companies. E-Learning has become an effective alternative in improving the quality or success of the teaching and learning process. The mathematics learning process in Junior High Schools (SMP) still uses conventional methods through direct face-to-face between teachers and students. This learning method will create limitations in the process of delivering knowledge. The study aims to design e-Learning that focuses on web-based mathematics learning in SMP, and the system can facilitate students in learning subjects anywhere and anytime as long as they are connected to the internet. This also uses a descriptive research type, and the data collection method in this writing is observation, interviews and questionnaires. It is expected that the results of this study will be able to obtain a web-based e-Learning system in SMP that can facilitate students in learning and understanding mathematics subjects.
Judul Paper: Web-Based e-Learning System for Mathematics Subjects for Middle Schools
Keyword: E-learning Mathematics Student Website Design
Jurnal:
Indonesian Journal of Science & Technology
 (IJoST)

Abstrak:
This research aims to design and develop a mobile application that can detect oral diseases early using computer vision technology. The background of this research is the importance of oral health in maintaining an individual's quality of life, as well as the need for easily accessible tools for early detection of oral diseases. The research methods used include collecting image data for oral diseases, processing the images using augmentation techniques, and developing an image classification model using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). The developed CNN model was then integrated into an Android-based mobile application using TensorFlow Lite to enable real-time detection and detection through image upload.
The application also has an intuitive and easy-to-use user interface, thus assisting the public in conducting self-examinations of oral health. The developed application shows potential as an effective tool for early detection of oral diseases. It is hoped that this application will contribute to increasing public awareness and improving overall oral health.
Judul Paper: Design and Development of an Application for Early Detection of Oral Disease Using Computer Vision
Keyword: Infocom Essence Journal: Journal of the Essence of Information Systems and Computer Systems
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak: This study aims to determine whether Perceived Ease of Use influences the Perceived Usefulness of the use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute, Perceived Ease of Use influences Behavioral Intention to Use of the use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute, Perceived Usefullness influences Behavioral Intention to Use of the use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute and Behavioral Intention to Use influences the Actual System Use of the use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute. The research method that will be used is an associative research method. The population in this study are all active students of the Nusantara Business Institute in the even semester of 2023/2024 who have used the Edlink E-Learning application for at least 2 semesters, totaling 533 students. The results of the study Perceived Ease of Use influences the Perceived Usefulness of the use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute. Perceived Ease of Use influences Behavioral Intention to Use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute. Perceived Usefulness influences Behavioral Intention to Use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute. Behavioral Intention to Use influences Actual System Use of the Edlink E-Learning Application at the Nusantara Business Institute.
Judul Paper: Analisis Technology Acceptance Model (TAM) pada Aplikasi E-Learning Sevima Edlink di Institut Bisnis Nusantara
Keyword: Model TAM Structural Equation Model (SEM) E-Learning Edlink
Jurnal: Jurnal Esensi Infokom: Jurnal Esensi Sistem Informasi dan Sistem Komputer

Abstrak: This study aims to analyze the effect of customer trust on customer loyalty with customer satisfaction as a mediating variable on Gojek online transportation service users in Bekasi City. Customer trust is assessed through three main dimensions: ability, benevolence, and integrity. The sample used in this study was 150 respondents, who were active Gojek customers in Bekasi City, and data collection was carried out through a Google Form-based questionnaire. Data were analyzed using statistical methods with the SEM-PLS approach to test the proposed hypothesis. The results showed that customer trust had no direct effect on customer loyalty, with a t-statistic value of 0.057 <1.96 and a probability value of 0.573 >0.05. However, customer trust had a significant effect on customer satisfaction, with a t-statistic value of 30.776 >1.96 and a probability value of 0.000 <0.05. In addition, customer satisfaction was proven to have a significant effect on customer loyalty with a t-statistic value of 9.229 >1.96 and a probability value of 0.000 <0.05. Customer satisfaction also mediates the relationship between trust and customer loyalty, with a t-statistic value of 9.179 > 1.96 and a probability value of 0.000 < 0.05. The conclusion of this study is that customer satisfaction plays an important role as a mediator in shaping customer loyalty, although trust does not have a direct influence on loyalty. The implications of this study direct online transportation service companies to focus on improving customer satisfaction to build stronger loyalty.
Judul Paper: The Impact of Trust on Customer Loyalty Through Satisfaction with Online Motorbike Taxi Transportation Services
Keyword: Customer Trust Customer Satisfaction Customer Loyalty Gojek Bekasi Online Transportation
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The development of information technology is currently very beneficial and helps human work. PO Usaha Raya, a business engaged in the sale of daily necessities, still records data manually. Recording errors and data inaccuracies are frequent problems and significantly hamper the company's performance in purchasing and sales transactions. This research was conducted to simplify the process of processing purchasing and sales data and improve business performance in the company. The system analysis and modeling techniques used are object-oriented techniques and Unified Modeling Language (UML). The system design technique uses Microsoft Visual Basic .NET 2010. The result of this research is a sales information system design that can be used by the company, which is expected to facilitate purchasing and sales transactions and help produce accurate information for decision-making. With this sales information system, it is also expected to improve company performance to become more optimal and service to consumers.
Judul Paper: DESIGN AND CONSTRUCTION OF AN INFORMATION SYSTEM FOR SALES OF GOODS AT PO BUSINESS RAYA
Keyword: : Sales Information System Prototyping Report
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: This study aims to design a management system for the Wirda Buana badminton court into an applied system to simplify the process of recording court rentals. The main problem in this study is the management process, which is currently still manual. The rental process is carried out by recording prospective tenant data in a book, making it difficult for the administrator to copy the data of the renting customers. Payment transactions that are only recorded in a book often result in miscalculations and make the reporting process late. The data for this study was obtained from observations and interviews. The process consists of planning, analysis, design, and system implementation. The result of this study is a badminton court management information system based on Java NetBeans. With this information system, it is expected to facilitate the administrator in managing court rental data, as well as the owner in monitoring the progress of court rental activities.
Judul Paper: Badminton Court Management Information System "Wirda Buana" Based on Java Netbean
Keyword: Field Rental Transaction Data Management Information System
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Information Technology Service Management (ITSM) is a set of structured practices designed to manage and improve the quality of IT services within an organization. The importance of ITSM lies in its ability to improve operational efficiency, reduce errors, and ensure IT services support the organization's strategic objectives. The East Java Public Works and Highways Agency (Bina Marga) has developed a Goods Inventory Card (KIB) application designed to replace manual processes with automation, enabling the import of employee and goods data in Excel format. While this application is expected to improve efficiency, a thorough evaluation is needed to measure its impact on service quality. This study used the ITIL V3 framework focusing on the Service Operation domain, with the aim of identifying problems or incidents that arise during application use and providing recommendations for continuous improvement. The results showed that the Problem Management aspect has been implemented quite well, helping to identify and address the root causes of recurring incidents. However, weaknesses were found in the Event Management, Incident Management, Request Fulfillment, and Access Management aspects, including the lack of an automated monitoring system and a manual incident reporting process.
Judul Paper: ITSM Evaluation of the Goods Inventory Card System Using the ITIL V3 Framework
Keyword: ITSM Evaluation of ITIL V3 Service Operation Goods Inventory Card
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This study aims to apply the linear sequential model in designing cinematic videos as promotional media, with a case study of PT Hasta Abdhi Cipta. The linear sequential model is a structured approach that involves a systematic sequence of steps in the video production process, from planning, development, to evaluation. This study focuses on how the model can be used to create effective and engaging cinematic videos to enhance company promotion. The initial stage of the study involved analyzing PT Hasta Abdhi Cipta's promotional needs and objectives. Based on this analysis, the concept and main message to be conveyed through the cinematic video were determined. Next, the planning process included creating a scenario, storyboarding, and selecting cinematic elements such as lighting, camera angles, and the use of visual effects to strengthen the narrative. The linear sequential model (Waterfall) was strictly applied, ensuring that each stage was carried out sequentially and no steps were skipped. In the production stage, shooting was carried out based on the designed scenario and storyboard. The entire process was arranged in such a way as to align with the sequential linear model's steps, so that the final video could reflect the desired cinematic quality. After production, the editing stage involved visual and audio processing to enhance the video, including the addition of background music, sound effects, and color grading. The results of the study indicate that the application of a linear sequential model in the creation of cinematic videos for the promotion of PT Hasta Abdhi Cipta resulted in videos that were effective in attracting audience attention and conveying promotional messages clearly. Video performance evaluation was conducted through audience response measurements and social media metric analysis. This model has proven to be an effective guideline in the production of structured and systematic promotional videos, with professional end results that align with the company's promotional objectives.
Judul Paper: Application of Linear Sequential Models in Designing Cinematic Videos as Promotional Media (Case Study: PT Hasta Abdhi Cipta)
Keyword: Linear Sequential Model Cinematic Video Promotional Media Visual Design PT Hasta Abdhi Cipta
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Globalization has brought profound changes to the information technology era, which plays a key role in the progress and development of countries worldwide. However, technological advancements also bring the risk of cyber threats that can compromise the security and integrity of computer systems, networks, and data. Cyberattacks are a serious threat that can harm individuals, organizations, and even entire countries. Madinah Ngunut Islamic Hospital, as a healthcare institution, faces potentially serious risks to patient data security, disruption of medical services, and decreased patient trust due to cyberattacks. To address these threats, implementing an effective security strategy is crucial. This study focuses on the implementation of Wazuh Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) on the Madinah Ngunut Islamic Hospital Server. Wazuh was chosen for its ability to manage large-scale data, rapid development, and ease of maintenance. Furthermore, integration with instant messaging platforms such as Telegram was also implemented to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the security team in responding to cyberthreats. It is expected that the implementation of Wazuh SIEM will strengthen the information security defenses of Madinah Ngunut Islamic Hospital, protect patient data, and maintain the smooth running of daily operations from potential cyberthreats. This research is also expected to provide guidance for other hospitals in increasing their resilience to evolving cyber threats.
Judul Paper: Implementation of SIEM Wazuh on the Madinah Ngunut Islamic Hospital Server
Keyword: Wazuh Telegram SIEM Cyber ​​Monitoring
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Biometric systems automatically identify people based on their behavioral characteristics. Finger veins are more secure as biometric data than other biometric data. Finger vein patterns are difficult to forge because they are located beneath the skin's surface. To make finger vein patterns visible on the skin, a special method is required to identify them. This study aims to develop a finger vein recognition system using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method implemented in Python, with the aim of replacing fingerprint-based employee attendance systems in hospitals. This method offers higher security and resistance to forgery, considering that finger veins are difficult to access from outside the body. This study used a blood vessel dataset from Kaggle and went through three main stages: preprocessing, training, and testing. The trained CNN model demonstrated high performance with 99.99% accuracy in recognizing patterns in finger vein images. The results of this study confirm that the developed system can provide accurate and consistent predictions, which are expected to significantly improve the safety, comfort, and operational efficiency of hospitals.
Judul Paper: Identification of Finger Blood Vessels, Using the Python Programming Language
Keyword: Python Finger Blood Vessel Biometrics CNN
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak:
The development of information and communication technology has brought significant changes to various aspects of life, including the commercial sector. Riau Computer Store, which sells computer hardware and software, still uses traditional methods in its sales and data management processes, often leading to data errors and service delays. To address this issue, a web-based information system is needed to manage business operations more effectively and efficiently. This study aims to design and develop a web-based sales information system at Riau Computer Store. The research method used is a linear sequential or waterfall model, which includes the stages of analysis, design, coding, testing, and maintenance. The analysis was conducted by gathering information regarding data requirements through a survey. The system design included the creation of use cases, databases, interfaces, activity diagrams, sequence diagrams, and class diagrams.
The results show that the designed web-based sales information system can speed up transactions, reduce data errors, and facilitate user access to information. System evaluations demonstrated improvements in inventory management and customer service. In conclusion, the design of the web-based sales information system at Riau Computer Store provides an effective and efficient solution for managing sales and inventory. This system not only improves store operational performance but also enhances customer satisfaction by providing accurate and up-to-date information.
Judul Paper: Design of a Web-Based Sales Information System at a Riau Computer Store
Keyword: designing a web-based sales information system with a linear sequential method for online sales in computer stores
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: In this study, the Systems Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method was used to assess the analysis and design of the Trenz Hotel reservation information system in Pekanbaru. The Trenz Hotel in Pekanbaru faces problems with manually managing reservation and room booking data, which often leads to errors and is time-consuming. To address this issue, an integrated and time-consuming information system is needed. To address this issue, an integrated and effective data system is needed. Identification of system objectives and requirements is carried out at the planning stage. The analysis stage includes data collection and understanding of existing business processes, as well as determining the requirements for a new system. The design stage includes designing the system architecture, data model, and user interface. The implementation stage includes software development based on the design and integration with the existing IT infrastructure. The maintenance stage involves testing the overall system, fixing bugs, and enhancing features based on user feedback. The results show that the information system consists of several main modules such as login, room management, room booking, order confirmation, payment, and reporting. The system is tested functionally and user-tested to ensure that all functions work as expected.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Reservation Information System Design at Hotel Trenz Pekanbaru using the SDLC Method
Keyword: Analysis of Trenz SDLC Hotel Information System Design
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: This study aims to address inventory management issues at the Public Works (PU) Bina Marga Department of East Java Province, which is still carried out manually using Excel, which is considered inefficient and error-prone. To optimize this process, a web-based Goods Inventory Card Information System was developed by implementing the Agile method. This method was chosen because of its flexibility in adapting to changing user needs during the development process. This system was built using the Laravel framework and MySQL database, and is equipped with data import features from Excel, CRUD operations, and role-based access control. The implementation results show that the designed system is able to accelerate the inventory data collection process, increase the effectiveness, efficiency, and accuracy of managing goods, employees, work units, and rooms. This system also produces KIB (Goods Inventory Card) and KIR (Room Inventory Card) reports according to applicable standards, thereby improving the quality of inventory management.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the Agile Method in Developing a Web-Based Goods Inventory Card Information System
Keyword: Goods Inventory Information System Agile Method of Asset Management for the Public Works Department
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Cybersecurity has become a major challenge in the digital era, along with the increasing dependence on information and communication technology. This paper discusses various types of threats such as DDoS attacks, malware, and ransomware, as well as mitigation solutions through the implementation of Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) using tools such as Nmap and Nikto. This study aims to provide insight into the best techniques in mitigating cyber threats and emphasizes the importance of VAPT in maintaining system integrity. The results show that the implementation of VAPT is not only effective in identifying vulnerabilities but also crucial for improving organizational preparedness in facing cyber threats
Judul Paper: Cybersecurity in the Digital Era: Challenges and Solutions
Keyword: Cybersecurity VAPT Nmap Nikto Threat Mitigation
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: Project management often faces challenges such as difficulty distributing tasks, monitoring progress, and managing schedules and documents efficiently. Unstructured delegation and lack of collaboration between teams also hamper productivity. In addition, decision-making is often hampered by inaccurate information. Therefore, a project management information system is needed to overcome these problems and improve the efficiency and effectiveness of project management. This study aims to design a Single Page Application (SPA)-based Project Management Information System that can improve the efficiency and effectiveness of project management, especially in supporting team collaboration and decision-making. This study uses the waterfall method, which consists of the stages of planning, requirements analysis, system design, implementation, testing, and maintenance, with the main technologies being Laravel for the backend, Vue.js for the frontend, and MySQL as the database. The result of this study is a Single Page Application-based system that is expected to assist in project management.
Judul Paper: Design and Build of a Single Page Application Based Project Management Information System at PT. Nusantara Cyber ​​Integration Bekasi
Keyword: Sistem Informasi Manajemen Manajemen Proyek Single Page Application Laravel MySQL
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: In the digital era, websites have become an important communication channel and source of information for educational institutions, including SMA Negeri 1 Kesesi. A quality school website plays a vital role in conveying accurate information, facilitating user interaction, and increasing user satisfaction. Therefore, it is important to evaluate the quality of SMA Negeri 1 Kesesi's website to improve user experience and communication effectiveness. This study uses the Webqual 4.0 method which will focus on user-oriented analysis to assess the quality of SMA Negeri 1 Kesesi's website. This study will examine usability, information quality, service interaction quality, visual quality, and user satisfaction variables of the website. The analysis method uses the SmartPLS 3 application, a well-known statistical software, and collects data through a questionnaire with a Likert scale ranging from (5) strongly agree to (1) strongly disagree. This questionnaire measures user perceptions regarding usability, information quality, service interaction quality, visual quality, and user satisfaction with the website. The findings of this study contribute to the understanding of the quality assessment of SMA Negeri 1 Kesesi's website. The analysis shows a significant relationship between usability, information quality, service interaction quality, and user satisfaction. This research also provides practical implications in improving the quality of school websites, such as improving navigation, providing relevant information, and increasing user interaction.
Judul Paper: WebQual 4.0 in Website Quality Analysis of SMA Negeri 1 Kesesi
Keyword: WebQual 4.0 Website Quality, PLS SMA N 1 User Satisfaction Session
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Children's education in the digital era increasingly emphasizes the development of learning solutions, particularly through educational games. These games provide interactive learning experiences and support the motor skills of elementary school-aged children. The GDLC approach is crucial in developing effective educational games. This study designed "Pet Venture Quest" using the GDLC approach, aiming to support children's motor learning and measure its positive impact. The results of this study are expected to provide guidance for educational game developers and education practitioners in maximizing technology to support children's motor development through games.
Judul Paper: Design of the Pet Venture Quest Game Using Game Development Life Cycle (GDLC) to Support Children's Motor Learning
Keyword: Educational Games Game Development Life Cycle (GDLC) Motor Learning for Children Digital Education
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The rise in internet usage carries the risk of increasingly massive hacking threats. The National Cyber ​​and Crypto Agency (BSSN) recorded that as of April 2022, cyberattacks in Indonesia reached 100 million cases. Web defacement consistently ranks among the top three incidents reported by BSSN services. Web defacement is the act of damaging and changing the appearance of a website, which can damage a business's reputation and threaten visitor trust. Action research methods are used to implement web defacement prevention measures, which are an integral part of a website security strategy.
Judul Paper: Web Defacement Prevention
Keyword: Cyber ​​Attacks Web Defacement Web Security Cyber ​​Security
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Based on the findings of various studies, there are numerous errors in the inaccurate statistical distribution of the Family Hope Program (PKH). A similar finding was demonstrated by a survey conducted in Tanjung Sari Village, Buay Pemaca, South Ogan Komering Ulu Regency. This indicates that many people still have claims for the funds but have not received them. Especially if a number of prospective participants are in poor or disadvantaged conditions and their eligibility levels are almost the same. Research on Acceptance of the Family Hope Program (PKH) by Utilizing the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) and Weighted Product (WP) Methodologies in the PKH Decision Support System (DSS) in Tanjung Sari Village, Buay Pemaca. The results of this study show that although there are differences between each approach, as shown by the comparison of ranking results in Table 9, there are similarities between the results of Rankings 1–12 and differences between the results of Rankings 13–27. The study concludes that in Tanjung Sari Village, Buay Pemaca, the Weight Product (WP) method can be recommended as a method for a decision support system for accepting PKH assistance. The results presented in this study have a very narrow range of values, indicating that the accuracy of the data has been tested.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Receiving PKH Assistance in Tanjung Sari Village
Keyword: PKH SPK Simple Additive Weighting Weighted Product
Jurnal: Jurnal Sains Informatika Terapan

Abstrak: Temperature is a crucial factor influencing human activities. Temperature influences various factors, including the weather. The need for temperature information can be met by predicting temperatures using the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) algorithm. This study aims to determine temperature trends in Ternate, North Maluku, and to predict these trends based on temperature data. Data analysis from 2010 to 2023 shows a consistent increase in the minimum temperature in Ternate. Predicted minimum, maximum, and average temperatures yield MAPE values ​​of 2.12, 2.51, and 1.93, respectively.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the LSTM Algorithm to Predict Temperature in the Ternate Region, North Maluku
Keyword: LSTM Maluku predicts Ternate temperatures
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: Temperature is a crucial factor influencing human activities. Temperature influences various factors, including the weather. The need for temperature information can be met by predicting temperatures using the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) algorithm. This study aims to determine temperature trends in Ternate, North Maluku, and to predict these trends based on temperature data. Data analysis from 2010 to 2023 shows a consistent increase in the minimum temperature in Ternate. Predicted minimum, maximum, and average temperatures yield MAPE values ​​of 2.12, 2.51, and 1.93, respectively.
Judul Paper: Implementation of the LSTM Algorithm to Predict Temperature in the Ternate Region, North Maluku
Keyword: LSTM Maluku predicts Ternate temperatures
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak: The support of computer network infrastructure in the Diploma III Midwifery Study Program at STIKes MH Thamrin has significantly stimulated the development of service facilities for students. In addition to the Academic Information System, another important requirement in lectures is the readiness of teaching and learning media or lectures. Recent research shows that students now demand more quality time to be able to discuss and facilitate understanding in lectures. Look at the faces in class are no longer lasting enough to fulfill that quality time. One alternative is to develop an e-learning system that can provide more time and opportunities for students to be able to discuss. E-Learning is a learning process where the delivery of material, discussions, and other lecture activities are carried out through electronic media. The developed e-Learning system is web-based and uses Moodle as its learning software, so this e-learning system is called Internet Enabled Learning. To date, the e-learning system developed in the Diploma III Midwifery Study Program at STIKes MH Thamrin is still in the implementation and test drive stages. The E-Learning system has been implemented in several lecture activities, including the Drawing Techniques course in the odd semester of 2011/2012. The results of the E-Learning System testing in several courses indicate that respondents were interested and enthusiastic about using this research model. By utilizing e-learning as a learning medium, it is expected that the quality of learning and learning outcomes will improve. The results of several e-learning learning trials have provided many inputs for system improvements.
Judul Paper: E-Learning Based Learning in the Diploma III Midwifery Study Program at MH Thamrin College
Keyword: e-learning learn web internet moodle
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: Settlements are an important part of a city that affects the quality of life of its residents. To understand the characteristics of settlements and determine their development strategies, appropriate and effective spatial analysis is required. In this study, researchers used Geographic Information Systems (GIS) with QGIS software and OpenStreetMap data to analyze the spatial settlements in a study area. The analysis method includes grouping settlements by type, measuring the area and density of settlements, and analyzing distance and accessibility to public facilities. The results of the analysis will be used to design policy recommendations and develop better settlements in the future. It is hoped that this research can contribute to the understanding of settlements and the application of GIS in spatial analysis
Judul Paper: Spatial Analysis of Settlements Based on Geographic Information Systems using QGIS and OpenStreetMap
Keyword: Analisis Spasial SIG QGIS OpenStreetMap Geografis
Jurnal: International Journal on Advanced Science, Engineering and Information Technology (IJASEIT)

Abstrak: One of the goals of advancing grocery store owners is to develop a sales inventory management information system. The purpose of this research is to design a web-based application system for grocery stores. This will later be able to assist sales activities and product promotions. One of the important facilities that can be utilized by grocery store owners is a product inventory management feature. In developing this system, the researcher used the PHP programming language, where this programming language is used to build web applications, while the database used is MySQL. The system development methodology used by the researcher is the Waterfall methodology. This Waterfall methodology has several stages: Analysis, System Design, Implementation, Integration, Operation and Maintenance. In the data collection process, the researcher used the observation method. The output that will be produced from this system development is a web-based product inventory application.
Judul Paper: Analysis of Web-Based Information Systems in Grocery Store Product Inventory Management
Keyword: Grocery Store Store inventory management
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: Technological innovation has become a key element in the transformation of the travel industry. PT Digital Travel Indonesia introduced a new approach in developing a travel registration application through the implementation of the Prototype Model. This study aims to investigate how the implementation of the Prototype Model can improve the development process of the travel registration application at PT Digital Travel Indonesia. This study uses a qualitative approach by applying the case study method. Data were collected through in-depth interviews with application developers, project managers, and end users. In addition, direct observations were also conducted during the application development process. The results show that the implementation of the Prototype Model has a significant impact on the development of the travel registration application at PT Digital Travel Indonesia. Through the use of prototypes, the development team can better identify user needs, reduce the risk of errors in development, and improve interaction between developers and users. Furthermore, the Prototype Model allows PT Digital Travel Indonesia to respond to changing market needs more quickly and effectively. Although the Prototype Model brings many benefits, this study also identifies several challenges faced during the implementation process. The main challenges include efficient management of time and resources, and ensuring consistency between the prototype and the final product. Thus, this study concludes that the implementation of the Prototype Model has had a positive impact on the development of the travel registration application at PT Digital Travel Indonesia. Recommendations are provided to improve the effectiveness of future Prototype Model implementations, including improving training for development teams and improving communication between various stakeholders.
Judul Paper: Application of the Prototype Model in Building a Travel Registration Application at PT Digital Travel Indonesia
Keyword: Web Prototype Model Registration Application
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Dengue Hemorrhagic Fever (DHF) is a disease that often causes outbreaks and is a serious public health problem in many tropical countries, including Indonesia. Dengue fever control is not only the responsibility of the government and medical personnel, but also requires the active participation of the community, including Jumantik (Juru Pemantau Larvae) officers tasked with controlling disease vectors. This study aims to design an educational application about DHF specifically aimed at Jumantik officers, using the waterfall software development method and based on the Android platform. The waterfall method was chosen because of its sequential and clear nature, suitable for projects with stable initial requirements and few changes. The application will be designed with features such as information about DHF, signs and symptoms, prevention methods, and emergency response steps. In addition, the application will provide an interactive training module that allows Jumantik officers to test their knowledge of DHF and vector control. The development process will begin with a needs analysis phase, where application requirements will be determined based on literature studies and interviews with Jumantik officers. The next stage is design, where the user interface design will be created in accordance with design principles that consider user needs. Following this, development will be conducted using Adobe Flash CS6 Professional for the Android platform. A trial of the application will be conducted with the involvement of several Jumantik officers to evaluate its feasibility, usability, and effectiveness. The results of the trial will be used to refine and improve the application before its official launch. With this application, it is hoped that Jumantik officers will improve their knowledge and skills in recognizing, preventing, and controlling dengue fever, thereby assisting in disease prevention and control efforts in the community.
Judul Paper: Designing an Android-Based Dengue Fever Educational Application for Jumantik
Keyword: Educational Application Dengue Fever Jumantik Android
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: Production planning, if carried out properly and in a planned manner, will ensure a smooth and optimal production process, thus providing several benefits for the company or organization. When production demand increases significantly, employees are unable to meet the specified production targets due to production machines having a maximum capacity per day. The method used in this case is to find the best value results from the comparative calculation results of the Fuzzy Inference System (FIS) Method of Mamdani, Sugeno, and Tsukamoto. This method will be used to determine the production quantity based on inventory data, the number of requests, and the number of production with the aim of saving time and minimizing errors in calculations in order to determine the optimal production quantity. Data processing used is Fuzzyfication, rule systems, and DeFuzzyfication to obtain the results of the calculations. After the calculation is carried out, the analysis technique process is continued with the calculation of the Mean Absolute Error (MAPE). From the results of the data processing carried out, the results of the Mamdani FIS method obtained a percentage error value of 21.249% for a percentage truth value of 78.751%, the Sugeno FIS method a percentage error value of 6.404% for a percentage truth value of 93.596% and the Tsukamoto FIS method a percentage error value of 7.438% for a percentage truth value of 92.562%.
Judul Paper:
Comparative Analysis of the Fuzzy Mamdani, Tsukamoto and Sugeno Methods for Optimizing Production Planning for Dea-Tea Products
Asep Suryadi
Pamulang University
Keyword: Fuzzy Inference System Mamdani Sugeno Tsukamoto Production Planning
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Information and communication technology is now undeniably a medium that facilitates various activities in various companies. Likewise, BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, an insurance company that stores a lot of data in the form of hardcopy archives and electronic files, where data recording problems often occur. The purpose of building this system is to simplify the digital archive file storage system while managing the storage of stationery stocks at BPJS Ketenagakerjaan, thereby overcoming the problem of data loss. To build this web-based inventory system, an action research method was used with a qualitative approach, with a waterfall development model. It also uses the PHP, HTML, CSS and Javascript programming languages, and uses the Bootstrap 4.0 framework. The result of this research is a web-based inventory system that can help simplify users in digital archiving and managing stock storage and reports.
Judul Paper: Web-Based Inventory System Using OTP Security System at BPJS Employment Membership Division Kebon Sirih Branch
Keyword: Action Research Waterfall Website Sistem Inventori OTP
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The On/Off system for lighting is generally still manual, that is, the process of turning it off and on still uses a switch, where the process takes a long time and requires energy in its operation. From this problem, researchers utilize the development of the internet/Wi-Fi and Android System to create an automation system that is fast, precise, and can be accessed from anywhere and at any time. In this case, one solution to this problem is to develop a prototype design for the On/Off automation of LED-E14 lighting based on the Internet of Things (IoT) which makes it easier for humans to carry out all their activities. The research method used is starting from designing the physical form of the system or Hardware System using a NodeMCU 8266 microcontroller connected to the internet network using Arduino IDE Software programming. The results of the research on the design and construction of the E-14 LED lighting On/Off automation system were designed starting from the lamp On/Off program and the telegram bot that had been created (coding system) then transferred to the NodeMCU 8266 microcontroller, where the NodeMCU 8266 microcontroller was given an electric current using a cellphone charger (micro electricity) connected to the 4 Channel Relay Module, the electric current was transferred to 4 E-14 LED lamps, namely with several commands from the telegram (Android System) by utilizing the internet/wifi. This IoT technology design can be developed to be implemented in the manufacturing industry, offices, etc.
Judul Paper: Design of On/Off Automation System for E-14 LED Lighting Based on Internet of Things (IOT) Using Node MCU ESP 6288 Microcontroller and Android System (Telegram Bot.)
Keyword: Software Arduino Uno Node MCU 8266 Android System Relay Module 4 Chanel LED E
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The era of advanced technology has advanced, but there are also threats to cyberspace, namely phishing. Phishing is one of the most dangerous and commonly used threats. Phishing exploits every targeted individual with deceptive tricks to steal personal data. In 2023, publications related to phishing and WhatsApp reached a peak with 64 publications (34.04%). Analysis of publication development shows three clusters: Cluster 1 in red has keywords phishing, cybercrime, cybersecurity, sensitive information, illustrating the relationship between cybercrime and cybersecurity. Cluster 2 in green has keywords social media, WhatsApp, security, privacy, data security, emphasizing the vulnerability of privacy and personal data by socializing cybersecurity education. Cluster 3 in blue has keywords social engineering, phishing attacks, cybersecurity, awareness, indicating potential threats to security by implementing specific methods in the form of cybersecurity applications. The methodology of conducting keyword mapping is very helpful in detecting relationship patterns and effective monitoring of phishing risks.
Judul Paper: Bibliometric Analysis of Phishing and Whatsapp Attacks using Vosviewer
Keyword: Analisis Bibliometrik Whatsapp Phishing Teknologi Keamanan Siber Privasi
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Nowadays, technology has been rapidly developed, while data has become the most valuable component to be processed to produce useful information. Technology is very helpful for analyzing data clearly or in more detail. The implementation of this technology can be found in real governmental, social, and business activities, for example in business activity, it is indicated by the number of minimarkets spread across Indonesia. Thus, it makes business competition highly increased. Therefore, it is necessary to conduct a study by utilizing the existing data to compete. This study used the Association Rule-Market Basket Analysis method to determine customers’ interest patterns when shopping. The results of this study indicated that there were 2 rules that showed the highest confidence value, such as 63% (food and beverages) and 58% (cigarettes and drinks). Regarding these results, the minimarket can determine the next steps that should be conducted, such as setting up the layout and so on.
Judul Paper: A Pattern Analysis on Goods Purchase Relationship for Minimarket’s Customers by Using Association Rule - Market Basket Analysis Method (AR-MBA)
Keyword: AR-MBA, Association Rule, Data Mining, Market Basket Analysis
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: Technological developments can certainly also change people's behavior in carrying out their activities, which were initially done manually, are now done digitally, making them more effective and efficient. The DANA e-wallet application is an electronic wallet application to facilitate customers in obtaining online payment services. Therefore, this study seeks to analyze the level of satisfaction of DANA e-wallet service users using the PIECES method. The PIECES method is used primarily on the variables of Performance, Information and Data, Economy, Control and Security, Efficiency and Service. This study used a questionnaire to respondents who were active users of the DANA application for at least 6 months of use, which was distributed through the Google Form platform and data management with IBM SPSS 25 and measured with the PIECES framework to determine the level of customer satisfaction with the service. From the results of this study, it was stated that the questionnaire was valid and reliable, and obtained a value of 4.051 on a Likert scale. Therefore, service users were categorized as satisfied with the DANA application service.
Judul Paper: Analysis of User Satisfaction Levels of DANA E-Wallet Services Using the PIECES Method
Keyword: satisfaction, e-wallet, FUNDS, PIECES
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: This study aims to evaluate the impact of Information and Communication Technology (ICT) infrastructure development on improving the quality of life in rural communities. Focusing on individual empowerment through ICT, this study explores how government programs to develop modern villages in the era of globalization can transform the lives of rural communities. Although ICT infrastructure has been introduced, its utilization in rural areas has not been fully effective, possibly due to low ICT literacy levels. This creates a gap in understanding the benefits of ICT and community reluctance to adopt information technology. The impetus for this research arose from observations of low ICT literacy in the implementation of applications from internal PPM projects. The aim was to assess the level of ICT literacy in rural areas and identify factors that influence it. This study was conducted using a respondent survey method in Cimenyan Village, Bandung Regency, with the hope of finding a correlation between ICT literacy and demographic variables such as age group, type of employment, and education level. The results of this study are expected to provide important insights for more effective digital village development strategies in the future.
Judul Paper: Assessment of the Computer Literacy Level of the Cimenyan Village Community, West Java in the Context of Moving towards a Digital Village
Keyword: Information Technology, ICT Literacy, Village Community, Literacy Factors, Cimenyan Village, Digital Village.
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: The Metaverse, a remarkable technological innovation with global influence, is a collection of digital realities that combine elements of social media, online gaming, augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and cryptocurrency. Manual approaches to determining the positivity or negativity of an opinion are often time-consuming and laborious, especially given the abundance of public opinion. To address this, the use of machine learning techniques is proposed to efficiently classify diverse opinion data sources. This study prioritizes the application of Text Mining as a method for document classification. The Naïve Bayes Classification (NBC) method was chosen by the researchers due to its effectiveness in using probability calculations. The results indicate that the developed system or model successfully achieved perfect precision (100%) in identifying the positive opinion class, meaning all positive predictions were on target. However, there was a small margin of recall for the positive class, at 93.37%, indicating that some positive cases were missed. Meanwhile, precision for the negative class was at 43.46%, implying the possibility of errors in a small proportion of negative predictions. However, recall for the negative class reached 100%, indicating that all negative cases were correctly identified.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Classification of Metaverse Dynamics Using the Naive Bayes Algorithm
Keyword: Metaverse, Naive Bayes, Text Mining
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: In the dynamic digital era, technological advancements have brought a significant increase in the need for IT resources. Digital transformation has become a trend in many organizations, shifting from offline to online services. However, this growth also brings greater security risks, especially to an organization's digital assets. This is reflected in the frequent occurrence of data breaches, data leaks, and data theft incidents, which threaten an organization's reputation and integrity. Given the importance of cybersecurity, the main objective of this research is to develop a penetration testing (pentest) system for web applications before they are published to a public network or the internet. This testing includes internal and external security evaluations, thus ensuring the application is more secure from cyberattacks. This research resulted in the design of IT infrastructure components that can implement the concept of penetration testing. This design is based on the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) penetration testing standards, providing a reliable and effective framework to protect an organization's web applications from evolving cybersecurity threats.
Judul Paper: Virtual Lab Infrastructure Design to Support Information Security Practicum Based on the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
Keyword: penetration testing, data breach, laboratory design, NIST
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: In the ever-evolving digital era, social media, particularly YouTube, has become a primary source of information and learning easily accessible via mobile phones. Beyond being a tool for interaction, social media also offers a wealth of knowledge and learning resources, including programming and software development tutorials. YouTube is particularly appealing because it provides easy-to-understand and engaging content, such as the use of the Naive Bayes algorithm, which is frequently discussed but poorly understood. This study focuses on analyzing sentiment in programming learning on YouTube, using the Naive Bayes classification algorithm to classify sentiment in comments as positive, negative, or neutral. The results show that the Naive Bayes algorithm is able to classify sentiment with 100% accuracy for positive sentiment and 66.39% accuracy for negative sentiment. This analysis provides insights into users' views and responses to programming learning content on YouTube, which can serve as a basis for further improvement and development of educational content.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of Learning Programming on YouTube Social Media Using the Naive Bayes Classification Algorithm
Keyword: Naïve Bayes, Social Media, Programming, Sentiment Analysis, YouTube
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Sentiment analysis is a valuable approach to understanding public perceptions and opinions about an event, particularly when it relates to violent acts such as bullying. The case of bullying among junior high school students in Cilacap, Central Java, in September 2023 captured public attention and attracted attention on social media, particularly on YouTube. This study aimed to apply the Naive Bayes classification algorithm to sentiment analysis of social media comments related to the bullying case. The study's methodology involved data crawling, preprocessing using RapidMiner, using TF-IDF for document representation, and implementing the Naive Bayes Classifier. The sentiment analysis results demonstrated an accuracy rate of 98.19%, with a high ability to classify comments as positive, negative, or neutral. However, evaluation using a confusion matrix indicated that some of the identified negative cases were incorrect. The conclusions of this study can provide valuable insights into how the public responds to and responds to bullying in school settings.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of Public Perceptions of Cilacap Student Bullying Cases Using a Machine Learning Approach
Keyword: Analisis Sentimen, Bullying Siswa SMP, Media Sosial, YouTube, Algoritma Naive Bayes
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: This research focuses on the development of an effective information system at PT Nielsen, highlighting the issue of employee attendance management. The Waterfall method was used to guide the system analysis and design, offering a systematic and sequential approach. The primary problem identified was the need to automate and improve the employee attendance process, which was previously performed manually and prone to inaccuracies and fraud. The results of this study indicate that the implementation of the attendance feature in the OPS PEDIA application successfully addressed this issue. This new feature not only improved the efficiency and accuracy of attendance recording but also reduced associated operational costs and eliminated the potential for attendance fraud. In conclusion, the addition of the attendance feature to OPS PEDIA at PT Nielsen provided significant improvements in the company's human resource management.
Judul Paper: Designing an Attendance Information System Using the Waterfall Method: Case Study of PT Nielsen Company
Keyword: Waterfall, PEDIA OPS Application
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Ornamental plants are a type of plant known for their beauty and aesthetic appeal. There are various types of ornamental plants that are easy to find, however, identifying and classifying ornamental plants is often difficult for us, especially for beginners who want to get involved in the ornamental plant business world. To facilitate the recognition of ornamental plant types, this study will use the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) algorithm as a solution. CNN has proven effective in image processing and object recognition, making it a suitable algorithm choice for ornamental plant classification. This study used 112 images of Damask Roses, 100 images of Echeveria Flowers, 100 images of Mirabilis Jalapa, 110 images of Rain Lily, and 47 images of Zinnia Elegans. In the pre-processing process, noise was removed, then image augmentation was performed, dividing the data into two, namely training data and test data, then training and evaluating the model to obtain accuracy results. The classification results successfully achieved a high level of accuracy for some labels, but there were certain labels that could not be identified. The highest F1 score was found for the "Damask Rose" label with a value of 1.00, while the "Mirabilis Jalapa" and "Rain Lily" labels had the highest Precision values ​​of 1.00. However, in the evaluation measurements, the "Zinnia Elegans" label did not produce any measurable value at all.
Judul Paper: Classification of Ornamental Plants Using the Convolutional Neural Network Algorithm
Keyword: Ornamental Plants, CNN, Classification
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: Digital voting systems have garnered significant attention in recent years due to their potential to increase accessibility and transparency in elections. However, concerns about security, transparency, and verifiability have limited their widespread adoption. This paper proposes a blockchain-based verifiable decentralized mechanism for digital voting systems, aiming to address these concerns. By leveraging blockchain technology, cryptographic techniques, and decentralized consensus, our proposed mechanism offers a secure and transparent platform for conducting digital elections. This paper outlines the architecture, components, and benefits of our system, highlighting its potential to revolutionize the way we conduct elections. The proposed mechanism incorporates advanced encryption algorithms to secure the privacy of individual votes. This privacy-centric approach safeguards voter anonymity while still allowing for transparent verification of the overall election results. Security analysis underscores the effectiveness of the blockchain-based verifiable decentralized mechanism in addressing key concerns surrounding digital voting systems. By leveraging innovative technologies and cryptographic principles, the proposed system exhibits a high degree of resilience, transparency, and protection against potential threats, making it a promising solution for secure and trustworthy digital elections.
Judul Paper: A Blockchain-Based Verifiable Decentralized Mechanism for Digital Voting System
Keyword: Digital voting, Blockchain, Ethereum, Decentralized app, Web 3.0
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: CV Alief Jaya is a company engaged in the distribution of snacks that sells hundreds of products to consumers or retailers in several districts. With the large number of products and customers owned by CV Alief Jaya, the purpose of creating the system is to facilitate employees in managing product and supplier data, managing goods in and out of the warehouse, monitoring remaining stock in the warehouse, determining when to add stock, and preventing stockouts in the warehouse. The methods that will be used in creating the system are interviews and observations conducted at CV Alief Jaya. The author uses the Safety Stock and Reorder Point Methods to determine the product stock that must be secured and when to add stock. This study aims to create a Product Stock Monitoring Information System with the Safety Stock and Reorder Point Methods at CV Alief Jaya to facilitate employees in managing, monitoring, and securing product stock so that the company's business processes continue to run smoothly.
Judul Paper: Product Stock Monitoring Information System Using Safety Stock and Reorder Point Methods at CV Alief Jaya
Keyword: Sistem Informasi, Monitoring, Safety Stock, Reorder Point, CV Alief Jaya
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Excessive reassurance-seeking is an attitude that seeks reassurance or self-validation regarding feelings of love and self-worth. Instagram is one of the most popular social media platforms among young people aged 18–24. With this in mind, Instagram is a tool that can be used to obtain excessive reassurance. The data used in this study were collected from a questionnaire survey with a sample of 137 students and analyzed using the Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) model with the Smart PLS application. The study shows that Excessive reassurance-seeking is positively correlated with social interaction, documentation, self-promotion, diversion, and creativity. The greater the Excessive reassurance-seeking they have, the greater the motive to use Instagram. This is necessary for respondents to seek recognition or validation from others.
Judul Paper: Excessive Reassurance-Seeking Analysis of Motives for Using Instagram by Students
Keyword: Excessive reassurance-seeking, Instagram, Mahasiswa
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The Senapelan Religious Affairs Office (KUA) in Pekanbaru plays a critical role in managing and supporting government activities in the marriage sector, operating in accordance with Islamic law. However, the Senapelan KUA faces challenges in managing marriage data, which is still done manually, resulting in a protracted registration process and reducing service effectiveness. Consequently, the level of satisfaction of prospective brides and grooms with KUA services is less than optimal. As a solution to this problem, this study proposes the development and implementation of a web-based marriage registration system. This system allows applicants to register online, reducing the need to visit the KUA solely for the registration process. Data collection methods in this study involved analysis, observation, and interviews. The results showed that the implementation of this online-based system successfully increased the satisfaction of prospective brides and grooms and simplified the work of KUA staff, indicating a significant increase in the efficiency and effectiveness of marriage services.
Judul Paper: Design of an online-based marriage registration information system at the Senapelan Religious Affairs Office
Keyword: KUA, Registration, Online, Web Based
Jurnal: Jurnal Teknologi Dan Sistem Informasi Bisnis

Abstrak: The hamlet meeting is a forum for parties involved in hamlet-level development to gather and discuss together. Benguk Hamlet is one of the hamlets that carries out hamlet meeting activities held by the government of Cabean Village, Sawahan District, Madiun Regency.
