Only now, the selection of participants for hamlet meetings is still considered ineffective because determining participants for village meetings is often subjective or taken from people with a relationship with the hamlet head. To assist the hamlet head as the hamlet leader in overcoming these problems, a decision support system was built using the web-based Fuzzy SAW (Simple Additive Weighting) method. The decision support system was created and designed using the Waterfall method and tested using the Black Box system testing method. With this decision support system, it is hoped that it will assist the Head of Benguk Hamlet in determining the participants for the Hamlet meeting. The Decision Support System test results for the Selection of Benguk Dusun Deliberation Participants, Cabean Village, Madiun Regency, Using the Web-Based Fuzzy SAW Method, obtained the expected results with Black Box testing to obtain a system success percentage of 100%.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Selection of Hamlet Deliberation Participants Using the Fuzzy SAW Method
Keyword: Decision Support System, Fuzzy SAW, Dusun Deliberation
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: LKP HARMONI is a course and training institution established in 2013, located in Temulus Village RT 005 RW 006, Mejobo District, Kudus Regency and is engaged in several skill areas such as car steering, sewing clothes, sewing bags, embroidery and others. The increasing number of prospective participants to join the Entrepreneurial Skills Program (PKW), is not followed by time productivity in handling participant selection and the large amount of uncoordinated data makes the selection cycle of Entrepreneurial Skills Program (PKW) participants complicated. Therefore, a strategy is needed that can help in determining the selection to choose participants for the Entrepreneurial Skills Program (PKW) using the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) technique. With this method, it can help in the selection process to be faster, more effective, and more efficient. And can build web-based computerized technology.
Judul Paper: Application of the Simple Additive Weighting (SAW) Method in the Entrepreneurial Skills Program (PKW) Participant Selection Application at the Harmoni Course and Training Institute (LKP)
Keyword: Entrepreneurial Skills Program, Simple Additive Weighting Method, Selection, Web
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: New student registration at schools is still carried out conventionally, requiring guardians to fill out registration forms and the administration department to record the registration. When assessing students, teachers still record grades directly in books, which are prone to loss or mix-ups with other documents. In preparing report cards, teaching staff rewrite and collect grades, which often result in writing or calculation errors. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to develop a web management system that can manage new student registration and student grades to reduce the risk of data loss. The method used is the Waterfall method, including definition analysis, device design, implementation and unit testing, system integration testing, and system testing. Data were collected through observation and interviews with school staff. The result of this study is an application for the Student Registration and Assessment Management Information System for SDIT Umar Bin Khathab Kudus, designed using the CodeIgniter 3 framework, MySQL as the database, and the PHP7 programming language. This application enables web-based management of student registration and assessment and WhatsApp notifications.
Judul Paper: Responsive web-based SDIT Umar Bin Khathab Kudus Student Registration and Assessment Management Information System with Whatsapp Notifications
Keyword: System, Management, Enrollment, Grades, Students
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: As information and communication systems develop in education and government, the use of algorithms and scientific methods to simplify human work is increasingly being developed through their implementation in the world of information technology. Kolaka Regency has significant potential to develop as a tourist destination. Unfortunately, tourists often have difficulty finding information and choosing which attractions to visit. Therefore, easily accessible publications about the area's attractions are needed. To facilitate this, a digital-based information system is needed. A Decision Support System (DSS) can assist decision-makers in making informed decisions. The Analytical Hierarchy Process (AHP) method can also be used to assist the decision-making process. The AHP method was chosen as a solution to select the best alternative from several coastal tourist attractions in Kolaka Regency. This was achieved using a website-based AHP method.
Judul Paper: Decision Support System for Determining Beach Tourism Destinations Using the Web-Based Analytical Hierarchy Process Method in Kolaka Regency
Keyword: SPK, Analytical Hierarchy Process, Alternatif Pilihan, Wisata Pantai
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Accreditation is an assessment activity to determine the eligibility of a study program or university. Accreditation for study programs is carried out by LAM (Independent Accreditation Institution). LAM has many types, one of which is LAMEMBA (Independent Accreditation Institution for Economics, Management, Business, and Accounting). Accreditation assessment is carried out by evaluating and assessing the implementation of study program learning based on instrument criteria. Because there are so many criteria, dimensions, and indicators, study programs are sometimes unable to anticipate the reduction of these points in the assessment. Therefore, a system is needed that can assist in the assessment of study program accreditation so that study programs can simulate the accreditation rating that can be obtained. The purpose of this study is to be able to build a web application that can help study programs in simulating the assessment of the LAMEMBA accreditation instrument. This study uses the Waterfall development method for system application development. This research produces a web application that is used to simulate the accreditation process of the Management and Accounting study program. The conclusion obtained from this study is that the LAMEMBA accreditation instrument assessment simulation application was successfully created and in accordance with the assessment directions of the LAMEMBA study program accreditation assessment guide which can be downloaded from the official LAMEMBA website. This research is a case study at the Quality Assurance Center Institute of Widya Kartika University, Surabaya.
Judul Paper: Web-Based LAMEMBA Standardized Accreditation Instrument Assessment Simulation Application
Keyword: Accreditation Assessment, Simulation, LAMEMBA
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Information technology plays a vital role in the performance of organizations, institutions, and companies today. Furthermore, the application of information technology can improve the effectiveness and efficiency of decision-making. For example, SDN 67, Ambon City, utilizes information technology to support academic activities and business processes, but an audit has not yet been conducted. The information system owned by SDN 67, Ambon City, is still not integrated and cannot support existing business processes at the school. This study will conduct an audit of the existing information system and design information technology governance using the COBIT 2019 framework. The results of the study will produce an information technology governance design at SDN 67, Ambon City, which can support the implementation of business processes in accordance with established regulations and requirements.
Judul Paper: Designing Information Technology Governance at SD Negeri 67 Ambon City Using the COBIT 2019 Framework
Keyword: COBIT 2019, Factor Design, Information Technology Governance, Elementary School
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: Subdit III Jatanras Polda South Sumatra is a Sub Directorate of Division III which is engaged in reducing crime and violence in the South Sumatra region. To support work activities, the Subdit III Jatanras Polda South Sumatra office uses information and communication technology-based facilities connected to internet services. However, existing internet network facilities often experience obstacles such as network connections that do not work properly which affect the completion of work, as well as the use of shared facilities between employees and visitors which results in poor connections during the process of uploading and downloading files at the Subdit III Jatanras Polda South Sumatra office, for that it is necessary to measure the network performance parameters, namely by implementing Quality of Service (QoS) consisting of throughput, delay, packet loss and jitter. The tools used to measure network parameters are using Axence Netools 5 and Iperftool. The results of the throughput parameter test are 30%, bandwidth is 23%, packet loss is 13%, delay is 26% and jitter is 35%. So the results obtained with an index of 25.4%, this value is in the category of disagreeing or not being satisfied for employees and visitors regarding the internet network services at the Subdit III Jatanras Polda South Sumatra office, so improvements are needed.
Judul Paper: Evaluation of the Quality of the Internet Network at the South Sumatra Regional Police Sub-Directorate III Jatanras Office Using the Action Research Method
Keyword: LAN, Bandwidth, Delay, Packet Loss, Throughput, Jitter, QoS
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: Salatiga is one of the cities that has a lot of business potential, it can be seen from several factors such as the large number of students from various regions who come to study, this is a great potential for local MSMEs to develop and many new businesses are established, such as culinary, fashion and automotive, but the problem that occurs is that students have difficulty getting information related to the location of MSMEs in Salatiga City The Location-Based Services (LBS) method is a method designed to help promote MSME products in Salatiga City that utilizes GPS technology to determine the user's location so that the application can display information on MSME products closest to the user. This research method uses the RAD (Rapid Application Development) research method, which is a software development methodology that focuses on developing prototypes with a fast and structured development process. The results of the research on designing an MSME search application in Salatiga City using the Location-Based Service method that utilizes user location information to display a list of MSMEs around the user and other information such as reviews and ratings from other users, providing results as expected and being able to easily find and select MSMEs in Salatiga City.
Judul Paper: Designing the MSME Application for Salatiga City Using the Location Base Services Method
Keyword: Design, Application, MSMEs, Location Base Service
Jurnal: JITK (Jurnal Ilmu Pengetahuan dan Teknologi Komputer)

Abstrak: The development of information systems and information technology is currently an important concern in every government institution as an effort to develop more effective and efficient organizational performance. The implementation of IS/IT also provides encouragement to the information management process both internally within the institution and the function of government institutions in providing services to the public. Referring to the current research, the researcher wants to conduct an IS/IT Strategic Planning for one of the government institutions, namely the Salatiga City Transportation Agency, which in this case seems to be lacking in maximizing the implementation of IS/IT so that data and information needs have not been fully integrated and have an impact on ineffective business process activities. Based on observations that the business and IT functions running in the Salatiga City Transportation Agency are still less organized and accommodated. Therefore, the researcher wants to review and propose an IS/IT Strategic Planning that is expected to complement the IS/IT needs in the Salatiga City Transportation Agency. The IS/IT Strategic Planning Method in the Salatiga City Transportation Agency uses the Value Chain to identify business processes at the beginning and also the enterprise architecture from TOGAF (The Open Group Architecture Framework), with the TOGAF ADM (Architecture Development Method) method for the process of defining and developing enterprise architecture that produces a vision architecture, business architecture, information system architecture, technology architecture, opportunities and solutions. Furthermore, the results of the development of the enterprise architecture from TOGAF become a proposed blueprint for information systems and information technology in the IS/IT Strategic Planning in the Salatiga City Transportation Agency.
Judul Paper: IS/IT Strategic Planning at the Salatiga City Transportation Department Using the TOGAF Framework
Keyword: Information System, Information Technology, Enterprise Architecture, TOGAF
Jurnal: JOIV : International Journal on Informatics Visualization

Abstrak: This research focuses on Hotel Mitra Muara Enim, where the room reservation process is still done manually by telephone or direct visits to the hotel. In this study, the Prorotype method is used as a software development model. By using this model, a web-based hotel reservation system has been developed to provide information services and room reservations quickly, without requiring direct visits to the hotel or by telephone. The programming languages ​​used in the development of this system are PHP and MySQL. Users who are guests at Hotel Mitra Muara Enim can perform various transactions online, including booking and reserving rooms, check-in, room service, and checkout. The hotel reservation system developed provides a user-friendly interface and offers functionality that allows transactions to be carried out quickly, compared to manual processes, including data searches and report generation.
Judul Paper: Design and Build a Web-Based Hotel Room Reservation Application using the Prototype Method
Keyword: Reservation, Hotel, Prototype
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Network security is a crucial part of any computer network. Human life today relies heavily on technology, especially computer networks. Within a network, the use of a firewall is crucial and highly recommended for system security. A firewall cannot monitor network traffic and cannot provide warnings in the event of an attack. Malware is a computer program or software intentionally created to find weaknesses and damage a computer's operating system software without the owner's permission. Monitoring server actions is crucial because suspicious actions can be aimed at attacking and damaging information on a server, potentially resulting in losses. The Intrusion Prevention System can detect and stop ongoing attacks responsively using Wazuh tools to detect and monitor every threat pattern against server computers, such as msfvenom, Metasploit, and other types of attacks. Wazuh is equipped with Security Analytics, Intrusion Prevention, Log Data Analysis, and File Integrity Monitoring features, thus reducing or even minimizing attacks on servers by detecting incoming attacks.
Judul Paper: Modeling an Instruction Prevention System for Detecting and Preventing the Spread of Malware Using Wazuh
Keyword: Detection system, malware, wazuh, IPS
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak:
SILTANUS, an Information Technology (IT) service initiated by the Palembang city government, aims to assist Da'i (Islamic preachers) in spreading religious teachings throughout the city. The primary issue addressed in this study is identifying SILTANUS's shortcomings in effectively evaluating system functionality and overall application performance. To address this, the study utilized the ITIL V3 Framework, a globally recognized IT service management framework that offers a structured approach to planning, implementing, and managing IT services to meet specific needs. Through the application of the ITIL V3 framework, this study aims to improve IT service management by the Palembang city government, increase operational efficiency, and support the achievement of program objectives. The findings indicate that while SILTANUS has the potential to significantly improve service management for Da'i, it is currently hampered by several limitations, including a lack of features, unstable performance, and the need to improve service quality.

SILTANUS, an Information Technology (IT) service initiated by the Palembang city government, aims to aid Da'is (Islamic preachers) in disseminating religious teachings throughout the city. The main issue addressed in this research is the identification of SILTANUS's shortcomings to effectively evaluate the system's functionality and overall application performance. To address this, the study employs the ITIL V3 Framework, a globally recognized framework in IT service management, offering a structured approach for planning, implementing, and managing IT services to align with specific needs. Through the application of the ITIL V3 framework, this research aims to enhance the Palembang city government's IT service management, improve operational efficiency, and support the attainment of program objectives. The findings reveal that while SILTANUS holds the potential to significantly improve service management for Da'is, it is currently hindered by several limitations, including a lack of features, unstable performance, and a need for improved service quality.
Judul Paper: Palembang City Government Da'i Service Management Analysis on IT-Based SILTANUS Using the ITIL V3 Framework
Keyword: Da'i, SILTANUS, ITIL V3
Jurnal: Journal of Information Technology Ampera

Abstrak: The purpose of this study is to address the problem of inaccurate distribution of Direct Cash Assistance (BLT) to the poor and MSMEs in Rama Indra Village, Seputih Raman District, Central Lampung Regency. The method used is cluster analysis using the k-means clustering algorithm, which partitions the data into several groups based on predetermined priority criteria. The results of using this method show increased effectiveness in identifying families eligible to receive assistance, resulting in more targeted BLT distribution and increased accuracy in selecting groups of families receiving assistance.
Judul Paper: Application of the K-Means Clustering Method to Determine the Eligibility of Mobile-Based Direct Cash Assistance
Keyword: Cluster Analysis, K-Means Clustering Algorithm, Direct Cash Assistance (BLT), Distribution of Aid, Effectiveness of Targeting
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of information technology utilization in the e-KTP issuance process at the Population and Civil Registration Office of Banyuasin Regency, by assessing its suitability to the strategic objectives of the office. A quantitative descriptive method and a case study approach were used, with data collection through literature review, observation, interviews, and analysis. The research focused on the Data and Document Utilization Section and the Technology and Communication Governance & Human Resources Section aimed at strengthening IT governance. The findings indicate that the e-KTP system, implemented using the COBIT 5 framework, successfully managed IT processes effectively, with most processes achieving the expected proficiency level. However, sustainability management under DSS04 remained at level 2, indicating that improvements in this area could significantly improve service efficiency and effectiveness.
Judul Paper: Analysis of E-KTP Management using the COBIT 5 Framework Approach in the Deliver, Service and Support Domains
Keyword: COBIT 5 Framework, IT Service Management, Digital Services, Population Administration
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: In the digital era, diary writing has shifted from paper to digital, raising privacy concerns due to the accessibility of text by unauthorized parties. To address this, this research developed "Catatan Daily," a digital diary application that prioritizes security and privacy through text encryption. The development method uses a waterfall approach and UML system design, with features such as login, note creation and storage, and logout. The implementation of cryptographic algorithms ensures that only users with the decryption key can access the notes, making the application secure and private. As a result, "Catatan Daily" offers a modern and easy-to-use solution for secure diary keeping, meeting users' need for privacy in the digital era.
Judul Paper: Android Based Daily Notes Application Design Using Waterfall Method
Keyword: desain, catatan daily, android, waterfall
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study measures the accuracy of the CHAID Decision Tree method in classifying infant nutritional status by adding gender and village location attributes to the integrated health post (Posyandu). The result of this study is a local server-based website for testing the classification system. The process includes data import, training and test data sharing, model training, algorithm selection, and matrix testing. From 3,106 data sets between January and February 2024, the accuracy of the test data reached 0.90, the training data 0.99, and the CHAID algorithm 0.84. The variables used include age, village, Posyandu, height, weight, and gender. Nutritional status classes include good nutrition, poor nutrition, undernutrition, overnutrition, obesity, and risk of overnutrition.
Judul Paper: Implementation of Data Mining in the Classification of Infant Nutritional Status Using the CHAID Decision Tree Method (Case Study: Godean 1 Health Center Yogyakarta)
Keyword: Data Mining, Decision Tree, CHAID, Baby Nutritional Status, Classification
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study aims to analyze sentiment toward the Natasha Skincare Clinic in Yogyakarta through Google Reviews. Data were collected from user reviews of visitors to the clinic, and sentiment analysis was used to evaluate the positive and negative opinions and feelings within these reviews. The analysis results are expected to help clinic management understand user perceptions and experiences, and improve service quality. This study also used a Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm to classify review sentiment, with the aim of providing in-depth insights into the reputation of the Natasha Skincare Clinic in Yogyakarta.
Judul Paper: Sentiment Analysis of the Natasha Skincare Clinic in Yogyakarta Using the Google Review Method
Keyword: Sentiment analysis, Google Review, Natasha Skincare, Klinik, Yogyakarta
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: This study aims to address obstacles in the management and supervision of archives at the South Sumatra Provincial Archives Service, including difficulty finding documents, limited access to information, and delays in archive management. To address these issues, a web-based application was developed using the Web Engineering method, consisting of the stages of Communication, Planning, Modeling, Construction, and Deployment. This application is designed to provide a menu for summarizing employee data based on various criteria that suit needs. Application testing shows that the provided features are effective and function according to their objectives, thereby increasing the efficiency of archive management at the institution.
Judul Paper: Developing Employee Data Applications Using Web Engineering Methods (Case Study: South Sumatra Province Archives Service)
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Indonesia has the highest tea consumption rate in the world, where the quality of tea leaves is highly dependent on the location where they are grown. To identify tea types, an automated system with digital image processing is used. This study compares two model architectures, one with data augmentation and one without augmentation, in classifying tea leaves from the GMB 1-5 series clones. The results show that the CNN model without augmentation provides higher accuracy than the one with augmentation. Specifically, the Xception model without augmentation achieved 98% accuracy, while the VGG16 model without augmentation achieved 95%. In contrast, the augmented model achieved 92% accuracy for Xception and 94% for VGG16. These findings suggest that, in the context of limited datasets, the unaugmented model tends to be more accurate because it avoids overfitting, which often occurs in small datasets.
Judul Paper: Classification of GMB Series Clone Tea Leaves Using Convolutional Neural Network with VGG16 and Xception Architecture
Keyword: Augmentation, Classification, CNN, Teh, VGG16, Xception
Jurnal: IJAIN (International Journal of Advances in Intelligent Informatics)

Abstrak: Nyemiliciouss has been a food business since 2022. To date, Nyemiliciouss has only conducted its product business through Instagram and word of mouth. This type of sales approach is considered insufficient to offer or market the product widely. Nyemiliciouss also does not yet have a website, so prior to website creation, a UI/UX design is required to determine whether the website meets expectations. The UI/UX design was created using Figma. This UI/UX design was created using the Lean UX method with four stages: declare assumptions, create an MVP, run an experiment, and conduct feedback and research. Furthermore, an evaluation was carried out using the User Experience Questionnaire (UEQ) where there were 6 indicators that produced an attractiveness indicator with an average value of 1.90 in the "Excellent" category, a clarity indicator with an average value of 1.88 in the "Good" category, an efficiency indicator with a value of 1.85 in the "Good" category, an accuracy indicator with a value of 1.92 in the "Excellent" category, stimulation with an average value of 1.70 in the "Good" category and recency with a value of 1.80 in the "Excellent" category.
Judul Paper: Website UI/UX Design Using Lean UX Methods
Keyword: Desain UI/UX, Lean UX, User Experience Questionnaire
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: This study aims to predict the level of speech delay in toddlers who have been identified as smartphone users using the classification method and the Decision Tree C4.5 algorithm. The attributes used in this study include age, duration, and type of application used. Data management for predicting the level of speech delay in toddlers uses the Knowledge Discovery in Database (KDD) stage with the help of the RapidMiner tool. The process of calculating data with the Decision Tree algorithm shows that the level of speech delay (Speech Delayed) is lower than the level of toddlers who do not experience speech delay (Normal). The prediction accuracy results are 89.59%. Evaluation with the AUC metric also shows a value of 89.59%, indicating that this model has almost perfect classification capabilities. These findings verify that the model is able to predict the level of speech delay in toddlers with a high level of accuracy.
Judul Paper: Predictive Modeling of Speech Delays in Toddlers Associated with Smartphone Use Using Data
Keyword: Speech Delays, Decision Trees, Toddlers
Jurnal: Khazanah Informatika: Jurnal Ilmu Komputer dan Informatika

Abstrak: PT. Indonesia Comnets Plus (IC0N+) is a subsidiary of PT PLN (Persero) which is a company in the field of telecommunications networks and information technology. Starting his work in the telecommunications network business, the internet service provider offered is named Stroomnet which has now changed to ICONNET on May 31, 2021. Various packages are offered according to the service needs of the internet in several districts in Bali. In doing marketing, it is necessary to carry out an effective and efficient strategy. Basically, a business strategy can provide business information such as market segmentation, target market, and approaches to marketing. The main data were obtained from research subjects, both through documentation and observation. Looking at the development of market demand for 1 year, this study uses a clustering process to determine potential new service users so as to make it easier for company management in planning service providers and appropriate promotional strategies. The processing uses data mining techniques and the K-Means algorithm. In this study, it is hoped that the results of the research can help the retail division in determining promotion strategies for prospective new service users.
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF DATA MINING FOR CLUSTERING INTENDANTS OF ICONNET SERVICES BASED ON BALI AREA USING THE K-MEANS METHOD
Keyword: ICONNET, Data Mining, K-Means Clustring.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: In helping village community businesses, there are LPDs that provide convenience in providing savings and loan services. Along with the progress of the development of the LPD which is getting faster and faster, the complexity of processing savings and loan transaction data is getting higher, such as the LPD in Tengkulung Traditional Village which is located on Jalan. Setra Ganda Mayu, South Kuta District, Badung Regency. Recording data manually with this book often encounters problems in the process of calculating data and reports, given the large amount of data that must be processed manually, resulting in errors in preparing reports. So, with the development of the current information technology era, the development of a computerized system, namely "Development of a Savings and Loans Information System at the Tengkulung Traditional Village LPD" is expected to help simplify the process of managing savings and loan data on LPD members in a faster and more efficient manner.The research method used in this study is the development of the waterfall method. The waterfall method is a systematic and sequential information system development system. The waterfall method has several stages, namely system analysis, system design, implementation, integration of system testing, and system maintenance.This system can generate savings, deposits and credit information that will produce a data report. Both the balance report and profit and loss report from the Tengkulung Traditional Village LPD.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF A SAVINGS AND LOANS INFORMATION SYSTEM IN THE LPD OF TENGKULUNG TRADITIONAL VILLAGE
Keyword: LPD, Savings and Loans, Data Mutilation, Computerization, Web, Technology
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Spare parts are essential for electronic devices such as TVs, air conditioners, refrigerators and washing machines, whose function is to help the machine's performance so that these electronic devices can be used properly. CV XYZ is a company engaged in the service of these electronic devices. One of the records is owned by CV. XYZ is a data service for a large number of customer electronic devices. Prediction of using spare parts during the service process is crucial. Predictions help management make decisions regarding spare parts inventory strategy. For this reason, an application system for predicting the use of spare parts is designed that can be used to analyze electronic device service data records in CV. XYZ. This spare parts usage prediction application utilizes input data from spare parts and service data. Both data are processed using the clustering method with the k-means algorithm. The application's output is in the form of patterns of the number of spare parts used during the service process for customer electronic devices per month. So with this application, CV. XYZ can arrange the types of spare parts that are more often needed during the service process for customer electronic devices.
Judul Paper: PREDICTION OF SPARE PART USAGE USING THE K-MEANS ALGORITHM IN CV. XYZ
Keyword: Clustering methode, K-Means Algorithm,C#, MySQL
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The problem which is still unresolved is nutrition, from year to year, the problem of nutrition becomes one of the crucial aspects of obesity rates in Indonesia. The number of obesity cases increased by 35.4 percent in 2018 from 2007 which was only 19.1 percent. It is feared that this problem will continue to increase every year. Efforts to solve these problems can be overcome with self-awareness. In this problem, it was sparked to create a Daily Calorie Application that functions as a food diary and can track the calorie needs to be needed of each individual with an application that is integrated with the Open API, so it is hoped that the food menu will always be updated
Judul Paper: WEB-BASED DAILY CALORIE APPLICATION USES GOLANG RESTFUL API
Keyword: .RESTful API, Golang, OPEN API, WDLC, calorie tracker
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The world of tourism is currently very developed and has even become one of the factors driving economic growth. One of the infrastructures driving tourism is the existence of hotels, every industry engaged in providing services and hospitality services must be very good in terms of service, cleanliness, and customer satisfaction priority. The check-in process at every hotel is almost the same, but in this digital era, there are still hotels that use the manual method, and the old computerized system which is the cheapest system which makes the check-in process less efficient and effective. Computer problems and weaknesses often occur, such as a slow system, problematic hotel guest room charges, sometimes double paying guests, and the registration process, check-in and check-out are still manual. This is necessary for information system to simplify the work process, solve problems, and speed up the process. Information system design method using SDLC (Systems Development Life Cycle). It is hoped that this information system will meet current industry needs and be able to support hospitality business processes whenever implemented.
Judul Paper: RFID-BASED PRESENCE MACHINE ARCHITECTURE USING REALTIME DATABASE
Keyword: Management Information Systems, Check-in, Check-out, Accomodation, Hotel
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The development of technology gives a lot of changes to human lifestyle, one of the technologies that are widely used for now is smartphones, a lot of activities that can be done through smartphones. As quoted from the latest report We Are Social in 2020 internet users in Indonesia reached 64% or 175.4 million, which includes smartphone users who reached 94%. Smartphone users are quite large also affect human patterns in seeking information one of them library, by providing ease of access then the library will remain the user's choice, therefore it takes innovation that adjusts the needs of the times. This research aims to design a digital library application of Amikom University Yogyakarta based on the needs of users and stakeholders. The design is done using the five planes method where each element has different stages. And to conduct evaluations using cognitive walkthrough method. This research resulted in a digital library application interface design using flutter framework that suits the needs of users by paying attention to the aspects of user interface (UI) and user experience (UX) so that it can be more easily accepted by prospective users. With the test results of 8 tasks given 7 tasks with a score of more than 80 (high) and 1 task with a score of 77 (medium) and resulting in an overall score of 86 points (high).
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN UI/UX APLIKASI DIGITAL LIBRARY DI UNIVERSITAS AMIKOM YOGYAKARTA MENGGUNAKAN METODE FIVE PLANES
Keyword: Five Planes Method, Digital Library, UI/UX.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
The use of technology, information, and communication in the field of government is known as e-Government. One of the implementations of e-Government carried out by government agencies or agencies in Indonesia is SPBE. To ensure that the SPBE runs according to the goals set, a monitoring and evaluation process is needed from the SPBE itself. The XYZ Agency itself has many systems that are intended for the community, to make it easier and to be able to reach all levels of government. To maintain and improve the quality of information security management at XYZ Agency is to evaluate the level of readiness and completeness of information security management using the KAMI Index parameters, which will later become a reference for producing recommendations in the form of ISMS guidelines.
Based on the results of an evaluation of the implementation of information security management related to the implementation of SPBE at the XYZ Agency, it is at an inappropriate level with the implementation of information security management that has been running which is still at level I to I+. To be able to adjust to these values. The XYZ Agency needs to prepare an Information Security Management System document as a standard guide in implementing SPBE.
Judul Paper: EVALUATION AND RECOMMENDATIONS OF SPBE'S INFORMATION SECURITY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM (SMKI) GUIDELINES IN XYZ AGENCY
Keyword: SPBE, Information Security, ISMS, KAMI Index, Guidelines, E-government
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: This study aims to determine the role of the use of production technology in increasing the production of brown sugar in kec. Kutasari and Mrebet Kab. Purbalingga and find out what are the obstacles faced by the coconut sap farmer group towards increasing brown sugar production in the district. Kutasari and Mrebet Kab. Purbalingga. The research was conducted from September to December 2022 in the district. Kutasari and Mrebet Kab. Purbalingga. The number of farmers who were taken by simple random sampling as respondents was 18 people. Data collection techniques through direct observation and interviews using a list of questions and secondary supporting data. Descriptive analysis of the data was used using a scoring system for each question item to see the role of production technology. The role of production technology in increasing production is moderate. In which of the five group roles, 3 of them are classified as high, 2 are classified as low. The role that is categorized as high is the role of production technology in the provision of production facilities and means, the application of five farming technologies, cooperation with government agencies or KUD. And the obstacles faced by farmer groups in increasing brown sugar production are the lack of facilities and production facilities, the lack of application of five-farm technology and the lack of institutions such as KUD to increase the production of farmer groups in kec. Kutasari and Mrebet Kab.
Judul Paper: THE ROLE OF PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGY IN THE QUALITY AND CAPACITY OF ORGANIC RED SUGAR PRODUCTION IN THE DISTRICT. KUTASARI AND MREBET REGENCY. PURBALINGGA
Keyword: the role of production technology, production capacity, brown sugar, Purbalingga.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: In a village, there are arrangements and manage the interests of the local community called the village government. In addition, each village certainly has abundant village potential. However, it is not known by many people due to the lack of information dissemination. This of course has an impact on economic development in the village and also reduces the village's readiness to become a Smart Village. This makes the village potential information system needed to bridge the economy in Keramas Village. With the village potential information system, it is expected to be able to bridge the potential of Keramas Village to be better known to the wider community. This research use Design Thinking method. The media used is a website using HTML 5, CSS 3, Javascript, PHP with Laravel 8 and Bootstrap 5 frameworks. There is a WhatsApp gateway that aims to get messages received by the admin. The purpose of making this system is to provide solutions for economic improvement and community empowerment in Keramas Village, Blahbatuh District, Gianyar Regency.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF A VILLAGE POTENTIAL INFORMATION SYSTEM (SINPODES) AS A SOLUTION FOR IMPROVING THE ECONOMY AND EMPOWERING THE KERAMAS VILLAGE COMMUNITY USING THE DESIGN THINKING METHOD
Keyword: Information System, Design Thinking, Website.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The development of information technology is growing so rapidly, both in the world of education, business, industry, commerce and so forth. Information technology is very helpful by making it easy for users to solve various things. For this reason, the authors conducted research in an educational institution in Primary School Sekolah Dasar Negeri 3 Bubunan. In accordance with the analysis conducted by the author when conducting research it was found that handling the management of incoming and outgoing mails still uses conventional or manual methods. To improve the manual system, the authors designed and built an information system that web-based mail and out which will hopefully be able to provide better results than the previous system. The conclusion that can be drawn from the problem above is the writer builds an information system of incoming and outgoing mails at Bubunan Primary School Sekolah Dasar Negeri 3 Bubunan so that the agency has a computerized application that can later be more effective and efficient. With this information system, it will be able to minimize the weaknesses or weaknesses of the previous system.
Judul Paper: WEB-BASED INCOMING AND OUTCOMING LETTER INFORMATION SYSTEM AT 3 BUBUNAN STATE PRIMARY SCHOOL
Keyword: Information Systems, In and Out Mail, Web.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The application of the website-based Tracer Study system at ITB STIKOM Bali is useful for tracking and getting feedback from alumni. The waiting time for alumni to get a job is one of the assessments of the Tracer Study system at STIKOM Bali. The data obtained from this assessment has not been optimally processed by STIKOM Bali. If you dig deeper, you can get a pattern to predict the waiting time for alumni to get a job. In this study, we tried to apply the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm in classifying alumni work waiting time. SVM is a method in supervised learning which is usually used for classification (such as Support Vector Classification) and regression (Support Vector Regression). In classification modeling, SVM has a more mature and clearer concept mathematically compared to other classification techniques. Sample data were obtained from the STIKOM Bali Tracer Study system, with a total of 1240 data consisting of 7 categorical type attributes. The trial of this SVM algorithm model uses WEKA tools with 10 folds cross-validation. The test results show an accuracy rate of 48.629%, where out of 1240 test data, 603 data were successfully classified correctly
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN ALGORITMA SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE (SVM) UNTUK PREDIKSI WAKTU TUNGGU ALUMNI MENDAPATKAN PEKERJAAN
Keyword: tracer study, alumni, svm, waiting time for work.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Traffic accidents are one of the biggest causes of death in the world. From WHO data, at least 1.35 million people die each year due to traffic accidents and 90% of them come from developing countries. This figure can actually be reduced by providing good pre-hospital services, such as easy accident reporting, recording the condition of victims and efficient communication between ambulances and hospitals. To make this happen, Startup G-One is here with one of its applications, namely the Nurses App, which helps record the condition of victims and communicates with referral hospitals. However, so that this application can be used easily by users, it is necessary to evaluate and analyze on the usability side. Therefore, the author made this study to measure the usability level of the Nurses App application with the Usability Testing Method so that suggestions for improvements can then be given in terms of the interface to increase the usability level of the application product. The results of the evaluation and analysis that have been carried out have succeeded in revealing all the problems in the Nurses G-One application where there are 10 problems and 11 recommendations for improvement which if improvements are made based on the recommendations given can streamline the time the user runs tasks using the application from 10.7 seconds to 10.7 seconds. 8.9 seconds and increases the smooth running of tasks, which initially only worked 69 tasks smoothly, then increased to 128 tasks.
Judul Paper: EVALUATION AND ANALYSIS OF USABILITY USING USABILITY TESTING METHOD IN PRE HOSPITAL APPLICATIONS CASE STUDY NURSES APP
Keyword: Analysis, Evaluation, Nurses App, Usability Level, Usability Testing
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Along with the rapid development of education, and the demands of keeping up with technological developments, schools need to continue to innovate in improving services and more comprehensive interactions with guardians of students in particular and society in general. One of them is by utilizing the development of the school website. SMK TI Bali Global Denpasar is a private IT school that has a large number of students. Previously, SMK TI Bali Global Denpasar already had a website, but the website was made using the wordpress CMS platform, so the display and access were very limited, making it difficult for the school admin to make modifications. The school web will also be integrated with other applications in the future, so the new school web must have integrated access with other applications. From these problems, a school web integrated information system will be developed using SDLC software design, programming language using PHP Codeigniter, responsive display using bootstrap, resulting in a well-integrated school website. This school website will feature the latest news, school profiles, announcements and application systems related to schools that will be integrated into a centralized school website.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI FRAMEWORK CODEIGNITER PADA SISTEM INFORMASI TERINTEGRASI WEBSITE SEKOLAH
Keyword: Website, Integrated System, SDLC, Codeigniter Framework
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Teaching activities are one of the important activities at Tri Dharma Perguruan Tinggi at Indonesia. This activity should run optimally in accordance with the plan. Presence report is a document which is evidence that teaching and learning activities are already running. At present, the presence in the Undhira campus environment is conducted by lecturers and requires special time to complete the presence. This certainly will reduce the time of teaching and learning activities in the classroom. Coupled with recording data manually with paper media can be easily damaged and lost. Accuracy in filling the presence is also very dependent on the accuracy of the lecturer. So it is not impossible that there will be an error in filling the presence. This research is expected to produce a prototype of a lecturer and student attendance system so that the problem can be resolved.
Judul Paper: USE OF QRCODE TO OPTIMIZE TEACHING AND LEARNING ACTIVITIES AT UNDHIRA CAMPUS (CASE STUDY ON INFORMATICS ENGINEERING STUDY PROGRAM)
Keyword: presence, qrcode, student presence.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The digital village is one of the ideas issued by the government to advance the development of every village in the Republic of Indonesia. A village that was initially still conventional, of course, must experience changes in various aspects in order to become a digital village. One of the goals of a digital village is that the expansion of information can be carried out quickly and precisely, and is easily understood by village communities. Keramas Village is one of the villages that is committed to developing a digital village. but in making a website, of course, it needs analysis to suit the characteristics of the village. almost all villages are directed to use information technology to improve information services. One of the efforts in developing a digital village in Keramas Village is to create a Website-based Village Potential information system that can make it easier to disseminate information to the public. The design of this information system uses the prototype method which aims to adjust the needs of the user.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF A VILLAGE POTENTIAL INFORMATION SYSTEM TO REALIZE A DIGITAL VILLAGE PROGRAM IN KERAMAS BLAHBATUH GIANYAR VILLAGE
Keyword: Information System, Digital Village, Village Potential, Web.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Doing activities out religious ceremonies is a real form of Hinduism people's belief in God Almighty with banten as a symbol of the contents of the universe. Currently, the knowledge level of Balinese women in making banten is decreasing. As many as 54.6% of Balinese women still lack knowledge in making banten. Several reasons include the demand for women to work to make ends meet, the lack of understanding from an early age, to the ease of access to buying upakara accessories. Most people are reluctant to make banten because they are busy. The Hinduism community in Bali tends to buy banten rather than making banten. People who have busy lives and various kinds of problems that are different for each individual. By using the design thinking method as a solution to these problems, it is necessary to make an online banten application design. The five stages of design thinking is emphatize, define, ideate, prototype dan testing. Based on the results of the research that has been done, it can be concluded that using the design thinking method produces a design that has been tested by prospective users so that they get a design with a value of 80 which is included in the word grade B.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN UI/UX APLIKASI BANTEN ONLINE MENGGUNAKAN METODE DESIGN THINKING
Keyword: Banten, UI/UX, Design Thinking.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: SD Negeri Adisucipto 1 is one of the state elementary schools located in the sub-district of Depok, Sleman, Yogyakarta. At the elementary school, teachers deliver subject matter according to the curriculum that has been determined by the government. One of the lessons given is the Solar System and for interest in learning the solar system in grade 5 SD Negeri Adisucipto 1 is said to be lacking because students feel bored with learning media using print media. This is evidenced by the score obtained as much as 81.31% of the 28 5th grade students who filled out the questionnaire stating that they were bored in the current learning media.Based on the problems above, the author wants to make learning media that is not boring for students with Augmented Reality technology. The author uses the MDLC method to design, and build which consists of 6 stages such as Conception, Design, Material Collection, Manufacture, Testing, and Distribution. The results of this study prove that as many as 85.4% stated strongly agree to use this Augmented Reality Solar System application.
Judul Paper: PENERAPAN AUGMENTED REALITY SEBAGAI MEDIA PEMBELAJARAN UNTUK PENGENALAN TATA SURYA SD NEGERI ADISUCIPTO 1
Keyword: Solar System, Augmented Reality, Learning Media, Elementary School, MDLC
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: is a form of E-Government implementation in Indonesia which is expected to be able to harmonize information technology and government administration. XYZ City as an area that has implemented SPBE, has evaluated the SPBE in 2021. Based on this evaluation, XYZ City Government received a score of 3.19 (good). However, if we look at the details of the audit results, SPBE Management Domain gets the lowest score. This domain has a key role, because in that domain there are indicators related to information security which should have a high value because it is related to information security in the regions that administer the SPBE. This study evaluates or re-audits the implementation of SPBE in the XYZ City Government, especially in the implementation of information security. The evaluation method is carried out using the Information Security Management System (ISMS) standard through the Indeks KAMI combined with COBIT 5 APO13 Manage Security to obtain the maturity level of information security. Based on the reassessment, it was found that the SPBE of the XYZ City Government was at a value of 3.17 (good), with the maturity level value being at level 1 (stub).
Judul Paper: EVALUATION OF ELECTRONIC-BASED GOVERNMENT SYSTEM SECURITY IN XYZ CITY
Keyword: E-Government, SPBE, Audit, Information Security, ISMS, Indeks KAMI, COBIT 5 APO13.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The government is trying to control the economy amid the Covid-19 pandemic by distributing several aids to the community in various cities and villages, one of which is in Yeh Embang Village, Mendoyo District, Jembrana Regency. Temporary Unconditional Cash Transfer Program (BLT) is assistance to society originating from village fund allocations in the Village Budget (APB Desa) which will be provided by the government to people who have lost their livelihoods due to the Covid-19 pandemic. The availability of BLT funds is limited and on the other hand many people need it. Therefore, this research has developed a decision support system for Covid-19 BLT recipients in Yeh Embang Village. The system developed uses 6 criteria, namely work, income, type of floor, toilet and type of roof. The system was tested using 156 datasets of the people of Yeh Embang Village and the results of the confusion matrix method test showed that the system could produce an accuracy of 90%.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI METODE MOORA DALAM MENENTUKAN KELAYAKAN PENERIMA BANTUAN LANGSUNG TUNAI COVID-19
Keyword: Decision Support System, Temporary Unconditional Cash Transfer Program, Covid-19, MOORA
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Minum (KPSPAM) is a community-based business unit group engaged in the management of drinking water facilities in a village. In 2020, Nyalian Village received assistance for the Penyediaan Air Minum dan Sanitasi berbasis Masyarakat (PAMSIMAS) located in Tegalwangi, Nyalian, Banjarangkan, Klungkung. The use of PAMSIMAS has started from January 2021 until now, the number of KPSPAM customers is 82 house connections (SR). To support the operation of KPSPAM, a tarif for drinking water usage is carried out which is recorded with a Water Meter. The recording is carried out periodically at the end of the current month, and generates a bill for drinking water usage. KPSPAM officers are still doing manual records, then they are entered in excel and water usage is calculated. The use of the Information System helps in making invoices, recapitulation of payments and annual reporting of the Nyalian Village KPSPAM. It is hoped that this information system can be developed into a mobile version so that the recording process can be carried out directly from the registration officer's mobile device..
Judul Paper: WATER METER RECORDING INFORMATION SYSTEM IN KPSPAM NYALIAN VILLAGE, BANJARANGKAN, KLUNGKUNG
Keyword: KPSPAM, Water Meter, Information
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: In this study, a system was developed that can provide information about the location of tourist destinations and road routes to selected locations in the form of maps utilizing geographic information systems. This research was conducted to support tourism in West Bandung Regency (KBB) so that it is more developed so that it becomes one of the main tourist destinations in the western part of Java Island. So far, information about tourist destinations is still in the form of news and does not yet have a map feature, let alone the route feature to the location of tourist destinations. The development of this system uses the programming language PHP, CSS, HTML, MySQL database and Google Maps API. The displayed map is taken from Google Maps, and then edited to provide information on tourist destinations and travel routes to the desired location. The results of this study are in the form of a website-based Geographic Information System equipped with features such as information on the location of tourist destinations, news, articles, visitor comments, maps and routes to tourist destinations. The maps and routes have been adapted to the factual conditions that will be passed by web visitors or potential visitors to tourist destinations in West Bandung Regency. The location of this object is obtained by conducting a survey directly to the tourist object. By implementing the features of the Google Maps API which are accompanied by Auto Update and Directions Service functions to display maps in mapping the location of tourist objects in this geographic information system, visitors can find out the location of tourist destinations in West Bandung district without having to ask other people. Website administrators can add tourist destination locations, change and delete them. From the results of the questionnaire it is known that the geographic information system for mapping tourist destinations in West Bandung Regency is already running and functioning properly with a satisfaction level of 72.56%..
Judul Paper: GEOGRAPHIC MAPPING INFORMATION SYSTEM EQUIPPED WITH ROUTES TO WEST BANDUNG DISTRICT TOURISM OBJECTS BASED ON WEBGIS
Keyword: the role of production technology, production capacity, brown sugar, Purbalingga.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The Bali State Polytechnic already has a Learning Management System which can be penetrated on the https://elearning.pnb.ac.id page. However, the lack of adequate resources for monitoring existing systems makes applications difficult to update. Meanwhile, the need to update as well as requests for additional features from the lecturers and students side are increasing. Therefore, an open-source learning management system application is needed when there is a lack of resources to monitor the system and add existing features quickly and easily.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN LEARNING MANAGEMENT SYSTEM PADA PROGRAM STUDI TEKNOLOGI REKAYASA PERANGKAT LUNAK JURUSAN TEKNIK ELEKTRO POLITEKNIK NEGERI BALI
Keyword: Learning Management System, Blended-Learning.
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
In an effort to support the optimization of the smart government concept among the academic community of the Electrical Engineering Department of Bali State Polytechnic, it is crucial to ensure that the department's website is integrated with all information systems used within the Polytechnic.
This is expected to facilitate academic community members in accessing various necessary digital services. Through the WEBUSE approach, it is hoped that an assessment of the usability of the Electrical Engineering Department of Bali State Polytechnic website will be conducted. This will serve as a reference for website development, providing a positive user experience for its users, which in this case includes the entire academic community of Bali State Polytechnic and the general public. The research outputs include a website usability evaluation score and recommendations for improvements or developments to the website design. The WEBUSE testing method implements four assessment instruments to measure the usability of a website: Content Organization and Readability, Website Navigation and Links, Website Interface Design, and Website Performance & Effectiveness. The website usability assessment yielded a "Good" score of 52%, a "Very Good" score of 40.6%, and a "Fair" score of 1.4%. These scores were generated from a survey conducted with 72 respondents, consisting of students, lecturers, academics of the Bali State Polytechnic, and the general public.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI WEBUSE UNTUK MENGEVALUASI NILAI USABILITY PADA WEBSITE JURUSAN TEKNIK ELEKTRO POLITEKNIK NEGERI BALI
Keyword: Usability Assessment, Usability Testing, Usability Evaluation, Human and Computer Interaction, WEBUSE Approach
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: A hotel prioritizes the comfort of its employees. The availability of fast information services for hotel reservations is one aspect that can provide convenience. The purpose of this article is to evaluate the reservation process at hotels in Nusa Penida and provide suggestions for improvement by building a reservation system using information systems technology. The manual reservation system in Nusa Penida hotels is a significant impact. Customers wishing to make a reservation must come in person or by phone, and information flow is limited, typically through newspapers, radio advertisements, or distributed flyers. There are many benefits to be gained by using information technology as part of website design, such as fast and easy access and unlimited access time. This is because websites can be accessed anytime, anywhere in the world via computer, tablet, or smartphone. This benefit is crucial as the market share expands globally, increasing hotel occupancy rates and, thus, hotel operations and revenue.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM INFORMASI RESERVASI BERBASIS WEBSITE PADA HOTEL DI NUSA PENIDA
Keyword: Sistem Informasi Manajemen, Check-in, Check-out, Akomodasi, Hotel
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Manufacturing companies operate in the industrial sector, operating equipment, machinery, and labor to process raw materials into finished goods with sales value. The challenge faced by PT Asia Garment Internasional is that all production processes are still manual, and a frequent obstacle is selecting suppliers for raw material purchases. In determining a Decision Support System (DSS), we must also know the appropriate method to use in the decision-making process for selecting suppliers for raw material purchases. In this study, the researchers used the Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) and Technique for Order Preference by Similarity to Ideal Solution (TOPSIS) methods to determine the results of the DSS for Prioritizing Raw Material Supplier Selection in the PT Asia Garment Internasional Case Study. The results of this study are a Microsoft Excel-based Decision Support System. The results show that supplier CV Silky Jaya is ranked first with a calculated score of 0.850.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF PRIORITIES FOR SELECTION OF RAW MATERIAL PURCHASING SUPPLIERS IN A DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM USING AHP AND TOPSIS METHODS IN MANUFACTURING COMPANIES (CASE STUDY OF PT ASIA GARMENT INTERNASIONAL)
Keyword: Perusahaan Manufaktur, Sistem Pendukung Keputusan (SPK), Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP), Technique For Order Prefrence by Similarity to Ideal Solution (TOPSIS)
Jurnal: Sinkron : Jurnal dan Penelitian Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: The Southwest Sumba Family Association in Bali (IKSBD Bali) is an association of migrants from Southwest Sumba Regency, Bali. This organization has a large membership base, necessitating a precise member data collection process. However, in reality, the membership data collection at the Southwest Sumba Family Association in Bali is not yet properly computerized, making it difficult to access member data quickly when needed. Based on this, the purpose of this research is to design and build a community data collection information system so that member data at the Southwest Sumba Family Association in Bali can be properly computerized and quickly accessed when needed in urgent situations. This research used the blackbox testing method and designed a website-based community data collection information system, with input and output functions being fully functional. The system design method used was the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) method (analysis and design stages) and a research and development approach. The community data collection information system for Southwest Sumba Regency, Bali, is expected to provide an appropriate solution for registering members of the Southwest Sumba Family Association in Bali, ensuring that the need for member data in emergencies can be met effectively.
Judul Paper: SOUTHWEST SUMBA COMMUNITY REGISTRATION INFORMATION SYSTEM IN BALI (CASE STUDY OF SOUTHWEST SUMBA FAMILY ASSOCIATIONS IN BALI)
Keyword: Information Systems, Community Data Collection, SDLC
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak: A website is a platform or collection of pages that can be used as a medium for disseminating information and promotion. This research was conducted at CV. Pama Solar, which operates in the renewable energy sector, specifically solar energy. Currently, CV. Pama Solar's promotional process is considered inadequate because it only utilizes social media platforms such as Facebook and Instagram. The purpose of this research is to design a UI/UX for a promotional website to enhance CV. Pama Solar's promotional activities for its products and services. The UI/UX design for this promotional website will utilize agile development methods. Agile development methods consist of several stages, including planning, design, development, testing, and deployment. Data collection techniques include literature studies, observation, and interviews. The UI/UX design process for this promotional website will be conducted using Figma. The testing process in this research will utilize black box testing, which focuses solely on functionality without considering the details of the code or internal logic. This research is expected to produce a promotional website design that meets user needs and can enhance CV. Pama Solar's promotional activities.
Judul Paper: UI/UX DESIGN OF SOLAR PANEL RENEWABLE ENERGY PROMOTION WEBSITE USING AGILE DEVELOPMENT METHOD (CASE STUDY CV. PAMA SOLAR)
Keyword: Website, UI/UX, Promosi, Energi Surya, Panel Surya, Agile Development
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak: Efata Christian Theological Elementary School, Denpasar, is a school established in 2018. The website currently used by Efata Elementary School is a blogspot site and Facebook social media platform to promote and convey information about the school to the public. The current website and social media platforms are considered ineffective because they do not display comprehensive information regarding the school profile, facilities, and other important information that supports school promotion. In this study, a UI/UX design was conducted using the design thinking method for the Efata Christian Theological Elementary School website in Denpasar. The application of the design thinking method stages, including empathize, define, ideate, prototype, and test, is expected to help design the school website according to user needs at Efata Christian Theological Elementary School, Denpasar. The results of this study are a website prototype with a System Usability Scale (SUS) score of 80.58. This score indicates that the website design prototype results, with an adjective rating, fall into the "acceptable" category, meaning they are well-received by users and meet their needs, with a percentile rank of "excellent."
Judul Paper: UI/UX DESIGN OF EFATA DENPASAR CHRISTIAN THEOLOGY PRIMARY SCHOOL WEBSITE USING THINKING DESIGN METHOD
Keyword: UI/UX Design, User Needs, Design thinking, SUS (System usability scale)
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Manual parking management at the Bali State Polytechnic (PNB) often results in congestion and inefficient parking space utilization. This research addresses these challenges by developing a real-time parking space detection system. The system uses the You Only Look Once (YOLO) algorithm, a state-of-the-art object detection method, to accurately identify available parking spaces on the PNB campus. By providing users with real-time parking information, the system aims to simplify parking procedures, reduce congestion, and improve overall campus efficiency. The results of this research demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed system in improving parking management at PNB.
Judul Paper: PERANCANGAN SISTEM PENDETEKSI TEMPAT PARKIR MOBIL MENGGUNAKAN METODE YOU ONLY LOOK ONCE (YOLO) DI POLITEKNIK NEGERI BALI
Keyword: Parking Lot Detection, YOLO Algorithm, Computer Vision
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The Balinese script is a cultural heritage with profound historical value for the Balinese people. It has been used for centuries to write various types of documents. The ability to read Balinese script is a primary concern, aimed at preserving and passing it on to the younger generation. In today's era of technological advancement, the interest of the younger generation, especially elementary school students, in learning Balinese script is declining. This is because conventional learning methods tend to be less engaging and relevant for students who are already accustomed to technology. One approach to learning is through educational games that focus on students' skills in reading Balinese script. Educational games provide a more engaging approach to learning Balinese script because they combine elements of entertainment and challenge. The development of the Balinese script reading educational game uses the Game Development Life Cycle (GDLC) method, which consists of six stages: Initiation, Pre-Production, Production, Testing, Beta, and Release. Based on the pretest and posttest calculations using N-Gain, the score was 0.6811. Based on the N-Gain category guidelines, the score is "Moderate." The SUS calculation results were 77. Based on the SUS assessment scale, the score is in the "Good" and acceptable category.
Judul Paper: PENGEMBANGAN GAME EDUKASI MEMBACA AKSARA BALI MENGGUNAKAN METODE GAME DEVELOPMENT LIFE CYCLE
Keyword: Balinese Script, Educational Games, Game Development Life Cycle
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) are a crucial pillar of economic activity in Indonesia. The increasingly dynamic development and competition in today's business world require MSMEs to adapt and respond more quickly. Furthermore, the unstoppable development of information technology requires MSMEs to utilize this technology. A common problem faced by MSMEs in Indonesia is human resource management, one of which is employee performance assessment. Utilizing information technology in the form of a decision support system for employee performance assessment is crucial for MSMEs. Several methods can be used to develop a decision support system, one of which is the Weighted Product (WP) method. This research follows the stages of the SDLC (System Development Life Cycle) model. SDLC is a cycle used in creating or developing systems that aim to solve problems effectively. The results of this research are a system consisting of several components: a master data menu, an alternative data set menu, calculations using the Weighted Product (WP), and recommendations. Based on testing the system's accuracy, precision, recall, and specificity, a high percentage of 80% was obtained, thus confirming the validity of this decision support system.
Judul Paper: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR EMPLOYEE PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT FOR MICRO, SMALL TO MEDIUM ENTERPRISES (UMKM) USING THE WEIGHTED PRODUCT (WP) METHOD
Keyword: spk, employee performance, wp
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Goeds Concept Store, a small and medium-sized enterprise (SME) in the retail sector, faces challenges in predicting stock requirements. Currently, they rely solely on an assumption-based approach based on previous sales without technological support. This study proposes the implementation of an inventory forecasting system using the Weighted Moving Average (WMA) method for Goeds Concept Store. This method was chosen because of its superior ability to respond to changing trends better than other methods. Based on related research, the implementation of WMA has successfully achieved a forecast accuracy rate of 82% in the context of inventory management. Therefore, the proposed system is expected to help Goeds Concept Store address overstock and understock issues, as well as improve efficiency in managing inventory.
Keywords: Stock, Moving Average Weight, Forecasting.
Judul Paper: INVENTORY FORECASTING SYSTEM USING THE WEIGHT MOVING AVERAGE METHOD (CASE STUDY: GOEDS CONCEPT STORE)
Keyword: Stock of goods, Average weight of movement, Forecasting
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak:
m. Weather conditions, such as humidity, temperature, dryness, and wind speed, are known to be the main factors influencing forest fires. Therefore, visual analysis of forest fire patterns using weather index data can provide valuable insights. Forest fire indices, such as FFMC, DMC, DC, and ISI, have been developed to predict forest fire risk.
These indices measure fuel moisture, dryness, and initial fire spread.
However, there is a need to better understand how these indices correlate with actual forest fire patterns. Data on forest fires, including location, time, and area burned, is available in various datasets. Visual analysis of this data can help identify spatial and temporal patterns of forest fires, as well as their correlation with weather factors. Data visualization plays a key role in understanding complex patterns in large datasets. Using appropriate visualization techniques can identify trends, anomalies, and patterns that are not directly visible through statistical analysis. This study aims to visually analyze forest fire patterns using weather index and burned area data.
The results are expected to provide a deeper understanding of the relationship between weather conditions and forest fires. The information obtained can be used to improve understanding of forest fire risks and develop more effective strategies for forest fire disaster mitigation.
Judul Paper: VISUAL ANALYSIS OF FOREST FIRE PATTERNS: A CASE STUDY USING WEATHER INDEX AND BURNT AREA DATA
Keyword: Spatial Data, Geographic Information Systems, Fire Prediction Models
Jurnal: Journal ofInformation Systems Engineeringand Business Intelligence

Abstrak:
Demulih Traditional Village is located in Susut District, Bangli Regency, Bali.
The uniqueness of this traditional village lies in its three heavenly temples: the Village Temple, the Puseh Temple, and the Dalem Temple. The Dalem Temple in Demulih Traditional Village, like most temples, has sacred objects that must be protected. To improve the security of the temple area, an integrated security system is needed, including closed-circuit television (CCTV), internet access and its applications, and patrols by traditional Pecalang (guardians). A neighborhood security monitoring system using CCTV is an effective solution for improving security in areas such as residential areas, offices, places of worship, and other public places. This system works by utilizing CCTV cameras installed at various strategic points to monitor surrounding activities in real time. Temples are very important places of worship for Hindus, where spiritual and cultural values ​​are highly valued. Temple security is a vital aspect to ensure the peace and comfort of worshippers, as well as to protect the temple from the threat of theft. One technology that can be relied upon to enhance temple security is the use of CCTV.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF CCTV FOR SECURITY MONITORING IN PURA DALEM DEMULIH ADAT VILLAGE, SUSUT DISTRICT, BANGLI-BALI DISTRICT
Keyword: security systems, CCTV, internet and applications
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Sleep quality is an important aspect of maintaining physical and mental health, while caffeine consumption is known to have a potential effect on sleep patterns. This study aims to analyze the relationship between caffeine consumption and sleep quality using simple regression analysis. The Sleep and Health Metrics dataset, containing 1,000 individual data, was used in this study, with daily caffeine consumption (mg) as the independent variable and sleep quality score as the dependent variable. The analysis showed that caffeine consumption had a significant negative relationship with sleep quality, with a regression coefficient of -0.0229 (p < 0.05). This means that every 1 mg of caffeine consumption can decrease sleep quality scores by 0.0229 points. The R-squared value of 0.521 indicates that caffeine consumption explains 52.1% of the variance in sleep quality, with the remainder influenced by other factors.
In conclusion, higher caffeine consumption can statistically significantly reduce an individual's sleep quality. These results provide important insights for the public on how to manage caffeine consumption to promote healthy sleep patterns. This study recommends further study considering other factors such as stress levels, physical activity, and sleep duration to gain a more comprehensive understanding.
Judul Paper: THE INFLUENCE OF CAFFEINE CONSUMPTION ON SLEEP QUALITY USING SIMPLE REGRESSION ANALYSIS
Keyword: Simple Regression Analysis, Python, Caffeine, Sleep Quality
Jurnal: Journal of Applied Informatics and Computing (JAIC)

Abstrak: Confirmation of attendance (RSVP) is a crucial feature for event organizers and vendors to facilitate crowd coordination. In online digital invitations, the RSVP feature is often difficult to use for both organizers and invited guests. This prompted the development of a website UI/UX design that emphasizes RSVP development, aiming to simplify the process for all parties, while providing tangible benefits in terms of user interface and user experience. This research employed User-Centered Design (UCD) methods within the scope of usability, considering aspects of learnability, efficiency, memorability, errors, and satisfaction. Through stages such as specifying the context of use, specifying requirements, creating design solutions, and evaluating the design, this research resulted in a website design that simplifies the RSVP process by integrating it into direct messaging. The evaluation demonstrated positive user feedback, demonstrating that the design meets usability standards and provides a positive experience for both event organizers and invited guests.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING UI/UX DESIGN OF A DIGITAL INVITATION WEBSITE WITH INTEGRATED RSVP DEVELOPMENT OF DIRECT MESSAGE TO EVENT ORGANIZERS (CASE STUDY KAMIUNDANGKAMU.COM)
Keyword: RSVP, UI/UX design, Usability, User-Centered Design (UCD), Direct message
