Jurnal: Jurnal Komtika (Komputasi dan Informatika)

Abstrak: Image compression plays a crucial role in various applications, such as digital storage, image transmission, and multimedia processing. Effective image compression techniques can significantly reduce the file size of digital images without sacrificing their visual quality. This study proposes a performance evaluation of an image compression technique that combines Multi-Level Thresholding with Fuzzy Entropy and Differential Evolution. This method is applied to facial and medical images. The performance of this method is assessed based on the Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), Structural Similarity Index (SSIM), and Feature Similarity Index Measure (FSIM). Further analysis reveals that the PSNR, SSIM, and FSIM values ​​increase with increasing threshold levels, with the highest value obtained at a threshold level of 40. This indicates that increasing the threshold level results in consistent image compression without sacrificing the visual quality of the compressed image
Judul Paper: APPLICATION OF MULTI-LEVEL THRESHOLDING FUZZY ENTROPY AND DIFFERENTIAL EVOLUTION TECHNIQUES IN IMAGE COMPRESSION
Keyword: Kompresi citra, Multi-Level Thresholding, Fuzzy Entropy, Differential Evolution
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Infant immunization is a crucial health effort to prevent various potentially dangerous infectious diseases. An accurate and timely immunization registration and data management system is crucial to ensure every infant receives their immunizations on schedule.
However, manual registration systems often face challenges such as recording errors, service delays, and difficulties in monitoring immunization schedules. This study aims to design and implement an online infant immunization registration database system that can be accessed by parents, guardians, and health workers. The system was designed using MySQL for database management and PHP for web application development.
The design utilized various methods such as context diagrams, data flow diagrams, fishbone diagrams, database structures, triggers, and constraints to ensure data integrity and consistency. The results showed that this system can improve the efficiency and accuracy of the infant immunization registration process by reducing manual errors and providing real-time monitoring of immunization schedules. The implementation of triggers and constraints in the database helps automate several critical processes, such as updating immunization status and deleting irrelevant data, while maintaining data quality. This system also provides easy access for parents and guardians to register their babies, and for health workers to monitor and manage immunization schedules. With potential for further development, such as the addition of automatic notification features and integration with other health systems, this system is expected to make a significant contribution to improving the quality of infant immunization services and overall public health.
Judul Paper: DESIGNING AN ONLINE-BASED BABY IMMUNIZATION REGISTRATION DATABASE
Keyword: Immunization, Database, Trigger, Constraint
Jurnal: Format : Jurnal Imiah Teknik Informatika

Abstrak:
Modernization has changed the way children play and learn, with many now preferring to use gadgets.

Children get bored easily, but parents often don't supervise gadget use, resulting in children accessing age-inappropriate content. Therefore, the author created an interactive application "Mengenal Hewan" (Getting to Know Animals) using the Multimedia Development Life Cycle (MDLC) method. Data was collected through interviews at Cimone 3 Elementary School, targeting teachers and students in grades 1 and 2. This application facilitates animal recognition learning. Testing showed that the application met functional requirements, with a score of 93% from multimedia experts and 93.7% from general users, indicating a "Very Good" result.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTATION OF MDLC IN THE INTERACTIVE LEARNING APPLICATION "KNOWING ANIMALS" SDN CIMONE 3
Keyword: Multimedia Development Live Cycle, Applications, Interactive Multimedia
Jurnal: Jurnal Informatika

Abstrak:
A school information system is a system that provides information services, particularly regarding school administration and personnel data. The existence of this school information system is crucial because it can assist in the management of school administration and personnel. In this case, SMP Negeri 2 Mengwi was chosen as the research site. The current system at the school is still conventional, often resulting in difficulties in managing administrative data, such as incoming and outgoing mail archives and civil servant personnel document archives. The purpose of this research is to simplify the management of incoming and outgoing mail data, simplify the management of personnel documents, and improve data security, thereby ensuring the security of administrative data.
The research method used in this study is the SDLC (System Development Life Cycle) method with the waterfall model. The result of this research is a website for the SMP Negeri 2 Mengwi school information system, which was created to simplify the management of administrative and personnel document data at SMP Negeri 2 Mengwi.
Judul Paper: THE SCHOOL INFORMATION SYSTEM AT SMP NEGERI 2 MEMBWI IS WEBSITE BASED
Keyword: Information Systems, incoming and outgoing letters, personnel documents
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: Manulife Indonesia offers a variety of financial services, including life insurance, accident and health insurance, investment services, and pension funds to both individual consumers and businesses in Indonesia. To meet the training needs of its agents, in 2020, Manulife Indonesia developed a digital training application for its marketing staff, both agents and financial specialists. The MiLearn application serves as a tool for agents in serving customers and can help improve their insurance skills and knowledge by accessing the application from anywhere without having to meet a trainer face-to-face in a classroom. The purpose of this study was to measure the level of satisfaction of MiLearn application users using the End User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS) method with five variables: Content, Accuracy, Format, Ease of Use, and Timeliness. The Importance Performance Analysis (IPA) method is also used to measure the level of importance and performance of attributes. Data collection in this study used a Google Form questionnaire with 59 respondents from MGM Bali agents who used the MiLearn application. The collected data was processed using SPSS and Excel software. The User Satisfaction Index (IKP) calculated a score of 80.41%, indicating that MGM Bali agents were quite satisfied with the performance of the MiLearn application.
Judul Paper: EVALUATION OF THE LEVEL OF USER SATISFACTION OF THE MANULIFE INSURANCE DIGITAL TRAINING APPLICATION USING EUCS AND IPA METHODS
Keyword: MiLearn, User Satisfaction, EUCS, IPA, Analysis
Jurnal: IJCCS (Indonesian Journal of Computing and Cybernetics Systems)

Abstrak: Lending is one of the essential services provided by Village Credit Institutions (LPDs) in Bali. LPDs play a vital role in supporting the rural economy by providing loan facilities for various purposes, from small and medium enterprises to personal needs. However, in the lending process, LPDs often face challenges in accurately and efficiently evaluating the eligibility of potential borrowers. A Decision Support System (DSS) is one solution that can be implemented to improve efficiency and accuracy in the selection and recommendation process for lending. This study aims to design and implement a DSS for lending at LPDs in Bali using the SAW method. This study follows the Linear Sequential Model (LSM) in its stages. The results of this study are a system consisting of several components: a master data menu, an alternative data set menu, calculations using SAW, and recommendation results. Testing for accuracy, precision, recall, and specificity yielded a high percentage of 80%, thus confirming the validity of this decision support system.
Judul Paper: DECISION SUPPORT SYSTEM FOR GRANTING CREDIT TO LPD IN BALI USING THE SAW METHOD
Keyword: spk, credit, saw, lpd
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: Nusa Penida is a popular tourist destination in Bali, offering a variety of natural and cultural attractions. Nusa Penida Island also boasts numerous beautiful and attractive tourist attractions that attract both international and domestic tourists. However, information about these destinations remains scattered and unstructured, making it difficult for tourists to plan their visits. Tourists also obtain information from various social media platforms, where information distribution is limited, thus suboptimally promoting Nusa Penida's tourist attractions. To address these challenges, an integrated and easily accessible web-based tourism information system was developed using the Laravel framework to provide an overview of destinations on Nusa Penida Island. The Laravel framework was chosen for its advantages in ease of development, security, and efficient database management. The tourism information system provides key features such as tourist destination information, travel routes, bookings, accommodation and restaurant recommendations, and traveler reviews. This framework utilizes the MVC framework, simplifying the coding process and program implementation. The system's interface is responsive, utilizing the Bootstrap template, making it user-friendly. The research methods used included needs analysis, system design, implementation, and testing. The tourism information system was tested using black box testing, resulting in a system that performed as intended and provided accurate and up-to-date information that enhanced the user experience when planning a trip to Nusa Penida. The system also received positive feedback from trial users regarding the ease of navigation and the comprehensiveness of the information provided.
Judul Paper: IMPLEMENTASI FRAMEWORK LARAVEL PADA SISTEM INFORMASI WISATA BERASIS WEB UNTUK DESTINASI NUSA PENIDA
Keyword: Nusa Penida, information systems, tourism, Laravel, websites
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
Serious problems arising from prohibited acts or crimes in the use of information technology have become a major concern in several countries.

Although social media should be a comfortable virtual environment for everyone, in reality, many cases of legal violations occur within it. The ITE Law exists as a protection for internet users, although the process of establishing sanctions for violations requires expertise and is quite time-consuming.

Therefore, an approach is needed to automate the classification of violations based on the articles in the ITE Law. This study aims to classify these violations using the Naive Bayes algorithm, with a case study focused on analyzing comments on the social media platform TikTok. In the experiment, the study grouped violations into five main categories: pornography, defamation, hate speech, online terrorism, and cyberbullying. The results of this experiment showed that the classification model using the Naive Bayes algorithm achieved an accuracy rate of 0.83, or 83%. Thus, this information retrieval system is expected to make it easier for social media users to identify violations of the ITE Law that occur in comments on TikTok.
Judul Paper: KLASIFIKASI PELANGGARAN UU ITE PADA TIKTOK MENGGUNAKAN ALGORITMA NAIVE BAYES
Keyword: Classification, Violations, ITE Law, TikTok, Text Mining, Naive Bayes Algorithm
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: The risk of LPG (Liquefied Petroleum Gas) leaks is a serious threat that can cause an explosion if exposed to sparks or other heat sources, resulting in extensive physical damage and potential loss of life. Furthermore, inhalation of leaked LPG gas can cause poisoning with symptoms such as headaches, dizziness, nausea, and, in severe cases, loss of consciousness or death. Therefore, effective prevention measures are needed. Although several gas leak detection systems already exist, this research focuses on designing a prototype tailored to the needs of Indonesia. This research develops an Internet of Things (IoT) prototype to prevent and respond to explosions or fires caused by gas leaks. The developed IoT prototype uses an ESP32 microcontroller, an MQ2 gas sensor, a solenoid valve to shut off the gas line, a flame sensor, and GPS to provide information on the location of the gas leak via WhatsApp to relevant parties. Test results showed that this system was able to accurately detect gas leaks and flames, effectively shut off the gas line automatically, and quickly send information about the location of the gas leak to authorities via WhatsApp. This system is designed to provide a fast and accurate response in detecting and addressing gas leaks, with the goal of improving safety and reducing the risk of accidents.
Judul Paper: IOT BASED LPG GAS LEAK DETECTION AND HANDLING SYSTEM
Keyword: Kebocoran Gas, IoT
Jurnal: ComTech: Computer, Mathematics and Engineering Applications

Abstrak: The Panca Dewata (Five Gods) is an educational material that represents the Five Gods as manifestations of God, tasked with guarding and ruling the five cardinal directions: Iswara (East), Brahma (South), Mahadeva (West), Vishnu (North), and Shiva (Central). At the Dharma Sentana Pasraman, Basarang District, Kapuas Regency, the Panca Dewata material is still delivered to students using images in textbooks. Using media in the learning process can help increase student interest and learning outcomes. The delivery of teaching materials in interactive multimedia can be developed using Augmented Reality technology. Augmented Reality (AR) technology is one of the latest multimedia technologies that is gaining popularity among the younger generation. AR technology allows two- or three-dimensional objects to be projected onto reality in real time. This research has successfully designed and built interactive Augmented Reality (AR) learning media to introduce the Panca Dewata weapons. The AR application was developed using the Marker-Based Tracking method.
Judul Paper: AUGMENTED REALITY INTRODUCTION OF PANCA DEWATA WEAPONS AS AN INTERACTIVE LEARNING MEDIA AT PASRAMAN DHARMA SENTANA BASARANG DISTRICT KAPUAS DISTRICT
Keyword: Augmented Reality, Panca Dewata, Marker Based Tracking, Media Pembelajaran
Jurnal: JIKO (Jurnal Informatika dan Komputer)

Abstrak: This study reviews the performance comparison between Named Data Networks (NDN) and IP-based networks. NDN emphasizes content-based data access, replacing IP-based systems with unique naming for each piece of information, which can improve resource efficiency and data security. IP-based networks have become more prominent in IP-based addressing and routing. The results of the performance comparison between NDN and IP-based networks indicate that NDN tends to outperform IP-based networks in terms of throughput, delay, and packet drop. The choice between NDN and IP-based networks must be tailored to the specifics and consider the pros and cons of each network model, as well as the user's initial objectives.
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE REVIEW OF THE PERFORMANCE OF NAMED DATA NETWORKS AND IP BASED NETWORKING
Keyword: NDN, IP, Network, Review, Performance Comparison
Jurnal: IJAIN (International Journal of Advances in Intelligent Informatics)

Abstrak:
The definition of an MSME (Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprise) is a productive business owned by an individual or business entity that meets the established criteria to be classified as a micro-enterprise. More clearly, the definition of an MSME and the criteria for businesses that fall under it are regulated in Law of the Republic of Indonesia No. 20 of 2008 concerning MSMEs.
This law states that MSMEs are classified based on their type of business, namely micro, small, and medium enterprises.
Judul Paper: MOBILE-BASED UMKM FINANCIAL APPLICATION DESIGN USING THE WATERFALL METHOD
Keyword: MSMEs, Design and Build
Jurnal: RESOLUSI: REKAYASA TEKNIK INFORMATIKA DAN INFORMASI

Abstrak:
The creation of a sales accounting information system allows for rapid sales data management and inventory information display without the need for individual recaps. Reporting is also easy because it can be printed periodically. To evaluate the system, the prototype system development method and system design used UML, using the Usecase Diagram and Activity Diagram design models. This system was implemented using Sublime Text and MySQL as the database. The implementation of an internal control system for managing sales accounting data at the Usaha Kasih Sejahtera Pre-Cooperative begins with the input of account data, account types, incoming goods, outgoing goods, journals, products, and product category data, resulting in accounting reports aligned with the sales process.
This internal control system was designed using UML and implemented using Sublime Text and MySQL as the database. The system can help the Bina Kasih Sejahtera Dhyanapura Pre-Cooperative quickly access sales and profit accounting data without having to review individual invoices because it can print periodic income reports.
Judul Paper: INTERNAL CONTROL ACCOUNTING INFORMATION SYSTEM IN PRA COOPERATION BINA KASIH SEJAHTERA DHYANA PURA, BALI.
Keyword: Accounting Information Systems, Sales, internal control, Sublime text, MySQL
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak: The use of artificial intelligence technology can transform the way managers make professional judgments. The purpose of this study is to examine the results of professional judgments based on the use of technology to solve various problems faced by each department within a company. This research methodology uses an exploratory qualitative approach supported by references and experience in interpreting the use of technology in establishing professional judgments. The results indicate that technology significantly assists managers in making professional judgments in the finance, marketing, operations, and personnel departments. Artificial intelligence technology is capable of identifying data patterns, which can help identify indications of error. Managers must also understand the strengths and weaknesses of artificial intelligence technology in conducting professional judgments. Managers must ensure that the use of artificial intelligence technology is supported by appropriate policies and procedures to minimize the risk of lapses in professional judgment, as technology has limitations in understanding complex contexts based on values ​​or holistic subjective aspects of a business.
Judul Paper: VIEWING PROFESSIONAL JUDGMENT MANAGEMENT USING ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE TECHNOLOGY
Keyword: Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Professional Judgment, Manager
Jurnal: International Journal of Computer and Information System (IJCIS)

Abstrak:
The current development of information technology has significantly impacted the progress of the sector.

Information technology provides speed and accuracy in data processing compared to manual data processing. The demand for information services and integrated information management is crucial for every institution, including health clinics and medical practices. In practice, the queueing system in clinics and medical practices tends to be ineffective because patients registering do not know the exact time they will receive medical care. One similar problem was encountered at Dr. Suartini's clinic. In her practice, Dr. Suartini performs every registration process manually and without an assistant. This makes it difficult to search for or summarize specific patient data at any time. In addition to these problems, the influx of patients makes the doctor's scheduled practice hours irregular, leading to the doctor exceeding the practice time limit. Another frequently encountered problem is that some patients jump the queue due to the lack of a queue number system. Furthermore, a problem encountered was that some patients sometimes showed up but were not informed that the doctor was unavailable or had a half-day appointment, requiring them to return home and find another appointment. Given the aforementioned issues, a possible solution is to create a web-based patient queue registration application. This would facilitate both patient registration and doctor data collection.
Judul Paper: DEVELOPMENT OF PATIENT REGISTRATION APPLICATION FEATURES IN WEB-BASED DOCTOR PRACTICE CLINICS
Keyword: Patient Registration Application in Clinics, PHP, Laravel, MySQL
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak:
A traditional house is a regional building that uniquely reflects that region and symbolizes the culture and characteristics of the local community. Currently, the use of traditional houses as residences is becoming increasingly abandoned. This is also the case in Pedawa Village, which has a traditional house called the Bandung Rangki traditional house. The existence of the Bandung Rangki traditional house is increasingly being abandoned and forgotten. The Bandung Rangki traditional house urgently needs to be preserved and introduced to the younger generation. This is to ensure that the Bandung Rangki traditional house is not lost or forgotten. The loss of a traditional house can result in the loss of the cultural identity of the local community.
One way to preserve and introduce traditional houses is by using Augmented Reality. Augmented reality is considered more interactive and engaging.
This research used a prototype method consisting of several stages: communication, quick planning and modeling, quick design, prototype construction, development, delivery, and feedback.
The results of testing using the black box method showed that the application ran smoothly as expected.
Judul Paper: INTRODUCTION TO THE BANDUNG RANGKI TRADITIONAL HOUSE USING AUGMENTED REALITY
Keyword: Augmented Reality, Traditional House, Bandung Rangki
Jurnal: KLIK: Kajian Ilmiah Informatika dan Komputer

Abstrak: In line with economic and technological developments, the use of applications to support economic growth is growing rapidly. Entrepreneurship is one of the driving forces of the economy, contributing significantly to economic growth. Beginning entrepreneurs who want to sell their products often encounter obstacles or even uncertainty in determining the selling price of their products. This research aims to help beginning entrepreneurs determine the Product Selling Price (COGS) and can be used in the education sector, particularly for Entrepreneurship subjects. This application will be mobile-based for ease of use in today's world where smartphones have become a part of our daily lives. This research will produce an application for determining product selling prices. This can help beginning entrepreneurs obtain certainty about the right product selling price without hesitation or even fear of setting a price that is too high for the market.
Judul Paper: APLIKASI PENENTUAN HARGA PENJUALAN PRODUK UNTUK WIRAUSAHA PEMULA
Keyword: entrepreneurship, product sales prices, technopreneur, mobile applications
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: Recorded financial management will make it easier for managers to create programs, control, view history and determine future policies. Mengwi Village is one of the tourist villages in Badung Regency, Bali. Its has experienced problems so far because financial recording is still done manually. It is hoped that the digitization of financial management through an information system can help financial management, especially regarding the finances of the jogging track tourist attraction. Digital management of information systems so that they are more accurate and efficient. The Financial Information System in the Mengwi Tourism Village, called SIKU Mengwi, was designed using the waterfall method approach. It is hoped that the SIKU Mengwi will make it easier to record financial transactions, prepare financial reports, increase the accuracy of reports by reducing calculation errors because it has been computed by the system and ultimately help in making policies and program activities for developing the Mengwi Tourism Village.
Judul Paper: DIGITALIZATION OF FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT THROUGH THE INFORMATION SYSTEM AT THE JOGGING TRACK ATTRACTION IN MEMBWI TOURISM VILLAGE
Keyword: Digitalization, Financial Management, Mengwi Village, Information Systems
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: SMK Negeri Bali Mandara is one of the schools that receives funding from the Bali Provincial Government through the APBD or Regional Revenue and Expenditure Budget which requires recording and data collection of these items as a form of accountability of SMK Negeri Bali Mandara to the budget provided by the Bali Provincial Government. However, inventory in the Computer Network Engineering and Telecommunications Department still has several problems which in the eyes of this matter become the basis for building an Inventory and Goods Loan Information System in the Computer Network Engineering and Telecommunications Department of SMK Negeri Bali Mandara. Manual recording is where all inventory of goods and the process of borrowing goods is done in the form of forms and is carried out by humans. This causes a greater risk of data loss and errors, while if examined more deeply many things are also spent in terms of human resources, processing time, energy expended, and swelling of storage space. With this information system, it is hoped that the management of Goods Inventory in the Computer Network Engineering and Telecommunications Department can be carried out effectively, efficiently and compatible, so that data can be managed well and accessed anytime and anywhere.
Judul Paper: WEBSITE-BASED INVENTORY AND LENDING GOODS INFORMATION SYSTEM IN THE DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER NETWORK ENGINEERING AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS VOCATIONAL SCHOOL OF BALI MANDARA
Keyword: Letter of Accountability, Web Based, HTML, MySql
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The rapid development of information technology has significantly impacted and facilitated human activities in the telecommunications and digitalization sectors. One such development is the development of a digitalized attendance system. The attendance process for teachers at a private IT vocational school in Bali still uses the conventional method of recording attendance using an attendance book. Frequent challenges encountered with this method include misplaced or lost attendance books, data changes, and slow attendance data recapitulation. Attendance is crucial data for attendance recording, directly related to teaching activities and educators' monthly salaries. Digitizing the attendance system to monitor learning activities can solve these problems. This system records teacher arrival and departure times, which are directly integrated with the teacher's schedule. The system displays classroom monitoring and records all learning activities based on teacher attendance. This attendance system was developed using the CodeIgniter framework, which uses the Model-View-Controller (MVC) concept. The system was tested using the blackbox testing method, resulting in a system that meets the functionality expected by the private IT vocational school in Bali.
Judul Paper: DIGITALIZATION OF THE ATTENDANCE SYSTEM FOR MONITORING LEARNING ACTIVITIES BASED ON A RESPONSIVE WEB
Keyword: Digitalization, Attendance System, CodeIgniter, Learning Monitoring
Jurnal: Jurnal Ilmiah Sistem Informasi dan Ilmu Komputer

Abstrak: The COVID-19 pandemic that hit the world, including in Purbalingga, Central Java, Indonesia, has had a positive impact on CV. Bunga Palm, with increased demand for brown sugar exports, which has impacted the region's economy. Many businesses in the production and sale of staple foods have experienced difficulties managing raw materials and finished products. This research was motivated by the low performance of inventory services, which has led to low performance at CV. Bunga Palm. This study aims to design and develop an inventory model information system that produces inventory data output in the form of numbers for specific user needs. This research is part of a program development research program using the System Development Life Cycle (SDLC). The program menu includes inventory data, usage circulation (dispatching), equipment maintenance and development, and raw material purchase and delivery transactions to the production department. Program execution includes a Log System, Security Access, Menu Manager, Data Entry, Circulation, Maintenance, and Reports. This information system is capable of presenting information in numerical, textual, and graphical form, if needed. Input can be through data entry or a barcode scanner. This system also implements multi-user support to meet user requirements in its operation. The use of this information system can improve the efficiency of material inventory services and achieve higher productivity. This program is designed as an open source program that can be used and developed more widely. The system modeling uses context diagrams, data flow diagrams (DFDs), and entity relationship diagrams (ERDs). Further research is needed to implement the results of this system design into an application that can be useful for companies.
Judul Paper: DESIGN OF PRODUCTION RAW MATERIAL AND FINISHED MATERIAL INVENTORY INFORMATION SYSTEMS AT CV. WEBSITE BASED PALM FLOWERS
Keyword: CV. Palm Flowers, information systems, inventory management, brown sugar, PHP
Jurnal: JUTIK: Jurnal Teknologi Informasi dan Komputer

Abstrak: This research was motivated by the Covid-19 pandemic, which prohibited gatherings or visits to the Bali Museum Technical Implementation Unit (UPTD), resulting in a decline in tourist visits. The Bali Museum is the oldest museum in Bali, located in the center of Denpasar, and boasts a collection of Balinese civilization. Therefore, a website-based 360-degree virtual tour application, the Bali Museum, was created, allowing tourists to visit and feel as if they were there online. The application aims to introduce the Bali Museum and provide tourists with new options and experiences to enjoy the Bali Museum without having to visit in person. This application was developed using the MDLC (Multimedia Development Life Cycle) method. The resulting product is a website-based 360-degree virtual tour application for the Bali Museum. Blackbox testing results showed that all functions were appropriate and functioning properly.
Judul Paper: UPTD 360 DEGREE VIRTUAL TOUR APPLICATION. BALI MUSEUM IS WEBSITE BASED
Keyword: Bali Museum, Virtual tour and Website
Jurnal: Jurnal Computer Science and Information Technology (CoSciTech)

Abstrak: The development of information and communication technology has brought significant changes in various aspects of people's lives, including consumption and food services. One of these advances is the presence of food delivery service applications, such as GrabFood. This research aims to analyze the usability and usefulness of the GrabFood application in the Palembang area using a simple linear regression method. Data was obtained through a survey of GrabFood application users in Palembang. The independent variable is application usability, measured based on ease of use, accessibility, and speed of service. The dependent variable is the usefulness of the application, measured based on the level of user satisfaction and frequency of use. The results of the analysis show a significant positive relationship between usability and usefulness on the attitudes of GrabFood application users. In conclusion, increasing the usability of the GrabFoodapplication increases its usefulness for users in Palembang. This research has implications for developing and improving GrabFood application services to better meet user needs and expectations.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF USEFULNESS AND USEFULNESS OF THE GRABFOOD APPLICATION IN THE PALEMBANG AREA USING SIMPLE LINEAR REGRESSION
Keyword: GrabFood, application usability, usefulness, simple linear regression
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: This research aims to analyze the level of satisfaction of Shopee application users among generation Z (Gen Z) using a simple regression method. In the ever-growing digital era, Shopee has become one of the most popular e-commerce platforms in Indonesia, especially among Gen Z who are very familiar with technology. This research uses primary data collected through an online survey of 30 Gen Z respondents who are active users of the Shopee application. The independent variables used in this research include ease of use, product variety, customer service quality, and promotions. The dependent variable measured is the level of user satisfaction. The results of simple regression analysis show that all independent variables have a positive and significant influence on the level of satisfaction of Shopee application users among Gen Z. The customer service quality variable has the most dominant influence, followed by ease of use, promotions and product variety. The findings of this research provide practical implications for Shopee management in improving marketing strategies and service quality to maintain and increase user satisfaction among Gen Z. This research also provides academic contributions by adding insight into the factors that influence e-commerce user satisfaction among this generation. young. This abstract provides a brief but comprehensive overview of the aims, methods, results and implications of the research conducted, in accordance with academic journal writing standards.
Judul Paper: ANALYSIS OF THE LEVEL OF SATISFACTION OF SHOPEE APPLICATION USERS AMONG GEN Z USING SIMPLE REGRESSION
Keyword: Satisfaction Level, Shopee Application, Gen z, Simple Regression Method
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: CV. XYZ is a distributor of building materials but focuses on PVC pipe products under the Target brand. CV. XYZ was founded in 2013. At CV. XYZ is very necessary for inventory scheduling which needs to be carried out by CV. XYZ in order to always meet consumer demand. The author suggests inventory calculations and scheduling to meet consumer demand using the Distribution Requirement Planning (DRP) method. In the DRP method there are several stages of data needed, namely demand data, inventory, lead time, holding cost data. Data processing in this DRP method is demand forecasting, determining Lead Time, determining lot size, calculating safety stock, and creating DRP tables. In the calculation results, results were obtained for distribution costs for 5 pipe products which initially had excess stock and could not meet demand. For Target Pipe AW 1.0 x 4m products savings of 33%, Target Pipe AW 2 ½ x 4m savings of 67%, Target Pipe C 5/8 x 4m savings of 67%, Target Pipe D 1 ½ savings of 50%, Target Pipe D 6.0 x 4m savings of 67%.

Sentiment analysis of YouTube video recordings has become important in this increasingly technologically advanced era to understand users' reactions and opinions on various topics, including politics. Rapfight videos, especially those related to the presidential election, are one type of content that often attracts attention. This research uses the Naïve Bayes algorithm to assess the sentiment of comments on the video "Epic Rap Battle of Presidency 2024" on the YouTube site. The algorithms used in this research are Naïve Bayes Classifier and Support Vector Machine (SVM). There are five processes in this research, namely collecting YouTube comment data, preprocessing, labeling, classification, implementation and testing. From 3650 comment data on YouTube regarding the video "Epic Rap Battle of Presidency 2024" based on the results of the analysis, it was found that 31% of the comments were positive, 7% of the comments were negative and 62% of the comments were neutral. The accuracy results using the Naïve Bayes Classifier algorithm were 84.82% and the accuracy results using the Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm got the best results at 93.3%.
Judul Paper: SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF YOUTUBE VIDEO COMMENTS "EPIC RAP BATTLE OF PRESIDENCY 2024" USING NAÏVE BAYES & SVM ALGORITHM
Keyword: You Tube Maximum, rapfight, Epic Rap Battle of Presidency 2024, Naïve Bayes, Support Vector Machine(SVM)
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: This research focuses on risk management in loading and unloading operations at SPMT Jamrud Nilam Mirah Branch, a multipurposeterminal in Surabaya. The aim of this research is to analyze risk events and their causes using the house of risk method, with a focus on determining risk agent priorities and mitigation strategies. In dry bulk cargo loading unloading operations, there are 36 risk events and 23 risk agent identified, with three dominant risk agent; lack of operator alertness, dust spills of hazardous bulk commodities and working at height, and slippery conditions. Based on these risk agents, shix key mitigation strategies were identified, which significantly reduced the estimated time of delay by 63% of the total cumulative ETD value. These strategies include the implementation of automatic warningsystems, the application of 3D technology, continuous risk monitoring and analysis system, anonymous reporting, the use of drones, and the use of predictive algorithms.

The increasing demand for clean water services in Majalengka Regency, especially in the strategic area of West Java International Airport (BIJB), necessitates optimal performance from PDAM Majalengka. This study aims to evaluate and optimize SPAM technology implementation to enhance water distribution services. Using quantitative analysis through surveys and statistical testing with SPSS, findings indicate that key factors such as water pressure, continuity, quality, pricing, and complaint handling significantly influence customer satisfaction. Recommendations include upgrading distribution networks, optimizing existing water sources, and adopting advanced SPAM technologies to meet future demands.

Air conditioning system has a very important role in a building, this is to support activities in the building. Conventional cooling systems are based on vapor compression systems using refrigerant as the working fluid in the cycle. Commonly used refrigerant fluids have very high global warming and ozone destruction potential. Prolonged use of refrigerants will have negative impacts on the environment such as greenhouse gases and global warming. Through a photovoltaic (PV) system, solar light energy can be converted into electrical energy. Meanwhile, thermoelectric systems can convert temperature differences into electrical voltage differences or vice versa. Hybridization of the two systems can be used as an air conditioning system in buildings or other equipment. In this research, a prototype of a thermoelectric cooling system was produced with an energy source from solar panels, by determining the cooling temperature of a cube-shaped room with a side length of 30 cm at 26oC, the time required to reach this temperature was 18 minutes, data taken starting at 08.00, able to produce an average daily power from solar panels of 54.25 watts at each data collection. Meanwhile, the Coefficient of Performance of the cooling system in this study was 0.305. This system still cannot be compared with conventional cooling systems, but the cooling system in this research has the advantage of being a cooling system that is capable of producing cooling without using an electrical energy source from PLN.
Judul Paper: EXPERIMENTAL STUDY OF THERMOELECTRIC-BASED ROOM CONDITIONING SYSTEMS WITH ENERGY SOURCES FROM SOLAR PANELS
Keyword: thermoelectric, air conditioning system, solar panel, COP
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)

Abstrak: Corrosion of API 5L Grade B steel is a common challenge in industries where the material is exposed to corrosive environments, such as saline solutions. To combat this issue, corrosion inhibitors are often used to protect the steel. This study explores the effectiveness of two inhibitors—Triethanolamine (TEA) and Cocamide DEA (CDEA)—in reducing corrosion on API 5L Grade B steel. By calculating the corrosion rate and inhibitor efficiency, we evaluated the protective properties of each substance. The results showed that TEA provided better corrosion protection, with a corrosion rate of 0.00045 mpy, compared to CDEA’s rate of 0.0009 mpy. Additionally, TEA demonstrated a higher inhibitor efficiency of 70.97%, while CDEA showed only 41.94%. These findings suggest that TEA is a more effective choice for preventing corrosion in API 5L Grade B steel, offering a viable solution to enhance the material’s durability in harsh environments.
Judul Paper: COMPARATIVE ANALYSIS OF WATER-BASED INHIBITORS CONTAINING CDEA AND TEA AGAINST API 5L GRADE B
Keyword: API 5L Grade B, Triethanolamine (TEA), Cocamide DEA (CDEA), Corrosion rate
Jurnal: J-ENSITEC (Journal of Engineering and Sustainable Technology)
